authors_text: Steeven Janny,Quentin Possamai,Laurent Bako,Madiha Nadri,Christian Wolf
title: Learning Reduced Nonlinear State-Space Models: an Output-Error Based Canonical Approach
title_zh: 学习简化的非线性状态空间模型：基于输出误差的规范方法
abstract: The identification of a nonlinear dynamic model is an open topic in control theory, especially from sparse input-output measurements. A fundamental challenge of this problem is that very few to zero prior knowledge is available on both the state and the nonlinear system model. To cope with this challenge, we investigate the effectiveness of deep learning in the modeling of dynamic systems with nonlinear behavior by advocating an approach which relies on three main ingredients: (i) we show that under some structural conditions on the to-be-identified model, the state can be expressed in function of a sequence of the past inputs and outputs; (ii) this relation which we call the state map can be modelled by resorting to the well-documented approximation power of deep neural networks; (iii) taking then advantage of existing learning schemes, a state-space model can be finally identified. After the formulation and analysis of the approach, we show its ability to identify three different nonlinear systems. The performances are evaluated in terms of open-loop prediction on test data generated in simulation as well as a real world data-set of unmanned aerial vehicle flight measurements.
summary: The identification of a nonlinear dynamic model is an open topic in control theory, especially from sparse input-output measurements. A fundamental challenge of this problem is that very few to zero prior knowledge is available on both the state and the nonlinear system model. To cope with this challenge, we investigate the effectiveness of deep learning in the modeling of dynamic systems with nonlinear behavior by advocating an approach which relies on three main ingredients: (i) we show that under some structural conditions on the to-be-identified model, the state can be expressed in function of a sequence of the past inputs and outputs; (ii) this relation which we call the state map can be modelled by resorting to the well-documented approximation power of deep neural networks; (iii) taking then advantage of existing learning schemes, a state-space model can be finally identified. After the formulation and analysis of the approach, we show its ability to identify three different nonlinear systems. The performances are evaluated in terms of open-loop prediction on test data generated in simulation as well as a real world data-set of unmanned aerial vehicle flight measurements.
abstract_zh: 非线性动态模型的识别是控制理论中的一个开放话题，尤其是稀疏输入输出测量。该问题的一个根本挑战是，状态模型和非线性系统模型的先验知识很少甚至为零。为了应对这一挑战，我们通过倡导一种依赖于三个主要成分的方法来研究深度学习在非线性行为动态系统建模中的有效性：（i）我们证明，在待识别模型的某些结构条件下，状态可以用过去输入和输出序列的函数来表示； （ii）我们称之为状态图的这种关系可以通过利用深度神经网络的有据可查的近似能力来建模； (iii)然后利用现有的学习方案，最终可以确定状态空间模型。在制定和分析该方法之后，我们展示了其识别三种不同非线性系统的能力。根据对模拟中生成的测试数据的开环预测以及无人机飞行测量的真实世界数据集来评估性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的非线性状态空间模型识别方法，通过输出误差准则从稀疏输入输出数据中建模动态系统。
AI.motivation: 非线性动态系统的建模在控制理论中存在挑战，尤其在缺乏先验知识且仅凭稀疏输入输出数据的情况下，传统方法难以有效识别系统状态与非线性特性。
AI.method: 提出三步方法：1) 在模型结构条件下，将状态表示为历史输入输出序列的函数；2) 利用深度神经网络的强大逼近能力建模该状态映射关系；3) 结合现有学习框架完成状态空间模型识别。
AI.result: 方法成功识别了三个不同非线性系统，在仿真数据和无人机飞行实测数据集上均表现出良好的开环预测性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为从稀疏数据中建模复杂非线性动态系统提供了有效途径，验证了深度学习在系统辨识中的潜力。

conclusion: 该方法为从稀疏数据中建模复杂非线性动态系统提供了有效途径，验证了深度学习在系统辨识中的潜力。
search_text: Learning Reduced Nonlinear State-Space Models: an Output-Error Based Canonical Approach 学习简化的非线性状态空间模型：基于输出误差的规范方法 The identification of a nonlinear dynamic model is an open topic in control theory, especially from sparse input-output measurements. A fundamental challenge of this problem is that very few to zero prior knowledge is available on both the state and the nonlinear system model. To cope with this challenge, we investigate the effectiveness of deep learning in the modeling of dynamic systems with nonlinear behavior by advocating an approach which relies on three main ingredients: (i) we show that under some structural conditions on the to-be-identified model, the state can be expressed in function of a sequence of the past inputs and outputs; (ii) this relation which we call the state map can be modelled by resorting to the well-documented approximation power of deep neural networks; (iii) taking then advantage of existing learning schemes, a state-space model can be finally identified. After the formulation and analysis of the approach, we show its ability to identify three different nonlinear systems. The performances are evaluated in terms of open-loop prediction on test data generated in simulation as well as a real world data-set of unmanned aerial vehicle flight measurements. 非线性动态模型的识别是控制理论中的一个开放话题，尤其是稀疏输入输出测量。该问题的一个根本挑战是，状态模型和非线性系统模型的先验知识很少甚至为零。为了应对这一挑战，我们通过倡导一种依赖于三个主要成分的方法来研究深度学习在非线性行为动态系统建模中的有效性：（i）我们证明，在待识别模型的某些结构条件下，状态可以用过去输入和输出序列的函数来表示； （ii）我们称之为状态图的这种关系可以通过利用深度神经网络的有据可查的近似能力来建模； (iii)然后利用现有的学习方案，最终可以确定状态空间模型。在制定和分析该方法之后，我们展示了其识别三种不同非线性系统的能力。根据对模拟中生成的测试数据的开环预测以及无人机飞行测量的真实世界数据集来评估性能。 本文提出一种基于深度学习的非线性状态空间模型识别方法，通过输出误差准则从稀疏输入输出数据中建模动态系统。 Steeven Janny,Quentin Possamai,Laurent Bako,Madiha Nadri,Christian Wolf eess.SY,cs.AI

authors_text: Shreyank N Gowda,Marcus Rohrbach,Frank Keller,Laura Sevilla-Lara
title: Learn2Augment: Learning to Composite Videos for Data Augmentation in Action Recognition
title_zh: Learn2Augment：学习合成视频以在动作识别中进行数据增强
abstract: We address the problem of data augmentation for video action recognition. Standard augmentation strategies in video are hand-designed and sample the space of possible augmented data points either at random, without knowing which augmented points will be better, or through heuristics. We propose to learn what makes a good video for action recognition and select only high-quality samples for augmentation. In particular, we choose video compositing of a foreground and a background video as the data augmentation process, which results in diverse and realistic new samples. We learn which pairs of videos to augment without having to actually composite them. This reduces the space of possible augmentations, which has two advantages: it saves computational cost and increases the accuracy of the final trained classifier, as the augmented pairs are of higher quality than average. We present experimental results on the entire spectrum of training settings: few-shot, semi-supervised and fully supervised. We observe consistent improvements across all of them over prior work and baselines on Kinetics, UCF101, HMDB51, and achieve a new state-of-the-art on settings with limited data. We see improvements of up to 8.6% in the semi-supervised setting.
summary: We address the problem of data augmentation for video action recognition. Standard augmentation strategies in video are hand-designed and sample the space of possible augmented data points either at random, without knowing which augmented points will be better, or through heuristics. We propose to learn what makes a good video for action recognition and select only high-quality samples for augmentation. In particular, we choose video compositing of a foreground and a background video as the data augmentation process, which results in diverse and realistic new samples. We learn which pairs of videos to augment without having to actually composite them. This reduces the space of possible augmentations, which has two advantages: it saves computational cost and increases the accuracy of the final trained classifier, as the augmented pairs are of higher quality than average. We present experimental results on the entire spectrum of training settings: few-shot, semi-supervised and fully supervised. We observe consistent improvements across all of them over prior work and baselines on Kinetics, UCF101, HMDB51, and achieve a new state-of-the-art on settings with limited data. We see improvements of up to 8.6% in the semi-supervised setting.
abstract_zh: 我们解决视频动作识别的数据增强问题。视频中的标准增强策略是手工设计的，并且在不知道哪些增强点更好的情况下随机采样可能的增强数据点的空间，或者通过启发式采样。我们建议了解什么是动作识别的好视频，并仅选择高质量的样本进行增强。特别是，我们选择前景和背景视频的视频合成作为数据增强过程，这会产生多样化且真实的新样本。我们了解要增强哪些视频对，而无需实际合成它们。这减少了可能的增强空间，这有两个优点：节省计算成本并提高最终训练分类器的准确性，因为增强对的质量高于平均水平。我们展示了整个训练设置范围的实验结果：少量训练、半监督和完全监督。我们观察到所有这些都比 Kinetics、UCF101、HMDB51 的先前工作和基线有了一致的改进，并在有限数据的设置上实现了新的最先进水平。我们发现半监督环境下的改进高达 8.6%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Learn2Augment的方法，通过学习组合前景和背景视频来生成高质量的数据增强样本，以提升动作识别任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统视频数据增强策略依赖手工设计或启发式方法，无法有效筛选高质量样本，导致计算成本高且效果有限。
AI.method: 通过学习选择高质量的视频对进行合成，无需实际生成所有可能的增强样本，从而减少计算量并提升分类器准确性。
AI.result: 在Kinetics、UCF101、HMDB51等数据集上，方法在少样本、半监督和全监督设置下均优于现有方法，半监督场景下提升高达8.6%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过智能筛选增强样本，显著提升了动作识别的性能，尤其在数据有限的情况下达到新状态-of-the-art水平。

authors_text: Jinman Park,Kimathi Kaai,Saad Hossain,Norikatsu Sumi,Sirisha Rambhatla,Paul Fieguth
title: Building Spatio-temporal Transformers for Egocentric 3D Pose Estimation
title_zh: 构建用于自我中心 3D 姿态估计的时空 Transformer
comment: 4 pages, Extended abstract, Joint International Workshop on Egocentric Perception, Interaction and Computing (EPIC) and Ego4D, IEEE/CVF Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition Conference (CVPR), 2022
comments: 4 pages, Extended abstract, Joint International Workshop on Egocentric Perception, Interaction and Computing (EPIC) and Ego4D, IEEE/CVF Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition Conference (CVPR), 2022
abstract: Egocentric 3D human pose estimation (HPE) from images is challenging due to severe self-occlusions and strong distortion introduced by the fish-eye view from the head mounted camera. Although existing works use intermediate heatmap-based representations to counter distortion with some success, addressing self-occlusion remains an open problem. In this work, we leverage information from past frames to guide our self-attention-based 3D HPE estimation procedure -- Ego-STAN. Specifically, we build a spatio-temporal Transformer model that attends to semantically rich convolutional neural network-based feature maps. We also propose feature map tokens: a new set of learnable parameters to attend to these feature maps. Finally, we demonstrate Ego-STAN's superior performance on the xR-EgoPose dataset where it achieves a 30.6% improvement on the overall mean per-joint position error, while leading to a 22% drop in parameters compared to the state-of-the-art.
summary: Egocentric 3D human pose estimation (HPE) from images is challenging due to severe self-occlusions and strong distortion introduced by the fish-eye view from the head mounted camera. Although existing works use intermediate heatmap-based representations to counter distortion with some success, addressing self-occlusion remains an open problem. In this work, we leverage information from past frames to guide our self-attention-based 3D HPE estimation procedure -- Ego-STAN. Specifically, we build a spatio-temporal Transformer model that attends to semantically rich convolutional neural network-based feature maps. We also propose feature map tokens: a new set of learnable parameters to attend to these feature maps. Finally, we demonstrate Ego-STAN's superior performance on the xR-EgoPose dataset where it achieves a 30.6% improvement on the overall mean per-joint position error, while leading to a 22% drop in parameters compared to the state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 由于严重的自遮挡和头戴式摄像头的鱼眼视图引入的强烈失真，从图像中进行以自我为中心的 3D 人体姿势估计 (HPE) 具有挑战性。尽管现有的工作使用基于中间热图的表示来对抗失真并取得了一些成功，但解决自遮挡仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。在这项工作中，我们利用过去帧中的信息来指导我们基于自注意力的 3D HPE 估计程序——Ego-STAN。具体来说，我们构建了一个时空 Transformer 模型，该模型关注语义丰富的基于卷积神经网络的特征图。我们还提出了特征图标记：一组新的可学习参数来处理这些特征图。最后，我们在 xR-EgoPose 数据集上展示了 Ego-STAN 的卓越性能，与最先进的技术相比，它的整体平均每关节位置误差提高了 30.6%，同时参数下降了 22%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于时空Transformer的模型Ego-STAN，用于解决第一视角下3D人体姿态估计中的自遮挡和鱼眼镜头畸变问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法虽通过热图表示缓解了鱼眼畸变，但对自遮挡问题仍缺乏有效解决方案，需利用时序信息辅助姿态估计。
AI.method: 构建时空Transformer模型，通过可学习的特征图标记（feature map tokens）处理卷积特征，并融合多帧时序信息进行自注意力机制计算。
AI.result: 在xR-EgoPose数据集上，整体平均关节位置误差降低30.6%，参数量较最先进方法减少22%。
AI.conclusion: Ego-STAN通过时空特征融合有效解决了第一视角3D姿态估计中的关键挑战，实现了性能与效率的平衡。

authors_text: Shehzeen Hussain,Todd Huster,Chris Mesterharm,Paarth Neekhara,Kevin An,Malhar Jere,Harshvardhan Sikka,Farinaz Koushanfar
title: ReFace: Real-time Adversarial Attacks on Face Recognition Systems
title_zh: ReFace：针对人脸识别系统的实时对抗性攻击
abstract: Deep neural network based face recognition models have been shown to be vulnerable to adversarial examples. However, many of the past attacks require the adversary to solve an input-dependent optimization problem using gradient descent which makes the attack impractical in real-time. These adversarial examples are also tightly coupled to the attacked model and are not as successful in transferring to different models. In this work, we propose ReFace, a real-time, highly-transferable attack on face recognition models based on Adversarial Transformation Networks (ATNs). ATNs model adversarial example generation as a feed-forward neural network. We find that the white-box attack success rate of a pure U-Net ATN falls substantially short of gradient-based attacks like PGD on large face recognition datasets. We therefore propose a new architecture for ATNs that closes this gap while maintaining a 10000x speedup over PGD. Furthermore, we find that at a given perturbation magnitude, our ATN adversarial perturbations are more effective in transferring to new face recognition models than PGD. ReFace attacks can successfully deceive commercial face recognition services in a transfer attack setting and reduce face identification accuracy from 82% to 16.4% for AWS SearchFaces API and Azure face verification accuracy from 91% to 50.1%.
summary: Deep neural network based face recognition models have been shown to be vulnerable to adversarial examples. However, many of the past attacks require the adversary to solve an input-dependent optimization problem using gradient descent which makes the attack impractical in real-time. These adversarial examples are also tightly coupled to the attacked model and are not as successful in transferring to different models. In this work, we propose ReFace, a real-time, highly-transferable attack on face recognition models based on Adversarial Transformation Networks (ATNs). ATNs model adversarial example generation as a feed-forward neural network. We find that the white-box attack success rate of a pure U-Net ATN falls substantially short of gradient-based attacks like PGD on large face recognition datasets. We therefore propose a new architecture for ATNs that closes this gap while maintaining a 10000x speedup over PGD. Furthermore, we find that at a given perturbation magnitude, our ATN adversarial perturbations are more effective in transferring to new face recognition models than PGD. ReFace attacks can successfully deceive commercial face recognition services in a transfer attack setting and reduce face identification accuracy from 82% to 16.4% for AWS SearchFaces API and Azure face verification accuracy from 91% to 50.1%.
abstract_zh: 基于深度神经网络的人脸识别模型已被证明容易受到对抗性例子的影响。然而，过去的许多攻击要求对手使用梯度下降来解决依赖于输入的优化问题，这使得实时攻击不切实际。这些对抗性示例也与受攻击模型紧密耦合，并且在转移到不同模型方面并不那么成功。在这项工作中，我们提出了 ReFace，这是一种基于对抗性转换网络（ATN）的针对人脸识别模型的实时、高度可转移的攻击。 ATN 将对抗性示例生成建模为前馈神经网络。我们发现，在大型人脸识别数据集上，纯 U-Net ATN 的白盒攻击成功率远远低于 PGD 等基于梯度的攻击。因此，我们提出了一种新的 ATN 架构，可以缩小这一差距，同时保持比 PGD 快 10000 倍的速度。此外，我们发现在给定的扰动幅度下，我们的 ATN 对抗性扰动在转移到新的人脸识别模型方面比 PGD 更有效。 ReFace 攻击可以在传输攻击设置中成功欺骗商业人脸识别服务，并将 AWS SearchFaces API 的人脸识别准确率从 82% 降低到 16.4%，Azure 人脸验证准确率从 91% 降低到 50.1%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ReFace，一种基于对抗变换网络（ATN）的实时且高度可迁移的面部识别系统对抗攻击方法。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗攻击方法依赖梯度下降优化，计算耗时且难以跨模型迁移，无法满足实时性需求。
AI.method: 设计改进的ATN架构，将对抗样本生成建模为前馈神经网络，替代传统梯度优化方法。
AI.result: 在相同扰动幅度下，ATN生成的对抗样本对新模型迁移成功率优于PGD，使商业面部识别服务准确率下降至16.4%-50.1%。
AI.conclusion: ReFace在保持10000倍加速的同时，实现了比基于梯度的方法更优的跨模型攻击效果。

search_text: ReFace: Real-time Adversarial Attacks on Face Recognition Systems ReFace：针对人脸识别系统的实时对抗性攻击 Deep neural network based face recognition models have been shown to be vulnerable to adversarial examples. However, many of the past attacks require the adversary to solve an input-dependent optimization problem using gradient descent which makes the attack impractical in real-time. These adversarial examples are also tightly coupled to the attacked model and are not as successful in transferring to different models. In this work, we propose ReFace, a real-time, highly-transferable attack on face recognition models based on Adversarial Transformation Networks (ATNs). ATNs model adversarial example generation as a feed-forward neural network. We find that the white-box attack success rate of a pure U-Net ATN falls substantially short of gradient-based attacks like PGD on large face recognition datasets. We therefore propose a new architecture for ATNs that closes this gap while maintaining a 10000x speedup over PGD. Furthermore, we find that at a given perturbation magnitude, our ATN adversarial perturbations are more effective in transferring to new face recognition models than PGD. ReFace attacks can successfully deceive commercial face recognition services in a transfer attack setting and reduce face identification accuracy from 82% to 16.4% for AWS SearchFaces API and Azure face verification accuracy from 91% to 50.1%. 基于深度神经网络的人脸识别模型已被证明容易受到对抗性例子的影响。然而，过去的许多攻击要求对手使用梯度下降来解决依赖于输入的优化问题，这使得实时攻击不切实际。这些对抗性示例也与受攻击模型紧密耦合，并且在转移到不同模型方面并不那么成功。在这项工作中，我们提出了 ReFace，这是一种基于对抗性转换网络（ATN）的针对人脸识别模型的实时、高度可转移的攻击。 ATN 将对抗性示例生成建模为前馈神经网络。我们发现，在大型人脸识别数据集上，纯 U-Net ATN 的白盒攻击成功率远远低于 PGD 等基于梯度的攻击。因此，我们提出了一种新的 ATN 架构，可以缩小这一差距，同时保持比 PGD 快 10000 倍的速度。此外，我们发现在给定的扰动幅度下，我们的 ATN 对抗性扰动在转移到新的人脸识别模型方面比 PGD 更有效。 ReFace 攻击可以在传输攻击设置中成功欺骗商业人脸识别服务，并将 AWS SearchFaces API 的人脸识别准确率从 82% 降低到 16.4%，Azure 人脸验证准确率从 91% 降低到 50.1%。 本文提出ReFace，一种基于对抗变换网络（ATN）的实时且高度可迁移的面部识别系统对抗攻击方法。 Shehzeen Hussain,Todd Huster,Chris Mesterharm,Paarth Neekhara,Kevin An,Malhar Jere,Harshvardhan Sikka,Farinaz Koushanfar cs.CV,cs.CR,cs.LG

authors_text: Kohei Suzuki,Shoki Sakamoto,Tadahiro Taniguchi,Hirokazu Kameoka
title: Speak Like a Dog: Human to Non-human creature Voice Conversion
title_zh: 像狗一样说话：人类到非人类生物的声音转换
abstract: This paper proposes a new voice conversion (VC) task from human speech to dog-like speech while preserving linguistic information as an example of human to non-human creature voice conversion (H2NH-VC) tasks. Although most VC studies deal with human to human VC, H2NH-VC aims to convert human speech into non-human creature-like speech. Non-parallel VC allows us to develop H2NH-VC, because we cannot collect a parallel dataset that non-human creatures speak human language. In this study, we propose to use dogs as an example of a non-human creature target domain and define the "speak like a dog" task. To clarify the possibilities and characteristics of the "speak like a dog" task, we conducted a comparative experiment using existing representative non-parallel VC methods in acoustic features (Mel-cepstral coefficients and Mel-spectrograms), network architectures (five different kernel-size settings), and training criteria (variational autoencoder (VAE)- based and generative adversarial network-based). Finally, the converted voices were evaluated using mean opinion scores: dog-likeness, sound quality and intelligibility, and character error rate (CER). The experiment showed that the employment of the Mel-spectrogram improved the dog-likeness of the converted speech, while it is challenging to preserve linguistic information. Challenges and limitations of the current VC methods for H2NH-VC are highlighted.
summary: This paper proposes a new voice conversion (VC) task from human speech to dog-like speech while preserving linguistic information as an example of human to non-human creature voice conversion (H2NH-VC) tasks. Although most VC studies deal with human to human VC, H2NH-VC aims to convert human speech into non-human creature-like speech. Non-parallel VC allows us to develop H2NH-VC, because we cannot collect a parallel dataset that non-human creatures speak human language. In this study, we propose to use dogs as an example of a non-human creature target domain and define the "speak like a dog" task. To clarify the possibilities and characteristics of the "speak like a dog" task, we conducted a comparative experiment using existing representative non-parallel VC methods in acoustic features (Mel-cepstral coefficients and Mel-spectrograms), network architectures (five different kernel-size settings), and training criteria (variational autoencoder (VAE)- based and generative adversarial network-based). Finally, the converted voices were evaluated using mean opinion scores: dog-likeness, sound quality and intelligibility, and character error rate (CER). The experiment showed that the employment of the Mel-spectrogram improved the dog-likeness of the converted speech, while it is challenging to preserve linguistic information. Challenges and limitations of the current VC methods for H2NH-VC are highlighted.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新的语音转换（VC）任务，从人类语音到类狗语音，同时保留语言信息，作为人类到非人类生物语音转换（H2NH-VC）任务的示例。尽管大多数 VC 研究涉及人与人之间的 VC，但 H2NH-VC 的目标是将人类语音转换为类非人类生物的语音。非并行 VC 允许我们开发 H2NH-VC，因为我们无法收集非人类生物讲人类语言的并行数据集。在本研究中，我们建议使用狗作为非人类生物目标域的示例，并定义“像狗一样说话”任务。为了阐明“像狗一样说话”任务的可能性和特征，我们使用现有的代表性非并行 VC 方法在声学特征（梅尔倒谱系数和梅尔谱图）、网络架构（五种不同的内核大小设置）和训练标准（基于变分自动编码器（VAE）和基于生成对抗网络）方面进行了比较实验。最后，使用平均意见评分来评估转换后的声音：狗的相似度、声音质量和清晰度以及字符错误率（CER）。实验表明，梅尔谱图的使用提高了转换后的语音的狗相似度，但保留语言信息具有挑战性。强调了当前 H2NH-VC VC 方法的挑战和局限性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型语音转换任务，将人类语音转换为犬类语音（即‘像狗一样说话’），并探讨了人类到非人类生物语音转换（H2NH-VC）的可行性。
AI.motivation: 传统语音转换（VC）主要针对人类之间，但H2NH-VC因无法获取非人类生物的平行语料而面临挑战。本文旨在通过非平行VC方法，探索将人类语音转换为犬类语音的可能性。
AI.method: 以犬类为目标领域，采用非平行VC方法，对比不同声学特征（梅尔倒谱系数与梅尔频谱图）、网络架构（五种卷积核设置）及训练准则（VAE与GAN），并通过MOS评分、字符错误率（CER）等指标评估转换效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，使用梅尔频谱图可提升转换语音的犬类相似度，但保留语言信息存在困难。现有VC方法在H2NH-VC任务中仍面临显著挑战。
AI.conclusion: 非平行VC方法为H2NH-VC提供了可能，但需进一步优化以平衡语音动物化与语言信息保留的矛盾。

authors_text: Cong Lu,Philip J. Ball,Tim G. J. Rudner,Jack Parker-Holder,Michael A. Osborne,Yee Whye Teh
title: Challenges and Opportunities in Offline Reinforcement Learning from Visual Observations
title_zh: 视觉观察离线强化学习的挑战和机遇
abstract: Offline reinforcement learning has shown great promise in leveraging large pre-collected datasets for policy learning, allowing agents to forgo often-expensive online data collection. However, offline reinforcement learning from visual observations with continuous action spaces remains under-explored, with a limited understanding of the key challenges in this complex domain. In this paper, we establish simple baselines for continuous control in the visual domain and introduce a suite of benchmarking tasks for offline reinforcement learning from visual observations designed to better represent the data distributions present in real-world offline RL problems and guided by a set of desiderata for offline RL from visual observations, including robustness to visual distractions and visually identifiable changes in dynamics. Using this suite of benchmarking tasks, we show that simple modifications to two popular vision-based online reinforcement learning algorithms, DreamerV2 and DrQ-v2, suffice to outperform existing offline RL methods and establish competitive baselines for continuous control in the visual domain. We rigorously evaluate these algorithms and perform an empirical evaluation of the differences between state-of-the-art model-based and model-free offline RL methods for continuous control from visual observations. All code and data used in this evaluation are open-sourced to facilitate progress in this domain.
summary: Offline reinforcement learning has shown great promise in leveraging large pre-collected datasets for policy learning, allowing agents to forgo often-expensive online data collection. However, offline reinforcement learning from visual observations with continuous action spaces remains under-explored, with a limited understanding of the key challenges in this complex domain. In this paper, we establish simple baselines for continuous control in the visual domain and introduce a suite of benchmarking tasks for offline reinforcement learning from visual observations designed to better represent the data distributions present in real-world offline RL problems and guided by a set of desiderata for offline RL from visual observations, including robustness to visual distractions and visually identifiable changes in dynamics. Using this suite of benchmarking tasks, we show that simple modifications to two popular vision-based online reinforcement learning algorithms, DreamerV2 and DrQ-v2, suffice to outperform existing offline RL methods and establish competitive baselines for continuous control in the visual domain. We rigorously evaluate these algorithms and perform an empirical evaluation of the differences between state-of-the-art model-based and model-free offline RL methods for continuous control from visual observations. All code and data used in this evaluation are open-sourced to facilitate progress in this domain.
abstract_zh: 离线强化学习在利用大量预先收集的数据集进行策略学习方面显示出了巨大的前景，使代理能够放弃通常昂贵的在线数据收集。然而，通过连续动作空间的视觉观察进行的离线强化学习仍未得到充分探索，对这个复杂领域的关键挑战的理解有限。在本文中，我们为视觉领域的连续控制建立了简单的基线，并引入了一套基于视觉观察的离线强化学习的基准测试任务，旨在更好地表示现实世界离线强化学习问题中存在的数据分布，并以一组基于视觉观察的离线强化学习的需求为指导，包括对视觉干扰的鲁棒性和视觉上可识别的动态变化。使用这套基准测试任务，我们表明，对两种流行的基于视觉的在线强化学习算法 DreamerV2 和 DrQ-v2 进行简单修改，足以超越现有的离线 RL 方法，并为视觉领域的连续控制建立竞争基线。我们严格评估这些算法，并对最先进的基于模型和无模型的离线强化学习方法之间的差异进行实证评估，以通过视觉观察进行连续控制。本次评估中使用的所有代码和数据都是开源的，以促进该领域的进展。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过建立视觉领域的简单基线和设计基准任务，推动从视觉观察中进行离线强化学习的研究，并比较不同方法的性能差异。
AI.motivation: 尽管离线强化学习在利用预收集数据方面有潜力，但在视觉观察和连续动作空间的挑战和机遇尚未被充分探索，缺乏对关键问题的系统性研究。
AI.method: 通过改进两种流行的视觉在线RL算法（DreamerV2和DrQ-v2），并构建符合现实世界数据分布的视觉基准任务，进行系统评估和比较。
AI.result: 实验表明，改进后的算法在视觉连续控制任务中优于现有离线RL方法，并揭示了模型基与无模型方法在性能上的差异。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过开源代码和数据，为视觉离线RL的研究提供了标准化的基准，促进了该领域的发展。

search_text: Challenges and Opportunities in Offline Reinforcement Learning from Visual Observations 视觉观察离线强化学习的挑战和机遇 Offline reinforcement learning has shown great promise in leveraging large pre-collected datasets for policy learning, allowing agents to forgo often-expensive online data collection. However, offline reinforcement learning from visual observations with continuous action spaces remains under-explored, with a limited understanding of the key challenges in this complex domain. In this paper, we establish simple baselines for continuous control in the visual domain and introduce a suite of benchmarking tasks for offline reinforcement learning from visual observations designed to better represent the data distributions present in real-world offline RL problems and guided by a set of desiderata for offline RL from visual observations, including robustness to visual distractions and visually identifiable changes in dynamics. Using this suite of benchmarking tasks, we show that simple modifications to two popular vision-based online reinforcement learning algorithms, DreamerV2 and DrQ-v2, suffice to outperform existing offline RL methods and establish competitive baselines for continuous control in the visual domain. We rigorously evaluate these algorithms and perform an empirical evaluation of the differences between state-of-the-art model-based and model-free offline RL methods for continuous control from visual observations. All code and data used in this evaluation are open-sourced to facilitate progress in this domain. 离线强化学习在利用大量预先收集的数据集进行策略学习方面显示出了巨大的前景，使代理能够放弃通常昂贵的在线数据收集。然而，通过连续动作空间的视觉观察进行的离线强化学习仍未得到充分探索，对这个复杂领域的关键挑战的理解有限。在本文中，我们为视觉领域的连续控制建立了简单的基线，并引入了一套基于视觉观察的离线强化学习的基准测试任务，旨在更好地表示现实世界离线强化学习问题中存在的数据分布，并以一组基于视觉观察的离线强化学习的需求为指导，包括对视觉干扰的鲁棒性和视觉上可识别的动态变化。使用这套基准测试任务，我们表明，对两种流行的基于视觉的在线强化学习算法 DreamerV2 和 DrQ-v2 进行简单修改，足以超越现有的离线 RL 方法，并为视觉领域的连续控制建立竞争基线。我们严格评估这些算法，并对最先进的基于模型和无模型的离线强化学习方法之间的差异进行实证评估，以通过视觉观察进行连续控制。本次评估中使用的所有代码和数据都是开源的，以促进该领域的进展。 本文旨在通过建立视觉领域的简单基线和设计基准任务，推动从视觉观察中进行离线强化学习的研究，并比较不同方法的性能差异。 Cong Lu,Philip J. authors_text: Robin Chan,Radin Dardashti,Meike Osinski,Matthias Rottmann,Dominik Brüggemann,Cilia Rücker,Peter Schlicht,Fabian Hüger,Nikol Rummel,Hanno Gottschalk
title: What should AI see? Using the Public's Opinion to Determine the Perception of an AI
title_zh: 人工智能应该看到什么？利用公众的意见来确定人工智能的看法
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNN) have made impressive progress in the interpretation of image data, so that it is conceivable and to some degree realistic to use them in safety critical applications like automated driving. From an ethical standpoint, the AI algorithm should take into account the vulnerability of objects or subjects on the street that ranges from "not at all", e.g. the road itself, to "high vulnerability" of pedestrians. One way to take this into account is to define the cost of confusion of one semantic category with another and use cost-based decision rules for the interpretation of probabilities, which are the output of DNNs. However, it is an open problem how to define the cost structure, who should be in charge to do that, and thereby define what AI-algorithms will actually "see". As one possible answer, we follow a participatory approach and set up an online survey to ask the public to define the cost structure. We present the survey design and the data acquired along with an evaluation that also distinguishes between perspective (car passenger vs. external traffic participant) and gender. Using simulation based $F$-tests, we find highly significant differences between the groups. These differences have consequences on the reliable detection of pedestrians in a safety critical distance to the self-driving car. We discuss the ethical problems that are related to this approach and also discuss the problems emerging from human-machine interaction through the survey from a psychological point of view. Finally, we include comments from industry leaders in the field of AI safety on the applicability of survey based elements in the design of AI functionalities in automated driving.
summary: Deep neural networks (DNN) have made impressive progress in the interpretation of image data, so that it is conceivable and to some degree realistic to use them in safety critical applications like automated driving. From an ethical standpoint, the AI algorithm should take into account the vulnerability of objects or subjects on the street that ranges from "not at all", e.g. the road itself, to "high vulnerability" of pedestrians. One way to take this into account is to define the cost of confusion of one semantic category with another and use cost-based decision rules for the interpretation of probabilities, which are the output of DNNs. However, it is an open problem how to define the cost structure, who should be in charge to do that, and thereby define what AI-algorithms will actually "see". As one possible answer, we follow a participatory approach and set up an online survey to ask the public to define the cost structure. We present the survey design and the data acquired along with an evaluation that also distinguishes between perspective (car passenger vs. external traffic participant) and gender. Using simulation based $F$-tests, we find highly significant differences between the groups. These differences have consequences on the reliable detection of pedestrians in a safety critical distance to the self-driving car. We discuss the ethical problems that are related to this approach and also discuss the problems emerging from human-machine interaction through the survey from a psychological point of view. Finally, we include comments from industry leaders in the field of AI safety on the applicability of survey based elements in the design of AI functionalities in automated driving.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）在图像数据的解释方面取得了令人瞩目的进展，因此将它们用于自动驾驶等安全关键应用是可以想象的，并且在某种程度上是现实的。从道德角度来看，人工智能算法应该考虑街道上物体或主体的脆弱性，范围从“完全不”，例如道路本身对行人来说是“高度脆弱的”。考虑到这一点的一种方法是定义一种语义类别与另一种语义类别的混淆成本，并使用基于成本的决策规则来解释概率（DNN 的输出）。然而，如何定义成本结构、谁应该负责定义成本结构，从而定义人工智能算法实际“看到”的内容，仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。作为一个可能的答案，我们遵循参与式方法并开展在线调查，要求公众定义成本结构。我们介绍了调查设计和获得的数据以及评估，该评估还区分了观点（汽车乘客与外部交通参与者）和性别。使用基于模拟的 $F$ 测试，我们发现各组之间存在高度显着的差异。这些差异会对自动驾驶汽车安全关键距离内的行人的可靠检测产生影响。我们讨论了与这种方法相关的伦理问题，并从心理学的角度讨论了通过调查产生的人机交互问题。最后，我们纳入了人工智能安全领域的行业领导者对基于调查的元素在自动驾驶人工智能功能设计中的适用性的评论。

AI.tldr: 本文通过公众意见确定AI在自动驾驶等安全关键应用中应如何感知环境。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在图像识别中取得进展，但如何定义AI对不同对象的脆弱性成本结构仍存在伦理争议，需考虑公众视角差异对安全决策的影响。
AI.method: 设计在线调查收集公众对成本结构的判断，通过模拟F检验分析不同视角（乘客vs.外部参与者）和性别间的差异。
AI.result: 发现群体间存在显著差异，影响自动驾驶车辆对临界距离内行人检测的可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 公众参与可为AI伦理设计提供依据，但需权衡人类心理因素与技术实现的复杂性，行业领袖建议谨慎应用调查结果。

authors_text: Tianyi Lin,Michael. I. Jordan
title: A Continuous-Time Perspective on Global Acceleration for Monotone Equation Problems
title_zh: 单调方程问题全局加速的连续时间视角
comment: Accepted by Communications in Optimization Theory; 29 Pages; Fix the inaccurate statement in Remark 2.7 and some typos
comments: Accepted by Communications in Optimization Theory; 29 Pages; Fix the inaccurate statement in Remark 2.7 and some typos
abstract: We propose a new framework to design and analyze accelerated methods that solve general monotone equation (ME) problems $F(x)=0$. Traditional approaches include generalized steepest descent methods and inexact Newton-type methods. If $F$ is uniformly monotone and twice differentiable, these methods achieve local convergence rates while the latter methods are globally convergent thanks to line search and hyperplane projection. However, a global rate is unknown for these methods. The variational inequality methods can be applied to yield a global rate that is expressed in terms of $\|F(x)\|$ but these results are restricted to first-order methods and a Lipschitz continuous operator. It has not been clear how to obtain global acceleration using high-order Lipschitz continuity. This paper takes a continuous-time perspective where accelerated methods are viewed as the discretization of dynamical systems. Our contribution is to propose accelerated rescaled gradient systems and prove that they are equivalent to closed-loop control systems. Based on this connection, we establish the properties of solution trajectories. Moreover, we provide a unified algorithmic framework obtained from discretization of our system, which together with two approximation subroutines yields both existing high-order methods and new first-order methods. We prove that the $p^{th}$-order method achieves a global rate of $O(k^{-p/2})$ in terms of $\|F(x)\|$ if $F$ is $p^{th}$-order Lipschitz continuous and the first-order method achieves the same rate if $F$ is $p^{th}$-order strongly Lipschitz continuous. If $F$ is strongly monotone, the restarted versions achieve local convergence with order $p$ when $p \geq 2$. Our discrete-time analysis is largely motivated by the continuous-time analysis and demonstrates the fundamental role that rescaled gradients play in global acceleration for solving ME problems.

Moreover, we provide a unified algorithmic framework obtained from discretization of our system, which together with two approximation subroutines yields both existing high-order methods and new first-order methods. We prove that the $p^{th}$-order method achieves a global rate of $O(k^{-p/2})$ in terms of $\|F(x)\|$ if $F$ is $p^{th}$-order Lipschitz continuous and the first-order method achieves the same rate if $F$ is $p^{th}$-order strongly Lipschitz continuous. If $F$ is strongly monotone, the restarted versions achieve local convergence with order $p$ when $p \geq 2$. Our discrete-time analysis is largely motivated by the continuous-time analysis and demonstrates the fundamental role that rescaled gradients play in global acceleration for solving ME problems.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个新的框架来设计和分析解决一般单调方程（ME）问题$F(x)=0$的加速方法。传统方法包括广义最速下降法和不精确牛顿型方法。如果 $F$ 一致单调且可二次微分，则这些方法实现局部收敛速度，而后者的方法由于线搜索和超平面投影而全局收敛。然而，这些方法的总体比率未知。变分不等式方法可用于产生以 $\|F(x)\|$ 表示的全局速率，但这些结果仅限于一阶方法和 Lipschitz 连续算子。目前尚不清楚如何利用高阶 Lipschitz 连续性获得全局加速度。本文采用连续时间的视角，其中加速方法被视为动力系统的离散化。我们的贡献是提出加速重新缩放梯度系统并证明它们相当于闭环控制系统。基于这种联系，我们建立了解轨迹的属性。此外，我们提供了一个通过系统离散化获得的统一算法框架，它与两个近似子例程一起产生现有的高阶方法和新的一阶方法。我们证明，如果 $F$ 是 $p^{th}$ 阶 Lipschitz 连续，则 $p^{th}$ 阶方法可以达到 $O(k^{-p/2})$ 的全局速率，并且如果 $F$ 是 $p^{th}$ 阶强 Lipschitz 连续，则一阶方法可以达到相同的速率。如果 $F$ 是强单调的，则当 $p \geq 2$ 时，重新启动的版本会实现阶数 $p$ 的局部收敛。我们的离散时间分析很大程度上是由连续时间分析推动的，并证明了重新调整梯度在解决 ME 问题的全局加速中所发挥的基本作用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新框架，通过连续时间视角设计加速方法，解决单调方程问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在全局收敛率和高阶Lipschitz连续性下的加速机制尚不明确，需探索更高效的算法框架。
AI.method: 将加速方法视为动力系统的离散化，提出加速重标度梯度系统，并建立其与闭环控制系统的等价性。
AI.result: 证明了p阶方法在p阶Lipschitz连续条件下可达到全局速率O(k^{-p/2})，强单调情况下重启版本具有p阶局部收敛性。
AI.conclusion: 连续时间分析揭示了重标度梯度在全局加速中的核心作用，为离散算法设计提供了理论基础。

search_text: A Continuous-Time Perspective on Global Acceleration for Monotone Equation Problems 单调方程问题全局加速的连续时间视角 We propose a new framework to design and analyze accelerated methods that solve general monotone equation (ME) problems $F(x)=0$. Traditional approaches include generalized steepest descent methods and inexact Newton-type methods. If $F$ is uniformly monotone and twice differentiable, these methods achieve local convergence rates while the latter methods are globally convergent thanks to line search and hyperplane projection. However, a global rate is unknown for these methods. The variational inequality methods can be applied to yield a global rate that is expressed in terms of $\|F(x)\|$ but these results are restricted to first-order methods and a Lipschitz continuous operator. It has not been clear how to obtain global acceleration using high-order Lipschitz continuity. This paper takes a continuous-time perspective where accelerated methods are viewed as the discretization of dynamical systems. Our contribution is to propose accelerated rescaled gradient systems and prove that they are equivalent to closed-loop control systems. Based on this connection, we establish the properties of solution trajectories. Moreover, we provide a unified algorithmic framework obtained from discretization of our system, which together with two approximation subroutines yields both existing high-order methods and new first-order methods. We prove that the $p^{th}$-order method achieves a global rate of $O(k^{-p/2})$ in terms of $\|F(x)\|$ if $F$ is $p^{th}$-order Lipschitz continuous and the first-order method achieves the same rate if $F$ is $p^{th}$-order strongly Lipschitz continuous. If $F$ is strongly monotone, the restarted versions achieve local convergence with order $p$ when $p \geq 2$. Our discrete-time analysis is largely motivated by the continuous-time analysis and demonstrates the fundamental role that rescaled gradients play in global acceleration for solving ME problems. 我们提出了一个新的框架来设计和分析解决一般单调方程（ME）问题$F(x)=0$的加速方法。传统方法包括广义最速下降法和不精确牛顿型方法。如果 $F$ 一致单调且可二次微分，则这些方法实现局部收敛速度，而后者的方法由于线搜索和超平面投影而全局收敛。然而，这些方法的总体比率未知。变分不等式方法可用于产生以 $\|F(x)\|$ 表示的全局速率，但这些结果仅限于一阶方法和 Lipschitz 连续算子。目前尚不清楚如何利用高阶 Lipschitz 连续性获得全局加速度。本文采用连续时间的视角，其中加速方法被视为动力系统的离散化。我们的贡献是提出加速重新缩放梯度系统并证明它们相当于闭环控制系统。基于这种联系，我们建立了解轨迹的属性。此外，我们提供了一个通过系统离散化获得的统一算法框架，它与两个近似子例程一起产生现有的高阶方法和新的一阶方法。我们证明，如果 $F$ 是 $p^{th}$ 阶 Lipschitz 连续，则 $p^{th}$ 阶方法可以达到 $O(k^{-p/2})$ 的全局速率，并且如果 $F$ 是 $p^{th}$ 阶强 Lipschitz 连续，则一阶方法可以达到相同的速率。如果 $F$ 是强单调的，则当 $p \geq 2$ 时，重新启动的版本会实现阶数 $p$ 的局部收敛。我们的离散时间分析很大程度上是由连续时间分析推动的，并证明了重新调整梯度在解决 ME 问题的全局加速中所发挥的基本作用。 本文提出了一种新框架，通过连续时间视角设计加速方法，解决单调方程问题。 Tianyi Lin,Michael. I. Jordan math.OC,cs.CC,cs.DS

authors_text: Benjamin Elizalde,Soham Deshmukh,Mahmoud Al Ismail,Huaming Wang
title: CLAP: Learning Audio Concepts From Natural Language Supervision
title_zh: CLAP：从自然语言监督中学习音频概念
abstract: Mainstream Audio Analytics models are trained to learn under the paradigm of one class label to many recordings focusing on one task. Learning under such restricted supervision limits the flexibility of models because they require labeled audio for training and can only predict the predefined categories. Instead, we propose to learn audio concepts from natural language supervision. We call our approach Contrastive Language-Audio Pretraining (CLAP), which learns to connect language and audio by using two encoders and a contrastive learning to bring audio and text descriptions into a joint multimodal space. We trained CLAP with 128k audio and text pairs and evaluated it on 16 downstream tasks across 8 domains, such as Sound Event Classification, Music tasks, and Speech-related tasks. Although CLAP was trained with significantly less pairs than similar computer vision models, it establishes SoTA for Zero-Shot performance. Additionally, we evaluated CLAP in a supervised learning setup and achieve SoTA in 5 tasks. Hence, CLAP's Zero-Shot capability removes the need of training with class labels, enables flexible class prediction at inference time, and generalizes to multiple downstream tasks.
summary: Mainstream Audio Analytics models are trained to learn under the paradigm of one class label to many recordings focusing on one task. Learning under such restricted supervision limits the flexibility of models because they require labeled audio for training and can only predict the predefined categories. Instead, we propose to learn audio concepts from natural language supervision. We call our approach Contrastive Language-Audio Pretraining (CLAP), which learns to connect language and audio by using two encoders and a contrastive learning to bring audio and text descriptions into a joint multimodal space. We trained CLAP with 128k audio and text pairs and evaluated it on 16 downstream tasks across 8 domains, such as Sound Event Classification, Music tasks, and Speech-related tasks. Although CLAP was trained with significantly less pairs than similar computer vision models, it establishes SoTA for Zero-Shot performance. Additionally, we evaluated CLAP in a supervised learning setup and achieve SoTA in 5 tasks. Hence, CLAP's Zero-Shot capability removes the need of training with class labels, enables flexible class prediction at inference time, and generalizes to multiple downstream tasks.
abstract_zh: 主流音频分析模型经过训练，可以在针对一项任务的多个录音的一类标签范式下进行学习。在这种受限监督下的学习限制了模型的灵活性，因为它们需要标记音频进行训练并且只能预测预定义的类别。相反，我们建议从自然语言监督中学习音频概念。我们将我们的方法称为对比语言音频预训练（CLAP），它通过使用两个编码器和对比学习来学习连接语言和音频，将音频和文本描述带入联合多模态空间。我们使用 128k 音频和文本对训练 CLAP，并在 8 个领域的 16 个下游任务上对其进行评估，例如声音事件分类、音乐任务和语音相关任务。尽管 CLAP 的训练对数明显少于类似的计算机视觉模型，但它为零样本性能建立了 SoTA。此外，我们在监督学习设置中评估了 CLAP，并在 5 项任务中实现了 SoTA。因此，CLAP 的零样本功能消除了使用类标签进行训练的需要，在推理时实现灵活的类预测，并推广到多个下游任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CLAP方法，通过自然语言监督学习音频概念，实现跨模态对齐。
AI.motivation: 传统音频模型依赖标注数据和预定义类别，灵活性受限。CLAP通过自然语言监督提升模型泛化能力与预测灵活性。
AI.method: 采用对比语言-音频预训练（CLAP），利用两个编码器和对比学习，将音频与文本描述映射到联合多模态空间，训练数据包含128k音频-文本对。
AI.result: 在8个领域16个下游任务中，CLAP在零样本场景下达到SOTA，且在监督学习设置下5个任务中表现最佳。
AI.conclusion: CLAP通过零样本能力摆脱标注依赖，支持灵活分类并泛化至多任务，显著优于传统方法。

authors_text: Leilani Battle,Alvitta Ottley
title: What Do We Mean When We Say "Insight"? A Formal Synthesis of Existing Theory
title_zh: 当我们说“洞察力”时，我们指的是什么？现有理论的正式综合
abstract: Researchers have derived many theoretical models for specifying users' insights as they interact with a visualization system. These representations are essential for understanding the insight discovery process, such as when inferring user interaction patterns that lead to insight or assessing the rigor of reported insights. However, theoretical models can be difficult to apply to existing tools and user studies, often due to discrepancies in how insight and its constituent parts are defined. This paper calls attention to the consistent structures that recur across the visualization literature and describes how they connect multiple theoretical representations of insight. We synthesize a unified formalism for insights using these structures, enabling a wider audience of researchers and developers to adopt the corresponding models. Through a series of theoretical case studies, we use our formalism to compare and contrast existing theories, revealing interesting research challenges in reasoning about a user's domain knowledge and leveraging synergistic approaches in data mining and data management research.
summary: Researchers have derived many theoretical models for specifying users' insights as they interact with a visualization system. These representations are essential for understanding the insight discovery process, such as when inferring user interaction patterns that lead to insight or assessing the rigor of reported insights. However, theoretical models can be difficult to apply to existing tools and user studies, often due to discrepancies in how insight and its constituent parts are defined. This paper calls attention to the consistent structures that recur across the visualization literature and describes how they connect multiple theoretical representations of insight. We synthesize a unified formalism for insights using these structures, enabling a wider audience of researchers and developers to adopt the corresponding models. Through a series of theoretical case studies, we use our formalism to compare and contrast existing theories, revealing interesting research challenges in reasoning about a user's domain knowledge and leveraging synergistic approaches in data mining and data management research.
abstract_zh: 研究人员得出了许多理论模型，用于指定用户在与可视化系统交互时的见解。这些表示对于理解洞察发现过程至关重要，例如在推断导致洞察的用户交互模式或评估报告的洞察的严谨性时。然而，理论模型可能很难应用于现有的工具和用户研究，这通常是由于洞察力及其组成部分的定义方式存在差异。本文呼吁人们关注可视化文献中重复出现的一致结构，并描述它们如何连接洞察力的多种理论表示。我们使用这些结构综合了统一的形式来获得见解，使更广泛的研究人员和开发人员能够采用相应的模型。通过一系列理论案例研究，我们使用形式主义来比较和对比现有理论，揭示在推理用户领域知识以及利用数据挖掘和数据管理研究中的协同方法方面有趣的研究挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在整合可视化领域关于用户洞察力的现有理论，建立统一的形式化框架以解决定义不一致导致的应用难题。
AI.motivation: 现有洞察力理论模型因定义差异难以应用于实际工具和用户研究，需通过统一框架促进理论比较与实践应用。
AI.method: 通过分析可视化文献中的共性结构，构建形式化统一模型，并利用理论案例研究对比现有理论差异。
AI.result: 提出统一的形式化洞察力框架，揭示用户领域知识推理及数据挖掘与管理协同方法的研究挑战。
AI.conclusion: 形式化框架为理论应用提供新途径，同时指出需进一步探索用户知识建模与跨领域方法协同的创新方向。

search_text: What Do We Mean When We Say "Insight"? A Formal Synthesis of Existing Theory 当我们说“洞察力”时，我们指的是什么？现有理论的正式综合 Researchers have derived many theoretical models for specifying users' insights as they interact with a visualization system. These representations are essential for understanding the insight discovery process, such as when inferring user interaction patterns that lead to insight or assessing the rigor of reported insights. However, theoretical models can be difficult to apply to existing tools and user studies, often due to discrepancies in how insight and its constituent parts are defined. This paper calls attention to the consistent structures that recur across the visualization literature and describes how they connect multiple theoretical representations of insight. We synthesize a unified formalism for insights using these structures, enabling a wider audience of researchers and developers to adopt the corresponding models. Through a series of theoretical case studies, we use our formalism to compare and contrast existing theories, revealing interesting research challenges in reasoning about a user's domain knowledge and leveraging synergistic approaches in data mining and data management research. 研究人员得出了许多理论模型，用于指定用户在与可视化系统交互时的见解。这些表示对于理解洞察发现过程至关重要，例如在推断导致洞察的用户交互模式或评估报告的洞察的严谨性时。然而，理论模型可能很难应用于现有的工具和用户研究，这通常是由于洞察力及其组成部分的定义方式存在差异。本文呼吁人们关注可视化文献中重复出现的一致结构，并描述它们如何连接洞察力的多种理论表示。我们使用这些结构综合了统一的形式来获得见解，使更广泛的研究人员和开发人员能够采用相应的模型。通过一系列理论案例研究，我们使用形式主义来比较和对比现有理论，揭示在推理用户领域知识以及利用数据挖掘和数据管理研究中的协同方法方面有趣的研究挑战。 本文旨在整合可视化领域关于用户洞察力的现有理论，建立统一的形式化框架以解决定义不一致导致的应用难题。 Leilani Battle,Alvitta Ottley cs.HC

authors_text: Tianlong Chen,Zhenyu Zhang,Sijia Liu,Yang Zhang,Shiyu Chang,Zhangyang Wang
title: Data-Efficient Double-Win Lottery Tickets from Robust Pre-training
title_zh: 强大的预训练带来数据高效的双赢彩票
abstract: Pre-training serves as a broadly adopted starting point for transfer learning on various downstream tasks. Recent investigations of lottery tickets hypothesis (LTH) demonstrate such enormous pre-trained models can be replaced by extremely sparse subnetworks (a.k.a. matching subnetworks) without sacrificing transferability. However, practical security-crucial applications usually pose more challenging requirements beyond standard transfer, which also demand these subnetworks to overcome adversarial vulnerability. In this paper, we formulate a more rigorous concept, Double-Win Lottery Tickets, in which a located subnetwork from a pre-trained model can be independently transferred on diverse downstream tasks, to reach BOTH the same standard and robust generalization, under BOTH standard and adversarial training regimes, as the full pre-trained model can do. We comprehensively examine various pre-training mechanisms and find that robust pre-training tends to craft sparser double-win lottery tickets with superior performance over the standard counterparts. For example, on downstream CIFAR-10/100 datasets, we identify double-win matching subnetworks with the standard, fast adversarial, and adversarial pre-training from ImageNet, at 89.26%/73.79%, 89.26%/79.03%, and 91.41%/83.22% sparsity, respectively. Furthermore, we observe the obtained double-win lottery tickets can be more data-efficient to transfer, under practical data-limited (e.g., 1% and 10%) downstream schemes. Our results show that the benefits from robust pre-training are amplified by the lottery ticket scheme, as well as the data-limited transfer setting. Codes are available at https://github.com/VITA-Group/Double-Win-LTH.
summary: Pre-training serves as a broadly adopted starting point for transfer learning on various downstream tasks. Recent investigations of lottery tickets hypothesis (LTH) demonstrate such enormous pre-trained models can be replaced by extremely sparse subnetworks (a.k.a. matching subnetworks) without sacrificing transferability. However, practical security-crucial applications usually pose more challenging requirements beyond standard transfer, which also demand these subnetworks to overcome adversarial vulnerability. In this paper, we formulate a more rigorous concept, Double-Win Lottery Tickets, in which a located subnetwork from a pre-trained model can be independently transferred on diverse downstream tasks, to reach BOTH the same standard and robust generalization, under BOTH standard and adversarial training regimes, as the full pre-trained model can do. We comprehensively examine various pre-training mechanisms and find that robust pre-training tends to craft sparser double-win lottery tickets with superior performance over the standard counterparts. For example, on downstream CIFAR-10/100 datasets, we identify double-win matching subnetworks with the standard, fast adversarial, and adversarial pre-training from ImageNet, at 89.26%/73.79%, 89.26%/79.03%, and 91.41%/83.22% sparsity, respectively. Furthermore, we observe the obtained double-win lottery tickets can be more data-efficient to transfer, under practical data-limited (e.g., 1% and 10%) downstream schemes. Our results show that the benefits from robust pre-training are amplified by the lottery ticket scheme, as well as the data-limited transfer setting. Codes are available at https://github.com/VITA-Group/Double-Win-LTH.
abstract_zh: 预训练是各种下游任务的迁移学习广泛采用的起点。最近对彩票假设（LTH）的研究表明，如此巨大的预训练模型可以被极其稀疏的子网络（又称匹配子网络）取代，而不会牺牲可转移性。然而，实际的安全关键应用程序通常会提出比标准传输更具挑战性的要求，这也要求这些子网络克服对抗性漏洞。在本文中，我们提出了一个更严格的概念，即双赢彩票，其中预训练模型中的定位子网络可以独立地转移到不同的下游任务上，以在标准和对抗训练制度下达到相同的标准和鲁棒的泛化，就像完整的预训练模型可以做到的那样。我们全面检查了各种预训练机制，发现强大的预训练往往会制作出比标准彩票性能更优异的稀疏双赢彩票。例如，在下游 CIFAR-10/100 数据集上，我们通过 ImageNet 的标准、快速对抗和对抗预训练识别出双赢匹配子网络，稀疏度分别为 89.26%/73.79%、89.26%/79.03% 和 91.41%/83.22%。此外，我们观察到，在实际数据有限（例如 1% 和 10%）的下游方案下，所获得的双赢彩票的传输数据效率更高。我们的结果表明，彩票计划以及数据有限的传输设置放大了强大的预训练的好处。代码可在 https://github.com/VITA-Group/Double-Win-LTH 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Double-Win Lottery Tickets的新型稀疏子网络，能够在标准和对抗训练环境下同时实现与完整预训练模型相当的泛化性能。
AI.motivation: 现有彩票假设研究未考虑对抗鲁棒性，而安全关键应用需要子网络同时具备标准任务性能和对抗攻击防御能力。
AI.method: 通过严格定义双赢彩票票据概念，系统研究不同预训练机制，发现鲁棒预训练能生成更稀疏且性能优越的子网络，并在CIFAR-10/100数据集验证其有效性。
AI.result: 在ImageNet预训练基础上，识别出标准/快速对抗/对抗预训练的双赢子网络，稀疏度分别达89.26%/73.79%、89.26%/79.03%、91.41%/83.22%，且在数据受限场景下表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 鲁棒预训练与彩票假设结合可显著提升数据效率和对抗鲁棒性，为安全关键应用提供高效模型压缩方案。

authors_text: Jinkun Cao,Ruiqian Nai,Qing Yang,Jialei Huang,Yang Gao
title: An Empirical Study on Disentanglement of Negative-free Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 无否定对比学习解缠的实证研究
comment: Accepted to NeurIPS 2022; 10 pages main text + 15 pages appendix
comments: Accepted to NeurIPS 2022; 10 pages main text + 15 pages appendix
abstract: Negative-free contrastive learning methods have attracted a lot of attention with simplicity and impressive performances for large-scale pretraining. However, its disentanglement property remains unexplored. In this paper, we examine negative-free contrastive learning methods to study the disentanglement property empirically. We find that existing disentanglement metrics fail to make meaningful measurements for high-dimensional representation models, so we propose a new disentanglement metric based on Mutual Information between latent representations and data factors. With this proposed metric, we benchmark the disentanglement property of negative-free contrastive learning on both popular synthetic datasets and a real-world dataset CelebA. Our study shows that the investigated methods can learn a well-disentangled subset of representation. As far as we know, we are the first to extend the study of disentangled representation learning to high-dimensional representation space and introduce negative-free contrastive learning methods into this area. The source code of this paper is available at \url{https://github.com/noahcao/disentanglement_lib_med}.
summary: Negative-free contrastive learning methods have attracted a lot of attention with simplicity and impressive performances for large-scale pretraining. However, its disentanglement property remains unexplored. In this paper, we examine negative-free contrastive learning methods to study the disentanglement property empirically. We find that existing disentanglement metrics fail to make meaningful measurements for high-dimensional representation models, so we propose a new disentanglement metric based on Mutual Information between latent representations and data factors. With this proposed metric, we benchmark the disentanglement property of negative-free contrastive learning on both popular synthetic datasets and a real-world dataset CelebA. Our study shows that the investigated methods can learn a well-disentangled subset of representation. As far as we know, we are the first to extend the study of disentangled representation learning to high-dimensional representation space and introduce negative-free contrastive learning methods into this area. The source code of this paper is available at \url{https://github.com/noahcao/disentanglement_lib_med}.
abstract_zh: 无负对比学习方法因其简单性和大规模预训练的令人印象深刻的性能而引起了广泛关注。然而，其解缠结特性仍未得到探索。在本文中，我们研究了无负对比学习方法，以实证研究解缠结属性。我们发现现有的解开度量无法对高维表示模型进行有意义的测量，因此我们提出了一种基于潜在表示和数据因子之间的互信息的新解开度量。通过这个提出的指标，我们在流行的合成数据集和现实世界数据集 CelebA 上对无负对比学习的解缠特性进行了基准测试。我们的研究表明，所研究的方法可以学习一个很好解开的表示子集。据我们所知，我们是第一个将解纠缠表示学习的研究扩展到高维表示空间，并将无负对比学习方法引入该领域的人。本文的源代码可在 \url{https://github.com/noahcao/disentanglement_lib_med} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文通过实证研究探讨无负样本对比学习方法在高维表示空间中的解耦性质。
AI.motivation: 现有解耦度量方法无法有效评估高维表示模型，而无负样本对比学习的解耦特性尚未被研究。
AI.method: 提出基于潜在表示与数据因子互信息的新解耦度量指标，并在合成数据集和CelebA数据集上进行基准测试。
AI.result: 验证了无负样本对比学习方法能够学习到具有良好解耦性质的表示子集。
AI.conclusion: 首次将解耦表示学习研究扩展至高维空间，并将无负样本对比学习引入该领域。

search_text: An Empirical Study on Disentanglement of Negative-free Contrastive Learning 无否定对比学习解缠的实证研究 Negative-free contrastive learning methods have attracted a lot of attention with simplicity and impressive performances for large-scale pretraining. However, its disentanglement property remains unexplored. In this paper, we examine negative-free contrastive learning methods to study the disentanglement property empirically. We find that existing disentanglement metrics fail to make meaningful measurements for high-dimensional representation models, so we propose a new disentanglement metric based on Mutual Information between latent representations and data factors. With this proposed metric, we benchmark the disentanglement property of negative-free contrastive learning on both popular synthetic datasets and a real-world dataset CelebA. Our study shows that the investigated methods can learn a well-disentangled subset of representation. As far as we know, we are the first to extend the study of disentangled representation learning to high-dimensional representation space and introduce negative-free contrastive learning methods into this area. The source code of this paper is available at \url{https://github.com/noahcao/disentanglement_lib_med}. 无负对比学习方法因其简单性和大规模预训练的令人印象深刻的性能而引起了广泛关注。然而，其解缠结特性仍未得到探索。在本文中，我们研究了无负对比学习方法，以实证研究解缠结属性。我们发现现有的解开度量无法对高维表示模型进行有意义的测量，因此我们提出了一种基于潜在表示和数据因子之间的互信息的新解开度量。通过这个提出的指标，我们在流行的合成数据集和现实世界数据集 CelebA 上对无负对比学习的解缠特性进行了基准测试。我们的研究表明，所研究的方法可以学习一个很好解开的表示子集。据我们所知，我们是第一个将解纠缠表示学习的研究扩展到高维表示空间，并将无负对比学习方法引入该领域的人。本文的源代码可在 \url{https://github.com/noahcao/disentanglement_lib_med} 获取。 本文通过实证研究探讨无负样本对比学习方法在高维表示空间中的解耦性质。 Jinkun Cao,Ruiqian Nai,Qing Yang,Jialei Huang,Yang Gao cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Jiafei Lyu,Xiaoteng Ma,Xiu Li,Zongqing Lu
title: Mildly Conservative Q-Learning for Offline Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 用于离线强化学习的轻度保守 Q-Learning
abstract: Offline reinforcement learning (RL) defines the task of learning from a static logged dataset without continually interacting with the environment. The distribution shift between the learned policy and the behavior policy makes it necessary for the value function to stay conservative such that out-of-distribution (OOD) actions will not be severely overestimated. However, existing approaches, penalizing the unseen actions or regularizing with the behavior policy, are too pessimistic, which suppresses the generalization of the value function and hinders the performance improvement. This paper explores mild but enough conservatism for offline learning while not harming generalization. We propose Mildly Conservative Q-learning (MCQ), where OOD actions are actively trained by assigning them proper pseudo Q values. We theoretically show that MCQ induces a policy that behaves at least as well as the behavior policy and no erroneous overestimation will occur for OOD actions. Experimental results on the D4RL benchmarks demonstrate that MCQ achieves remarkable performance compared with prior work. Furthermore, MCQ shows superior generalization ability when transferring from offline to online, and significantly outperforms baselines. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/dmksjfl/MCQ.
summary: Offline reinforcement learning (RL) defines the task of learning from a static logged dataset without continually interacting with the environment. The distribution shift between the learned policy and the behavior policy makes it necessary for the value function to stay conservative such that out-of-distribution (OOD) actions will not be severely overestimated. However, existing approaches, penalizing the unseen actions or regularizing with the behavior policy, are too pessimistic, which suppresses the generalization of the value function and hinders the performance improvement. This paper explores mild but enough conservatism for offline learning while not harming generalization. We propose Mildly Conservative Q-learning (MCQ), where OOD actions are actively trained by assigning them proper pseudo Q values. We theoretically show that MCQ induces a policy that behaves at least as well as the behavior policy and no erroneous overestimation will occur for OOD actions. Experimental results on the D4RL benchmarks demonstrate that MCQ achieves remarkable performance compared with prior work. Furthermore, MCQ shows superior generalization ability when transferring from offline to online, and significantly outperforms baselines. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/dmksjfl/MCQ.
abstract_zh: 离线强化学习（RL）定义了从静态记录数据集中学习而不与环境持续交互的任务。学习策略和行为策略之间的分布转变使得价值函数有必要保持保守，这样分布外（OOD）行为就不会被严重高估。然而，现有的方法，即惩罚未见的行为或用行为策略进行正则化，过于悲观，抑制了价值函数的泛化并阻碍了绩效的提高。本文探讨了离线学习的温和但足够的保守性，同时又不损害泛化能力。我们提出了轻度保守 Q 学习（MCQ），其中 OOD 动作通过分配适当的伪 Q 值来主动训练。我们从理论上证明，MCQ 会产生一个至少与行为策略一样好的策略，并且 OOD 操作不会发生错误的高估。 D4RL 基准测试的实验结果表明，与之前的工作相比，MCQ 取得了显着的性能。此外，MCQ 在从离线转移到在线时表现出优异的泛化能力，并且显着优于基线。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/dmksjfl/MCQ 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MCQ的离线强化学习方法，通过适度保守的Q学习策略解决分布偏移问题，提升策略性能和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有离线强化学习方法因过度悲观的保守策略导致价值函数泛化能力受限，无法有效处理分布外动作的过估计问题。
AI.method: 提出MCQ算法，通过为分布外动作分配合理伪Q值进行主动训练，理论证明其策略表现不低于行为策略且不会出现分布外动作的错误过估计。
AI.result: 在D4RL基准测试中，MCQ相较先前方法表现出显著性能提升，并在离线到在线迁移中展现更强的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: MCQ通过平衡保守性与泛化性，有效解决了离线强化学习中的分布偏移问题，为后续研究提供了新思路。

authors_text: Kiev Gama,George Valença,Pedro Alessio,Rafael Formiga,André Neves,Nycolas Lacerda
title: The Developers' Design Thinking Toolbox in Hackathons: A Study on the Recurring Design Methods in Software Development Marathons
title_zh: 黑客马拉松中开发者的设计思维工具箱：软件开发马拉松中重复设计方法的研究
comment: To be published in the International Journal of Human-Computer Interaction (Taylor and Francis)
comments: To be published in the International Journal of Human-Computer Interaction (Taylor and Francis)
abstract: Hackathons are time-bounded collaborative events of intense teamwork to build prototypes usually in the form of software, aiming to specific challenges proposed by the organizers. These events became a widespread practice in the IT industry, universities and many other scenarios, as a result of a growing open-innovation trend in the last decade. Since the main deliverable of these events is a demonstrable version of an idea, such as early hardware or software prototypes, the short time frame requires participants to quickly understand the proposed challenge or even identify issues related to a given domain. To create solutions, teams follow an ad-hoc but effective design approach, that many times seems informal since the background of the participants is rather centered on technical aspects (e.g., web and mobile programming) and does not involve any training in Design Thinking. To understand this creative process, we conducted 37 interviews (32 hackathons winners and 5 hackathon organizers) with people from 16 countries. We aimed to identify the design processes and recurring design methods applied by winners in these events. Also, we conducted a focus group with 8 people experienced in hackathons (participants and organizers) to discuss our findings. Our analysis revealed that although hackathon winners with IT background have no formal training on Design Thinking, they are aware of many design methods, typically following a sequence of phases that involve divergent and convergent thinking to explore the problem space and propose alternatives in a solution space, which is the rationale behind Design Thinking. We derived a set of recommendations based on design strategies that seem to lead to successful hackathon participation. These recommendations can also be useful to organizers who intend to enhance the experience of newcomers in hackathons.
summary: Hackathons are time-bounded collaborative events of intense teamwork to build prototypes usually in the form of software, aiming to specific challenges proposed by the organizers. These events became a widespread practice in the IT industry, universities and many other scenarios, as a result of a growing open-innovation trend in the last decade. Since the main deliverable of these events is a demonstrable version of an idea, such as early hardware or software prototypes, the short time frame requires participants to quickly understand the proposed challenge or even identify issues related to a given domain. To create solutions, teams follow an ad-hoc but effective design approach, that many times seems informal since the background of the participants is rather centered on technical aspects (e.g., web and mobile programming) and does not involve any training in Design Thinking. To understand this creative process, we conducted 37 interviews (32 hackathons winners and 5 hackathon organizers) with people from 16 countries. We aimed to identify the design processes and recurring design methods applied by winners in these events. Also, we conducted a focus group with 8 people experienced in hackathons (participants and organizers) to discuss our findings. Our analysis revealed that although hackathon winners with IT background have no formal training on Design Thinking, they are aware of many design methods, typically following a sequence of phases that involve divergent and convergent thinking to explore the problem space and propose alternatives in a solution space, which is the rationale behind Design Thinking. We derived a set of recommendations based on design strategies that seem to lead to successful hackathon participation. These recommendations can also be useful to organizers who intend to enhance the experience of newcomers in hackathons.
abstract_zh: 黑客马拉松是有时间限制的激烈团队合作活动，通常以软件的形式构建原型，旨在应对组织者提出的特定挑战。由于过去十年开放创新趋势不断发展，这些活动已成为 IT 行业、大学和许多其他场景中的普遍做法。由于这些活动的主要交付成果是一个想法的可演示版本，例如早期的硬件或软件原型，因此在短时间内要求参与者快速理解所提出的挑战，甚至识别与给定领域相关的问题。为了创建解决方案，团队遵循一种临时但有效的设计方法，这种方法很多时候似乎是非正式的，因为参与者的背景主要集中在技术方面（例如网络和移动编程），并且不涉及任何设计思维方面的培训。为了了解这个创作过程，我们对来自 16 个国家的人们进行了 37 次采访（32 名黑客马拉松获胜者和 5 名黑客马拉松组织者）。我们的目的是确定获胜者在这些活动中应用的设计流程和重复设计方法。此外，我们还组织了由 8 名具有黑客马拉松经验的人（参与者和组织者）组成的焦点小组来讨论我们的发现。我们的分析显示，虽然具有 IT 背景的黑客马拉松获胜者没有接受过设计思维的正式培训，但他们知道许多设计方法，通常遵循一系列涉及发散和聚合思维的阶段来探索问题空间并在解决方案空间中提出替代方案，这就是设计思维背后的基本原理。我们根据设计策略得出了一系列建议，这些建议似乎有助于成功参与黑客马拉松。这些建议对于想要增强黑客马拉松新手体验的组织者也很有用。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了黑客松中开发者使用的重复设计方法，分析其设计思维过程。
AI.motivation: 黑客松参与者通常缺乏设计思维训练，但能快速产出解决方案，需探索其背后的设计策略。
AI.method: 通过37次访谈（32名获奖者和5名组织者）及8人焦点小组讨论，分析设计流程与方法。
AI.result: 发现获奖者虽无正式设计思维训练，但会自发应用发散与收敛思维阶段，符合设计思维框架。
AI.conclusion: 总结出提升黑客松表现的设计策略，为组织者优化新人体验提供参考。

Our analysis revealed that although hackathon winners with IT background have no formal training on Design Thinking, they are aware of many design methods, typically following a sequence of phases that involve divergent and convergent thinking to explore the problem space and propose alternatives in a solution space, which is the rationale behind Design Thinking. We derived a set of recommendations based on design strategies that seem to lead to successful hackathon participation. These recommendations can also be useful to organizers who intend to enhance the experience of newcomers in hackathons. 黑客马拉松是有时间限制的激烈团队合作活动，通常以软件的形式构建原型，旨在应对组织者提出的特定挑战。由于过去十年开放创新趋势不断发展，这些活动已成为 IT 行业、大学和许多其他场景中的普遍做法。由于这些活动的主要交付成果是一个想法的可演示版本，例如早期的硬件或软件原型，因此在短时间内要求参与者快速理解所提出的挑战，甚至识别与给定领域相关的问题。为了创建解决方案，团队遵循一种临时但有效的设计方法，这种方法很多时候似乎是非正式的，因为参与者的背景主要集中在技术方面（例如网络和移动编程），并且不涉及任何设计思维方面的培训。为了了解这个创作过程，我们对来自 16 个国家的人们进行了 37 次采访（32 名黑客马拉松获胜者和 5 名黑客马拉松组织者）。我们的目的是确定获胜者在这些活动中应用的设计流程和重复设计方法。此外，我们还组织了由 8 名具有黑客马拉松经验的人（参与者和组织者）组成的焦点小组来讨论我们的发现。我们的分析显示，虽然具有 IT 背景的黑客马拉松获胜者没有接受过设计思维的正式培训，但他们知道许多设计方法，通常遵循一系列涉及发散和聚合思维的阶段来探索问题空间并在解决方案空间中提出替代方案，这就是设计思维背后的基本原理。我们根据设计策略得出了一系列建议，这些建议似乎有助于成功参与黑客马拉松。这些建议对于想要增强黑客马拉松新手体验的组织者也很有用。 本文研究了黑客松中开发者使用的重复设计方法，分析其设计思维过程。 Kiev Gama,George Valença,Pedro Alessio,Rafael Formiga,André Neves,Nycolas Lacerda cs.SE,cs.HC

authors_text: Jieming Bian,Jie Xu
title: Accelerating Asynchronous Federated Learning Convergence via Opportunistic Mobile Relaying
title_zh: 通过机会移动中继加速异步联邦学习融合
abstract: This paper presents a study on asynchronous Federated Learning (FL) in a mobile network setting. The majority of FL algorithms assume that communication between clients and the server is always available, however, this is not the case in many real-world systems. To address this issue, the paper explores the impact of mobility on the convergence performance of asynchronous FL. By exploiting mobility, the study shows that clients can indirectly communicate with the server through another client serving as a relay, creating additional communication opportunities. This enables clients to upload local model updates sooner or receive fresher global models. We propose a new FL algorithm, called FedMobile, that incorporates opportunistic relaying and addresses key questions such as when and how to relay. We prove that FedMobile achieves a convergence rate $O(\frac{1}{\sqrt{NT}})$, where $N$ is the number of clients and $T$ is the number of communication slots, and show that the optimal design involves an interesting trade-off on the best timing of relaying. The paper also presents an extension that considers data manipulation before relaying to reduce the cost and enhance privacy. Experiment results on a synthetic dataset and two real-world datasets verify our theoretical findings.
summary: This paper presents a study on asynchronous Federated Learning (FL) in a mobile network setting. The majority of FL algorithms assume that communication between clients and the server is always available, however, this is not the case in many real-world systems. To address this issue, the paper explores the impact of mobility on the convergence performance of asynchronous FL. By exploiting mobility, the study shows that clients can indirectly communicate with the server through another client serving as a relay, creating additional communication opportunities. This enables clients to upload local model updates sooner or receive fresher global models. We propose a new FL algorithm, called FedMobile, that incorporates opportunistic relaying and addresses key questions such as when and how to relay. We prove that FedMobile achieves a convergence rate $O(\frac{1}{\sqrt{NT}})$, where $N$ is the number of clients and $T$ is the number of communication slots, and show that the optimal design involves an interesting trade-off on the best timing of relaying. The paper also presents an extension that considers data manipulation before relaying to reduce the cost and enhance privacy. Experiment results on a synthetic dataset and two real-world datasets verify our theoretical findings.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了移动网络环境中异步联邦学习（FL）的研究。大多数 FL 算法都假设客户端和服务器之间的通信始终可用，但是，在许多实际系统中情况并非如此。为了解决这个问题，本文探讨了移动性对异步 FL 收敛性能的影响。通过利用移动性，研究表明客户端可以通过充当中继的另一个客户端间接与服务器通信，从而创造额外的通信机会。这使客户能够更快地上传本地模型更新或接收更新的全球模型。我们提出了一种新的 FL 算法，称为 FedMobile，它结合了机会中继并解决了诸如何时以及如何中继等关键问题。我们证明 FedMobile 实现了收敛率 $O(\frac{1}{\sqrt{NT}})$，其中 $N$ 是客户端数量，$T$ 是通信时隙数量，并表明最佳设计涉及最佳中继时间的有趣权衡。该论文还提出了一种扩展，在转发之前考虑数据操作，以降低成本并增强隐私。合成数据集和两个现实世界数据集的实验结果验证了我们的理论发现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为FedMobile的新算法，通过机会主义移动中继技术加速异步联邦学习的收敛过程。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦学习算法假设客户端与服务器通信始终可用，但实际移动网络中常存在通信中断问题，需探索利用移动性提升异步FL性能的方案。
AI.method: 设计FedMobile算法，通过客户端间机会主义中继实现间接通信，解决中继时机与方式问题，并证明收敛率O(1/√(NT))。扩展部分增加数据预处理以降低通信成本并增强隐私。
AI.result: 在合成数据集和两个真实数据集上的实验验证了FedMobile的收敛性能优于基准算法，理论分析与实验结果一致。
AI.conclusion: FedMobile通过优化中继时机平衡通信效率与模型更新时效性，有效提升异步FL收敛速度，数据预处理扩展进一步增强了隐私保护与通信效率。

authors_text: Amy de Castro,Paul Kuberry,Irina Tezaur,Pavel Bochev
title: A Novel Partitioned Approach for Reduced Order Model -- Finite Element Model (ROM-FEM) and ROM-ROM Coupling
title_zh: 一种新颖的降阶模型划分方法——有限元模型(ROM-FEM)和ROM-ROM耦合
abstract: Partitioned methods allow one to build a simulation capability for coupled problems by reusing existing single-component codes. In so doing, partitioned methods can shorten code development and validation times for multiphysics and multiscale applications. In this work, we consider a scenario in which one or more of the "codes" being coupled are projection-based reduced order models (ROMs), introduced to lower the computational cost associated with a particular component. We simulate this scenario by considering a model interface problem that is discretized independently on two non-overlapping subdomains. We then formulate a partitioned scheme for this problem that allows the coupling between a ROM "code" for one of the subdomains with a finite element model (FEM) or ROM "code" for the other subdomain. The ROM "codes" are constructed by performing proper orthogonal decomposition (POD) on a snapshot ensemble to obtain a low-dimensional reduced order basis, followed by a Galerkin projection onto this basis. The ROM and/or FEM "codes" on each subdomain are then coupled using a Lagrange multiplier representing the interface flux. To partition the resulting monolithic problem, we first eliminate the flux through a dual Schur complement. Application of an explicit time integration scheme to the transformed monolithic problem decouples the subdomain equations, allowing their independent solution for the next time step. We show numerical results that demonstrate the proposed method's efficacy in achieving both ROM-FEM and ROM-ROM coupling.
summary: Partitioned methods allow one to build a simulation capability for coupled problems by reusing existing single-component codes. In so doing, partitioned methods can shorten code development and validation times for multiphysics and multiscale applications. In this work, we consider a scenario in which one or more of the "codes" being coupled are projection-based reduced order models (ROMs), introduced to lower the computational cost associated with a particular component. We simulate this scenario by considering a model interface problem that is discretized independently on two non-overlapping subdomains. We then formulate a partitioned scheme for this problem that allows the coupling between a ROM "code" for one of the subdomains with a finite element model (FEM) or ROM "code" for the other subdomain. The ROM "codes" are constructed by performing proper orthogonal decomposition (POD) on a snapshot ensemble to obtain a low-dimensional reduced order basis, followed by a Galerkin projection onto this basis. The ROM and/or FEM "codes" on each subdomain are then coupled using a Lagrange multiplier representing the interface flux. To partition the resulting monolithic problem, we first eliminate the flux through a dual Schur complement. Application of an explicit time integration scheme to the transformed monolithic problem decouples the subdomain equations, allowing their independent solution for the next time step. We show numerical results that demonstrate the proposed method's efficacy in achieving both ROM-FEM and ROM-ROM coupling.
abstract_zh: 分区方法允许人们通过重用现有的单组件代码来构建耦合问题的模拟能力。这样做，分区方法可以缩短多物理场和多尺度应用的代码开发和验证时间。在这项工作中，我们考虑一种场景，其中耦合的一个或多个“代码”是基于投影的降阶模型（ROM），引入该模型是为了降低与特定组件相关的计算成本。我们通过考虑在两个不重叠的子域上独立离散的模型接口问题来模拟这种情况。然后，我们针对这个问题制定了一个分区方案，该方案允许一个子域的 ROM“代码”与另一个子域的有限元模型 (FEM) 或 ROM“代码”之间的耦合。 ROM“代码”是通过对快照系综执行适当的正交分解（POD）以获得低维降阶基础，然后在此基础上进行伽辽金投影来构建的。然后使用代表界面通量的拉格朗日乘数来耦合每个子域上的 ROM 和/或 FEM“代码”。为了划分由此产生的整体问题，我们首先通过对偶 Schur 补来消除通量。对转换后的整体问题应用显式时间积分方案可以解耦子域方程，从而为下一个时间步骤提供独立的解。我们展示的数值结果证明了所提出的方法在实现 ROM-FEM 和 ROM-ROM 耦合方面的功效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的分区方法，实现降阶模型（ROM）与有限元模型（FEM）以及ROM-ROM之间的耦合。
AI.motivation: 传统多物理场仿真需要开发复杂耦合代码，而ROM可降低计算成本，但如何有效实现ROM与FEM或其他ROM的耦合仍具挑战性。
AI.method: 通过POD提取低维基底并Galerkin投影构建ROM，利用拉格朗日乘数处理子域界面通量，结合Schur补消去通量后采用显式时间积分解耦方程。
AI.result: 数值实验验证了该方法在ROM-FEM和ROM-ROM耦合中的有效性，证明其能准确且高效地处理多子域耦合问题。
AI.conclusion: 提出的分区方法为多物理场和多尺度仿真提供了高效耦合框架，兼具ROM的计算优势与分区方法的灵活性。

We show numerical results that demonstrate the proposed method's efficacy in achieving both ROM-FEM and ROM-ROM coupling. 分区方法允许人们通过重用现有的单组件代码来构建耦合问题的模拟能力。这样做，分区方法可以缩短多物理场和多尺度应用的代码开发和验证时间。在这项工作中，我们考虑一种场景，其中耦合的一个或多个“代码”是基于投影的降阶模型（ROM），引入该模型是为了降低与特定组件相关的计算成本。我们通过考虑在两个不重叠的子域上独立离散的模型接口问题来模拟这种情况。然后，我们针对这个问题制定了一个分区方案，该方案允许一个子域的 ROM“代码”与另一个子域的有限元模型 (FEM) 或 ROM“代码”之间的耦合。 ROM“代码”是通过对快照系综执行适当的正交分解（POD）以获得低维降阶基础，然后在此基础上进行伽辽金投影来构建的。然后使用代表界面通量的拉格朗日乘数来耦合每个子域上的 ROM 和/或 FEM“代码”。为了划分由此产生的整体问题，我们首先通过对偶 Schur 补来消除通量。对转换后的整体问题应用显式时间积分方案可以解耦子域方程，从而为下一个时间步骤提供独立的解。我们展示的数值结果证明了所提出的方法在实现 ROM-FEM 和 ROM-ROM 耦合方面的功效。 本文提出一种新的分区方法，实现降阶模型（ROM）与有限元模型（FEM）以及ROM-ROM之间的耦合。 Amy de Castro,Paul Kuberry,Irina Tezaur,Pavel Bochev math.NA,cs.DS,cs.LG,physics.comp-ph

authors_text: Dimitrios Kollias,Anastasios Arsenos,Stefanos Kollias
title: AI-MIA: COVID-19 Detection & Severity Analysis through Medical Imaging
title_zh: AI-MIA：通过医学成像进行 COVID-19 检测和严重程度分析
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2106.07524
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2106.07524
abstract: This paper presents the baseline approach for the organized 2nd Covid-19 Competition, occurring in the framework of the AIMIA Workshop in the European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV 2022). It presents the COV19-CT-DB database which is annotated for COVID-19 detction, consisting of about 7,700 3-D CT scans. Part of the database consisting of Covid-19 cases is further annotated in terms of four Covid-19 severity conditions. We have split the database and the latter part of it in training, validation and test datasets. The former two datasets are used for training and validation of machine learning models, while the latter will be used for evaluation of the developed models. The baseline approach consists of a deep learning approach, based on a CNN-RNN network and report its performance on the COVID19-CT-DB database.
summary: This paper presents the baseline approach for the organized 2nd Covid-19 Competition, occurring in the framework of the AIMIA Workshop in the European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV 2022). It presents the COV19-CT-DB database which is annotated for COVID-19 detction, consisting of about 7,700 3-D CT scans. Part of the database consisting of Covid-19 cases is further annotated in terms of four Covid-19 severity conditions. We have split the database and the latter part of it in training, validation and test datasets. The former two datasets are used for training and validation of machine learning models, while the latter will be used for evaluation of the developed models. The baseline approach consists of a deep learning approach, based on a CNN-RNN network and report its performance on the COVID19-CT-DB database.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了有组织的第二届 Covid-19 竞赛的基线方法，该竞赛是在欧洲计算机视觉会议 (ECCV 2022) 的 AIMIA 研讨会框架内进行的。它提供了 COV19-CT-DB 数据库，该数据库针对 COVID-19 检测进行了注释，由约 7,700 个 3-D CT 扫描组成。由 Covid-19 病例组成的数据库的一部分进一步根据四种 Covid-19 严重程度进行注释。我们将数据库及其后半部分分为训练数据集、验证数据集和测试数据集。前两个数据集用于机器学习模型的训练和验证，而后者将用于评估已开发的模型。基线方法由基于 CNN-RNN 网络的深度学习方法组成，并在 COVID19-CT-DB 数据库上报告其性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的医学影像分析方法，用于检测COVID-19及评估其严重程度。
AI.motivation: 为应对新冠疫情，需要高效准确的医学影像分析工具以辅助诊断和病情评估。
AI.method: 采用CNN-RNN网络架构，结合标注的CT扫描数据库（COV19-CT-DB）进行模型训练与验证。
AI.result: 在包含7,700例3D CT扫描的数据集上验证了模型性能，部分数据用于严重程度分级评估。
AI.conclusion: 该基线方法为后续研究提供了参考，未来可进一步优化模型以提高检测精度和临床适用性。
