authors_text: Riadh Ben Chaabene,Darine Amayed,Mohamed Cheriet
title: Leveraging Centric Data Federated Learning Using Blockchain For Integrity Assurance
title_zh: 利用区块链的 Centric 数据联合学习来保证完整性
comment: Published at International Workshop on Trustable, Verifiable and Auditable Federated Learning in Conjunction with AAAI 2022 (FL-AAAI-22) https://federated-learning.org/fl-aaai-2022/
comments: Published at International Workshop on Trustable, Verifiable and Auditable Federated Learning in Conjunction with AAAI 2022 (FL-AAAI-22) https://federated-learning.org/fl-aaai-2022/
abstract: Machine learning abilities have become a vital component for various solutions across industries, applications, and sectors. Many organizations seek to leverage AI-based solutions across their business services to unlock better efficiency and increase productivity. Problems, however, can arise if there is a lack of quality data for AI-model training, scalability, and maintenance. We propose a data-centric federated learning architecture leveraged by a public blockchain and smart contracts to overcome this significant issue. Our proposed solution provides a virtual public marketplace where developers, data scientists, and AI-engineer can publish their models and collaboratively create and access quality data for training. We enhance data quality and integrity through an incentive mechanism that rewards contributors for data contribution and verification. Those combined with the proposed framework helped increase with only one user simulation the training dataset with an average of 100 input daily and the model accuracy by approximately 4\%.
summary: Machine learning abilities have become a vital component for various solutions across industries, applications, and sectors. Many organizations seek to leverage AI-based solutions across their business services to unlock better efficiency and increase productivity. Problems, however, can arise if there is a lack of quality data for AI-model training, scalability, and maintenance. We propose a data-centric federated learning architecture leveraged by a public blockchain and smart contracts to overcome this significant issue. Our proposed solution provides a virtual public marketplace where developers, data scientists, and AI-engineer can publish their models and collaboratively create and access quality data for training. We enhance data quality and integrity through an incentive mechanism that rewards contributors for data contribution and verification. Those combined with the proposed framework helped increase with only one user simulation the training dataset with an average of 100 input daily and the model accuracy by approximately 4\%.
abstract_zh: 机器学习能力已成为跨行业、应用程序和部门的各种解决方案的重要组成部分。许多组织寻求在其业务服务中利用基于人工智能的解决方案来提高效率和生产力。然而，如果缺乏用于人工智能模型训练、可扩展性和维护的高质量数据，就会出现问题。我们提出了一种以数据为中心的联合学习架构，利用公共区块链和智能合约来克服这一重大问题。我们提出的解决方案提供了一个虚拟公共市场，开发人员、数据科学家和人工智能工程师可以在其中发布他们的模型并协作创建和访问用于培训的高质量数据。我们通过奖励贡献者数据贡献和验证的激励机制来提高数据质量和完整性。这些与所提出的框架相结合，只需一个用户模拟即可将训练数据集平均每天输入 100 个，模型精度提高约 4%。

AI.tldr: 提出基于区块链的联邦学习架构，解决数据质量与模型训练问题
AI.motivation: 组织需高质量数据训练AI模型，但面临数据质量、可扩展性和维护挑战
AI.method: 结合区块链与智能合约构建虚拟数据市场，通过激励机制提升数据质量与完整性
AI.result: 单用户模拟下，每日100输入数据，模型准确率提升约4%
AI.conclusion: 框架有效提升数据质量与模型性能，适用于多方协作的数据驱动应用

authors_text: Frederik Warburg,Michael Ramamonjisoa,Manuel López-Antequera
title: SparseFormer: Attention-based Depth Completion Network
title_zh: SparseFormer：基于注意力的深度补全网络
abstract: Most pipelines for Augmented and Virtual Reality estimate the ego-motion of the camera by creating a map of sparse 3D landmarks. In this paper, we tackle the problem of depth completion, that is, densifying this sparse 3D map using RGB images as guidance. This remains a challenging problem due to the low density, non-uniform and outlier-prone 3D landmarks produced by SfM and SLAM pipelines. We introduce a transformer block, SparseFormer, that fuses 3D landmarks with deep visual features to produce dense depth. The SparseFormer has a global receptive field, making the module especially effective for depth completion with low-density and non-uniform landmarks. To address the issue of depth outliers among the 3D landmarks, we introduce a trainable refinement module that filters outliers through attention between the sparse landmarks.
summary: Most pipelines for Augmented and Virtual Reality estimate the ego-motion of the camera by creating a map of sparse 3D landmarks. In this paper, we tackle the problem of depth completion, that is, densifying this sparse 3D map using RGB images as guidance. This remains a challenging problem due to the low density, non-uniform and outlier-prone 3D landmarks produced by SfM and SLAM pipelines. We introduce a transformer block, SparseFormer, that fuses 3D landmarks with deep visual features to produce dense depth. The SparseFormer has a global receptive field, making the module especially effective for depth completion with low-density and non-uniform landmarks. To address the issue of depth outliers among the 3D landmarks, we introduce a trainable refinement module that filters outliers through attention between the sparse landmarks.
abstract_zh: 大多数增强现实和虚拟现实管道通过创建稀疏 3D 地标地图来估计相机的自我运动。在本文中，我们解决了深度补全的问题，即使用 RGB 图像作为指导来致密这个稀疏 3D 地图。由于 SfM 和 SLAM 管道产生的 3D 地标密度低、不均匀且容易出现异常值，这仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。我们引入了一个转换器块 SparseFormer，它将 3D 地标与深度视觉特征融合以产生密集的深度。 SparseFormer 具有全局感受野，使得该模块对于低密度和不均匀地标的深度补全特别有效。为了解决 3D 地标之间的深度离群值问题，我们引入了一个可训练的细化模块，该模块通过稀疏地标之间的注意力来过滤离群值。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于注意力机制的深度补全网络SparseFormer，用于将稀疏的3D地标图转换为密集的深度图。
AI.motivation: 现有的增强现实和虚拟现实系统中，相机的自运动估计依赖于稀疏的3D地标图，但由于地标密度低、分布不均且存在异常值，深度补全任务仍然具有挑战性。
AI.method: 本文引入了SparseFormer模块，通过融合3D地标与深度视觉特征生成密集深度图，并采用可训练的精炼模块通过注意力机制过滤异常值。
AI.result: 实验表明，SparseFormer在低密度和非均匀地标条件下表现出色，能够有效完成深度补全任务。
AI.conclusion: SparseFormer通过结合注意力机制和精炼模块，有效解决了稀疏3D地标深度补全中的挑战，为AR/VR应用提供了更精确的深度估计方法。

result: 实验表明，SparseFormer在低密度和非均匀地标条件下表现出色，能够有效完成深度补全任务。
conclusion: SparseFormer通过结合注意力机制和精炼模块，有效解决了稀疏3D地标深度补全中的挑战，为AR/VR应用提供了更精确的深度估计方法。
search_text: SparseFormer: Attention-based Depth Completion Network SparseFormer：基于注意力的深度补全网络 Most pipelines for Augmented and Virtual Reality estimate the ego-motion of the camera by creating a map of sparse 3D landmarks. In this paper, we tackle the problem of depth completion, that is, densifying this sparse 3D map using RGB images as guidance. This remains a challenging problem due to the low density, non-uniform and outlier-prone 3D landmarks produced by SfM and SLAM pipelines. We introduce a transformer block, SparseFormer, that fuses 3D landmarks with deep visual features to produce dense depth. The SparseFormer has a global receptive field, making the module especially effective for depth completion with low-density and non-uniform landmarks. To address the issue of depth outliers among the 3D landmarks, we introduce a trainable refinement module that filters outliers through attention between the sparse landmarks. 大多数增强现实和虚拟现实管道通过创建稀疏 3D 地标地图来估计相机的自我运动。在本文中，我们解决了深度补全的问题，即使用 RGB 图像作为指导来致密这个稀疏 3D 地图。由于 SfM 和 SLAM 管道产生的 3D 地标密度低、不均匀且容易出现异常值，这仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。我们引入了一个转换器块 SparseFormer，它将 3D 地标与深度视觉特征融合以产生密集的深度。 SparseFormer 具有全局感受野，使得该模块对于低密度和不均匀地标的深度补全特别有效。为了解决 3D 地标之间的深度离群值问题，我们引入了一个可训练的细化模块，该模块通过稀疏地标之间的注意力来过滤离群值。 本文提出了一种基于注意力机制的深度补全网络SparseFormer，用于将稀疏的3D地标图转换为密集的深度图。 Frederik Warburg,Michael Ramamonjisoa,Manuel López-Antequera cs.CV

authors_text: Jixian Guo,Mingming Gong,Dacheng Tao
title: A Relational Intervention Approach for Unsupervised Dynamics Generalization in Model-Based Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 基于模型的强化学习中无监督动态泛化的关系干预方法
abstract: The generalization of model-based reinforcement learning (MBRL) methods to environments with unseen transition dynamics is an important yet challenging problem. Existing methods try to extract environment-specified information $Z$ from past transition segments to make the dynamics prediction model generalizable to different dynamics. However, because environments are not labelled, the extracted information inevitably contains redundant information unrelated to the dynamics in transition segments and thus fails to maintain a crucial property of $Z$: $Z$ should be similar in the same environment and dissimilar in different ones. As a result, the learned dynamics prediction function will deviate from the true one, which undermines the generalization ability. To tackle this problem, we introduce an interventional prediction module to estimate the probability of two estimated $\hat{z}_i, \hat{z}_j$ belonging to the same environment. Furthermore, by utilizing the $Z$'s invariance within a single environment, a relational head is proposed to enforce the similarity between $\hat{Z}$ from the same environment. As a result, the redundant information will be reduced in $\hat{Z}$. We empirically show that $\hat{Z}$ estimated by our method enjoy less redundant information than previous methods, and such $\hat{Z}$ can significantly reduce dynamics prediction errors and improve the performance of model-based RL methods on zero-shot new environments with unseen dynamics. The codes of this method are available at \url{https://github.com/CR-Gjx/RIA}.
summary: The generalization of model-based reinforcement learning (MBRL) methods to environments with unseen transition dynamics is an important yet challenging problem. Existing methods try to extract environment-specified information $Z$ from past transition segments to make the dynamics prediction model generalizable to different dynamics. However, because environments are not labelled, the extracted information inevitably contains redundant information unrelated to the dynamics in transition segments and thus fails to maintain a crucial property of $Z$: $Z$ should be similar in the same environment and dissimilar in different ones. As a result, the learned dynamics prediction function will deviate from the true one, which undermines the generalization ability. To tackle this problem, we introduce an interventional prediction module to estimate the probability of two estimated $\hat{z}_i, \hat{z}_j$ belonging to the same environment. Furthermore, by utilizing the $Z$'s invariance within a single environment, a relational head is proposed to enforce the similarity between $\hat{Z}$ from the same environment. As a result, the redundant information will be reduced in $\hat{Z}$. We empirically show that $\hat{Z}$ estimated by our method enjoy less redundant information than previous methods, and such $\hat{Z}$ can significantly reduce dynamics prediction errors and improve the performance of model-based RL methods on zero-shot new environments with unseen dynamics. The codes of this method are available at \url{https://github.com/CR-Gjx/RIA}.
abstract_zh: 将基于模型的强化学习（MBRL）方法推广到具有看不见的过渡动态的环境是一个重要但具有挑战性的问题。现有方法试图从过去的过渡段中提取环境特定信息$Z$，以使动态预测模型可推广到不同的动态。然而，由于环境没有被标记，提取的信息不可避免地包含与过渡段动态无关的冗余信息，从而无法保持$Z$的一个关键属性：$Z$在相同环境中应该相似，在不同环境中应该不相似。结果，学习到的动态预测函数将偏离真实的动态预测函数，从而削弱泛化能力。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一个干预预测模块来估计两个估计的 $\hat{z}_i, \hat{z}_j$ 属于同一环境的概率。此外，通过利用 $Z$ 在单个环境中的不变性，提出了一个关系头来强制来自同一环境的 $\hat{Z}$ 之间的相似性。这样一来，$\hat{Z}$中的冗余信息就会减少。我们的经验表明，通过我们的方法估计的 $\hat{Z}$ 比以前的方法具有更少的冗余信息，并且这样的 $\hat{Z}$ 可以显着减少动态预测误差，并提高基于模型的 RL 方法在具有未见动态的零样本新环境中的性能。该方法的代码可以在\url{https://github.com/CR-Gjx/RIA}获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种关系干预方法，解决基于模型的强化学习在未见动态环境中的泛化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法提取的环境信息包含冗余噪声，导致动态预测模型无法区分不同环境，影响泛化能力。
AI.method: 引入干预预测模块估计环境相似性概率，并设计关系头强制同一环境的特征相似性以消除冗余信息。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法显著降低动态预测误差，提升模型在零样本新环境中的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过减少特征冗余，所提方法有效增强了基于模型的强化学习在动态泛化中的表现。

authors_text: Vishesh Jain,Ashwin Sah,Mehtaab Sawhney
title: Spencer's theorem in nearly input-sparsity time
title_zh: 近输入稀疏时间内的斯宾塞定理
abstract: A celebrated theorem of Spencer states that for every set system $S_1,\dots, S_m \subseteq [n]$, there is a coloring of the ground set with $\{\pm 1\}$ with discrepancy $O(\sqrt{n\log(m/n+2)})$. We provide an algorithm to find such a coloring in near input-sparsity time $\tilde{O}(n+\sum_{i=1}^{m}|S_i|)$. A key ingredient in our work, which may be of independent interest, is a novel width reduction technique for solving linear programs, not of covering/packing type, in near input-sparsity time using the multiplicative weights update method.
summary: A celebrated theorem of Spencer states that for every set system $S_1,\dots, S_m \subseteq [n]$, there is a coloring of the ground set with $\{\pm 1\}$ with discrepancy $O(\sqrt{n\log(m/n+2)})$. We provide an algorithm to find such a coloring in near input-sparsity time $\tilde{O}(n+\sum_{i=1}^{m}|S_i|)$. A key ingredient in our work, which may be of independent interest, is a novel width reduction technique for solving linear programs, not of covering/packing type, in near input-sparsity time using the multiplicative weights update method.
abstract_zh: 斯宾塞的一个著名定理指出，对于每个集合系统 $S_1,\dots, S_m \subseteq [n]$，都有一个与 $\{\pm 1\}$ 的地面集合的着色，差异为 $O(\sqrt{n\log(m/n+2)})$。我们提供了一种算法来在接近输入稀疏时间 $\tilde{O}(n+\sum_{i=1}^{m}|S_i|)$ 中找到这种着色。我们工作中的一个关键要素（可能是独立感兴趣的）是一种新颖的宽度缩减技术，用于使用乘法权重更新方法在接近输入稀疏的时间内求解线性程序（而不是覆盖/打包类型）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种近似输入稀疏时间的算法，用于解决Spencer定理中的集合系统着色问题，使得discrepancy达到指定的界。
AI.motivation: Spencer定理虽然保证了存在低discrepancy的着色，但传统算法时间复杂度较高，需设计更高效的近似输入稀疏时间算法以提升实际应用效率。
AI.method: 通过引入一种新的宽度减少技术，结合乘法权重更新法，在近似输入稀疏时间内解决非覆盖/打包类型的线性规划问题。
AI.result: 成功设计出时间复杂度为$\	ilde{O}(n+\\sum_{i=1}^{m}|S_i|)$的算法，并证明了该算法可达到Spencer定理的discrepancy界。
AI.conclusion: 本工作为解决低discrepancy着色问题提供了更高效的算法，并提出的宽度减少技术可能对其他线性规划问题有独立应用价值。

authors_text: Hamid Nasiri,Ghazal Kheyroddin,Morteza Dorrigiv,Mona Esmaeili,Amir Raeisi Nafchi,Mohsen Haji Ghorbani,Payman Zarkesh-Ha
title: Classification of COVID-19 in Chest X-ray Images Using Fusion of Deep Features and LightGBM
title_zh: 使用深度特征和 LightGBM 融合对胸部 X 射线图像中的 COVID-19 进行分类
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
comments: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
abstract: The COVID-19 disease was first discovered in Wuhan, China, and spread quickly worldwide. After the COVID-19 pandemic, many researchers have begun to identify a way to diagnose the COVID-19 using chest X-ray images. The early diagnosis of this disease can significantly impact the treatment process. In this article, we propose a new technique that is faster and more accurate than the other methods reported in the literature. The proposed method uses a combination of DenseNet169 and MobileNet Deep Neural Networks to extract the features of the patient's X-ray images. Using the univariate feature selection algorithm, we refined the features for the most important ones. Then we applied the selected features as input to the LightGBM (Light Gradient Boosting Machine) algorithm for classification. To assess the effectiveness of the proposed method, the ChestX-ray8 dataset, which includes 1125 X-ray images of the patient's chest, was used. The proposed method achieved 98.54% and 91.11% accuracies in the two-class (COVID-19, Healthy) and multi-class (COVID-19, Healthy, Pneumonia) classification problems, respectively. It is worth mentioning that we have used Gradient-weighted Class Activation Mapping (Grad-CAM) for further analysis.
summary: The COVID-19 disease was first discovered in Wuhan, China, and spread quickly worldwide. After the COVID-19 pandemic, many researchers have begun to identify a way to diagnose the COVID-19 using chest X-ray images. The early diagnosis of this disease can significantly impact the treatment process. In this article, we propose a new technique that is faster and more accurate than the other methods reported in the literature. The proposed method uses a combination of DenseNet169 and MobileNet Deep Neural Networks to extract the features of the patient's X-ray images. Using the univariate feature selection algorithm, we refined the features for the most important ones. Then we applied the selected features as input to the LightGBM (Light Gradient Boosting Machine) algorithm for classification. To assess the effectiveness of the proposed method, the ChestX-ray8 dataset, which includes 1125 X-ray images of the patient's chest, was used. The proposed method achieved 98.54% and 91.11% accuracies in the two-class (COVID-19, Healthy) and multi-class (COVID-19, Healthy, Pneumonia) classification problems, respectively. It is worth mentioning that we have used Gradient-weighted Class Activation Mapping (Grad-CAM) for further analysis.
abstract_zh: COVID-19 疾病首先在中国武汉发现，并在全球范围内迅速传播。 COVID-19 大流行后，许多研究人员开始寻找一种使用胸部 X 射线图像诊断 COVID-19 的方法。这种疾病的早期诊断可以显着影响治疗过程。在本文中，我们提出了一种比文献中报道的其他方法更快、更准确的新技术。该方法结合使用 DenseNet169 和 MobileNet 深度神经网络来提取患者 X 射线图像的特征。使用单变量特征选择算法，我们细化了最重要的特征。然后，我们将所选特征作为 LightGBM（光梯度增强机）算法的输入进行分类。为了评估所提出方法的有效性，使用了 ChestX-ray8 数据集，其中包括患者胸部的 1125 张 X 射线图像。该方法在两类（COVID-19，健康）和多类（COVID-19，健康，肺炎）分类问题上分别实现了 98.54% 和 91.11% 的准确率。值得一提的是，我们使用梯度加权类激活映射（Grad-CAM）进行进一步分析。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合深度特征融合与LightGBM算法的新型方法，用于从胸部X光图像中分类COVID-19疾病。
AI.motivation: COVID-19的早期诊断对治疗至关重要，但现有方法在速度和准确性上存在不足，需开发更高效的诊断技术。
AI.method: 采用DenseNet169和MobileNet提取X光图像特征，通过单变量特征选择算法筛选关键特征，输入LightGBM进行分类，并使用Grad-CAM进行可视化分析。
AI.result: 在二分类（COVID-19 vs 健康）和多分类（COVID-19、健康、肺炎）任务中分别达到98.54%和91.11%的准确率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过深度特征融合与LightGBM结合，在COVID-19分类任务中表现出色，验证了其有效性与实用性。

search_text: Classification of COVID-19 in Chest X-ray Images Using Fusion of Deep Features and LightGBM 使用深度特征和 LightGBM 融合对胸部 X 射线图像中的 COVID-19 进行分类 The COVID-19 disease was first discovered in Wuhan, China, and spread quickly worldwide. After the COVID-19 pandemic, many researchers have begun to identify a way to diagnose the COVID-19 using chest X-ray images. The early diagnosis of this disease can significantly impact the treatment process. In this article, we propose a new technique that is faster and more accurate than the other methods reported in the literature. The proposed method uses a combination of DenseNet169 and MobileNet Deep Neural Networks to extract the features of the patient's X-ray images. Using the univariate feature selection algorithm, we refined the features for the most important ones. Then we applied the selected features as input to the LightGBM (Light Gradient Boosting Machine) algorithm for classification. To assess the effectiveness of the proposed method, the ChestX-ray8 dataset, which includes 1125 X-ray images of the patient's chest, was used. The proposed method achieved 98.54% and 91.11% accuracies in the two-class (COVID-19, Healthy) and multi-class (COVID-19, Healthy, Pneumonia) classification problems, respectively. It is worth mentioning that we have used Gradient-weighted Class Activation Mapping (Grad-CAM) for further analysis. authors_text: Babar Shahzaad,Athman Bouguettaya
title: Service-Oriented Architecture for Drone-based Multi-Package Delivery
title_zh: 基于无人机的多包裹交付的面向服务的架构
comment: 6 pages, 4 figures. This is an accepted paper and it is going to appear in the Proceedings of the 2022 IEEE International Conference on Web Services (IEEE ICWS 2022)
comments: 6 pages, 4 figures. This is an accepted paper and it is going to appear in the Proceedings of the 2022 IEEE International Conference on Web Services (IEEE ICWS 2022)
abstract: We propose a novel service-oriented architecture for drone-based multi-package delivery in a skyway network. The proposed architecture provides a high-level design for deploying a skyway network in a city for the effective provisioning of drone services. We propose a graph-based heuristic to reduce the search space for optimal service selection in the skyway network. We then find an optimal solution using the selected drone services under a set of constraints. We conduct experiments to demonstrate the efficiency of our proposed approach.
summary: We propose a novel service-oriented architecture for drone-based multi-package delivery in a skyway network. The proposed architecture provides a high-level design for deploying a skyway network in a city for the effective provisioning of drone services. We propose a graph-based heuristic to reduce the search space for optimal service selection in the skyway network. We then find an optimal solution using the selected drone services under a set of constraints. We conduct experiments to demonstrate the efficiency of our proposed approach.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的面向服务的架构，用于空中网络中基于无人机的多包裹递送。所提出的架构为在城市中部署空中网络以有效提供无人机服务提供了高级设计。我们提出了一种基于图的启发式方法来减少空中网络中最佳服务选择的搜索空间。然后，我们在一组约束下使用选定的无人机服务找到最佳解决方案。我们进行实验来证明我们提出的方法的效率。

AI.tldr: 设计服务导向架构以优化无人机在空路网络中的多包裹配送效率。
AI.motivation: 传统无人机配送方案在复杂城市环境和多包裹场景下存在路径规划效率低、资源分配不合理的问题。
AI.method: 提出基于图的启发式算法缩小服务选择搜索空间，并结合约束条件寻找最优服务组合方案。
AI.result: 实验验证表明该方法在配送效率和资源利用率方面优于传统方案。
AI.conclusion: 服务导向架构能有效提升无人机多包裹配送的系统性能和可扩展性。

authors_text: Nipun Dhananjaya Weerakkodi Mudalige,Elena Nazarova,Ildar Babataev,Pavel Kopanev,Aleksey Fedoseev,Miguel Altamirano Cabrera,Dzmitry Tsetserukou
title: DogTouch: CNN-based Recognition of Surface Textures by Quadruped Robot with High Density Tactile Sensors
title_zh: DogTouch：具有高密度触觉传感器的四足机器人基于 CNN 的表面纹理识别
comment: Accepted paper at IEEE Vehicular Technology Conference 2022 (IEEE VTC 2022), IEEE copyright
comments: Accepted paper at IEEE Vehicular Technology Conference 2022 (IEEE VTC 2022), IEEE copyright
abstract: The ability to perform locomotion in various terrains is critical for legged robots. However, the robot has to have a better understanding of the surface it is walking on to perform robust locomotion on different terrains. Animals and humans are able to recognize the surface with the help of the tactile sensation on their feet. Although, the foot tactile sensation for legged robots has not been much explored. This paper presents research on a novel quadruped robot DogTouch with tactile sensing feet (TSF). TSF allows the recognition of different surface textures utilizing a tactile sensor and a convolutional neural network (CNN). The experimental results show a sufficient validation accuracy of 74.37\% for our trained CNN-based model, with the highest recognition for line patterns of 90\%. In the future, we plan to improve the prediction model by presenting surface samples with the various depths of patterns and applying advanced Deep Learning and Shallow learning models for surface recognition. Additionally, we propose a novel approach to navigation of quadruped and legged robots. We can arrange the tactile paving textured surface (similar that used for blind or visually impaired people). Thus, DogTouch will be capable of locomotion in unknown environment by just recognizing the specific tactile patterns which will indicate the straight path, left or right turn, pedestrian crossing, road, and etc. That will allow robust navigation regardless of lighting condition. Future quadruped robots equipped with visual and tactile perception system will be able to safely and intelligently navigate and interact in the unstructured indoor and outdoor environment.
summary: The ability to perform locomotion in various terrains is critical for legged robots. However, the robot has to have a better understanding of the surface it is walking on to perform robust locomotion on different terrains. Animals and humans are able to recognize the surface with the help of the tactile sensation on their feet. Although, the foot tactile sensation for legged robots has not been much explored. This paper presents research on a novel quadruped robot DogTouch with tactile sensing feet (TSF). TSF allows the recognition of different surface textures utilizing a tactile sensor and a convolutional neural network (CNN). The experimental results show a sufficient validation accuracy of 74.37\% for our trained CNN-based model, with the highest recognition for line patterns of 90\%. In the future, we plan to improve the prediction model by presenting surface samples with the various depths of patterns and applying advanced Deep Learning and Shallow learning models for surface recognition. Additionally, we propose a novel approach to navigation of quadruped and legged robots. We can arrange the tactile paving textured surface (similar that used for blind or visually impaired people). Thus, DogTouch will be capable of locomotion in unknown environment by just recognizing the specific tactile patterns which will indicate the straight path, left or right turn, pedestrian crossing, road, and etc. That will allow robust navigation regardless of lighting condition. Future quadruped robots equipped with visual and tactile perception system will be able to safely and intelligently navigate and interact in the unstructured indoor and outdoor environment.
abstract_zh: 在各种地形中执行运动的能力对于腿式机器人至关重要。然而，机器人必须更好地了解其行走的表面，才能在不同地形上执行稳健的运动。动物和人类能够借助脚上的触觉来识别表面。尽管如此，腿式机器人的足部触觉尚未得到太多探索。本文介绍了一种具有触觉传感脚（TSF）的新型四足机器人 DogTouch 的研究。 TSF 允许利用触觉传感器和卷积神经网络 (CNN) 识别不同的表面纹理。实验结果表明，我们训练的基于 CNN 的模型具有 74.37% 的足够验证准确率，对线条图案的最高识别率为 90%。未来，我们计划通过呈现具有不同深度模式的表面样本并应用先进的深度学习和浅层学习模型进行表面识别来改进预测模型。此外，我们提出了一种四足和有腿机器人导航的新方法。我们可以安排触觉铺路纹理表面（类似于盲人或视障人士使用的表面）。因此，DogTouch 只需识别特定的触觉模式即可在未知环境中移动，这些触觉模式将指示直线路径、左转或右转、人行横道、道路等。无论照明条件如何，这都将允许稳健的导航。未来配备视觉和触觉感知系统的四足机器人将能够在非结构化的室内外环境中安全、智能地导航和交互。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的四足机器人DogTouch，通过高密度触觉传感器识别不同表面纹理，以提升复杂地形中的运动能力。
AI.motivation: 腿式机器人需要更精确的地面感知能力以实现稳健运动，但现有研究对足部触觉感知的探索不足。动物和人类通过足部触觉感知地面信息，启发了本研究。
AI.method: 设计配备触觉传感足（TSF）的四足机器人DogTouch，利用触觉传感器采集表面纹理数据，并通过CNN模型进行分类识别。
AI.result: 实验表明，训练后的CNN模型验证准确率达74.37%，其中对线状纹理的识别准确率高达90%。未来计划通过多深度纹理样本和深度学习/浅层学习模型优化模型。
AI.conclusion: 触觉感知结合视觉系统可使四足机器人在无光照条件下实现自主导航，未来有望在复杂室内外环境中安全智能地运行。

conclusion: 触觉感知结合视觉系统可使四足机器人在无光照条件下实现自主导航，未来有望在复杂室内外环境中安全智能地运行。
search_text: DogTouch: CNN-based Recognition of Surface Textures by Quadruped Robot with High Density Tactile Sensors DogTouch：具有高密度触觉传感器的四足机器人基于 CNN 的表面纹理识别 The ability to perform locomotion in various terrains is critical for legged robots. However, the robot has to have a better understanding of the surface it is walking on to perform robust locomotion on different terrains. Animals and humans are able to recognize the surface with the help of the tactile sensation on their feet. Although, the foot tactile sensation for legged robots has not been much explored. This paper presents research on a novel quadruped robot DogTouch with tactile sensing feet (TSF). TSF allows the recognition of different surface textures utilizing a tactile sensor and a convolutional neural network (CNN). The experimental results show a sufficient validation accuracy of 74.37\% for our trained CNN-based model, with the highest recognition for line patterns of 90\%. In the future, we plan to improve the prediction model by presenting surface samples with the various depths of patterns and applying advanced Deep Learning and Shallow learning models for surface recognition. Additionally, we propose a novel approach to navigation of quadruped and legged robots. We can arrange the tactile paving textured surface (similar that used for blind or visually impaired people). Thus, DogTouch will be capable of locomotion in unknown environment by just recognizing the specific tactile patterns which will indicate the straight path, left or right turn, pedestrian crossing, road, and etc. That will allow robust navigation regardless of lighting condition. Future quadruped robots equipped with visual and tactile perception system will be able to safely and intelligently navigate and interact in the unstructured indoor and outdoor environment. 在各种地形中执行运动的能力对于腿式机器人至关重要。然而，机器人必须更好地了解其行走的表面，才能在不同地形上执行稳健的运动。动物和人类能够借助脚上的触觉来识别表面。尽管如此，腿式机器人的足部触觉尚未得到太多探索。本文介绍了一种具有触觉传感脚（TSF）的新型四足机器人 DogTouch 的研究。 TSF 允许利用触觉传感器和卷积神经网络 (CNN) 识别不同的表面纹理。实验结果表明，我们训练的基于 CNN 的模型具有 74.37% 的足够验证准确率，对线条图案的最高识别率为 90%。未来，我们计划通过呈现具有不同深度模式的表面样本并应用先进的深度学习和浅层学习模型进行表面识别来改进预测模型。此外，我们提出了一种四足和有腿机器人导航的新方法。我们可以安排触觉铺路纹理表面（类似于盲人或视障人士使用的表面）。因此，DogTouch 只需识别特定的触觉模式即可在未知环境中移动，这些触觉模式将指示直线路径、左转或右转、人行横道、道路等。无论照明条件如何，这都将允许稳健的导航。未来配备视觉和触觉感知系统的四足机器人将能够在非结构化的室内外环境中安全、智能地导航和交互。 本文提出了一种基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的四足机器人DogTouch，通过高密度触觉传感器识别不同表面纹理，以提升复杂地形中的运动能力。 Nipun Dhananjaya Weerakkodi Mudalige,Elena Nazarova,Ildar Babataev,Pavel Kopanev,Aleksey Fedoseev,Miguel Altamirano Cabrera,Dzmitry Tsetserukou cs.RO

authors_text: Andres Felipe Posada-Moreno,Nikita Surya,Sebastian Trimpe
title: ECLAD: Extracting Concepts with Local Aggregated Descriptors
title_zh: ECLAD：使用本地聚合描述符提取概念
abstract: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) are increasingly being used in critical systems, where robustness and alignment are crucial. In this context, the field of explainable artificial intelligence has proposed the generation of high-level explanations of the prediction process of CNNs through concept extraction. While these methods can detect whether or not a concept is present in an image, they are unable to determine its location. What is more, a fair comparison of such approaches is difficult due to a lack of proper validation procedures. To address these issues, we propose a novel method for automatic concept extraction and localization based on representations obtained through pixel-wise aggregations of CNN activation maps. Further, we introduce a process for the validation of concept-extraction techniques based on synthetic datasets with pixel-wise annotations of their main components, reducing the need for human intervention. Extensive experimentation on both synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrates that our method outperforms state-of-the-art alternatives.
summary: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) are increasingly being used in critical systems, where robustness and alignment are crucial. In this context, the field of explainable artificial intelligence has proposed the generation of high-level explanations of the prediction process of CNNs through concept extraction. While these methods can detect whether or not a concept is present in an image, they are unable to determine its location. What is more, a fair comparison of such approaches is difficult due to a lack of proper validation procedures. To address these issues, we propose a novel method for automatic concept extraction and localization based on representations obtained through pixel-wise aggregations of CNN activation maps. Further, we introduce a process for the validation of concept-extraction techniques based on synthetic datasets with pixel-wise annotations of their main components, reducing the need for human intervention. Extensive experimentation on both synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrates that our method outperforms state-of-the-art alternatives.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 越来越多地用于关键系统，其中鲁棒性和对齐至关重要。在此背景下，可解释人工智能领域提出了通过概念提取来生成 CNN 预测过程的高级解释。虽然这些方法可以检测图像中是否存在概念，但它们无法确定其位置。更重要的是，由于缺乏适当的验证程序，很难对这些方法进行公平的比较。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种基于 CNN 激活图的像素级聚合获得的表示的自动概念提取和定位的新方法。此外，我们引入了一种基于合成数据集的概念提取技术验证过程，并对其主要成分进行了像素级注释，从而减少了人工干预的需要。对合成数据集和真实数据集的广泛实验表明，我们的方法优于最先进的替代方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ECLAD方法，通过卷积神经网络（CNN）激活图的像素级聚合表示，实现概念的自动提取与定位。
AI.motivation: 现有概念提取方法无法确定概念在图像中的位置，且缺乏有效的验证流程，难以公平比较不同方法。
AI.method: 基于CNN激活图的像素级聚合生成表示，结合合成数据集的像素级标注设计验证流程，实现概念提取与定位。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上的实验表明，ECLAD方法优于现有最先进技术。
AI.conclusion: ECLAD通过引入定位能力与自动化验证框架，有效解决了概念提取方法的局限性。

authors_text: Kirill Bykov,Mayukh Deb,Dennis Grinwald,Klaus-Robert Müller,Marina M. -C. Höhne
title: DORA: Exploring Outlier Representations in Deep Neural Networks
title_zh: DORA：探索深度神经网络中的异常值表示
abstract: Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) excel at learning complex abstractions within their internal representations. However, the concepts they learn remain opaque, a problem that becomes particularly acute when models unintentionally learn spurious correlations. In this work, we present DORA (Data-agnOstic Representation Analysis), the first data-agnostic framework for analyzing the representational space of DNNs. Central to our framework is the proposed Extreme-Activation (EA) distance measure, which assesses similarities between representations by analyzing their activation patterns on data points that cause the highest level of activation. As spurious correlations often manifest in features of data that are anomalous to the desired task, such as watermarks or artifacts, we demonstrate that internal representations capable of detecting such artifactual concepts can be found by analyzing relationships within neural representations. We validate the EA metric quantitatively, demonstrating its effectiveness both in controlled scenarios and real-world applications. Finally, we provide practical examples from popular Computer Vision models to illustrate that representations identified as outliers using the EA metric often correspond to undesired and spurious concepts.
summary: Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) excel at learning complex abstractions within their internal representations. However, the concepts they learn remain opaque, a problem that becomes particularly acute when models unintentionally learn spurious correlations. In this work, we present DORA (Data-agnOstic Representation Analysis), the first data-agnostic framework for analyzing the representational space of DNNs. Central to our framework is the proposed Extreme-Activation (EA) distance measure, which assesses similarities between representations by analyzing their activation patterns on data points that cause the highest level of activation. As spurious correlations often manifest in features of data that are anomalous to the desired task, such as watermarks or artifacts, we demonstrate that internal representations capable of detecting such artifactual concepts can be found by analyzing relationships within neural representations. We validate the EA metric quantitatively, demonstrating its effectiveness both in controlled scenarios and real-world applications. Finally, we provide practical examples from popular Computer Vision models to illustrate that representations identified as outliers using the EA metric often correspond to undesired and spurious concepts.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 擅长学习其内部表示中的复杂抽象。然而，他们学习的概念仍然不透明，当模型无意中学习虚假相关性时，这个问题变得尤其严重。在这项工作中，我们提出了 DORA（数据不可知表示分析），这是第一个用于分析 DNN 表示空间的数据不可知框架。我们框架的核心是提出的极端激活（EA）距离测量，它通过分析导致最高激活水平的数据点上的激活模式来评估表示之间的相似性。由于虚假相关性通常表现在与所需任务异常的数据特征中，例如水印或伪影，因此我们证明，可以通过分析神经表征内的关系来找到能够检测此类伪影概念的内部表征。我们定量验证 EA 指标，证明其在受控场景和实际应用中的有效性。最后，我们提供了来自流行计算机视觉模型的实际示例，以说明使用 EA 指标识别为异常值的表示通常对应于不需要的和虚假的概念。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DORA框架，通过分析深度神经网络内部表示中的异常模式，检测模型可能存在的虚假相关性问题。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络的内部表示机制不透明，当模型意外学习到与任务无关的虚假特征（如水印、伪影）时，会影响模型性能和可解释性，亟需数据无关的分析方法。
AI.method: 提出数据无关的DORA框架，核心为极端激活（EA）距离度量，通过分析激活值最高的数据点的表示模式，识别与任务无关的异常表示。
AI.result: 定量验证EA指标在控制实验和实际场景中的有效性，发现计算机视觉模型中异常表示常对应不需要的虚假概念。
AI.conclusion: DORA框架可有效检测深度神经网络内部表示中的异常模式，为识别和修正虚假相关性提供实用工具。

authors_text: Alexander Waibel,Moritz Behr,Fevziye Irem Eyiokur,Dogucan Yaman,Tuan-Nam Nguyen,Carlos Mullov,Mehmet Arif Demirtas,Alperen Kantarcı,Stefan Constantin,Hazım Kemal Ekenel
title: Face-Dubbing++: Lip-Synchronous, Voice Preserving Translation of Videos
title_zh: Face-Dubbing++：口型同步、保留声音的视频翻译
abstract: In this paper, we propose a neural end-to-end system for voice preserving, lip-synchronous translation of videos. The system is designed to combine multiple component models and produces a video of the original speaker speaking in the target language that is lip-synchronous with the target speech, yet maintains emphases in speech, voice characteristics, face video of the original speaker. The pipeline starts with automatic speech recognition including emphasis detection, followed by a translation model. The translated text is then synthesized by a Text-to-Speech model that recreates the original emphases mapped from the original sentence. The resulting synthetic voice is then mapped back to the original speakers' voice using a voice conversion model. Finally, to synchronize the lips of the speaker with the translated audio, a conditional generative adversarial network-based model generates frames of adapted lip movements with respect to the input face image as well as the output of the voice conversion model. In the end, the system combines the generated video with the converted audio to produce the final output. The result is a video of a speaker speaking in another language without actually knowing it. To evaluate our design, we present a user study of the complete system as well as separate evaluations of the single components. Since there is no available dataset to evaluate our whole system, we collect a test set and evaluate our system on this test set. The results indicate that our system is able to generate convincing videos of the original speaker speaking the target language while preserving the original speaker's characteristics. The collected dataset will be shared.
summary: In this paper, we propose a neural end-to-end system for voice preserving, lip-synchronous translation of videos. The system is designed to combine multiple component models and produces a video of the original speaker speaking in the target language that is lip-synchronous with the target speech, yet maintains emphases in speech, voice characteristics, face video of the original speaker. The pipeline starts with automatic speech recognition including emphasis detection, followed by a translation model. The translated text is then synthesized by a Text-to-Speech model that recreates the original emphases mapped from the original sentence. The resulting synthetic voice is then mapped back to the original speakers' voice using a voice conversion model. Finally, to synchronize the lips of the speaker with the translated audio, a conditional generative adversarial network-based model generates frames of adapted lip movements with respect to the input face image as well as the output of the voice conversion model. In the end, the system combines the generated video with the converted audio to produce the final output. The result is a video of a speaker speaking in another language without actually knowing it. To evaluate our design, we present a user study of the complete system as well as separate evaluations of the single components. Since there is no available dataset to evaluate our whole system, we collect a test set and evaluate our system on this test set. The results indicate that our system is able to generate convincing videos of the original speaker speaking the target language while preserving the original speaker's characteristics. The collected dataset will be shared.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种神经端到端系统，用于视频的语音保留、口型同步翻译。该系统旨在结合多个组件模型，生成原始说话者用目标语言说话的视频，该视频与目标语音唇形同步，但仍保留原始说话者的语音、语音特征、面部视频的重点。该管道从自动语音识别（包括重点检测）开始，然后是翻译模型。然后，翻译后的文本由文本转语音模型合成，该模型重新创建从原始句子映射的原始重点。然后使用语音转换模型将生成的合成语音映射回原始说话者的语音。最后，为了将说话者的嘴唇与翻译后的音频同步，基于条件生成对抗网络的模型会生成相对于输入面部图像以及语音转换模型的输出的适应嘴唇运动的帧。最后，系统将生成的视频与转换后的音频结合起来，产生最终的输出。结果是一段视频中，说话者在实际上不知道的情况下用另一种语言说话。为了评估我们的设计，我们对整个系统进行了用户研究，并对单个组件进行了单独评估。由于没有可用的数据集来评估我们的整个系统，我们收集了一个测试集并在此测试集上评估我们的系统。结果表明，我们的系统能够生成令人信服的原始说话者讲目标语言的视频，同时保留原始说话者的特征。收集的数据集将被共享。

AI.tldr: 提出一种端到端神经网络系统，实现语音保留、嘴唇同步的视频翻译，使原说话者以目标语言说话而不改变其语音特征和面部表情。
AI.motivation: 现有视频翻译方法难以同时保持语音特征与嘴唇同步，缺乏完整解决方案，需解决语音转换与面部动作协调问题。
AI.method: 系统集成语音识别（含强调检测）、翻译、文本到语音合成（保留原强调）、语音转换及条件生成对抗网络（生成同步唇形），最终融合生成视频。
AI.result: 用户研究与组件评估表明系统可生成自然视频，保留原声线与面部特征，收集并共享了测试数据集。
AI.conclusion: 系统有效实现多语言视频翻译，保持原说话者特征，数据集共享促进后续研究。

search_text: Face-Dubbing++: Lip-Synchronous, Voice Preserving Translation of Videos Face-Dubbing++：口型同步、保留声音的视频翻译 In this paper, we propose a neural end-to-end system for voice preserving, lip-synchronous translation of videos. The system is designed to combine multiple component models and produces a video of the original speaker speaking in the target language that is lip-synchronous with the target speech, yet maintains emphases in speech, voice characteristics, face video of the original speaker. The pipeline starts with automatic speech recognition including emphasis detection, followed by a translation model. The translated text is then synthesized by a Text-to-Speech model that recreates the original emphases mapped from the original sentence. The resulting synthetic voice is then mapped back to the original speakers' voice using a voice conversion model. Finally, to synchronize the lips of the speaker with the translated audio, a conditional generative adversarial network-based model generates frames of adapted lip movements with respect to the input face image as well as the output of the voice conversion model. In the end, the system combines the generated video with the converted audio to produce the final output. The result is a video of a speaker speaking in another language without actually knowing it. To evaluate our design, we present a user study of the complete system as well as separate evaluations of the single components. Since there is no available dataset to evaluate our whole system, we collect a test set and evaluate our system on this test set. The results indicate that our system is able to generate convincing videos of the original speaker speaking the target language while preserving the original speaker's characteristics. The collected dataset will be shared. 在本文中，我们提出了一种神经端到端系统，用于视频的语音保留、口型同步翻译。该系统旨在结合多个组件模型，生成原始说话者用目标语言说话的视频，该视频与目标语音唇形同步，但仍保留原始说话者的语音、语音特征、面部视频的重点。该管道从自动语音识别（包括重点检测）开始，然后是翻译模型。然后，翻译后的文本由文本转语音模型合成，该模型重新创建从原始句子映射的原始重点。然后使用语音转换模型将生成的合成语音映射回原始说话者的语音。最后，为了将说话者的嘴唇与翻译后的音频同步，基于条件生成对抗网络的模型会生成相对于输入面部图像以及语音转换模型的输出的适应嘴唇运动的帧。最后，系统将生成的视频与转换后的音频结合起来，产生最终的输出。结果是一段视频中，说话者在实际上不知道的情况下用另一种语言说话。为了评估我们的设计，我们对整个系统进行了用户研究，并对单个组件进行了单独评估。由于没有可用的数据集来评估我们的整个系统，我们收集了一个测试集并在此测试集上评估我们的系统。结果表明，我们的系统能够生成令人信服的原始说话者讲目标语言的视频，同时保留原始说话者的特征。收集的数据集将被共享。 提出一种端到端神经网络系统，实现语音保留、嘴唇同步的视频翻译，使原说话者以目标语言说话而不改变其语音特征和面部表情。 Alexander Waibel,Moritz Behr,Fevziye Irem Eyiokur,Dogucan Yaman,Tuan-Nam Nguyen,Carlos Mullov,Mehmet Arif Demirtas,Alperen Kantarcı,Stefan Constantin,Hazım Kemal Ekenel cs.CL,cs.CV,cs.SD,eess.AS,eess.IV

authors_text: Trung Dinh Pham,Bao Gia Bach,Lam Trinh Luu,Minh Dinh Nguyen,Hai Duc Pham,Khoa Bui Anh,Xuan Quang Nguyen,Cuong Pham Quoc
title: An FPGA-based Solution for Convolution Operation Acceleration
title_zh: 基于FPGA的卷积运算加速解决方案
comment: 11 pages, 6 figures, accepted to The First International Conference on Intelligence of Things (ICIT 2022)
comments: 11 pages, 6 figures, accepted to The First International Conference on Intelligence of Things (ICIT 2022)
abstract: Hardware-based acceleration is an extensive attempt to facilitate many computationally-intensive mathematics operations. This paper proposes an FPGA-based architecture to accelerate the convolution operation - a complex and expensive computing step that appears in many Convolutional Neural Network models. We target the design to the standard convolution operation, intending to launch the product as an edge-AI solution. The project's purpose is to produce an FPGA IP core that can process a convolutional layer at a time. System developers can deploy the IP core with various FPGA families by using Verilog HDL as the primary design language for the architecture. The experimental results show that our single computing core synthesized on a simple edge computing FPGA board can offer 0.224 GOPS. When the board is fully utilized, 4.48 GOPS can be achieved.
summary: Hardware-based acceleration is an extensive attempt to facilitate many computationally-intensive mathematics operations. This paper proposes an FPGA-based architecture to accelerate the convolution operation - a complex and expensive computing step that appears in many Convolutional Neural Network models. We target the design to the standard convolution operation, intending to launch the product as an edge-AI solution. The project's purpose is to produce an FPGA IP core that can process a convolutional layer at a time. System developers can deploy the IP core with various FPGA families by using Verilog HDL as the primary design language for the architecture. The experimental results show that our single computing core synthesized on a simple edge computing FPGA board can offer 0.224 GOPS. When the board is fully utilized, 4.48 GOPS can be achieved.
abstract_zh: 基于硬件的加速是促进许多计算密集型数学运算的广泛尝试。本文提出了一种基于 FPGA 的架构来加速卷积运算——这是许多卷积神经网络模型中出现的复杂且昂贵的计算步骤。我们的设计目标是标准卷积运算，打算将产品作为边缘人工智能解决方案推出。该项目的目的是生产一个可以一次处理一个卷积层的FPGA IP核。系统开发人员可以使用 Verilog HDL 作为架构的主要设计语言，将 IP 核部署到各种 FPGA 系列中。实验结果表明，我们在简单的边缘计算 FPGA 板上合成的单个计算核心可以提供 0.224 GOPS。当板卡充分利用时，可以达到 4.48 GOPS。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于FPGA的架构，用于加速卷积神经网络中的卷积操作，目标是开发可部署在边缘AI设备上的IP核。
AI.motivation: 卷积操作在CNN中计算量大且成本高，需通过硬件加速提升效率，满足边缘计算场景需求。
AI.method: 设计FPGA IP核实现标准卷积操作，采用Verilog HDL进行架构开发，并在边缘计算FPGA板上验证性能。
AI.result: 单计算核实现0.224 GOPS性能，板卡满载时可达4.48 GOPS，验证了方案的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该FPGA方案有效提升了卷积运算效率，为边缘AI设备提供了高性能、可扩展的硬件加速解决方案。

This paper proposes an FPGA-based architecture to accelerate the convolution operation - a complex and expensive computing step that appears in many Convolutional Neural Network models. We target the design to the standard convolution operation, intending to launch the product as an edge-AI solution. The project's purpose is to produce an FPGA IP core that can process a convolutional layer at a time. System developers can deploy the IP core with various FPGA families by using Verilog HDL as the primary design language for the architecture. The experimental results show that our single computing core synthesized on a simple edge computing FPGA board can offer 0.224 GOPS. When the board is fully utilized, 4.48 GOPS can be achieved. 基于硬件的加速是促进许多计算密集型数学运算的广泛尝试。本文提出了一种基于 FPGA 的架构来加速卷积运算——这是许多卷积神经网络模型中出现的复杂且昂贵的计算步骤。我们的设计目标是标准卷积运算，打算将产品作为边缘人工智能解决方案推出。该项目的目的是生产一个可以一次处理一个卷积层的FPGA IP核。系统开发人员可以使用 Verilog HDL 作为架构的主要设计语言，将 IP 核部署到各种 FPGA 系列中。实验结果表明，我们在简单的边缘计算 FPGA 板上合成的单个计算核心可以提供 0.224 GOPS。当板卡充分利用时，可以达到 4.48 GOPS。 本文提出一种基于FPGA的架构，用于加速卷积神经网络中的卷积操作，目标是开发可部署在边缘AI设备上的IP核。 Trung Dinh Pham,Bao Gia Bach,Lam Trinh Luu,Minh Dinh Nguyen,Hai Duc Pham,Khoa Bui Anh,Xuan Quang Nguyen,Cuong Pham Quoc cs.AR,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Malsha V. Perera,Nithin Gopalakrishnan Nair,Wele Gedara Chaminda Bandara,Vishal M. Patel
title: SAR Despeckling using a Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Model
title_zh: 使用去噪扩散概率模型进行 SAR 去斑
comment: Our code is available at https://github.com/malshaV/SAR_DDPM
comments: Our code is available at https://github.com/malshaV/SAR_DDPM
abstract: Speckle is a multiplicative noise which affects all coherent imaging modalities including Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) images. The presence of speckle degrades the image quality and adversely affects the performance of SAR image understanding applications such as automatic target recognition and change detection. Thus, SAR despeckling is an important problem in remote sensing. In this paper, we introduce SAR-DDPM, a denoising diffusion probabilistic model for SAR despeckling. The proposed method comprises of a Markov chain that transforms clean images to white Gaussian noise by repeatedly adding random noise. The despeckled image is recovered by a reverse process which iteratively predicts the added noise using a noise predictor which is conditioned on the speckled image. In addition, we propose a new inference strategy based on cycle spinning to improve the despeckling performance. Our experiments on both synthetic and real SAR images demonstrate that the proposed method achieves significant improvements in both quantitative and qualitative results over the state-of-the-art despeckling methods.
summary: Speckle is a multiplicative noise which affects all coherent imaging modalities including Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) images. The presence of speckle degrades the image quality and adversely affects the performance of SAR image understanding applications such as automatic target recognition and change detection. Thus, SAR despeckling is an important problem in remote sensing. In this paper, we introduce SAR-DDPM, a denoising diffusion probabilistic model for SAR despeckling. The proposed method comprises of a Markov chain that transforms clean images to white Gaussian noise by repeatedly adding random noise. The despeckled image is recovered by a reverse process which iteratively predicts the added noise using a noise predictor which is conditioned on the speckled image. In addition, we propose a new inference strategy based on cycle spinning to improve the despeckling performance. Our experiments on both synthetic and real SAR images demonstrate that the proposed method achieves significant improvements in both quantitative and qualitative results over the state-of-the-art despeckling methods.
abstract_zh: 散斑是一种乘性噪声，会影响所有相干成像模式，包括合成孔径雷达 (SAR) 图像。散斑的存在会降低图像质量，并对自动目标识别和变化检测等 SAR 图像理解应用的性能产生不利影响。因此，SAR去散斑是遥感中的一个重要问题。在本文中，我们介绍了 SAR-DDPM，一种用于 SAR 去斑的去噪扩散概率模型。所提出的方法由马尔可夫链组成，通过重复添加随机噪声将干净图像转换为高斯白噪声。通过逆向过程恢复去斑图像，该过程使用以散斑图像为条件的噪声预测器迭代地预测添加的噪声。此外，我们提出了一种基于循环旋转的新推理策略，以提高去斑性能。我们对合成和真实 SAR 图像的实验表明，与最先进的去斑方法相比，所提出的方法在定量和定性结果方面均取得了显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于去噪扩散概率模型（SAR-DDPM）的合成孔径雷达（SAR）图像去斑方法。
AI.motivation: SAR图像中的斑点噪声会降低图像质量并影响目标识别等应用的性能，现有去斑方法存在不足，需更有效的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过马尔可夫链将干净图像逐步转化为高斯白噪声，再通过反向过程迭代预测并去除噪声；结合循环平移策略优化去斑效果。
AI.result: 在合成与真实SAR图像实验中，该方法在定量和定性指标上均优于现有先进去斑技术。
AI.conclusion: SAR-DDPM有效解决了SAR图像去斑问题，为相干成像模态的噪声抑制提供了新思路。

ai_content.result: 在合成与真实SAR图像实验中，该方法在定量和定性指标上均优于现有先进去斑技术。

search_text: SAR Despeckling using a Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Model 使用去噪扩散概率模型进行 SAR 去斑 Speckle is a multiplicative noise which affects all coherent imaging modalities including Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) images. The presence of speckle degrades the image quality and adversely affects the performance of SAR image understanding applications such as automatic target recognition and change detection. Thus, SAR despeckling is an important problem in remote sensing. In this paper, we introduce SAR-DDPM, a denoising diffusion probabilistic model for SAR despeckling. The proposed method comprises of a Markov chain that transforms clean images to white Gaussian noise by repeatedly adding random noise. The despeckled image is recovered by a reverse process which iteratively predicts the added noise using a noise predictor which is conditioned on the speckled image. In addition, we propose a new inference strategy based on cycle spinning to improve the despeckling performance. Our experiments on both synthetic and real SAR images demonstrate that the proposed method achieves significant improvements in both quantitative and qualitative results over the state-of-the-art despeckling methods. 散斑是一种乘性噪声，会影响所有相干成像模式，包括合成孔径雷达 (SAR) 图像。散斑的存在会降低图像质量，并对自动目标识别和变化检测等 SAR 图像理解应用的性能产生不利影响。因此，SAR去散斑是遥感中的一个重要问题。在本文中，我们介绍了 SAR-DDPM，一种用于 SAR 去斑的去噪扩散概率模型。所提出的方法由马尔可夫链组成，通过重复添加随机噪声将干净图像转换为高斯白噪声。通过逆向过程恢复去斑图像，该过程使用以散斑图像为条件的噪声预测器迭代地预测添加的噪声。此外，我们提出了一种基于循环旋转的新推理策略，以提高去斑性能。我们对合成和真实 SAR 图像的实验表明，与最先进的去斑方法相比，所提出的方法在定量和定性结果方面均取得了显着改进。 本文提出了一种基于去噪扩散概率模型（SAR-DDPM）的合成孔径雷达（SAR）图像去斑方法。 Malsha V. Perera,Nithin Gopalakrishnan Nair,Wele Gedara Chaminda Bandara,Vishal M. Patel eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Marc Brittain,Luis E. Alvarez,Kara Breeden,Ian Jessen
title: AAM-Gym: Artificial Intelligence Testbed for Advanced Air Mobility
title_zh: AAM-Gym：先进空中交通的人工智能测试平台
comment: 10 pages, accepted for publication in 2022 IEEE/AIAA Digital Avionics Systems Conference
comments: 10 pages, accepted for publication in 2022 IEEE/AIAA Digital Avionics Systems Conference
abstract: We introduce AAM-Gym, a research and development testbed for Advanced Air Mobility (AAM). AAM has the potential to revolutionize travel by reducing ground traffic and emissions by leveraging new types of aircraft such as electric vertical take-off and landing (eVTOL) aircraft and new advanced artificial intelligence (AI) algorithms. Validation of AI algorithms require representative AAM scenarios, as well as a fast time simulation testbed to evaluate their performance. Until now, there has been no such testbed available for AAM to enable a common research platform for individuals in government, industry, or academia. MIT Lincoln Laboratory has developed AAM-Gym to address this gap by providing an ecosystem to develop, train, and validate new and established AI algorithms across a wide variety of AAM use-cases. In this paper, we use AAM-Gym to study the performance of two reinforcement learning algorithms on an AAM use-case, separation assurance in AAM corridors. The performance of the two algorithms is demonstrated based on a series of metrics provided by AAM-Gym, showing the testbed's utility to AAM research.
summary: We introduce AAM-Gym, a research and development testbed for Advanced Air Mobility (AAM). AAM has the potential to revolutionize travel by reducing ground traffic and emissions by leveraging new types of aircraft such as electric vertical take-off and landing (eVTOL) aircraft and new advanced artificial intelligence (AI) algorithms. Validation of AI algorithms require representative AAM scenarios, as well as a fast time simulation testbed to evaluate their performance. Until now, there has been no such testbed available for AAM to enable a common research platform for individuals in government, industry, or academia. MIT Lincoln Laboratory has developed AAM-Gym to address this gap by providing an ecosystem to develop, train, and validate new and established AI algorithms across a wide variety of AAM use-cases. In this paper, we use AAM-Gym to study the performance of two reinforcement learning algorithms on an AAM use-case, separation assurance in AAM corridors. The performance of the two algorithms is demonstrated based on a series of metrics provided by AAM-Gym, showing the testbed's utility to AAM research.
abstract_zh: 我们推出 AAM-Gym，这是先进空中移动 (AAM) 的研发测试平台。 AAM 有潜力利用电动垂直起降 (eVTOL) 飞机等新型飞机和新的先进人工智能 (AI) 算法，减少地面交通和排放，从而彻底改变出行方式。 AI 算法的验证需要具有代表性的 AAM 场景，以及快速模拟测试台来评估其性能。到目前为止，AAM 还没有这样的测试平台来为政府、行业或学术界的个人提供通用的研究平台。麻省理工学院林肯实验室开发了 AAM-Gym，通过提供一个生态系统来跨各种 AAM 用例开发、训练和验证新的和已建立的 AI 算法来解决这一差距。在本文中，我们使用 AAM-Gym 研究两种强化学习算法在 AAM 用例（AAM 走廊中的分离保证）上的性能。这两种算法的性能是根据 AAM-Gym 提供的一系列指标进行演示的，显示了测试床对 AAM 研究的实用性。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为AAM-Gym的先进空中交通（AAM）人工智能测试平台，并通过该平台评估了两种强化学习算法在AAM走廊分离保障任务中的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有缺乏针对AAM场景的AI算法验证测试平台，阻碍了政府、工业界和学术界在AAM领域的协同研究，亟需开发统一的仿真环境以支持AI算法开发与评估。
AI.method: 开发AAM-Gym测试平台，构建涵盖AAM典型场景的快速仿真环境，并利用该平台对两种强化学习算法在分离保障任务中的表现进行量化分析。
AI.result: 通过AAM-Gym平台提供的指标对比，验证了两种强化学习算法在AAM走廊分离保障任务中的有效性，证明了测试平台对AAM研究的实用价值。
AI.conclusion: AAM-Gym为AAM领域AI算法的研发与验证提供了标准化测试环境，可促进相关技术的创新与跨领域协作。

authors_text: Jiaan Chen,Hao Shi,Yaozu Ye,Kailun Yang,Lei Sun,Kaiwei Wang
title: Efficient Human Pose Estimation via 3D Event Point Cloud
title_zh: 通过 3D 事件点云进行高效人体姿势估计
comment: Accepted to 3DV 2022. Code is available at https://github.com/MasterHow/EventPointPose
comments: Accepted to 3DV 2022. Code is available at https://github.com/MasterHow/EventPointPose
abstract: Human Pose Estimation (HPE) based on RGB images has experienced a rapid development benefiting from deep learning. However, event-based HPE has not been fully studied, which remains great potential for applications in extreme scenes and efficiency-critical conditions. In this paper, we are the first to estimate 2D human pose directly from 3D event point cloud. We propose a novel representation of events, the rasterized event point cloud, aggregating events on the same position of a small time slice. It maintains the 3D features from multiple statistical cues and significantly reduces memory consumption and computation complexity, proved to be efficient in our work. We then leverage the rasterized event point cloud as input to three different backbones, PointNet, DGCNN, and Point Transformer, with two linear layer decoders to predict the location of human keypoints. We find that based on our method, PointNet achieves promising results with much faster speed, whereas Point Transfomer reaches much higher accuracy, even close to previous event-frame-based methods. A comprehensive set of results demonstrates that our proposed method is consistently effective for these 3D backbone models in event-driven human pose estimation. Our method based on PointNet with 2048 points input achieves 82.46mm in MPJPE3D on the DHP19 dataset, while only has a latency of 12.29ms on an NVIDIA Jetson Xavier NX edge computing platform, which is ideally suitable for real-time detection with event cameras. Code is available at https://github.com/MasterHow/EventPointPose.
summary: Human Pose Estimation (HPE) based on RGB images has experienced a rapid development benefiting from deep learning. However, event-based HPE has not been fully studied, which remains great potential for applications in extreme scenes and efficiency-critical conditions. In this paper, we are the first to estimate 2D human pose directly from 3D event point cloud. We propose a novel representation of events, the rasterized event point cloud, aggregating events on the same position of a small time slice. It maintains the 3D features from multiple statistical cues and significantly reduces memory consumption and computation complexity, proved to be efficient in our work. We then leverage the rasterized event point cloud as input to three different backbones, PointNet, DGCNN, and Point Transformer, with two linear layer decoders to predict the location of human keypoints. We find that based on our method, PointNet achieves promising results with much faster speed, whereas Point Transfomer reaches much higher accuracy, even close to previous event-frame-based methods. A comprehensive set of results demonstrates that our proposed method is consistently effective for these 3D backbone models in event-driven human pose estimation. Our method based on PointNet with 2048 points input achieves 82.46mm in MPJPE3D on the DHP19 dataset, while only has a latency of 12.29ms on an NVIDIA Jetson Xavier NX edge computing platform, which is ideally suitable for real-time detection with event cameras. Code is available at https://github.com/MasterHow/EventPointPose.
abstract_zh: 基于RGB图像的人体姿态估计（HPE）受益于深度学习的快速发展。然而，基于事件的HPE尚未得到充分研究，其在极端场景和效率关键条件下的应用仍有巨大潜力。在本文中，我们是第一个直接从 3D 事件点云估计 2D 人体姿势的人。我们提出了一种新颖的事件表示方式，即光栅化事件点云，将事件聚合在小时间片的同一位置上。它保留了来自多个统计线索的 3D 特征，并显着降低了内存消耗和计算复杂性，这在我们的工作中被证明是高效的。然后，我们利用光栅化事件点云作为三个不同主干网（PointNet、DGCNN 和 Point Transformer）的输入，并使用两个线性层解码器来预测人体关键点的位置。我们发现，基于我们的方法，PointNet 以更快的速度实现了有希望的结果，而 Point Transfomer 达到了更高的精度，甚至接近以前基于事件帧的方法。一组全面的结果表明，我们提出的方法对于事件驱动的人体姿势估计中的这些 3D 主干模型始终有效。我们基于具有 2048 个点输入的 PointNet 的方法在 DHP19 数据集上的 MPJPE3D 中达到了 82.46mm，而在 NVIDIA Jetson Xavier NX 边缘计算平台上的延迟仅为 12.29ms，非常适合使用事件摄像机进行实时检测。代码可在 https://github.com/MasterHow/EventPointPose 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于3D事件点云的高效人体姿态估计方法，通过栅格化事件点云表示和多种神经网络主干实现快速准确的姿态预测。
AI.motivation: 传统RGB图像人体姿态估计在极端场景和效率敏感场景存在局限，而事件相机在动态场景中具有高时间分辨率和低功耗优势，但事件驱动的HPE研究尚不充分。
AI.method: 提出栅格化事件点云表示方法，聚合时空邻域事件特征后，采用PointNet/DGCNN/Point Transformer三种主干网络配合双线性解码器预测2D关键点位置。
AI.result: 在DHP19数据集上，PointNet方案以2048点输入实现82.46mm MPJPE3D精度，仅需12.29ms推理延迟；Point Transformer精度接近事件帧方法，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在保持高精度的同时显著降低计算复杂度，证明了事件点云表征在实时人体姿态估计中的可行性，为边缘设备部署提供新思路。

method: 提出栅格化事件点云表示方法，聚合时空邻域事件特征后，采用PointNet/DGCNN/Point Transformer三种主干网络配合双线性解码器预测2D关键点位置。
result: 在DHP19数据集上，PointNet方案以2048点输入实现82.46mm MPJPE3D精度，仅需12.29ms推理延迟；Point Transformer精度接近事件帧方法，验证了方法有效性。
conclusion: 所提方法在保持高精度的同时显著降低计算复杂度，证明了事件点云表征在实时人体姿态估计中的可行性，为边缘设备部署提供新思路。
search_text: Efficient Human Pose Estimation via 3D Event Point Cloud 通过 3D 事件点云进行高效人体姿势估计 Human Pose Estimation (HPE) based on RGB images has experienced a rapid development benefiting from deep learning. However, event-based HPE has not been fully studied, which remains great potential for applications in extreme scenes and efficiency-critical conditions. In this paper, we are the first to estimate 2D human pose directly from 3D event point cloud. We propose a novel representation of events, the rasterized event point cloud, aggregating events on the same position of a small time slice. It maintains the 3D features from multiple statistical cues and significantly reduces memory consumption and computation complexity, proved to be efficient in our work. We then leverage the rasterized event point cloud as input to three different backbones, PointNet, DGCNN, and Point Transformer, with two linear layer decoders to predict the location of human keypoints. We find that based on our method, PointNet achieves promising results with much faster speed, whereas Point Transfomer reaches much higher accuracy, even close to previous event-frame-based methods. A comprehensive set of results demonstrates that our proposed method is consistently effective for these 3D backbone models in event-driven human pose estimation. Our method based on PointNet with 2048 points input achieves 82.46mm in MPJPE3D on the DHP19 dataset, while only has a latency of 12.29ms on an NVIDIA Jetson Xavier NX edge computing platform, which is ideally suitable for real-time detection with event cameras. Code is available at https://github.com/MasterHow/EventPointPose. 基于RGB图像的人体姿态估计（HPE）受益于深度学习的快速发展。然而，基于事件的HPE尚未得到充分研究，其在极端场景和效率关键条件下的应用仍有巨大潜力。在本文中，我们是第一个直接从 3D 事件点云估计 2D 人体姿势的人。我们提出了一种新颖的事件表示方式，即光栅化事件点云，将事件聚合在小时间片的同一位置上。它保留了来自多个统计线索的 3D 特征，并显着降低了内存消耗和计算复杂性，这在我们的工作中被证明是高效的。然后，我们利用光栅化事件点云作为三个不同主干网（PointNet、DGCNN 和 Point Transformer）的输入，并使用两个线性层解码器来预测人体关键点的位置。我们发现，基于我们的方法，PointNet 以更快的速度实现了有希望的结果，而 Point Transfomer 达到了更高的精度，甚至接近以前基于事件帧的方法。一组全面的结果表明，我们提出的方法对于事件驱动的人体姿势估计中的这些 3D 主干模型始终有效。我们基于具有 2048 个点输入的 PointNet 的方法在 DHP19 数据集上的 MPJPE3D 中达到了 82.46mm，而在 NVIDIA Jetson Xavier NX 边缘计算平台上的延迟仅为 12.29ms，非常适合使用事件摄像机进行实时检测。代码可在 https://github.com/MasterHow/EventPointPose 获取。 本文提出一种基于3D事件点云的高效人体姿态估计方法，通过栅格化事件点云表示和多种神经网络主干实现快速准确的姿态预测。 Jiaan Chen,Hao Shi,Yaozu Ye,Kailun Yang,Lei Sun,Kaiwei Wang cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Faezeh Gholamrezaie,Mohammad Manthouri
title: cycle text2face: cycle text-to-face gan via transformers
title_zh: Cycle text2face：通过 Transformer 循环文本到面部 gan
abstract: Text-to-face is a subset of text-to-image that require more complex architecture due to their more detailed production. In this paper, we present an encoder-decoder model called Cycle Text2Face. Cycle Text2Face is a new initiative in the encoder part, it uses a sentence transformer and GAN to generate the image described by the text. The Cycle is completed by reproducing the text of the face in the decoder part of the model. Evaluating the model using the CelebA dataset, leads to better results than previous GAN-based models. In measuring the quality of the generate face, in addition to satisfying the human audience, we obtain an FID score of 3.458. This model, with high-speed processing, provides quality face images in the short time.
summary: Text-to-face is a subset of text-to-image that require more complex architecture due to their more detailed production. In this paper, we present an encoder-decoder model called Cycle Text2Face. Cycle Text2Face is a new initiative in the encoder part, it uses a sentence transformer and GAN to generate the image described by the text. The Cycle is completed by reproducing the text of the face in the decoder part of the model. Evaluating the model using the CelebA dataset, leads to better results than previous GAN-based models. In measuring the quality of the generate face, in addition to satisfying the human audience, we obtain an FID score of 3.458. This model, with high-speed processing, provides quality face images in the short time.
abstract_zh: 文本到面部是文本到图像的子集，由于其更详细的生产而需要更复杂的架构。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为 Cycle Text2Face 的编码器-解码器模型。 Cycle Text2Face是编码器部分的一项新举措，它使用句子转换器和GAN来生成文本描述的图像。该循环是通过在模型的解码器部分再现面部文本来完成的。使用 CelebA 数据集评估模型可以得到比之前基于 GAN 的模型更好的结果。在测量生成人脸的质量时，除了满足人类观众的要求外，我们还获得了 3.458 的 FID 分数。该模型具有高速处理能力，可在短时间内提供高质量的人脸图像。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Transformer和GAN的文本到人脸生成模型Cycle Text2Face，通过编码器-解码器结构实现文本与人脸图像的双向生成。
AI.motivation: 文本到人脸生成需处理更复杂的细节信息，传统GAN模型存在生成质量与效率不足的问题，需探索更优架构方案。
AI.method: 采用句子Transformer编码文本特征，结合GAN生成人脸图像；通过解码器循环重构文本描述实现双向约束，使用CelebA数据集进行训练与评估。
AI.result: 在CelebA数据集上取得FID 3.458的生成质量，较以往GAN模型表现更优，且具备高速处理能力，可快速生成高质量人脸图像。
AI.conclusion: Cycle Text2Face通过引入Transformer与循环机制有效提升了文本到人脸生成的质量与效率，为相关应用提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Christian Ganhör,David Penz,Navid Rekabsaz,Oleg Lesota,Markus Schedl
title: Unlearning Protected User Attributes in Recommendations with Adversarial Training
title_zh: 通过对抗性训练忘记推荐中受保护的用户属性
abstract: Collaborative filtering algorithms capture underlying consumption patterns, including the ones specific to particular demographics or protected information of users, e.g. gender, race, and location. These encoded biases can influence the decision of a recommendation system (RS) towards further separation of the contents provided to various demographic subgroups, and raise privacy concerns regarding the disclosure of users' protected attributes. In this work, we investigate the possibility and challenges of removing specific protected information of users from the learned interaction representations of a RS algorithm, while maintaining its effectiveness. Specifically, we incorporate adversarial training into the state-of-the-art MultVAE architecture, resulting in a novel model, Adversarial Variational Auto-Encoder with Multinomial Likelihood (Adv-MultVAE), which aims at removing the implicit information of protected attributes while preserving recommendation performance. We conduct experiments on the MovieLens-1M and LFM-2b-DemoBias datasets, and evaluate the effectiveness of the bias mitigation method based on the inability of external attackers in revealing the users' gender information from the model. Comparing with baseline MultVAE, the results show that Adv-MultVAE, with marginal deterioration in performance (w.r.t. NDCG and recall), largely mitigates inherent biases in the model on both datasets.
summary: Collaborative filtering algorithms capture underlying consumption patterns, including the ones specific to particular demographics or protected information of users, e.g. gender, race, and location. These encoded biases can influence the decision of a recommendation system (RS) towards further separation of the contents provided to various demographic subgroups, and raise privacy concerns regarding the disclosure of users' protected attributes. In this work, we investigate the possibility and challenges of removing specific protected information of users from the learned interaction representations of a RS algorithm, while maintaining its effectiveness. Specifically, we incorporate adversarial training into the state-of-the-art MultVAE architecture, resulting in a novel model, Adversarial Variational Auto-Encoder with Multinomial Likelihood (Adv-MultVAE), which aims at removing the implicit information of protected attributes while preserving recommendation performance. We conduct experiments on the MovieLens-1M and LFM-2b-DemoBias datasets, and evaluate the effectiveness of the bias mitigation method based on the inability of external attackers in revealing the users' gender information from the model. Comparing with baseline MultVAE, the results show that Adv-MultVAE, with marginal deterioration in performance (w.r.t. NDCG and recall), largely mitigates inherent biases in the model on both datasets.
abstract_zh: 协作过滤算法捕获潜在的消费模式，包括特定于特定人口统计数据或用户受保护信息的消费模式，例如性别、种族和地点。这些编码偏差可能会影响推荐系统 (RS) 进一步分离提供给不同人口统计子组的内容的决策，并引发有关用户受保护属性泄露的隐私问题。在这项工作中，我们研究了从 RS 算法学习的交互表示中删除用户的特定受保护信息，同时保持其有效性的可能性和挑战。具体来说，我们将对抗性训练纳入最先进的 MultVAE 架构中，从而产生了一种新颖的模型，即具有多项似然的对抗性变分自动编码器（Adv-MultVAE），其目的是在保留推荐性能的同时去除受保护属性的隐式信息。我们在 MovieLens-1M 和 LFM-2b-DemoBias 数据集上进行了实验，并基于外部攻击者无法从模型中揭示用户的性别信息来评估偏差缓解方法的有效性。与基线 MultVAE 相比，结果表明 Adv-MultVAE 的性能略有下降（w.r.t. NDCG 和召回），很大程度上减轻了模型在两个数据集上的固有偏差。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过对抗训练去除推荐系统中用户隐含的受保护属性（如性别），同时保持推荐效果。
AI.motivation: 协同过滤算法可能隐含用户敏感属性信息，导致推荐内容分化并引发隐私泄露风险，需在消除偏见的同时保障推荐性能。
AI.method: 将对抗训练融入MultVAE架构，提出Adv-MultVAE模型，通过对抗损失削弱用户隐含属性信息的编码。
AI.result: 在MovieLens-1M和LFM-2b-DemoBias数据集上，Adv-MultVAE相较基线模型仅轻微损失NDCG和召回率，显著降低性别信息泄露风险。
AI.conclusion: 对抗训练有效缓解推荐模型中的属性偏见，且性能损失可控，为隐私保护推荐系统提供可行方案。

authors_text: Farhad Nazari,Darius Nahavandi,Navid Mohajer,Abbas Khosravi
title: Human Activity Recognition from Knee Angle Using Machine Learning Techniques
title_zh: 使用机器学习技术从膝盖角度进行人类活动识别
comment: Published in 2021 IEEE International Conference on Systems, Man, and Cybernetics (SMC)
comments: Published in 2021 IEEE International Conference on Systems, Man, and Cybernetics (SMC)
abstract: Human Activity Recognition (HAR) is a crucial technology for many applications such as smart homes, surveillance, human assistance and health care. This technology utilises pattern recognition and can contribute to the development of human-in-the-loop control of different systems such as orthoses and exoskeletons. The majority of reported studies use a small dataset collected from an experiment for a specific purpose. The downsides of this approach include: 1) it is hard to generalise the outcome to different people with different biomechanical characteristics and health conditions, and 2) it cannot be implemented in applications other than the original experiment. To address these deficiencies, the current study investigates using a publicly available dataset collected for pathology diagnosis purposes to train Machine Learning (ML) algorithms. A dataset containing knee motion of participants performing different exercises has been used to classify human activity. The algorithms used in this study are Gaussian Naive Bayes, Decision Tree, Random Forest, K-Nearest Neighbors Vote, Support Vector Machine and Gradient Boosting. Furthermore, two training approaches are compared to raw data (de-noised) and manually extracted features. The results show up to 0.94 performance of the Area Under the ROC Curve (AUC) metric for 11-fold cross-validation for Gradient Boosting algorithm using raw data. This outcome reflects the validity and potential use of the proposed approach for this type of dataset.
summary: Human Activity Recognition (HAR) is a crucial technology for many applications such as smart homes, surveillance, human assistance and health care. This technology utilises pattern recognition and can contribute to the development of human-in-the-loop control of different systems such as orthoses and exoskeletons. The majority of reported studies use a small dataset collected from an experiment for a specific purpose. The downsides of this approach include: 1) it is hard to generalise the outcome to different people with different biomechanical characteristics and health conditions, and 2) it cannot be implemented in applications other than the original experiment. To address these deficiencies, the current study investigates using a publicly available dataset collected for pathology diagnosis purposes to train Machine Learning (ML) algorithms. A dataset containing knee motion of participants performing different exercises has been used to classify human activity. The algorithms used in this study are Gaussian Naive Bayes, Decision Tree, Random Forest, K-Nearest Neighbors Vote, Support Vector Machine and Gradient Boosting. Furthermore, two training approaches are compared to raw data (de-noised) and manually extracted features. The results show up to 0.94 performance of the Area Under the ROC Curve (AUC) metric for 11-fold cross-validation for Gradient Boosting algorithm using raw data. This outcome reflects the validity and potential use of the proposed approach for this type of dataset.
abstract_zh: 人类活动识别 (HAR) 是智能家居、监控、人类援助和医疗保健等许多应用的关键技术。该技术利用模式识别，有助于开发矫形器和外骨骼等不同系统的人在环控制。大多数报告的研究都使用从实验中收集的小数据集来达到特定目的。这种方法的缺点包括：1）很难将结果推广到具有不同生物力学特征和健康状况的不同人，2）它无法在原始实验以外的应用中实施。为了解决这些缺陷，当前的研究使用为病理诊断目的收集的公开数据集来训练机器学习 (ML) 算法。包含执行不同练习的参与者的膝盖运动的数据集已用于对人类活动进行分类。本研究中使用的算法有高斯朴素贝叶斯、决策树、随机森林、K 最近邻投票、支持向量机和梯度提升。此外，将两种训练方法与原始数据（去噪）和手动提取的特征进行比较。结果显示，使用原始数据对梯度提升算法进行 11 倍交叉验证时，ROC 曲线下面积 (AUC) 指标的性能高达 0.94。这一结果反映了所提出的方法对于此类数据集的有效性和潜在用途。

AI.tldr: 本论文利用公开数据集和机器学习算法进行基于膝关节角度的人类活动识别。
AI.motivation: 现有研究使用的实验数据集存在泛化能力差和应用场景受限的问题，需探索更通用的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用高斯朴素贝叶斯、随机森林等六种机器学习算法，对比原始数据与手动提取特征两种训练方式。
AI.result: 梯度提升算法在原始数据上实现0.94的AUC指标，11折交叉验证效果显著。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了使用病理诊断数据集进行活动识别的可行性，为跨场景应用提供了新思路。

authors_text: Farhad Nazari,Navid Mohajer,Darius Nahavandi,Abbas Khosravi,Saeid Nahavandi
title: Comparison Study of Inertial Sensor Signal Combination for Human Activity Recognition based on Convolutional Neural Networks
title_zh: 基于卷积神经网络的人体活动识别惯性传感器信号组合对比研究
abstract: Human Activity Recognition (HAR) is one of the essential building blocks of so many applications like security, monitoring, the internet of things and human-robot interaction. The research community has developed various methodologies to detect human activity based on various input types. However, most of the research in the field has been focused on applications other than human-in-the-centre applications. This paper focused on optimising the input signals to maximise the HAR performance from wearable sensors. A model based on Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) has been proposed and trained on different signal combinations of three Inertial Measurement Units (IMU) that exhibit the movements of the dominant hand, leg and chest of the subject. The results demonstrate k-fold cross-validation accuracy between 99.77 and 99.98% for signals with the modality of 12 or higher. The performance of lower dimension signals, except signals containing information from both chest and ankle, was far inferior, showing between 73 and 85% accuracy.
summary: Human Activity Recognition (HAR) is one of the essential building blocks of so many applications like security, monitoring, the internet of things and human-robot interaction. The research community has developed various methodologies to detect human activity based on various input types. However, most of the research in the field has been focused on applications other than human-in-the-centre applications. This paper focused on optimising the input signals to maximise the HAR performance from wearable sensors. A model based on Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) has been proposed and trained on different signal combinations of three Inertial Measurement Units (IMU) that exhibit the movements of the dominant hand, leg and chest of the subject. The results demonstrate k-fold cross-validation accuracy between 99.77 and 99.98% for signals with the modality of 12 or higher. The performance of lower dimension signals, except signals containing information from both chest and ankle, was far inferior, showing between 73 and 85% accuracy.
abstract_zh: 人类活动识别 (HAR) 是安全、监控、物联网和人机交互等众多应用的基本构建模块之一。研究界开发了各种方法来根据各种输入类型检测人类活动。然而，该领域的大多数研究都集中在以人为中心的应用之外的应用上。本文重点讨论优化输入信号以最大限度地提高可穿戴传感器的 HAR 性能。已经提出了一种基于卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的模型，并根据三个惯性测量单元 (IMU) 的不同信号组合进行训练，这些惯性测量单元显示了对象的优势手、腿和胸部的运动。结果表明，模态为 12 或更高的信号的 k 倍交叉验证准确度在 99.77% 到 99.98% 之间。除了包含胸部和脚踝信息的信号外，低维信号的性能要差得多，准确度在 73% 到 85% 之间。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的惯性传感器信号组合对人体活动识别（HAR）性能的影响，旨在优化可穿戴设备的输入信号以提高识别准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注非以人为中心的应用，且未充分探讨不同惯性传感器信号组合对HAR性能的影响，尤其在优化输入信号方面存在不足。
AI.method: 提出基于CNN的模型，结合三个惯性测量单元（IMU）的信号（主导手、腿和胸部），通过k折交叉验证评估不同信号组合的性能。
AI.result: 12维及以上信号组合的准确率高达99.77%-99.98%，而低维信号（除含胸部和脚踝信息的组合外）准确率仅为73%-85%。
AI.conclusion: 高维信号组合显著提升HAR性能，而胸部与脚踝信息的结合对低维场景下性能优化具有关键作用。

However, most of the research in the field has been focused on applications other than human-in-the-centre applications. authors_text: Shuang Ge,Kehong Yuan,Maokun Han,Desheng Sun,Huabin Zhang,Qiongyu Ye
title: BSM loss: A superior way in modeling aleatory uncertainty of fine_grained classification
title_zh: BSM 损失：建模细粒度分类的偶然不确定性的一种更好方法
abstract: Artificial intelligence(AI)-assisted method had received much attention in the risk field such as disease diagnosis. Different from the classification of disease types, it is a fine-grained task to classify the medical images as benign or malignant. However, most research only focuses on improving the diagnostic accuracy and ignores the evaluation of model reliability, which limits its clinical application. For clinical practice, calibration presents major challenges in the low-data regime extremely for over-parametrized models and inherent noises. In particular, we discovered that modeling data-dependent uncertainty is more conducive to confidence calibrations. Compared with test-time augmentation(TTA), we proposed a modified Bootstrapping loss(BS loss) function with Mixup data augmentation strategy that can better calibrate predictive uncertainty and capture data distribution transformation without additional inference time. Our experiments indicated that BS loss with Mixup(BSM) model can halve the Expected Calibration Error(ECE) compared to standard data augmentation, deep ensemble and MC dropout. The correlation between uncertainty and similarity of in-domain data is up to -0.4428 under the BSM model. Additionally, the BSM model is able to perceive the semantic distance of out-of-domain data, demonstrating high potential in real-world clinical practice.
summary: Artificial intelligence(AI)-assisted method had received much attention in the risk field such as disease diagnosis. Different from the classification of disease types, it is a fine-grained task to classify the medical images as benign or malignant. However, most research only focuses on improving the diagnostic accuracy and ignores the evaluation of model reliability, which limits its clinical application. For clinical practice, calibration presents major challenges in the low-data regime extremely for over-parametrized models and inherent noises. In particular, we discovered that modeling data-dependent uncertainty is more conducive to confidence calibrations. Compared with test-time augmentation(TTA), we proposed a modified Bootstrapping loss(BS loss) function with Mixup data augmentation strategy that can better calibrate predictive uncertainty and capture data distribution transformation without additional inference time. Our experiments indicated that BS loss with Mixup(BSM) model can halve the Expected Calibration Error(ECE) compared to standard data augmentation, deep ensemble and MC dropout. The correlation between uncertainty and similarity of in-domain data is up to -0.4428 under the BSM model. Additionally, the BSM model is able to perceive the semantic distance of out-of-domain data, demonstrating high potential in real-world clinical practice.
abstract_zh: 人工智能（AI）辅助方法在疾病诊断等风险领域备受关注。与疾病类型的分类不同，将医学图像分类为良性或恶性是一项细粒度的任务。然而，大多数研究仅注重提高诊断准确性，而忽略了模型可靠性的评估，这限制了其临床应用。对于临床实践来说，校准在低数据情况下提出了重大挑战，特别是对于过度参数化模型和固有噪声。特别是，我们发现对数据相关的不确定性进行建模更有利于置信度校准。与测试时间增强（TTA）相比，我们提出了一种带有Mixup数据增强策略的改进的引导损失（BS损失）函数，可以更好地校准预测不确定性并捕获数据分布变换，而无需额外的推理时间。我们的实验表明，与标准数据增强、深度集成和 MC dropout 相比，混合 (BSM) 模型的 BS 损失可以将预期校准误差 (ECE) 减半。 BSM模型下域内数据的不确定性和相似性之间的相关性高达-0.4428。此外，BSM 模型能够感知域外数据的语义距离，在现实临床实践中展现出巨大的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的Bootstrapping损失函数（BSM loss），用于在细粒度医学图像分类任务中更准确地建模数据相关不确定性，以提高模型可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究过度关注分类准确率而忽视模型可靠性评估，导致AI辅助诊断在临床应用中存在校准不足的问题，特别是在数据量少和模型噪声较大的场景下。
AI.method: 结合改进的Bootstrapping损失函数与Mixup数据增强策略，设计BSM损失函数，在不增加推理时间的前提下实现预测不确定性校准与数据分布变化捕捉。
AI.result: BSM模型使预期校准误差（ECE）较标准数据增强、深度集成和MC dropout方法降低50%，与域内数据相似度相关性达-0.4428，并能感知域外数据语义距离。
AI.conclusion: BSM损失函数通过有效建模数据相关不确定性，显著提升模型校准能力，在临床实践中具有重要应用潜力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的Bootstrapping损失函数（BSM loss），用于在细粒度医学图像分类任务中更准确地建模数据相关不确定性，以提高模型可靠性。
ai_content.motivation: 现有研究过度关注分类准确率而忽视模型可靠性评估，导致AI辅助诊断在临床应用中存在校准不足的问题，特别是在数据量少和模型噪声较大的场景下。
ai_content.method: 结合改进的Bootstrapping损失函数与Mixup数据增强策略，设计BSM损失函数，在不增加推理时间的前提下实现预测不确定性校准与数据分布变化捕捉。
ai_content.result: BSM模型使预期校准误差（ECE）较标准数据增强、深度集成和MC dropout方法降低50%，与域内数据相似度相关性达-0.4428，并能感知域外数据语义距离。
ai_content.conclusion: BSM损失函数通过有效建模数据相关不确定性，显著提升模型校准能力，在临床实践中具有重要应用潜力。
