search_text: BSM loss: A superior way in modeling aleatory uncertainty of fine_grained classification BSM 损失：建模细粒度分类的偶然不确定性的一种更好方法 Artificial intelligence(AI)-assisted method had received much attention in the risk field such as disease diagnosis. Different from the classification of disease types, it is a fine-grained task to classify the medical images as benign or malignant. However, most research only focuses on improving the diagnostic accuracy and ignores the evaluation of model reliability, which limits its clinical application. For clinical practice, calibration presents major challenges in the low-data regime extremely for over-parametrized models and inherent noises. In particular, we discovered that modeling data-dependent uncertainty is more conducive to confidence calibrations. Compared with test-time augmentation(TTA), we proposed a modified Bootstrapping loss(BS loss) function with Mixup data augmentation strategy that can better calibrate predictive uncertainty and capture data distribution transformation without additional inference time. Our experiments indicated that BS loss with Mixup(BSM) model can halve the Expected Calibration Error(ECE) compared to standard data augmentation, deep ensemble and MC dropout. The correlation between uncertainty and similarity of in-domain data is up to -0.4428 under the BSM model. Additionally, the BSM model is able to perceive the semantic distance of out-of-domain data, demonstrating high potential in real-world clinical practice. 人工智能（AI）辅助方法在疾病诊断等风险领域备受关注。与疾病类型的分类不同，将医学图像分类为良性或恶性是一项细粒度的任务。然而，大多数研究仅注重提高诊断准确性，而忽略了模型可靠性的评估，这限制了其临床应用。对于临床实践来说，校准在低数据情况下提出了重大挑战，特别是对于过度参数化模型和固有噪声。特别是，我们发现对数据相关的不确定性进行建模更有利于置信度校准。与测试时间增强（TTA）相比，我们提出了一种带有Mixup数据增强策略的改进的引导损失（BS损失）函数，可以更好地校准预测不确定性并捕获数据分布变换，而无需额外的推理时间。我们的实验表明，与标准数据增强、深度集成和 MC dropout 相比，混合 (BSM) 模型的 BS 损失可以将预期校准误差 (ECE) 减半。 BSM模型下域内数据的不确定性和相似性之间的相关性高达-0.4428。此外，BSM 模型能够感知域外数据的语义距离，在现实临床实践中展现出巨大的潜力。 本文提出一种改进的Bootstrapping损失函数（BSM loss），用于在细粒度医学图像分类任务中更准确地建模数据相关不确定性，以提高模型可靠性。 Shuang Ge,Kehong Yuan,Maokun Han,Desheng Sun,Huabin Zhang,Qiongyu Ye cs.CV

authors_text: Yiqing Xu,Wei Gao,David Hsu
title: Receding Horizon Inverse Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 后退地平线逆强化学习
comment: The paper is accepted by Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS) 2022
comments: The paper is accepted by Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS) 2022
abstract: Inverse reinforcement learning (IRL) seeks to infer a cost function that explains the underlying goals and preferences of expert demonstrations. This paper presents receding horizon inverse reinforcement learning (RHIRL), a new IRL algorithm for high-dimensional, noisy, continuous systems with black-box dynamic models. RHIRL addresses two key challenges of IRL: scalability and robustness. To handle high-dimensional continuous systems, RHIRL matches the induced optimal trajectories with expert demonstrations locally in a receding horizon manner and 'stitches' together the local solutions to learn the cost; it thereby avoids the 'curse of dimensionality'. This contrasts sharply with earlier algorithms that match with expert demonstrations globally over the entire high-dimensional state space. To be robust against imperfect expert demonstrations and control noise, RHIRL learns a state-dependent cost function 'disentangled' from system dynamics under mild conditions. Experiments on benchmark tasks show that RHIRL outperforms several leading IRL algorithms in most instances. We also prove that the cumulative error of RHIRL grows linearly with the task duration.
summary: Inverse reinforcement learning (IRL) seeks to infer a cost function that explains the underlying goals and preferences of expert demonstrations. This paper presents receding horizon inverse reinforcement learning (RHIRL), a new IRL algorithm for high-dimensional, noisy, continuous systems with black-box dynamic models. RHIRL addresses two key challenges of IRL: scalability and robustness. To handle high-dimensional continuous systems, RHIRL matches the induced optimal trajectories with expert demonstrations locally in a receding horizon manner and 'stitches' together the local solutions to learn the cost; it thereby avoids the 'curse of dimensionality'. This contrasts sharply with earlier algorithms that match with expert demonstrations globally over the entire high-dimensional state space. To be robust against imperfect expert demonstrations and control noise, RHIRL learns a state-dependent cost function 'disentangled' from system dynamics under mild conditions. Experiments on benchmark tasks show that RHIRL outperforms several leading IRL algorithms in most instances. We also prove that the cumulative error of RHIRL grows linearly with the task duration.
abstract_zh: 逆强化学习（IRL）旨在推断一个成本函数，以解释专家演示的基本目标和偏好。本文提出了后退地平线逆强化学习（RHIRL），这是一种新的 IRL 算法，适用于具有黑盒动态模型的高维、噪声、连续系统。 RHIRL 解决了 IRL 的两个关键挑战：可扩展性和稳健性。为了处理高维连续系统，RHIRL 将诱导的最佳轨迹与本地专家演示以后退的方式进行匹配，并将本地解决方案“缝合”在一起以了解成本；从而避免了“维数灾难”。这与早期算法形成鲜明对比，早期算法在整个高维状态空间上与全球专家演示相匹配。为了对不完美的专家演示和控制噪声具有鲁棒性，RHIRL 学习了一种与状态相关的成本函数，该函数在温和条件下与系统动力学“分离”。基准任务实验表明，RHIRL 在大多数情况下优于几种领先的 IRL 算法。我们还证明 RHIRL 的累积误差随着任务持续时间线性增长。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为RHIRL的逆强化学习算法，用于解决高维、连续系统中的成本函数推断问题，提升算法的可扩展性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有逆强化学习算法在处理高维连续系统时面临可扩展性挑战（如维度灾难），且对噪声和不完美专家示范的鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 通过滚动时域局部匹配专家轨迹并拼接局部解来学习成本函数，避免维度灾难；同时学习与系统动态解耦的状态相关成本函数以提高鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在基准任务中优于多种主流IRL算法，且理论证明其累积误差随任务时长线性增长。
AI.conclusion: RHIRL有效解决了高维连续系统的逆强化学习问题，在可扩展性和鲁棒性方面优于现有方法，并具有理论误差界保证。

authors_text: Julian Tritscher,Fabian Gwinner,Daniel Schlör,Anna Krause,Andreas Hotho
title: Open ERP System Data For Occupational Fraud Detection
title_zh: 开放 ERP 系统数据用于职业欺诈检测
abstract: Recent estimates report that companies lose 5% of their revenue to occupational fraud. Since most medium-sized and large companies employ Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) systems to track vast amounts of information regarding their business process, researchers have in the past shown interest in automatically detecting fraud through ERP system data. Current research in this area, however, is hindered by the fact that ERP system data is not publicly available for the development and comparison of fraud detection methods. We therefore endeavour to generate public ERP system data that includes both normal business operation and fraud. We propose a strategy for generating ERP system data through a serious game, model a variety of fraud scenarios in cooperation with auditing experts, and generate data from a simulated make-to-stock production company with multiple research participants. We aggregate the generated data into ready to used datasets for fraud detection in ERP systems, and supply both the raw and aggregated data to the general public to allow for open development and comparison of fraud detection approaches on ERP system data.
summary: Recent estimates report that companies lose 5% of their revenue to occupational fraud. Since most medium-sized and large companies employ Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) systems to track vast amounts of information regarding their business process, researchers have in the past shown interest in automatically detecting fraud through ERP system data. Current research in this area, however, is hindered by the fact that ERP system data is not publicly available for the development and comparison of fraud detection methods. We therefore endeavour to generate public ERP system data that includes both normal business operation and fraud. We propose a strategy for generating ERP system data through a serious game, model a variety of fraud scenarios in cooperation with auditing experts, and generate data from a simulated make-to-stock production company with multiple research participants. We aggregate the generated data into ready to used datasets for fraud detection in ERP systems, and supply both the raw and aggregated data to the general public to allow for open development and comparison of fraud detection approaches on ERP system data.
abstract_zh: 最近的估计表明，公司因职业欺诈而损失了 5% 的收入。由于大多数中型和大型公司都采用企业资源规划 (ERP) 系统来跟踪有关其业务流程的大量信息，因此研究人员过去对通过 ERP 系统数据自动检测欺诈表现出兴趣。然而，目前该领域的研究受到以下事实的阻碍：ERP 系统数据无法公开用于欺诈检测方法的开发和比较。因此，我们努力生成公共 ERP 系统数据，其中包括正常业务运营和欺诈行为。我们提出了通过严肃的游戏生成 ERP 系统数据的策略，与审计专家合作对各种欺诈场景进行建模，并从具有多个研究参与者的模拟按库存生产公司生成数据。我们将生成的数据聚合成可立即使用的数据集，用于 ERP 系统中的欺诈检测，并向公众提供原始数据和聚合数据，以便对 ERP 系统数据上的欺诈检测方法进行开放开发和比较。

AI.tldr: 生成包含正常业务操作和欺诈场景的公开ERP系统数据集，以促进职业欺诈检测方法的研究与比较。
AI.motivation: 由于ERP系统数据不公开，限制了欺诈检测方法的开发和比较，因此需要创建公开数据集以推动相关研究。
AI.method: 通过严肃游戏和审计专家合作设计欺诈场景，在模拟的按库存生产公司中生成数据，并整合为原始和聚合数据集。
AI.result: 生成并公开了包含正常操作和欺诈案例的ERP系统原始及聚合数据集，供研究者用于开发和比较欺诈检测方法。
AI.conclusion: 公开的ERP数据集为职业欺诈检测方法的开发和比较提供了基础，有助于推动该领域的研究进展。

Since most medium-sized and large companies employ Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) systems to track vast amounts of information regarding their business process, researchers have in the past shown interest in automatically detecting fraud through ERP system data. Current research in this area, however, is hindered by the fact that ERP system data is not publicly available for the development and comparison of fraud detection methods. We therefore endeavour to generate public ERP system data that includes both normal business operation and fraud. We propose a strategy for generating ERP system data through a serious game, model a variety of fraud scenarios in cooperation with auditing experts, and generate data from a simulated make-to-stock production company with multiple research participants. We aggregate the generated data into ready to used datasets for fraud detection in ERP systems, and supply both the raw and aggregated data to the general public to allow for open development and comparison of fraud detection approaches on ERP system data. 最近的估计表明，公司因职业欺诈而损失了 5% 的收入。由于大多数中型和大型公司都采用企业资源规划 (ERP) 系统来跟踪有关其业务流程的大量信息，因此研究人员过去对通过 ERP 系统数据自动检测欺诈表现出兴趣。然而，目前该领域的研究受到以下事实的阻碍：ERP 系统数据无法公开用于欺诈检测方法的开发和比较。因此，我们努力生成公共 ERP 系统数据，其中包括正常业务运营和欺诈行为。我们提出了通过严肃的游戏生成 ERP 系统数据的策略，与审计专家合作对各种欺诈场景进行建模，并从具有多个研究参与者的模拟按库存生产公司生成数据。我们将生成的数据聚合成可立即使用的数据集，用于 ERP 系统中的欺诈检测，并向公众提供原始数据和聚合数据，以便对 ERP 系统数据上的欺诈检测方法进行开放开发和比较。 生成包含正常业务操作和欺诈场景的公开ERP系统数据集，以促进职业欺诈检测方法的研究与比较。 Julian Tritscher,Fabian Gwinner,Daniel Schlör,Anna Krause,Andreas Hotho cs.AI

authors_text: Xijie Huang,Zhiqiang Shen,Shichao Li,Zechun Liu,Xianghong Hu,Jeffry Wicaksana,Eric Xing,Kwang-Ting Cheng
title: SDQ: Stochastic Differentiable Quantization with Mixed Precision
title_zh: SDQ：混合精度的随机可微量化
abstract: In order to deploy deep models in a computationally efficient manner, model quantization approaches have been frequently used. In addition, as new hardware that supports mixed bitwidth arithmetic operations, recent research on mixed precision quantization (MPQ) begins to fully leverage the capacity of representation by searching optimized bitwidths for different layers and modules in a network. However, previous studies mainly search the MPQ strategy in a costly scheme using reinforcement learning, neural architecture search, etc., or simply utilize partial prior knowledge for bitwidth assignment, which might be biased and sub-optimal. In this work, we present a novel Stochastic Differentiable Quantization (SDQ) method that can automatically learn the MPQ strategy in a more flexible and globally-optimized space with smoother gradient approximation. Particularly, Differentiable Bitwidth Parameters (DBPs) are employed as the probability factors in stochastic quantization between adjacent bitwidth choices. After the optimal MPQ strategy is acquired, we further train our network with entropy-aware bin regularization and knowledge distillation. We extensively evaluate our method for several networks on different hardware (GPUs and FPGA) and datasets. SDQ outperforms all state-of-the-art mixed or single precision quantization with a lower bitwidth and is even better than the full-precision counterparts across various ResNet and MobileNet families, demonstrating the effectiveness and superiority of our method.
summary: In order to deploy deep models in a computationally efficient manner, model quantization approaches have been frequently used. In addition, as new hardware that supports mixed bitwidth arithmetic operations, recent research on mixed precision quantization (MPQ) begins to fully leverage the capacity of representation by searching optimized bitwidths for different layers and modules in a network. However, previous studies mainly search the MPQ strategy in a costly scheme using reinforcement learning, neural architecture search, etc., or simply utilize partial prior knowledge for bitwidth assignment, which might be biased and sub-optimal. In this work, we present a novel Stochastic Differentiable Quantization (SDQ) method that can automatically learn the MPQ strategy in a more flexible and globally-optimized space with smoother gradient approximation. Particularly, Differentiable Bitwidth Parameters (DBPs) are employed as the probability factors in stochastic quantization between adjacent bitwidth choices. After the optimal MPQ strategy is acquired, we further train our network with entropy-aware bin regularization and knowledge distillation. We extensively evaluate our method for several networks on different hardware (GPUs and FPGA) and datasets. SDQ outperforms all state-of-the-art mixed or single precision quantization with a lower bitwidth and is even better than the full-precision counterparts across various ResNet and MobileNet families, demonstrating the effectiveness and superiority of our method.
abstract_zh: 为了以计算有效的方式部署深度模型，经常使用模型量化方法。此外，作为支持混合位宽算术运算的新硬件，最近对混合精度量化（MPQ）的研究开始通过搜索网络中不同层和模块的优化位宽来充分利用表示能力。然而，以往的研究主要是使用强化学习、神经架构搜索等在昂贵的方案中搜索MPQ策略，或者简单地利用部分先验知识进行位宽分配，这可能是有偏差和次优的。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的随机可微量化（SDQ）方法，该方法可以在更灵活和全局优化的空间中自动学习 MPQ 策略，并具有更平滑的梯度逼近。特别地，可微分位宽参数(DBP)被用作相邻位宽选择之间的随机量化中的概率因子。获得最佳 MPQ 策略后，我们通过熵感知 bin 正则化和知识蒸馏进一步训练我们的网络。我们针对不同硬件（GPU 和 FPGA）和数据集上的多个网络广泛评估了我们的方法。 SDQ 的性能优于所有最先进的混合或单精度量化，且位宽较低，甚至优于各种 ResNet 和 MobileNet 系列的全精度量化，这证明了我们方法的有效性和优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SDQ的随机可微量化方法，通过混合精度自动学习优化模型量化策略，以提高深度模型的计算效率。
AI.motivation: 现有混合精度量化方法依赖强化学习或神经架构搜索等高成本方案，或仅利用部分先验知识进行位宽分配，可能导致偏差和次优结果。
AI.method: 引入可微位宽参数（DBP）作为随机量化中的概率因子，通过平滑梯度近似在全局优化空间中学习混合精度策略，并结合熵感知二值正则化和知识蒸馏进行网络训练。
AI.result: 在多种网络（ResNet、MobileNet）和硬件（GPU、FPGA）上，SDQ在更低位宽下优于所有现有混合或单精度量化方法，甚至超越全精度模型。
AI.conclusion: SDQ方法通过灵活的全局优化和梯度近似，有效提升了混合精度量化性能，验证了其在模型压缩领域的优越性。

authors_text: Jasper Uijlings,Thomas Mensink,Vittorio Ferrari
title: The Missing Link: Finding label relations across datasets
title_zh: 缺失的环节：查找跨数据集的标签关系
abstract: Computer vision is driven by the many datasets available for training or evaluating novel methods. However, each dataset has a different set of class labels, visual definition of classes, images following a specific distribution, annotation protocols, etc. In this paper we explore the automatic discovery of visual-semantic relations between labels across datasets. We aim to understand how instances of a certain class in a dataset relate to the instances of another class in another dataset. Are they in an identity, parent/child, overlap relation? Or is there no link between them at all? To find relations between labels across datasets, we propose methods based on language, on vision, and on their combination. We show that we can effectively discover label relations across datasets, as well as their type. We apply our method to four applications: understand label relations, identify missing aspects, increase label specificity, and predict transfer learning gains. We conclude that label relations cannot be established by looking at the names of classes alone, as they depend strongly on how each of the datasets was constructed.
summary: Computer vision is driven by the many datasets available for training or evaluating novel methods. However, each dataset has a different set of class labels, visual definition of classes, images following a specific distribution, annotation protocols, etc. In this paper we explore the automatic discovery of visual-semantic relations between labels across datasets. We aim to understand how instances of a certain class in a dataset relate to the instances of another class in another dataset. Are they in an identity, parent/child, overlap relation? Or is there no link between them at all? To find relations between labels across datasets, we propose methods based on language, on vision, and on their combination. We show that we can effectively discover label relations across datasets, as well as their type. We apply our method to four applications: understand label relations, identify missing aspects, increase label specificity, and predict transfer learning gains. We conclude that label relations cannot be established by looking at the names of classes alone, as they depend strongly on how each of the datasets was constructed.
abstract_zh: 计算机视觉是由许多可用于训练或评估新方法的数据集驱动的。然而，每个数据集都有不同的类标签集、类的视觉定义、遵循特定分布的图像、注释协议等。在本文中，我们探索跨数据集标签之间视觉语义关系的自动发现。我们的目标是了解数据集中某个类的实例如何与另一个数据集中另一个类的实例相关。他们是否处于身份、父/子、重叠关系？或者说它们之间根本就没有联系？为了找到跨数据集标签之间的关系，我们提出了基于语言、视觉及其组合的方法。我们表明，我们可以有效地发现跨数据集的标签关系及其类型。我们将我们的方法应用于四个应用：理解标签关系、识别缺失的方面、增加标签特异性和预测迁移学习增益。我们得出的结论是，标签关系不能仅通过查看类名称来建立，因为它们很大程度上取决于每个数据集的构建方式。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在自动发现跨数据集中标签之间的视觉语义关系，分析不同数据集间类别实例的关联类型。
AI.motivation: 计算机视觉依赖多数据集，但各数据集标签体系、图像分布和标注规范差异显著，需理解跨数据集标签的关联性以提升模型泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出基于语言、视觉及两者结合的方法，通过分析标签语义和视觉特征，识别跨数据集标签间的身份、层级或重叠等关系。
AI.result: 有效发现跨数据集标签关系并分类，应用于理解标签关联、识别缺失类别、提升标签特异性及预测迁移学习效果。
AI.conclusion: 标签关系无法仅通过名称确定，需结合数据集构建方式分析，跨数据集标签关联研究对模型迁移具有重要意义。

authors_text: Doyup Lee,Chiheon Kim,Saehoon Kim,Minsu Cho,Wook-Shin Han
title: Draft-and-Revise: Effective Image Generation with Contextual RQ-Transformer
title_zh: 起草和修订：使用上下文 RQ-Transformer 生成有效的图像
abstract: Although autoregressive models have achieved promising results on image generation, their unidirectional generation process prevents the resultant images from fully reflecting global contexts. To address the issue, we propose an effective image generation framework of Draft-and-Revise with Contextual RQ-transformer to consider global contexts during the generation process. As a generalized VQ-VAE, RQ-VAE first represents a high-resolution image as a sequence of discrete code stacks. After code stacks in the sequence are randomly masked, Contextual RQ-Transformer is trained to infill the masked code stacks based on the unmasked contexts of the image. Then, Contextual RQ-Transformer uses our two-phase decoding, Draft-and-Revise, and generates an image, while exploiting the global contexts of the image during the generation process. Specifically. in the draft phase, our model first focuses on generating diverse images despite rather low quality. Then, in the revise phase, the model iteratively improves the quality of images, while preserving the global contexts of generated images. In experiments, our method achieves state-of-the-art results on conditional image generation. We also validate that the Draft-and-Revise decoding can achieve high performance by effectively controlling the quality-diversity trade-off in image generation.
summary: Although autoregressive models have achieved promising results on image generation, their unidirectional generation process prevents the resultant images from fully reflecting global contexts. To address the issue, we propose an effective image generation framework of Draft-and-Revise with Contextual RQ-transformer to consider global contexts during the generation process. As a generalized VQ-VAE, RQ-VAE first represents a high-resolution image as a sequence of discrete code stacks. After code stacks in the sequence are randomly masked, Contextual RQ-Transformer is trained to infill the masked code stacks based on the unmasked contexts of the image. Then, Contextual RQ-Transformer uses our two-phase decoding, Draft-and-Revise, and generates an image, while exploiting the global contexts of the image during the generation process. Specifically. in the draft phase, our model first focuses on generating diverse images despite rather low quality. Then, in the revise phase, the model iteratively improves the quality of images, while preserving the global contexts of generated images. In experiments, our method achieves state-of-the-art results on conditional image generation. We also validate that the Draft-and-Revise decoding can achieve high performance by effectively controlling the quality-diversity trade-off in image generation.
abstract_zh: 尽管自回归模型在图像生成方面取得了有希望的结果，但其单向生成过程阻碍了生成的图像充分反映全局背景。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种有效的图像生成框架，即带有上下文 RQ 转换器的 Draft-and-Revise 图像生成框架，以在生成过程中考虑全局上下文。作为广义的 VQ-VAE，RQ-VAE 首先将高分辨率图像表示为一系列离散代码堆栈。在序列中的代码堆栈被随机屏蔽后，上下文 RQ-Transformer 被训练以根据图像的未屏蔽上下文填充屏蔽的代码堆栈。然后，Contextual RQ-Transformer 使用我们的两阶段解码、Draft-and-Revise 并生成图像，同时在生成过程中利用图像的全局上下文。具体来说。在草稿阶段，我们的模型首先专注于生成不同的图像，尽管质量相当低。然后，在修订阶段，模型迭代地提高图像质量，同时保留生成图像的全局上下文。在实验中，我们的方法在条件图像生成方面取得了最先进的结果。我们还验证了草稿和修订解码可以通过有效控制图像生成中的质量多样性权衡来实现高性能。

search_text: Draft-and-Revise: Effective Image Generation with Contextual RQ-Transformer 起草和修订：使用上下文 RQ-Transformer 生成有效的图像 Although autoregressive models have achieved promising results on image generation, their unidirectional generation process prevents the resultant images from fully reflecting global contexts. After code stacks in the sequence are randomly masked, Contextual RQ-Transformer is trained to infill the masked code stacks based on the unmasked contexts of the image. Then, Contextual RQ-Transformer uses our two-phase decoding, Draft-and-Revise, and generates an image, while exploiting the global contexts of the image during the generation process. Specifically. in the draft phase, our model first focuses on generating diverse images despite rather low quality. Then, in the revise phase, the model iteratively improves the quality of images, while preserving the global contexts of generated images. In experiments, our method achieves state-of-the-art results on conditional image generation. authors_text: Steven Kelk,Simone Linz,Ruben Meuwese
title: Deep kernelization for the Tree Bisection and Reconnnect (TBR) distance in phylogenetics
title_zh: 系统发生学中树二分和重新连接（TBR）距离的深度核化
comment: 38 pages. In this version a figure has been added, some references have been added, some small typo's have been fixed and the introduction and conclusion have been slightly extended. Submitted for journal review
comments: 38 pages. In this version a figure has been added, some references have been added, some small typo's have been fixed and the introduction and conclusion have been slightly extended. Submitted for journal review
abstract: We describe a kernel of size 9k-8 for the NP-hard problem of computing the Tree Bisection and Reconnect (TBR) distance k between two unrooted binary phylogenetic trees. We achieve this by extending the existing portfolio of reduction rules with three novel new reduction rules. Two of the rules are based on the idea of topologically transforming the trees in a distance-preserving way in order to guarantee execution of earlier reduction rules. The third rule extends the local neighbourhood approach introduced in (Kelk and Linz, Annals of Combinatorics 24(3), 2020) to more global structures, allowing new situations to be identified when deletion of a leaf definitely reduces the TBR distance by one. The bound on the kernel size is tight up to an additive term. Our results also apply to the equivalent problem of computing a Maximum Agreement Forest (MAF) between two unrooted binary phylogenetic trees. We anticipate that our results will be more widely applicable for computing agreement-forest based dissimilarity measures.
summary: We describe a kernel of size 9k-8 for the NP-hard problem of computing the Tree Bisection and Reconnect (TBR) distance k between two unrooted binary phylogenetic trees. We achieve this by extending the existing portfolio of reduction rules with three novel new reduction rules. Two of the rules are based on the idea of topologically transforming the trees in a distance-preserving way in order to guarantee execution of earlier reduction rules. The third rule extends the local neighbourhood approach introduced in (Kelk and Linz, Annals of Combinatorics 24(3), 2020) to more global structures, allowing new situations to be identified when deletion of a leaf definitely reduces the TBR distance by one. The bound on the kernel size is tight up to an additive term. Our results also apply to the equivalent problem of computing a Maximum Agreement Forest (MAF) between two unrooted binary phylogenetic trees. We anticipate that our results will be more widely applicable for computing agreement-forest based dissimilarity measures.
abstract_zh: 我们描述了一个大小为 9k-8 的内核，用于计算两个无根二元系统发育树之间的树二分和重新连接（TBR）距离 k 的 NP 难题。我们通过使用三个新颖的新归约规则扩展现有的归约规则组合来实现这一目标。其中两个规则基于以保持距离的方式对树进行拓扑变换的思想，以保证早期约简规则的执行。第三条规则将（Kelk 和 Linz，Annals of Combinatorics 24(3), 2020）中引入的局部邻域方法扩展到更全局的结构，允许在删除叶子肯定会使 TBR 距离减少 1 时识别新情况。内核大小的界限严格到加法项。我们的结果也适用于计算两个无根二元系统发育树之间的最大一致性森林（MAF）的等效问题。我们预计我们的结果将更广泛地适用于计算基于协议森林的相异性度量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种计算两棵无根二叉系统发育树之间TBR距离的核方法，将问题规模缩减到9k-8的大小。
AI.motivation: TBR距离计算是系统发育学中重要的树比较问题，但其NP难特性需要更高效的算法。现有方法在处理大规模数据时效率不足，需改进核化技术以降低计算复杂度。
AI.method: 通过扩展现有缩减规则，引入三种新规则：两种基于拓扑变换保持距离特性，第三种将局部邻域方法扩展至全局结构以识别叶节点删除对距离的影响。
AI.result: 获得大小为9k-8的紧致核界（误差项内），结果适用于最大一致森林（MAF）计算，提升了基于一致森林的差异度量计算效率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为系统发育树比较提供了更高效的核化框架，未来可拓展至其他基于一致森林的差异度量计算场景。

authors_text: Eric Arazo,Robin Aly,Kevin McGuinness
title: Segmentation Enhanced Lameness Detection in Dairy Cows from RGB and Depth Video
title_zh: 通过 RGB 和深度视频分割增强奶牛跛行检测
comment: Accepted at the CV4Animals workshop in CVPR 2022
comments: Accepted at the CV4Animals workshop in CVPR 2022
abstract: Cow lameness is a severe condition that affects the life cycle and life quality of dairy cows and results in considerable economic losses. Early lameness detection helps farmers address illnesses early and avoid negative effects caused by the degeneration of cows' condition. We collected a dataset of short clips of cows passing through a hallway exiting a milking station and annotated the degree of lameness of the cows. This paper explores the resulting dataset and provides a detailed description of the data collection process. Additionally, we proposed a lameness detection method that leverages pre-trained neural networks to extract discriminative features from videos and assign a binary score to each cow indicating its condition: "healthy" or "lame." We improve this approach by forcing the model to focus on the structure of the cow, which we achieve by substituting the RGB videos with binary segmentation masks predicted with a trained segmentation model. This work aims to encourage research and provide insights into the applicability of computer vision models for cow lameness detection on farms.
summary: Cow lameness is a severe condition that affects the life cycle and life quality of dairy cows and results in considerable economic losses. Early lameness detection helps farmers address illnesses early and avoid negative effects caused by the degeneration of cows' condition. We collected a dataset of short clips of cows passing through a hallway exiting a milking station and annotated the degree of lameness of the cows. This paper explores the resulting dataset and provides a detailed description of the data collection process. Additionally, we proposed a lameness detection method that leverages pre-trained neural networks to extract discriminative features from videos and assign a binary score to each cow indicating its condition: "healthy" or "lame." We improve this approach by forcing the model to focus on the structure of the cow, which we achieve by substituting the RGB videos with binary segmentation masks predicted with a trained segmentation model. This work aims to encourage research and provide insights into the applicability of computer vision models for cow lameness detection on farms.
abstract_zh: 奶牛跛行是一种严重影响奶牛生命周期和生活质量并造成巨大经济损失的疾病。早期跛行检测有助于农民及早解决疾病，避免奶牛状况恶化造成的负面影响。我们收集了奶牛穿过挤奶站走廊的短片数据集，并注释了奶牛的跛行程度。本文探讨了生成的数据集并提供了数据收集过程的详细描述。此外，我们提出了一种跛行检测方法，利用预先训练的神经网络从视频中提取判别特征，并为每头牛分配一个二进制分数，指示其状况：“健康”或“跛行”。我们通过强制模型关注牛的结构来改进这种方法，这是通过用经过训练的分割模型预测的二进制分割掩模替换 RGB 视频来实现的。这项工作旨在鼓励研究并为计算机视觉模型在农场奶牛跛行检测中的适用性提供见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合RGB和深度视频的分割增强方法，用于检测奶牛跛行状况。
AI.motivation: 奶牛跛行会导致严重的经济损失和动物福利问题，早期检测对农场管理至关重要。
AI.method: 通过预训练神经网络提取视频特征，并利用分割掩码强化模型对奶牛结构的关注，最终输出二分类评分（健康/跛行）。
AI.result: 验证了分割增强方法在跛行检测任务中的有效性，为农场计算机视觉应用提供了可行方案。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为奶牛跛行检测研究提供了新思路，有助于推动农业智能化发展。

search_text: Segmentation Enhanced Lameness Detection in Dairy Cows from RGB and Depth Video 通过 RGB 和深度视频分割增强奶牛跛行检测 Cow lameness is a severe condition that affects the life cycle and life quality of dairy cows and results in considerable economic losses. Early lameness detection helps farmers address illnesses early and avoid negative effects caused by the degeneration of cows' condition. We collected a dataset of short clips of cows passing through a hallway exiting a milking station and annotated the degree of lameness of the cows. This paper explores the resulting dataset and provides a detailed description of the data collection process. Additionally, we proposed a lameness detection method that leverages pre-trained neural networks to extract discriminative features from videos and assign a binary score to each cow indicating its condition: "healthy" or "lame." We improve this approach by forcing the model to focus on the structure of the cow, which we achieve by substituting the RGB videos with binary segmentation masks predicted with a trained segmentation model. This work aims to encourage research and provide insights into the applicability of computer vision models for cow lameness detection on farms. 奶牛跛行是一种严重影响奶牛生命周期和生活质量并造成巨大经济损失的疾病。早期跛行检测有助于农民及早解决疾病，避免奶牛状况恶化造成的负面影响。我们收集了奶牛穿过挤奶站走廊的短片数据集，并注释了奶牛的跛行程度。本文探讨了生成的数据集并提供了数据收集过程的详细描述。此外，我们提出了一种跛行检测方法，利用预先训练的神经网络从视频中提取判别特征，并为每头牛分配一个二进制分数，指示其状况：“健康”或“跛行”。我们通过强制模型关注牛的结构来改进这种方法，这是通过用经过训练的分割模型预测的二进制分割掩模替换 RGB 视频来实现的。这项工作旨在鼓励研究并为计算机视觉模型在农场奶牛跛行检测中的适用性提供见解。 本文提出了一种结合RGB和深度视频的分割增强方法，用于检测奶牛跛行状况。 Eric Arazo,Robin Aly,Kevin McGuinness cs.CV

authors_text: Andreas Kofler,Christian Wald,Tobias Schaeffter,Markus Haltmeier,Christoph Kolbitsch
title: Convolutional Dictionary Learning by End-To-End Training of Iterative Neural Networks
title_zh: 通过迭代神经网络的端到端训练进行卷积字典学习
comment: Accepted for publication at the European Signal Processing Conference (EUSIPCO) 2022
comments: Accepted for publication at the European Signal Processing Conference (EUSIPCO) 2022
abstract: Sparsity-based methods have a long history in the field of signal processing and have been successfully applied to various image reconstruction problems. The involved sparsifying transformations or dictionaries are typically either pre-trained using a model which reflects the assumed properties of the signals or adaptively learned during the reconstruction - yielding so-called blind Compressed Sensing approaches. However, by doing so, the transforms are never explicitly trained in conjunction with the physical model which generates the signals. In addition, properly choosing the involved regularization parameters remains a challenging task. Another recently emerged training-paradigm for regularization methods is to use iterative neural networks (INNs) - also known as unrolled networks - which contain the physical model. In this work, we construct an INN which can be used as a supervised and physics-informed online convolutional dictionary learning algorithm. We evaluated the proposed approach by applying it to a realistic large-scale dynamic MR reconstruction problem and compared it to several other recently published works. We show that the proposed INN improves over two conventional model-agnostic training methods and yields competitive results also compared to a deep INN. Further, it does not require to choose the regularization parameters and - in contrast to deep INNs - each network component is entirely interpretable.
summary: Sparsity-based methods have a long history in the field of signal processing and have been successfully applied to various image reconstruction problems. The involved sparsifying transformations or dictionaries are typically either pre-trained using a model which reflects the assumed properties of the signals or adaptively learned during the reconstruction - yielding so-called blind Compressed Sensing approaches. However, by doing so, the transforms are never explicitly trained in conjunction with the physical model which generates the signals. In addition, properly choosing the involved regularization parameters remains a challenging task. Another recently emerged training-paradigm for regularization methods is to use iterative neural networks (INNs) - also known as unrolled networks - which contain the physical model. In this work, we construct an INN which can be used as a supervised and physics-informed online convolutional dictionary learning algorithm. We evaluated the proposed approach by applying it to a realistic large-scale dynamic MR reconstruction problem and compared it to several other recently published works. We show that the proposed INN improves over two conventional model-agnostic training methods and yields competitive results also compared to a deep INN. Further, it does not require to choose the regularization parameters and - in contrast to deep INNs - each network component is entirely interpretable.
abstract_zh: 基于稀疏性的方法在信号处理领域有着悠久的历史，并已成功应用于各种图像重建问题。所涉及的稀疏变换或字典通常要么使用反映信号假设属性的模型进行预训练，要么在重建过程中自适应学习 - 产生所谓的盲压缩感知方法。然而，通过这样做，变换永远不会与生成信号的物理模型结合显式训练。此外，正确选择所涉及的正则化参数仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务。最近出现的另一个正则化方法的训练范例是使用迭代神经网络（INN）——也称为展开网络——其中包含物理模型。在这项工作中，我们构建了一个 INN，它可以用作有监督和物理信息的在线卷积字典学习算法。我们通过将所提出的方法应用于现实的大规模动态 MR 重建问题来评估它，并将其与其他最近发表的作品进行比较。我们表明，所提出的 INN 比两种传统的模型无关训练方法有所改进，并且与深度 INN 相比也产生了有竞争力的结果。此外，它不需要选择正则化参数，并且与深度 INN 相比，每个网络组件都是完全可解释的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于端到端训练迭代神经网络的卷积字典学习方法，并应用于动态磁共振成像重建任务。
AI.motivation: 传统稀疏方法中字典与物理模型分离导致性能受限，且正则化参数选择困难；现有迭代神经网络虽含物理模型但缺乏可解释性。
AI.method: 构建包含物理模型的迭代神经网络（INN），通过监督学习实现卷积字典的端到端训练，无需手动设置正则化参数。
AI.result: 在动态MRI重建实验中，该方法优于两种传统模型无关方法，结果与深度INN相当，且网络组件具有完全可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法实现了物理感知的字典学习，在保证性能的同时解决了参数选择难题，且保持模型可解释性。

authors_text: Nalin Kumar,Deepak Kumar,Subhankar Mishra
title: Dict-NMT: Bilingual Dictionary based NMT for Extremely Low Resource Languages
title_zh: Dict-NMT：基于双语词典的极低资源语言 NMT
abstract: Neural Machine Translation (NMT) models have been effective on large bilingual datasets. However, the existing methods and techniques show that the model's performance is highly dependent on the number of examples in training data. For many languages, having such an amount of corpora is a far-fetched dream. Taking inspiration from monolingual speakers exploring new languages using bilingual dictionaries, we investigate the applicability of bilingual dictionaries for languages with extremely low, or no bilingual corpus. In this paper, we explore methods using bilingual dictionaries with an NMT model to improve translations for extremely low resource languages. We extend this work to multilingual systems, exhibiting zero-shot properties. We present a detailed analysis of the effects of the quality of dictionaries, training dataset size, language family, etc., on the translation quality. Results on multiple low-resource test languages show a clear advantage of our bilingual dictionary-based method over the baselines.
summary: Neural Machine Translation (NMT) models have been effective on large bilingual datasets. However, the existing methods and techniques show that the model's performance is highly dependent on the number of examples in training data. For many languages, having such an amount of corpora is a far-fetched dream. Taking inspiration from monolingual speakers exploring new languages using bilingual dictionaries, we investigate the applicability of bilingual dictionaries for languages with extremely low, or no bilingual corpus. In this paper, we explore methods using bilingual dictionaries with an NMT model to improve translations for extremely low resource languages. We extend this work to multilingual systems, exhibiting zero-shot properties. We present a detailed analysis of the effects of the quality of dictionaries, training dataset size, language family, etc., on the translation quality. Results on multiple low-resource test languages show a clear advantage of our bilingual dictionary-based method over the baselines.
abstract_zh: 神经机器翻译 (NMT) 模型在大型双语数据集上非常有效。然而，现有的方法和技术表明，模型的性能高度依赖于训练数据中的示例数量。对于许多语言来说，拥有如此数量的语料库是一个遥不可及的梦想。受到单语使用者使用双语词典探索新语言的启发，我们研究了双语词典对于双语语料库极少或没有双语语料库的语言的适用性。在本文中，我们探索了使用双语词典和 NMT 模型来改进资源极少的语言的翻译的方法。我们将这项工作扩展到多语言系统，表现出零样本特性。我们详细分析了词典质量、训练数据集大小、语系等对翻译质量的影响。多种低资源测试语言的结果表明，我们基于双语词典的方法相对于基线具有明显的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于双语词典的神经机器翻译方法（Dict-NMT），用于解决极低资源语言的翻译问题。
AI.motivation: 传统神经机器翻译依赖大量双语语料，而许多语言缺乏此类数据，需探索替代方案以提升低资源语言的翻译效果。
AI.method: 将双语词典整合到NMT模型中，并扩展至多语言系统以实现零样本翻译，分析词典质量、语料规模及语言家族对翻译质量的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在多个低资源语言测试中显著优于基线模型，验证了双语词典的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 双语词典可有效辅助极低资源语言的翻译，且翻译质量受词典质量、语言亲缘关系等因素显著影响。

We present a detailed analysis of the effects of the quality of dictionaries, training dataset size, language family, etc., on the translation quality. authors_text: Niko Tsakalakis,Sophie Stalla-Bourdillon,Trung Dong Huynh,Luc Moreau
title: A taxonomy of explanations to support Explainability-by-Design
title_zh: 支持设计可解释性的解释分类
abstract: As automated decision-making solutions are increasingly applied to all aspects of everyday life, capabilities to generate meaningful explanations for a variety of stakeholders (i.e., decision-makers, recipients of decisions, auditors, regulators...) become crucial. In this paper, we present a taxonomy of explanations that was developed as part of a holistic 'Explainability-by-Design' approach for the purposes of the project PLEAD. The taxonomy was built with a view to produce explanations for a wide range of requirements stemming from a variety of regulatory frameworks or policies set at the organizational level either to translate high-level compliance requirements or to meet business needs. The taxonomy comprises nine dimensions. It is used as a stand-alone classifier of explanations conceived as detective controls, in order to aid supportive automated compliance strategies. A machinereadable format of the taxonomy is provided in the form of a light ontology and the benefits of starting the Explainability-by-Design journey with such a taxonomy are demonstrated through a series of examples.
summary: As automated decision-making solutions are increasingly applied to all aspects of everyday life, capabilities to generate meaningful explanations for a variety of stakeholders (i.e., decision-makers, recipients of decisions, auditors, regulators...) become crucial. In this paper, we present a taxonomy of explanations that was developed as part of a holistic 'Explainability-by-Design' approach for the purposes of the project PLEAD. The taxonomy was built with a view to produce explanations for a wide range of requirements stemming from a variety of regulatory frameworks or policies set at the organizational level either to translate high-level compliance requirements or to meet business needs. The taxonomy comprises nine dimensions. It is used as a stand-alone classifier of explanations conceived as detective controls, in order to aid supportive automated compliance strategies. A machinereadable format of the taxonomy is provided in the form of a light ontology and the benefits of starting the Explainability-by-Design journey with such a taxonomy are demonstrated through a series of examples.
abstract_zh: 随着自动化决策解决方案越来越多地应用于日常生活的各个方面，为各种利益相关者（即决策者、决策接受者、审计员、监管者……）生成有意义的解释的能力变得至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种解释分类法，该分类法是出于 PLEAD 项目目的而作为整体“设计可解释性”方法的一部分而开发的。建立分类法的目的是对源自组织层面的各种监管框架或政策的广泛要求进行解释，以转化高级别合规性要求或满足业务需求。该分类法包括九个维度。它被用作被视为检测控制的独立解释分类器，以帮助支持性自动化合规策略。分类法的机器可读格式以轻本体的形式提供，并且通过一系列示例演示了使用此类分类法开始“设计可解释性”之旅的好处。

AI.tldr: 开发一个用于支持‘设计可解释性’的解释分类法，以满足不同监管框架和企业需求，辅助自动化合规策略。
AI.motivation: 随着自动化决策的普及，需要为不同利益相关者（如决策者、审计人员等）提供符合多种监管框架和企业需求的解释，以确保合规性和透明度。
AI.method: 通过构建包含九个维度的分类法，作为独立的解释分类工具，并以轻量级本体形式提供，用于自动化合规策略。
AI.result: 通过实例展示了该分类法在支持自动化合规策略中的应用价值，并提供了机器可读的本体格式。
AI.conclusion: 该分类法为设计可解释性提供了系统框架，有助于满足监管要求和业务需求，推动自动化决策的透明化。

authors_text: Chengyang Ying,Xinning Zhou,Hang Su,Dong Yan,Ning Chen,Jun Zhu
title: Towards Safe Reinforcement Learning via Constraining Conditional Value-at-Risk
title_zh: 通过限制条件风险价值实现安全强化学习
abstract: Though deep reinforcement learning (DRL) has obtained substantial success, it may encounter catastrophic failures due to the intrinsic uncertainty of both transition and observation. Most of the existing methods for safe reinforcement learning can only handle transition disturbance or observation disturbance since these two kinds of disturbance affect different parts of the agent; besides, the popular worst-case return may lead to overly pessimistic policies. To address these issues, we first theoretically prove that the performance degradation under transition disturbance and observation disturbance depends on a novel metric of Value Function Range (VFR), which corresponds to the gap in the value function between the best state and the worst state. Based on the analysis, we adopt conditional value-at-risk (CVaR) as an assessment of risk and propose a novel reinforcement learning algorithm of CVaR-Proximal-Policy-Optimization (CPPO) which formalizes the risk-sensitive constrained optimization problem by keeping its CVaR under a given threshold. Experimental results show that CPPO achieves a higher cumulative reward and is more robust against both observation and transition disturbances on a series of continuous control tasks in MuJoCo.
summary: Though deep reinforcement learning (DRL) has obtained substantial success, it may encounter catastrophic failures due to the intrinsic uncertainty of both transition and observation. Most of the existing methods for safe reinforcement learning can only handle transition disturbance or observation disturbance since these two kinds of disturbance affect different parts of the agent; besides, the popular worst-case return may lead to overly pessimistic policies. To address these issues, we first theoretically prove that the performance degradation under transition disturbance and observation disturbance depends on a novel metric of Value Function Range (VFR), which corresponds to the gap in the value function between the best state and the worst state. Based on the analysis, we adopt conditional value-at-risk (CVaR) as an assessment of risk and propose a novel reinforcement learning algorithm of CVaR-Proximal-Policy-Optimization (CPPO) which formalizes the risk-sensitive constrained optimization problem by keeping its CVaR under a given threshold. Experimental results show that CPPO achieves a higher cumulative reward and is more robust against both observation and transition disturbances on a series of continuous control tasks in MuJoCo.
abstract_zh: 尽管深度强化学习（DRL）取得了巨大的成功，但由于过渡和观察的内在不确定性，它可能会遇到灾难性的失败。大多数现有的安全强化学习方法只能处理过渡干扰或观察干扰，因为这两种干扰影响智能体的不同部分；此外，流行的最坏情况回报可能会导致政策过于悲观。为了解决这些问题，我们首先从理论上证明，过渡干扰和观察干扰下的性能下降取决于价值函数范围（VFR）的新度量，它对应于最佳状态和最差状态之间的价值函数的差距。基于分析，我们采用条件风险值（CVaR）作为风险评估，并提出了一种新的强化学习算法CVaR-Proximal-Policy-Optimization（CPPO），通过将CVaR保持在给定阈值以下来形式化风险敏感约束优化问题。实验结果表明，CPPO 在 MuJoCo 中的一系列连续控制任务上获得了更高的累积奖励，并且对观察和过渡干扰具有更强的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于条件风险价值（CVaR）的强化学习算法CPPO，通过约束CVaR阈值来解决深度强化学习中的安全问题，应对状态转移和观测扰动带来的性能退化。
AI.motivation: 现有安全强化学习方法仅能处理单一类型的扰动（转移或观测），且最坏情况回报可能导致过度悲观策略，无法有效平衡安全与性能。
AI.method: 理论证明性能退化与价值函数范围（VFR）相关，提出基于CVaR的风险敏感约束优化问题，并设计CPPO算法通过约束CVaR阈值实现安全学习。
AI.result: 实验表明，CPPO在MuJoCo连续控制任务中相比基线方法获得更高累积奖励，且对观测和转移扰动具有更强鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入CVaR约束，CPPO有效缓解了双重扰动下的性能下降问题，在安全与收益间实现了更优平衡。

Most of the existing methods for safe reinforcement learning can only handle transition disturbance or observation disturbance since these two kinds of disturbance affect different parts of the agent; besides, the popular worst-case return may lead to overly pessimistic policies. To address these issues, we first theoretically prove that the performance degradation under transition disturbance and observation disturbance depends on a novel metric of Value Function Range (VFR), which corresponds to the gap in the value function between the best state and the worst state. Based on the analysis, we adopt conditional value-at-risk (CVaR) as an assessment of risk and propose a novel reinforcement learning algorithm of CVaR-Proximal-Policy-Optimization (CPPO) which formalizes the risk-sensitive constrained optimization problem by keeping its CVaR under a given threshold. authors_text: Amir Averbuch,Pekka Neittaanmäki,Valery Zheludev,Moshe Salhov,Jonathan Hauser
title: Cross-boosting of WNNM Image Denoising method by Directional Wavelet Packets
title_zh: 定向小波包WNNM图像去噪方法的交叉增强
comment: 30 pages, 28 figures. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2008.11595. text overlap with arXiv:2001.04899
comments: 30 pages, 28 figures. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2008.11595. text overlap with arXiv:2001.04899
abstract: The paper presents an image denoising scheme by combining a method that is based on directional quasi-analytic wavelet packets (qWPs) with the state-of-the-art Weighted Nuclear Norm Minimization (WNNM) denoising algorithm. The qWP-based denoising method (qWPdn) consists of multiscale qWP transform of the degraded image, application of adaptive localized soft thresholding to the transform coefficients using the Bivariate Shrinkage methodology, and restoration of the image from the thresholded coefficients from several decomposition levels. The combined method consists of several iterations of qWPdn and WNNM algorithms in a way that at each iteration the output from one algorithm boosts the input to the other. The proposed methodology couples the qWPdn capabilities to capture edges and fine texture patterns even in the severely corrupted images with utilizing the non-local self-similarity in real images that is inherent in the WNNM algorithm. Multiple experiments, which compared the proposed methodology with six advanced denoising algorithms, including WNNM, confirmed that the combined cross-boosting algorithm outperforms most of them in terms of both quantitative measure and visual perception quality.
summary: The paper presents an image denoising scheme by combining a method that is based on directional quasi-analytic wavelet packets (qWPs) with the state-of-the-art Weighted Nuclear Norm Minimization (WNNM) denoising algorithm. The qWP-based denoising method (qWPdn) consists of multiscale qWP transform of the degraded image, application of adaptive localized soft thresholding to the transform coefficients using the Bivariate Shrinkage methodology, and restoration of the image from the thresholded coefficients from several decomposition levels. The combined method consists of several iterations of qWPdn and WNNM algorithms in a way that at each iteration the output from one algorithm boosts the input to the other. The proposed methodology couples the qWPdn capabilities to capture edges and fine texture patterns even in the severely corrupted images with utilizing the non-local self-similarity in real images that is inherent in the WNNM algorithm. Multiple experiments, which compared the proposed methodology with six advanced denoising algorithms, including WNNM, confirmed that the combined cross-boosting algorithm outperforms most of them in terms of both quantitative measure and visual perception quality.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种图像去噪方案，将基于定向准解析小波包 (qWP) 的方法与最先进的加权核范数最小化 (WNNM) 去噪算法相结合。基于 qWP 的去噪方法 (qWPdn) 包括退化图像的多尺度 qWP 变换、使用双变量收缩方法对变换系数应用自适应局部软阈值，以及根据多个分解级别的阈值系数恢复图像。该组合方法由 qWPdn 和 WNNM 算法的多次迭代组成，每次迭代时一种算法的输出都会增强另一种算法的输入。所提出的方法将 qWPdn 功能结合起来，即使在严重损坏的图像中也能捕获边缘和精细纹理图案，并利用 WNNM 算法固有的真实图像中的非局部自相似性。多项实验将所提出的方法与包括 WNNM 在内的六种先进去噪算法进行了比较，证实组合的交叉增强算法在定量测量和视觉感知质量方面优于大多数算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合方向性准解析小波包（qWP）与加权核范数最小化（WNNM）算法的图像去噪方法，通过交叉增强迭代提升去噪效果。
AI.motivation: 现有去噪方法在处理严重噪声图像时难以同时有效捕捉边缘纹理细节与利用非局部自相似性，需融合不同算法优势以提升性能。
AI.method: 采用多尺度qWP变换与自适应软阈值处理，结合WNNM算法的非局部自相似性，通过交替迭代交叉增强两算法输入输出以优化去噪过程。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在定量指标和视觉质量上优于包括WNNM在内的六种先进算法，尤其在高噪声场景下表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 交叉增强框架有效结合了qWP的纹理捕捉能力与WNNM的非局部特性，为图像去噪提供了性能更优的解决方案。

search_text: Cross-boosting of WNNM Image Denoising method by Directional Wavelet Packets 定向小波包WNNM图像去噪方法的交叉增强 The paper presents an image denoising scheme by combining a method that is based on directional quasi-analytic wavelet packets (qWPs) with the state-of-the-art Weighted Nuclear Norm Minimization (WNNM) denoising algorithm. The qWP-based denoising method (qWPdn) consists of multiscale qWP transform of the degraded image, application of adaptive localized soft thresholding to the transform coefficients using the Bivariate Shrinkage methodology, and restoration of the image from the thresholded coefficients from several decomposition levels. The combined method consists of several iterations of qWPdn and WNNM algorithms in a way that at each iteration the output from one algorithm boosts the input to the other. The proposed methodology couples the qWPdn capabilities to capture edges and fine texture patterns even in the severely corrupted images with utilizing the non-local self-similarity in real images that is inherent in the WNNM algorithm. Multiple experiments, which compared the proposed methodology with six advanced denoising algorithms, including WNNM, confirmed that the combined cross-boosting algorithm outperforms most of them in terms of both quantitative measure and visual perception quality. 本文提出了一种图像去噪方案，将基于定向准解析小波包 (qWP) 的方法与最先进的加权核范数最小化 (WNNM) 去噪算法相结合。基于 qWP 的去噪方法 (qWPdn) 包括退化图像的多尺度 qWP 变换、使用双变量收缩方法对变换系数应用自适应局部软阈值，以及根据多个分解级别的阈值系数恢复图像。该组合方法由 qWPdn 和 WNNM 算法的多次迭代组成，每次迭代时一种算法的输出都会增强另一种算法的输入。所提出的方法将 qWPdn 功能结合起来，即使在严重损坏的图像中也能捕获边缘和精细纹理图案，并利用 WNNM 算法固有的真实图像中的非局部自相似性。多项实验将所提出的方法与包括 WNNM 在内的六种先进去噪算法进行了比较，证实组合的交叉增强算法在定量测量和视觉感知质量方面优于大多数算法。 本文提出了一种结合方向性准解析小波包（qWP）与加权核范数最小化（WNNM）算法的图像去噪方法，通过交叉增强迭代提升去噪效果。 Amir Averbuch,Pekka Neittaanmäki,Valery Zheludev,Moshe Salhov,Jonathan Hauser eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Jianchuan Ding,Bo Dong,Felix Heide,Yufei Ding,Yunduo Zhou,Baocai Yin,Xin Yang
title: Biologically Inspired Dynamic Thresholds for Spiking Neural Networks
title_zh: 尖峰神经网络的受生物学启发的动态阈值
abstract: The dynamic membrane potential threshold, as one of the essential properties of a biological neuron, is a spontaneous regulation mechanism that maintains neuronal homeostasis, i.e., the constant overall spiking firing rate of a neuron. As such, the neuron firing rate is regulated by a dynamic spiking threshold, which has been extensively studied in biology. Existing work in the machine learning community does not employ bioinspired spiking threshold schemes. This work aims at bridging this gap by introducing a novel bioinspired dynamic energy-temporal threshold (BDETT) scheme for spiking neural networks (SNNs). The proposed BDETT scheme mirrors two bioplausible observations: a dynamic threshold has 1) a positive correlation with the average membrane potential and 2) a negative correlation with the preceding rate of depolarization. We validate the effectiveness of the proposed BDETT on robot obstacle avoidance and continuous control tasks under both normal conditions and various degraded conditions, including noisy observations, weights, and dynamic environments. We find that the BDETT outperforms existing static and heuristic threshold approaches by significant margins in all tested conditions, and we confirm that the proposed bioinspired dynamic threshold scheme offers homeostasis to SNNs in complex real-world tasks.
summary: The dynamic membrane potential threshold, as one of the essential properties of a biological neuron, is a spontaneous regulation mechanism that maintains neuronal homeostasis, i.e., the constant overall spiking firing rate of a neuron. As such, the neuron firing rate is regulated by a dynamic spiking threshold, which has been extensively studied in biology. Existing work in the machine learning community does not employ bioinspired spiking threshold schemes. This work aims at bridging this gap by introducing a novel bioinspired dynamic energy-temporal threshold (BDETT) scheme for spiking neural networks (SNNs). The proposed BDETT scheme mirrors two bioplausible observations: a dynamic threshold has 1) a positive correlation with the average membrane potential and 2) a negative correlation with the preceding rate of depolarization. We validate the effectiveness of the proposed BDETT on robot obstacle avoidance and continuous control tasks under both normal conditions and various degraded conditions, including noisy observations, weights, and dynamic environments. We find that the BDETT outperforms existing static and heuristic threshold approaches by significant margins in all tested conditions, and we confirm that the proposed bioinspired dynamic threshold scheme offers homeostasis to SNNs in complex real-world tasks.
abstract_zh: 动态膜电位阈值作为生物神经元的基本特性之一，是一种维持神经元稳态的自发调节机制，即神经元总体尖峰放电率恒定。因此，神经元放电率由动态尖峰阈值调节，这在生物学中已得到广泛研究。机器学习社区的现有工作并未采用仿生尖峰阈值方案。这项工作旨在通过引入一种新颖的生物启发动态能量时间阈值（BDETT）方案来弥补这一差距，用于尖峰神经网络（SNN）。所提出的 BDETT 方案反映了两个生物合理的观察结果：动态阈值 1）与平均膜电位正相关，2）与先前的去极化速率负相关。我们验证了所提出的 BDETT 在正常条件和各种退化条件（包括噪声观测、权重和动态环境）下对机器人避障和连续控制任务的有效性。我们发现 BDETT 在所有测试条件下都明显优于现有的静态和启发式阈值方法，并且我们确认所提出的仿生动态阈值方案在复杂的现实世界任务中为 SNN 提供了稳态。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种受生物启发的动态能量-时间阈值（BDETT）方案，用于改进脉冲神经网络（SNNs）的动态阈值机制。
AI.motivation: 现有机器学习方法未采用生物启发的动态阈值方案，而生物神经元的动态阈值能维持神经元稳态，这对复杂任务中的SNNs性能提升具有重要意义。
AI.method: 设计BDETT方案，使其动态阈值与平均膜电位正相关、与去极化速率负相关，模拟生物神经元的两个关键特性。
AI.result: 在机器人避障和连续控制任务中，BDETT在正常及噪声、权重退化等复杂环境下均显著优于静态和启发式阈值方法。
AI.conclusion: BDETT通过生物启发的动态阈值机制，为SNNs在复杂现实任务中提供了稳态调节能力，验证了其有效性。

authors_text: Michael Gadermayr,Maximilian Tschuchnig
title: Multiple Instance Learning for Digital Pathology: A Review on the State-of-the-Art, Limitations & Future Potential
title_zh: 数字病理学的多实例学习：对最新技术、局限性和未来潜力的回顾
abstract: Digital whole slides images contain an enormous amount of information providing a strong motivation for the development of automated image analysis tools. Particularly deep neural networks show high potential with respect to various tasks in the field of digital pathology. However, a limitation is given by the fact that typical deep learning algorithms require (manual) annotations in addition to the large amounts of image data, to enable effective training. Multiple instance learning exhibits a powerful tool for learning deep neural networks in a scenario without fully annotated data. These methods are particularly effective in this domain, due to the fact that labels for a complete whole slide image are often captured routinely, whereas labels for patches, regions or pixels are not. This potential already resulted in a considerable number of publications, with the majority published in the last three years. Besides the availability of data and a high motivation from the medical perspective, the availability of powerful graphics processing units exhibits an accelerator in this field. In this paper, we provide an overview of widely and effectively used concepts of used deep multiple instance learning approaches, recent advances and also critically discuss remaining challenges and future potential.
summary: Digital whole slides images contain an enormous amount of information providing a strong motivation for the development of automated image analysis tools. Particularly deep neural networks show high potential with respect to various tasks in the field of digital pathology. However, a limitation is given by the fact that typical deep learning algorithms require (manual) annotations in addition to the large amounts of image data, to enable effective training. Multiple instance learning exhibits a powerful tool for learning deep neural networks in a scenario without fully annotated data. These methods are particularly effective in this domain, due to the fact that labels for a complete whole slide image are often captured routinely, whereas labels for patches, regions or pixels are not. This potential already resulted in a considerable number of publications, with the majority published in the last three years. Besides the availability of data and a high motivation from the medical perspective, the availability of powerful graphics processing units exhibits an accelerator in this field. In this paper, we provide an overview of widely and effectively used concepts of used deep multiple instance learning approaches, recent advances and also critically discuss remaining challenges and future potential.
abstract_zh: 数字全幻灯片图像包含大量信息，为自动图像分析工具的开发提供了强大的动力。特别是深度神经网络在数字病理学领域的各种任务方面显示出巨大的潜力。然而，典型的深度学习算法除了大量图像数据之外还需要（手动）注释，以实现有效的训练，这一事实给出了限制。多实例学习展示了在没有完全注释数据的情况下学习深度神经网络的强大工具。这些方法在这个领域特别有效，因为完整的整个幻灯片图像的标签通常是常规捕获的，而块、区域或像素的标签则不是。这种潜力已经催生了大量出版物，其中大部分是在过去三年出版的。除了数据的可用性和从医学角度来看的高动力之外，强大的图形处理单元的可用性也展示了该领域的加速器。在本文中，我们概述了所使用的深度多实例学习方法的广泛且有效使用的概念、最新进展，并批判性地讨论了剩余的挑战和未来的潜力。

AI.tldr: 综述多实例学习在数字病理学中的最新进展、局限性及未来潜力
AI.motivation: 数字病理图像数据量大但标注困难，多实例学习无需完全标注数据，且GPU发展推动了该领域进步
AI.method: 系统综述和分析现有深度多实例学习方法，并讨论其挑战和未来方向
AI.result: 总结了主流深度多实例学习方法，指出研究集中在近三年，GPU推动发展，但数据和标注仍是挑战
AI.conclusion: 多实例学习在数字病理学有潜力，但需解决数据和模型问题，未来需更强大算法和跨学科合作

search_text: Multiple Instance Learning for Digital Pathology: A Review on the State-of-the-Art, Limitations & Future Potential 数字病理学的多实例学习：对最新技术、局限性和未来潜力的回顾 Digital whole slides images contain an enormous amount of information providing a strong motivation for the development of automated image analysis tools. Particularly deep neural networks show high potential with respect to various tasks in the field of digital pathology. However, a limitation is given by the fact that typical deep learning algorithms require (manual) annotations in addition to the large amounts of image data, to enable effective training. Multiple instance learning exhibits a powerful tool for learning deep neural networks in a scenario without fully annotated data. These methods are particularly effective in this domain, due to the fact that labels for a complete whole slide image are often captured routinely, whereas labels for patches, regions or pixels are not. This potential already resulted in a considerable number of publications, with the majority published in the last three years. Besides the availability of data and a high motivation from the medical perspective, the availability of powerful graphics processing units exhibits an accelerator in this field. In this paper, we provide an overview of widely and effectively used concepts of used deep multiple instance learning approaches, recent advances and also critically discuss remaining challenges and future potential. 数字全幻灯片图像包含大量信息，为自动图像分析工具的开发提供了强大的动力。特别是深度神经网络在数字病理学领域的各种任务方面显示出巨大的潜力。然而，典型的深度学习算法除了大量图像数据之外还需要（手动）注释，以实现有效的训练，这一事实给出了限制。多实例学习展示了在没有完全注释数据的情况下学习深度神经网络的强大工具。这些方法在这个领域特别有效，因为完整的整个幻灯片图像的标签通常是常规捕获的，而块、区域或像素的标签则不是。这种潜力已经催生了大量出版物，其中大部分是在过去三年出版的。除了数据的可用性和从医学角度来看的高动力之外，强大的图形处理单元的可用性也展示了该领域的加速器。在本文中，我们概述了所使用的深度多实例学习方法的广泛且有效使用的概念、最新进展，并批判性地讨论了剩余的挑战和未来的潜力。 综述多实例学习在数字病理学中的最新进展、局限性及未来潜力 Michael Gadermayr,Maximilian Tschuchnig cs.CV

authors_text: Zangir Iklassov,Dmitrii Medvedev,Ruben Solozabal,Martin Takac
title: Learning to generalize Dispatching rules on the Job Shop Scheduling
title_zh: 学习概括作业车间调度的调度规则
abstract: This paper introduces a Reinforcement Learning approach to better generalize heuristic dispatching rules on the Job-shop Scheduling Problem (JSP). Current models on the JSP do not focus on generalization, although, as we show in this work, this is key to learning better heuristics on the problem. A well-known technique to improve generalization is to learn on increasingly complex instances using Curriculum Learning (CL). However, as many works in the literature indicate, this technique might suffer from catastrophic forgetting when transferring the learned skills between different problem sizes. To address this issue, we introduce a novel Adversarial Curriculum Learning (ACL) strategy, which dynamically adjusts the difficulty level during the learning process to revisit the worst-performing instances. This work also presents a deep learning model to solve the JSP, which is equivariant w.r.t. the job definition and size-agnostic. Conducted experiments on Taillard's and Demirkol's instances show that the presented approach significantly improves the current state-of-the-art models on the JSP. It reduces the average optimality gap from 19.35\% to 10.46\% on Taillard's instances and from 38.43\% to 18.85\% on Demirkol's instances. Our implementation is available online.
summary: This paper introduces a Reinforcement Learning approach to better generalize heuristic dispatching rules on the Job-shop Scheduling Problem (JSP). Current models on the JSP do not focus on generalization, although, as we show in this work, this is key to learning better heuristics on the problem. A well-known technique to improve generalization is to learn on increasingly complex instances using Curriculum Learning (CL). However, as many works in the literature indicate, this technique might suffer from catastrophic forgetting when transferring the learned skills between different problem sizes. To address this issue, we introduce a novel Adversarial Curriculum Learning (ACL) strategy, which dynamically adjusts the difficulty level during the learning process to revisit the worst-performing instances. This work also presents a deep learning model to solve the JSP, which is equivariant w.r.t. the job definition and size-agnostic. Conducted experiments on Taillard's and Demirkol's instances show that the presented approach significantly improves the current state-of-the-art models on the JSP. It reduces the average optimality gap from 19.35\% to 10.46\% on Taillard's instances and from 38.43\% to 18.85\% on Demirkol's instances. Our implementation is available online.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种强化学习方法，可以更好地推广作业车间调度问题 (JSP) 的启发式调度规则。当前 JSP 上的模型并不注重泛化，尽管正如我们在这项工作中所展示的，这是学习更好的问题启发法的关键。提高泛化能力的一项众所周知的技术是使用课程学习 (CL) 来学习日益复杂的实例。然而，正如文献中的许多作品所表明的那样，当在不同问题规模之间转移所学到的技能时，这种技术可能会遭受灾难性遗忘。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一种新颖的对抗性课程学习（ACL）策略，该策略在学习过程中动态调整难度级别，以重新审视表现最差的实例。这项工作还提出了一个深度学习模型来解决 JSP，它是等变的。工作定义和规模无关。对 Taillard 和 Demirkol 实例进行的实验表明，所提出的方法显着改进了 JSP 上当前最先进的模型。它将 Taillard 实例上的平均最优性差距从 19.35\% 减少到 10.46\%，将 Demirkol 实例上的平均最优性差距从 38.43\% 减少到 18.85\%。我们的实施可以在线获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于强化学习的方法，通过改进通用性来优化作业车间调度问题的启发式调度规则。
AI.motivation: 现有作业车间调度问题（JSP）模型缺乏对通用性的关注，而通用性对于学习更优启发式规则至关重要。传统课程学习（CL）方法在跨规模问题迁移时易出现灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.method: 提出对抗课程学习（ACL）策略，动态调整学习难度并回访表现最差的实例；设计对作业定义等变且与规模无关的深度学习模型。
AI.result: 在Taillard和Demirkol实例上，平均最优解差距分别从19.35%降至10.46%、从38.43%降至18.85%，显著优于现有最优模型。
AI.conclusion: ACL策略与规模无关模型有效提升了JSP求解的通用性与性能，开源实现验证了方法的可行性。

authors_text: Barak Or,Itzik Klein
title: Learning Vehicle Trajectory Uncertainty
title_zh: 学习车辆轨迹的不确定性
abstract: A novel approach for vehicle tracking using a hybrid adaptive Kalman filter is proposed. The filter utilizes recurrent neural networks to learn the vehicle's geometrical and kinematic features, which are then used in a supervised learning model to determine the actual process noise covariance in the Kalman framework. This approach addresses the limitations of traditional linear Kalman filters, which can suffer from degraded performance due to uncertainty in the vehicle kinematic trajectory modeling. Our method is evaluated and compared to other adaptive filters using the Oxford RobotCar dataset, and has shown to be effective in accurately determining the process noise covariance in real-time scenarios. Overall, this approach can be implemented in other estimation problems to improve performance.
summary: A novel approach for vehicle tracking using a hybrid adaptive Kalman filter is proposed. The filter utilizes recurrent neural networks to learn the vehicle's geometrical and kinematic features, which are then used in a supervised learning model to determine the actual process noise covariance in the Kalman framework. This approach addresses the limitations of traditional linear Kalman filters, which can suffer from degraded performance due to uncertainty in the vehicle kinematic trajectory modeling. Our method is evaluated and compared to other adaptive filters using the Oxford RobotCar dataset, and has shown to be effective in accurately determining the process noise covariance in real-time scenarios. Overall, this approach can be implemented in other estimation problems to improve performance.
abstract_zh: 提出了一种使用混合自适应卡尔曼滤波器进行车辆跟踪的新方法。该滤波器利用循环神经网络来学习车辆的几何和运动学特征，然后在监督学习模型中使用这些特征来确定卡尔曼框架中的实际过程噪声协方差。这种方法解决了传统线性卡尔曼滤波器的局限性，传统线性卡尔曼滤波器可能因车辆运动轨迹建模的不确定性而导致性能下降。使用 Oxford RobotCar 数据集对我们的方法进行了评估并与其他自适应滤波器进行了比较，结果表明该方法可以有效地准确确定实时场景中的过程噪声协方差。总的来说，这种方法可以应用于其他估计问题以提高性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于混合自适应卡尔曼滤波器的车辆轨迹不确定性学习方法，通过循环神经网络提升传统滤波器的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统线性卡尔曼滤波器因车辆运动学轨迹建模的不确定性导致性能下降，需更精准的过程噪声协方差估计方法。
AI.method: 结合循环神经网络学习车辆几何与运动学特征，并通过监督学习模型实时估计卡尔曼滤波中的过程噪声协方差。
AI.result: 在Oxford RobotCar数据集上的实验表明，该方法能有效提升过程噪声协方差估计的准确性，优于其他自适应滤波器。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可有效解决车辆轨迹不确定性问题，且适用于其他估计场景以提升性能。

authors_text: Tamara G. Grossmann,Sören Dittmer,Yury Korolev,Carola-Bibiane Schönlieb
title: Unsupervised Learning of the Total Variation Flow
title_zh: 总变异流的无监督学习
abstract: The total variation (TV) flow generates a scale-space representation of an image based on the TV functional. This gradient flow observes desirable features for images, such as sharp edges and enables spectral, scale, and texture analysis. Solving the TV flow is challenging; one reason is the the non-uniqueness of the subgradients. The standard numerical approach for TV flow requires solving multiple non-smooth optimisation problems. Even with state-of-the-art convex optimisation techniques, this is often prohibitively expensive and strongly motivates the use of alternative, faster approaches. Inspired by and extending the framework of physics-informed neural networks (PINNs), we propose the TVflowNET, an unsupervised neural network approach, to approximate the solution of the TV flow given an initial image and a time instance. The TVflowNET requires no ground truth data but rather makes use of the PDE for optimisation of the network parameters. We circumvent the challenges related to the non-uniqueness of the subgradients by additionally learning the related diffusivity term. Our approach significantly speeds up the computation time and we show that the TVflowNET approximates the TV flow solution with high fidelity for different image sizes and image types. Additionally, we give a full comparison of different network architecture designs as well as training regimes to underscore the effectiveness of our approach.
summary: The total variation (TV) flow generates a scale-space representation of an image based on the TV functional. This gradient flow observes desirable features for images, such as sharp edges and enables spectral, scale, and texture analysis. Solving the TV flow is challenging; one reason is the the non-uniqueness of the subgradients. The standard numerical approach for TV flow requires solving multiple non-smooth optimisation problems. Even with state-of-the-art convex optimisation techniques, this is often prohibitively expensive and strongly motivates the use of alternative, faster approaches. Inspired by and extending the framework of physics-informed neural networks (PINNs), we propose the TVflowNET, an unsupervised neural network approach, to approximate the solution of the TV flow given an initial image and a time instance. The TVflowNET requires no ground truth data but rather makes use of the PDE for optimisation of the network parameters. We circumvent the challenges related to the non-uniqueness of the subgradients by additionally learning the related diffusivity term. Our approach significantly speeds up the computation time and we show that the TVflowNET approximates the TV flow solution with high fidelity for different image sizes and image types. Additionally, we give a full comparison of different network architecture designs as well as training regimes to underscore the effectiveness of our approach.
abstract_zh: 全变分 (TV) 流根据 TV 泛函生成图像的尺度空间表示。这种梯度流观察图像所需的特征，例如锐利边缘，并实现光谱、尺度和纹理分析。解决电视流量问题具有挑战性；原因之一是次梯度的非唯一性。电视流的标准数值方法需要解决多个非光滑优化问题。即使采用最先进的凸优化技术，这通常也非常昂贵，并且强烈促使人们使用替代的、更快的方法。受物理信息神经网络（PINN）框架的启发和扩展，我们提出了 TVflowNET，一种无监督神经网络方法，在给定初始图像和时间实例的情况下近似求解电视流。 TVflowNET 不需要真实数据，而是利用偏微分方程来优化网络参数。我们通过额外学习相关的扩散项来规避与次梯度的非唯一性相关的挑战。我们的方法显着加快了计算时间，并且我们表明 TVflowNET 对于不同图像尺寸和图像类型以高保真度近似电视流解决方案。此外，我们对不同的网络架构设计和训练制度进行了全面比较，以强调我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督神经网络方法TVflowNET，用于近似求解总变分流（TV flow）问题，无需依赖真实数据。
AI.motivation: 传统TV流求解方法因需处理非光滑优化问题导致计算成本高昂，且存在子梯度非唯一性挑战，亟需更高效替代方案。
AI.method: 基于物理信息神经网络（PINNs）框架，设计无监督网络TVflowNET，通过PDE约束优化参数，并联合学习扩散项以解决子梯度非唯一性问题。
AI.result: TVflowNET显著提升计算效率，在多种图像尺寸和类型中均能高保真近似TV流解，且通过架构与训练策略对比验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效克服TV流求解的计算瓶颈，在保持精度的同时实现加速，为图像尺度空间分析提供新思路。

search_text: Unsupervised Learning of the Total Variation Flow 总变异流的无监督学习 The total variation (TV) flow generates a scale-space representation of an image based on the TV functional. This gradient flow observes desirable features for images, such as sharp edges and enables spectral, scale, and texture analysis. Solving the TV flow is challenging; one reason is the the non-uniqueness of the subgradients. The standard numerical approach for TV flow requires solving multiple non-smooth optimisation problems. Even with state-of-the-art convex optimisation techniques, this is often prohibitively expensive and strongly motivates the use of alternative, faster approaches. Inspired by and extending the framework of physics-informed neural networks (PINNs), we propose the TVflowNET, an unsupervised neural network approach, to approximate the solution of the TV flow given an initial image and a time instance. The TVflowNET requires no ground truth data but rather makes use of the PDE for optimisation of the network parameters. We circumvent the challenges related to the non-uniqueness of the subgradients by additionally learning the related diffusivity term. Our approach significantly speeds up the computation time and we show that the TVflowNET approximates the TV flow solution with high fidelity for different image sizes and image types. Additionally, we give a full comparison of different network architecture designs as well as training regimes to underscore the effectiveness of our approach. 全变分 (TV) 流根据 TV 泛函生成图像的尺度空间表示。这种梯度流观察图像所需的特征，例如锐利边缘，并实现光谱、尺度和纹理分析。解决电视流量问题具有挑战性；原因之一是次梯度的非唯一性。电视流的标准数值方法需要解决多个非光滑优化问题。即使采用最先进的凸优化技术，这通常也非常昂贵，并且强烈促使人们使用替代的、更快的方法。受物理信息神经网络（PINN）框架的启发和扩展，我们提出了 TVflowNET，一种无监督神经网络方法，在给定初始图像和时间实例的情况下近似求解电视流。 TVflowNET 不需要真实数据，而是利用偏微分方程来优化网络参数。我们通过额外学习相关的扩散项来规避与次梯度的非唯一性相关的挑战。我们的方法显着加快了计算时间，并且我们表明 TVflowNET 对于不同图像尺寸和图像类型以高保真度近似电视流解决方案。此外，我们对不同的网络架构设计和训练制度进行了全面比较，以强调我们方法的有效性。 本文提出一种无监督神经网络方法TVflowNET，用于近似求解总变分流（TV flow）问题，无需依赖真实数据。 Tamara G. Grossmann,Sören Dittmer,Yury Korolev,Carola-Bibiane Schönlieb cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Miran Heo,Sukjun Hwang,Seoung Wug Oh,Joon-Young Lee,Seon Joo Kim
title: VITA: Video Instance Segmentation via Object Token Association
title_zh: VITA：通过对象令牌关联进行视频实例分割
abstract: We introduce a novel paradigm for offline Video Instance Segmentation (VIS), based on the hypothesis that explicit object-oriented information can be a strong clue for understanding the context of the entire sequence. To this end, we propose VITA, a simple structure built on top of an off-the-shelf Transformer-based image instance segmentation model. Specifically, we use an image object detector as a means of distilling object-specific contexts into object tokens. VITA accomplishes video-level understanding by associating frame-level object tokens without using spatio-temporal backbone features. By effectively building relationships between objects using the condensed information, VITA achieves the state-of-the-art on VIS benchmarks with a ResNet-50 backbone: 49.8 AP, 45.7 AP on YouTube-VIS 2019 & 2021, and 19.6 AP on OVIS. Moreover, thanks to its object token-based structure that is disjoint from the backbone features, VITA shows several practical advantages that previous offline VIS methods have not explored - handling long and high-resolution videos with a common GPU, and freezing a frame-level detector trained on image domain. Code is available at https://github.com/sukjunhwang/VITA.
summary: We introduce a novel paradigm for offline Video Instance Segmentation (VIS), based on the hypothesis that explicit object-oriented information can be a strong clue for understanding the context of the entire sequence. To this end, we propose VITA, a simple structure built on top of an off-the-shelf Transformer-based image instance segmentation model. Specifically, we use an image object detector as a means of distilling object-specific contexts into object tokens. VITA accomplishes video-level understanding by associating frame-level object tokens without using spatio-temporal backbone features. By effectively building relationships between objects using the condensed information, VITA achieves the state-of-the-art on VIS benchmarks with a ResNet-50 backbone: 49.8 AP, 45.7 AP on YouTube-VIS 2019 & 2021, and 19.6 AP on OVIS. Moreover, thanks to its object token-based structure that is disjoint from the backbone features, VITA shows several practical advantages that previous offline VIS methods have not explored - handling long and high-resolution videos with a common GPU, and freezing a frame-level detector trained on image domain. Code is available at https://github.com/sukjunhwang/VITA.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种离线视频实例分割（VIS）的新颖范式，基于这样的假设：显式面向对象的信息可以成为理解整个序列上下文的有力线索。为此，我们提出了 VITA，这是一种建立在现成的基于 Transformer 的图像实例分割模型之上的简单结构。具体来说，我们使用图像对象检测器作为将特定于对象的上下文提取为对象标记的方法。 VITA 通过关联帧级对象标记来实现视频级理解，而不使用时空主干特征。通过使用压缩信息有效地建立对象之间的关系，VITA 在 ResNet-50 主干网络上实现了最先进的 VIS 基准：49.8 AP、YouTube-VIS 2019 和 2021 上的 45.7 AP 以及 OVIS 上的 19.6 AP。此外，由于其基于对象标记的结构与主干特征不相交，VITA 显示了以前的离线 VIS 方法尚未探索到的几个实际优势 - 使用通用 GPU 处理长且高分辨率的视频，并冻结在图像域上训练的帧级检测器。代码可在 https://github.com/sukjunhwang/VITA 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于对象标记关联的视频实例分割方法VITA，通过利用显式对象信息提升视频序列的理解能力。
AI.motivation: 传统视频实例分割方法依赖时空特征，但未能充分利用显式对象信息。作者认为，对象导向的信息能更有效地理解视频上下文。
AI.method: 在现成的Transformer图像分割模型基础上，使用图像对象检测器生成对象标记，并通过跨帧关联对象标记实现视频级理解，无需时空主干特征。
AI.result: 在YouTube-VIS 2019/2021和OVIS基准测试中分别达到49.8 AP、45.7 AP和19.6 AP，且能处理长视频和高分辨率视频。
AI.conclusion: VITA通过对象标记结构实现高效视频实例分割，在性能和实用性上优于现有方法。

authors_text: Xiaohong Wang,Chaoqi Li,Xiangcai Ma
title: Cross-modal Local Shortest Path and Global Enhancement for Visible-Thermal Person Re-Identification
title_zh: 可见热人员重识别的跨模态局部最短路径和全局增强
abstract: In addition to considering the recognition difficulty caused by human posture and occlusion, it is also necessary to solve the modal differences caused by different imaging systems in the Visible-Thermal cross-modal person re-identification (VT-ReID) task. In this paper,we propose the Cross-modal Local Shortest Path and Global Enhancement (CM-LSP-GE) modules,a two-stream network based on joint learning of local and global features. The core idea of our paper is to use local feature alignment to solve occlusion problem, and to solve modal difference by strengthening global feature. Firstly, Attention-based two-stream ResNet network is designed to extract dual-modality features and map to a unified feature space. Then, to solve the cross-modal person pose and occlusion problems, the image are cut horizontally into several equal parts to obtain local features and the shortest path in local features between two graphs is used to achieve the fine-grained local feature alignment. Thirdly, a batch normalization enhancement module applies global features to enhance strategy, resulting in difference enhancement between different classes. The multi granularity loss fusion strategy further improves the performance of the algorithm. Finally, joint learning mechanism of local and global features is used to improve cross-modal person re-identification accuracy. The experimental results on two typical datasets show that our model is obviously superior to the most state-of-the-art methods. Especially, on SYSU-MM01 datasets, our model can achieve a gain of 2.89%and 7.96% in all search term of Rank-1 and mAP. The source code will be released soon.
summary: In addition to considering the recognition difficulty caused by human posture and occlusion, it is also necessary to solve the modal differences caused by different imaging systems in the Visible-Thermal cross-modal person re-identification (VT-ReID) task. In this paper,we propose the Cross-modal Local Shortest Path and Global Enhancement (CM-LSP-GE) modules,a two-stream network based on joint learning of local and global features. The core idea of our paper is to use local feature alignment to solve occlusion problem, and to solve modal difference by strengthening global feature. Firstly, Attention-based two-stream ResNet network is designed to extract dual-modality features and map to a unified feature space. Then, to solve the cross-modal person pose and occlusion problems, the image are cut horizontally into several equal parts to obtain local features and the shortest path in local features between two graphs is used to achieve the fine-grained local feature alignment. Thirdly, a batch normalization enhancement module applies global features to enhance strategy, resulting in difference enhancement between different classes. The multi granularity loss fusion strategy further improves the performance of the algorithm. Finally, joint learning mechanism of local and global features is used to improve cross-modal person re-identification accuracy. The experimental results on two typical datasets show that our model is obviously superior to the most state-of-the-art methods. Especially, on SYSU-MM01 datasets, our model can achieve a gain of 2.89%and 7.96% in all search term of Rank-1 and mAP. The source code will be released soon.
abstract_zh: 除了考虑人体姿态和遮挡带来的识别难度外，在可见热跨模态行人重识别（VT-ReID）任务中还需要解决不同成像系统带来的模态差异。在本文中，我们提出了跨模态局部最短路径和全局增强（CM-LSP-GE）模块，这是一种基于局部和全局特征联合学习的双流网络。我们论文的核心思想是利用局部特征对齐来解决遮挡问题，并通过加强全局特征来解决模态差异。首先，设计基于Attention的双流ResNet网络来提取双模态特征并映射到统一的特征空间。然后，为了解决跨模态的人物姿态和遮挡问题，将图像水平分割成几个相等的部分以获得局部特征，并利用两个图之间局部特征的最短路径来实现细粒度的局部特征对齐。第三，批量归一化增强模块应用全局特征来增强策略，从而导致不同类之间的差异增强。多粒度损失融合策略进一步提高了算法的性能。最后，利用局部和全局特征的联合学习机制来提高跨模态行人重识别的准确性。两个典型数据集的实验结果表明，我们的模型明显优于最先进的方法。特别是，在 SYSU-MM01 数据集上，我们的模型在 Rank-1 和 mAP 的所有搜索项中都能实现 2.89% 和 7.96% 的增益。源代码即将发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种跨模态可见光-热红外行人重识别方法，通过局部特征对齐和全局特征增强解决遮挡与模态差异问题。
AI.motivation: 可见光-热红外跨模态行人重识别面临人体姿态、遮挡及不同成像系统导致的模态差异等挑战，现有方法难以有效处理这些复杂因素。
AI.method: 设计基于注意力机制的双流ResNet网络提取双模态特征，并通过水平分割图像获取局部特征、计算局部最短路径实现细粒度对齐；结合批量归一化增强模块强化全局特征差异，融合多粒度损失函数优化模型性能。
AI.result: 在SYSU-MM01数据集上，Rank-1准确率提升2.89%，mAP提升7.96%，显著优于当前最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过联合学习局部与全局特征，有效解决了跨模态行人重识别中的遮挡与模态差异问题，验证了模型的有效性。
