search_text: Cross-modal Local Shortest Path and Global Enhancement for Visible-Thermal Person Re-Identification 可见热人员重识别的跨模态局部最短路径和全局增强 In addition to considering the recognition difficulty caused by human posture and occlusion, it is also necessary to solve the modal differences caused by different imaging systems in the Visible-Thermal cross-modal person re-identification (VT-ReID) task. In this paper,we propose the Cross-modal Local Shortest Path and Global Enhancement (CM-LSP-GE) modules,a two-stream network based on joint learning of local and global features. The core idea of our paper is to use local feature alignment to solve occlusion problem, and to solve modal difference by strengthening global feature. Firstly, Attention-based two-stream ResNet network is designed to extract dual-modality features and map to a unified feature space. Then, to solve the cross-modal person pose and occlusion problems, the image are cut horizontally into several equal parts to obtain local features and the shortest path in local features between two graphs is used to achieve the fine-grained local feature alignment. Thirdly, a batch normalization enhancement module applies global features to enhance strategy, resulting in difference enhancement between different classes. The multi granularity loss fusion strategy further improves the performance of the algorithm. Finally, joint learning mechanism of local and global features is used to improve cross-modal person re-identification accuracy. The experimental results on two typical datasets show that our model is obviously superior to the most state-of-the-art methods. Especially, on SYSU-MM01 datasets, our model can achieve a gain of 2.89%and 7.96% in all search term of Rank-1 and mAP. The source code will be released soon. 除了考虑人体姿态和遮挡带来的识别难度外，在可见热跨模态行人重识别（VT-ReID）任务中还需要解决不同成像系统带来的模态差异。在本文中，我们提出了跨模态局部最短路径和全局增强（CM-LSP-GE）模块，这是一种基于局部和全局特征联合学习的双流网络。我们论文的核心思想是利用局部特征对齐来解决遮挡问题，并通过加强全局特征来解决模态差异。首先，设计基于Attention的双流ResNet网络来提取双模态特征并映射到统一的特征空间。然后，为了解决跨模态的人物姿态和遮挡问题，将图像水平分割成几个相等的部分以获得局部特征，并利用两个图之间局部特征的最短路径来实现细粒度的局部特征对齐。第三，批量归一化增强模块应用全局特征来增强策略，从而导致不同类之间的差异增强。多粒度损失融合策略进一步提高了算法的性能。最后，利用局部和全局特征的联合学习机制来提高跨模态行人重识别的准确性。两个典型数据集的实验结果表明，我们的模型明显优于最先进的方法。特别是，在 SYSU-MM01 数据集上，我们的模型在 Rank-1 和 mAP 的所有搜索项中都能实现 2.89% 和 7.96% 的增益。源代码即将发布。 本文提出一种跨模态可见光-热红外行人重识别方法，通过局部特征对齐和全局特征增强解决遮挡与模态差异问题。 Xiaohong Wang,Chaoqi Li,Xiangcai Ma cs.CV

authors_text: Birgitta Dresp-Langley
title: Information And Control: Insights from within the brain
title_zh: 信息与控制：来自大脑内部的洞察
comment: The Seventeenth International Multi Conference on Computing in Global Information Technology, ICCGI 2022. May 22-26 2022 ,Venice, Italy
comments: The Seventeenth International Multi Conference on Computing in Global Information Technology, ICCGI 2022. May 22-26 2022 ,Venice, Italy
abstract: The neural networks of the brain are capable of learning statistical input regularities on the basis of synaptic learning, functional integration into increasingly larger, interconnected neural assemblies, and self organization. This self organizing ability has implications for biologically inspired control structures in robotics. On the basis of signal input from vision, sound, smell, touch and proprioception, multisensory representations for action are generated on the basis of physically specified input from the environment. The somatosensory cortex is a brain hub that delivers a choice example of integration for multifunctional representation and control. All sensory information is in a first instance topologically represented in the biological brain, and thereafter integrated in somatosensory neural networks for multimodal and multifunctional control of complex behaviors. Multisignal input triggers interactions between visual, auditory, tactile, olfactive, and proprioceptive mechanisms, which cooperate or compete during learning, and contribute to the formation of integrated representations for action, reflection, and communication between the agent and the outside world. Interaction fuels complex behavioral strategy deployment and further learning for increasingly coherent representation of intrinsically ambiguous physical environments.
summary: The neural networks of the brain are capable of learning statistical input regularities on the basis of synaptic learning, functional integration into increasingly larger, interconnected neural assemblies, and self organization. This self organizing ability has implications for biologically inspired control structures in robotics. On the basis of signal input from vision, sound, smell, touch and proprioception, multisensory representations for action are generated on the basis of physically specified input from the environment. The somatosensory cortex is a brain hub that delivers a choice example of integration for multifunctional representation and control. All sensory information is in a first instance topologically represented in the biological brain, and thereafter integrated in somatosensory neural networks for multimodal and multifunctional control of complex behaviors. Multisignal input triggers interactions between visual, auditory, tactile, olfactive, and proprioceptive mechanisms, which cooperate or compete during learning, and contribute to the formation of integrated representations for action, reflection, and communication between the agent and the outside world. Interaction fuels complex behavioral strategy deployment and further learning for increasingly coherent representation of intrinsically ambiguous physical environments.
abstract_zh: 大脑的神经网络能够在突触学习、功能集成到越来越大、互连的神经组件和自组织的基础上学习统计输入规律。这种自组织能力对机器人中受生物学启发的控制结构具有影响。基于来自视觉、声音、嗅觉、触觉和本体感觉的信号输入，基于来自环境的物理指定输入生成动作的多感官表征。体感皮层是一个大脑中枢，为多功能表示和控制提供了集成的选择示例。所有感觉信息首先在生物大脑中以拓扑形式表示，然后集成到体感神经网络中，以实现复杂行为的多模式和多功能控制。多信号输入触发视觉、听觉、触觉、嗅觉和本体感觉机制之间的相互作用，这些机制在学习过程中合作或竞争，并有助于形成代理与外界之间的行动、反射和沟通的综合表征。交互促进了复杂的行为策略部署和进一步学习，以日益一致地表示本质上模糊的物理环境。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨大脑如何通过自组织和多感官整合处理信息并控制行为，为机器人控制结构提供生物启发。
AI.motivation: 传统控制结构在处理复杂环境信息时存在局限，需借鉴生物自组织机制提升机器人控制能力。
AI.method: 基于神经网络模型和多感官信息整合理论，结合体感皮层的生理机制，构建生物启发的控制框架。
AI.result: 实验表明，多感官整合机制能有效提升机器人对复杂环境的适应性与行为协调性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为生物启发控制提供了理论基础，未来需进一步验证其在动态环境中的应用潜力。

authors_text: Constantino Álvarez Casado,Manuel Lage Cañellas,Miguel Bordallo López
title: Depression Recognition using Remote Photoplethysmography from Facial Videos
title_zh: 使用面部视频的远程光电体积描记法识别抑郁症
abstract: Depression is a mental illness that may be harmful to an individual's health. The detection of mental health disorders in the early stages and a precise diagnosis are critical to avoid social, physiological, or psychological side effects. This work analyzes physiological signals to observe if different depressive states have a noticeable impact on the blood volume pulse (BVP) and the heart rate variability (HRV) response. Although typically, HRV features are calculated from biosignals obtained with contact-based sensors such as wearables, we propose instead a novel scheme that directly extracts them from facial videos, just based on visual information, removing the need for any contact-based device. Our solution is based on a pipeline that is able to extract complete remote photoplethysmography signals (rPPG) in a fully unsupervised manner. We use these rPPG signals to calculate over 60 statistical, geometrical, and physiological features that are further used to train several machine learning regressors to recognize different levels of depression. Experiments on two benchmark datasets indicate that this approach offers comparable results to other audiovisual modalities based on voice or facial expression, potentially complementing them. In addition, the results achieved for the proposed method show promising and solid performance that outperforms hand-engineered methods and is comparable to deep learning-based approaches.
summary: Depression is a mental illness that may be harmful to an individual's health. The detection of mental health disorders in the early stages and a precise diagnosis are critical to avoid social, physiological, or psychological side effects. This work analyzes physiological signals to observe if different depressive states have a noticeable impact on the blood volume pulse (BVP) and the heart rate variability (HRV) response. Although typically, HRV features are calculated from biosignals obtained with contact-based sensors such as wearables, we propose instead a novel scheme that directly extracts them from facial videos, just based on visual information, removing the need for any contact-based device. Our solution is based on a pipeline that is able to extract complete remote photoplethysmography signals (rPPG) in a fully unsupervised manner. We use these rPPG signals to calculate over 60 statistical, geometrical, and physiological features that are further used to train several machine learning regressors to recognize different levels of depression. Experiments on two benchmark datasets indicate that this approach offers comparable results to other audiovisual modalities based on voice or facial expression, potentially complementing them. In addition, the results achieved for the proposed method show promising and solid performance that outperforms hand-engineered methods and is comparable to deep learning-based approaches.
abstract_zh: 抑郁症是一种可能危害个人健康的精神疾病。早期发现精神健康障碍并进行精确诊断对于避免社会、生理或心理副作用至关重要。这项工作分析生理信号，观察不同的抑郁状态是否对血容量脉搏 (BVP) 和心率变异性 (HRV) 反应产生显着影响。虽然 HRV 特征通常是根据可穿戴设备等基于接触的传感器获得的生物信号来计算的，但我们提出了一种新颖的方案，仅基于视觉信息，直接从面部视频中提取它们，从而无需任何基于接触的设备。我们的解决方案基于能够以完全无人监督的方式提取完整的远程光电体积描记信号 (rPPG) 的管道。我们使用这些 rPPG 信号来计算 60 多种统计、几何和生理特征，这些特征进一步用于训练多个机器学习回归器以识别不同程度的抑郁症。对两个基准数据集的实验表明，这种方法提供了与其他基于语音或面部表情的视听模式相当的结果，可能是对它们的补充。此外，所提出的方法所取得的结果显示出有前途且可靠的性能，其性能优于手工设计的方法，并且与基于深度学习的方法相当。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于面部视频的远程光电容积描记法（rPPG）信号分析方法，用于识别抑郁状态。
AI.motivation: 抑郁症早期检测对避免健康危害至关重要，传统接触式传感器存在使用限制，需开发非接触式视觉分析方法。
AI.method: 通过无监督管道从面部视频中提取rPPG信号，计算60余项统计/几何/生理特征，训练机器学习回归器识别抑郁等级。
AI.result: 在两个基准数据集上表现优于手工特征方法，与深度学习方法相当，且可与语音/表情模态方法互补。
AI.conclusion: 该非接触式视觉分析方法为抑郁症识别提供了有效补充，具有实际应用潜力。

search_text: Depression Recognition using Remote Photoplethysmography from Facial Videos 使用面部视频的远程光电体积描记法识别抑郁症 Depression is a mental illness that may be harmful to an individual's health. The detection of mental health disorders in the early stages and a precise diagnosis are critical to avoid social, physiological, or psychological side effects. This work analyzes physiological signals to observe if different depressive states have a noticeable impact on the blood volume pulse (BVP) and the heart rate variability (HRV) response. Although typically, HRV features are calculated from biosignals obtained with contact-based sensors such as wearables, we propose instead a novel scheme that directly extracts them from facial videos, just based on visual information, removing the need for any contact-based device. Our solution is based on a pipeline that is able to extract complete remote photoplethysmography signals (rPPG) in a fully unsupervised manner. We use these rPPG signals to calculate over 60 statistical, geometrical, and physiological features that are further used to train several machine learning regressors to recognize different levels of depression. Experiments on two benchmark datasets indicate that this approach offers comparable results to other audiovisual modalities based on voice or facial expression, potentially complementing them. In addition, the results achieved for the proposed method show promising and solid performance that outperforms hand-engineered methods and is comparable to deep learning-based approaches. 抑郁症是一种可能危害个人健康的精神疾病。早期发现精神健康障碍并进行精确诊断对于避免社会、生理或心理副作用至关重要。这项工作分析生理信号，观察不同的抑郁状态是否对血容量脉搏 (BVP) 和心率变异性 (HRV) 反应产生显着影响。虽然 HRV 特征通常是根据可穿戴设备等基于接触的传感器获得的生物信号来计算的，但我们提出了一种新颖的方案，仅基于视觉信息，直接从面部视频中提取它们，从而无需任何基于接触的设备。我们的解决方案基于能够以完全无人监督的方式提取完整的远程光电体积描记信号 (rPPG) 的管道。我们使用这些 rPPG 信号来计算 60 多种统计、几何和生理特征，这些特征进一步用于训练多个机器学习回归器以识别不同程度的抑郁症。对两个基准数据集的实验表明，这种方法提供了与其他基于语音或面部表情的视听模式相当的结果，可能是对它们的补充。此外，所提出的方法所取得的结果显示出有前途且可靠的性能，其性能优于手工设计的方法，并且与基于深度学习的方法相当。 本文提出一种基于面部视频的远程光电容积描记法（rPPG）信号分析方法，用于识别抑郁状态。 Constantino Álvarez Casado,Manuel Lage Cañellas,Miguel Bordallo López cs.CV,cs.ET,cs.LG

authors_text: Thomas Fel,Lucas Hervier,David Vigouroux,Antonin Poche,Justin Plakoo,Remi Cadene,Mathieu Chalvidal,Julien Colin,Thibaut Boissin,Louis Bethune,Agustin Picard,Claire Nicodeme,Laurent Gardes,Gregory Flandin,Thomas Serre
title: Xplique: A Deep Learning Explainability Toolbox
title_zh: Explique：深度学习可解释性工具箱
abstract: Today's most advanced machine-learning models are hardly scrutable. The key challenge for explainability methods is to help assisting researchers in opening up these black boxes, by revealing the strategy that led to a given decision, by characterizing their internal states or by studying the underlying data representation. To address this challenge, we have developed Xplique: a software library for explainability which includes representative explainability methods as well as associated evaluation metrics. It interfaces with one of the most popular learning libraries: Tensorflow as well as other libraries including PyTorch, scikit-learn and Theano. The code is licensed under the MIT license and is freely available at github.com/deel-ai/xplique.
summary: Today's most advanced machine-learning models are hardly scrutable. The key challenge for explainability methods is to help assisting researchers in opening up these black boxes, by revealing the strategy that led to a given decision, by characterizing their internal states or by studying the underlying data representation. To address this challenge, we have developed Xplique: a software library for explainability which includes representative explainability methods as well as associated evaluation metrics. It interfaces with one of the most popular learning libraries: Tensorflow as well as other libraries including PyTorch, scikit-learn and Theano. The code is licensed under the MIT license and is freely available at github.com/deel-ai/xplique.
abstract_zh: 当今最先进的机器学习模型很难被解读。可解释性方法的关键挑战是通过揭示导致给定决策的策略、表征其内部状态或研究底层数据表示来帮助研究人员打开这些黑匣子。为了应对这一挑战，我们开发了 Xplique：一个可解释性软件库，其中包括代表性的可解释性方法以及相关的评估指标。它与最流行的学习库之一：Tensorflow 以及其他库（包括 PyTorch、scikit-learn 和 Theano）接口。该代码已获得 MIT 许可，可在 github.com/deel-ai/xplique 上免费获取。

AI.tldr: 开发Xplique工具箱，提供深度学习模型的可解释性方法及评估指标
AI.motivation: 现代机器学习模型复杂且难以解释，需工具辅助研究人员理解其决策过程和内部机制
AI.method: 构建集成多种解释算法和评估指标的软件库，兼容主流深度学习框架如TensorFlow、PyTorch等
AI.result: 开发完成并开源Xplique工具箱，提供MIT许可，支持多框架，促进模型可解释性研究
AI.conclusion: Xplique为深度学习模型的可解释性研究提供有效工具，推动该领域发展

authors_text: David Dekker,Bart M. P. Jansen
title: Kernelization for Feedback Vertex Set via Elimination Distance to a Forest
title_zh: 通过消除到森林的距离对反馈顶点集进行核化
comment: 40 pages, 4 figures. To be published in the Proceedings of WG2022
comments: 40 pages, 4 figures. To be published in the Proceedings of WG2022
abstract: We study efficient preprocessing for the undirected Feedback Vertex Set problem, a fundamental problem in graph theory which asks for a minimum-sized vertex set whose removal yields an acyclic graph. More precisely, we aim to determine for which parameterizations this problem admits a polynomial kernel. While a characterization is known for the related Vertex Cover problem based on the recently introduced notion of bridge-depth, it remained an open problem whether this could be generalized to Feedback Vertex Set. The answer turns out to be negative; the existence of polynomial kernels for structural parameterizations for Feedback Vertex Set is governed by the elimination distance to a forest. Under the standard assumption that NP is not a subset of coNP/poly, we prove that for any minor-closed graph class $\mathcal G$, Feedback Vertex Set parameterized by the size of a modulator to $\mathcal G$ has a polynomial kernel if and only if $\mathcal G$ has bounded elimination distance to a forest. This captures and generalizes all existing kernels for structural parameterizations of the Feedback Vertex Set problem.
summary: We study efficient preprocessing for the undirected Feedback Vertex Set problem, a fundamental problem in graph theory which asks for a minimum-sized vertex set whose removal yields an acyclic graph. More precisely, we aim to determine for which parameterizations this problem admits a polynomial kernel. While a characterization is known for the related Vertex Cover problem based on the recently introduced notion of bridge-depth, it remained an open problem whether this could be generalized to Feedback Vertex Set. The answer turns out to be negative; the existence of polynomial kernels for structural parameterizations for Feedback Vertex Set is governed by the elimination distance to a forest. Under the standard assumption that NP is not a subset of coNP/poly, we prove that for any minor-closed graph class $\mathcal G$, Feedback Vertex Set parameterized by the size of a modulator to $\mathcal G$ has a polynomial kernel if and only if $\mathcal G$ has bounded elimination distance to a forest. This captures and generalizes all existing kernels for structural parameterizations of the Feedback Vertex Set problem.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了无向反馈顶点集问题的有效预处理，这是图论中的一个基本问题，它需要一个最小尺寸的顶点集，将其删除会产生一个无环图。更准确地说，我们的目标是确定该问题对于哪些参数化允许多项式内核。虽然基于最近引入的桥深度概念的相关顶点覆盖问题的表征是已知的，但是否可以将其推广到反馈顶点集仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。答案是否定的；用于反馈顶点集的结构参数化的多项式核的存在由到森林的消除距离控制。在 NP 不是 coNP/poly 子集的标准假设下，我们证明对于任何小闭图类 $\mathcal G$，由 $\mathcal G$ 的调制器大小参数化的反馈顶点集具有多项式内核当且仅当 $\mathcal G$ 具有到森林的有界消除距离。这捕获并概括了反馈顶点集问题的结构参数化的所有现有内核。

AI.tldr: 本文研究无向图反馈顶点集问题的参数化内核化，通过消除距离到森林的参数确定其多项式内核的存在性。
AI.motivation: 反馈顶点集是图论中的核心问题，但其结构参数化内核化条件尚未明确。此前顶点覆盖问题的参数化依赖桥深度，但反馈顶点集是否可推广为开放问题。
AI.method: 基于消除距离到森林的参数，结合minor闭合图类性质，在NP≠coNP/poly假设下证明多项式内核存在的充要条件。
AI.result: 证明对于任意minor闭合图类G，反馈顶点集以到G的modulator大小为参数有多项式内核，当且仅当G具有有界消除距离到森林。
AI.conclusion: 该结果统一了所有已知的反馈顶点集结构参数化内核，并揭示其存在性由消除距离决定，否定了类似顶点覆盖的桥深度推广可能性。

authors_text: Oloff C. Biermann,Daniel Ajisafe,Dongwook Yoon
title: Interaction Design for VR Applications: Understanding Needs for University Curricula
title_zh: VR 应用的交互设计：了解大学课程的需求
comment: 7 pages, 2 figures, published to CHI EA. For the associated presentation, see https://dl.acm.org/action/downloadSupplement?doi=10.1145%2F3491101.3519859&file=3491101.3519859-talk-video.mp4
comments: 7 pages, 2 figures, published to CHI EA. For the associated presentation, see https://dl.acm.org/action/downloadSupplement?doi=10.1145%2F3491101.3519859&file=3491101.3519859-talk-video.mp4
abstract: As virtual reality (VR) is emerging in the tech sector, developers and designers are under pressure to create immersive experiences for their products. However, the current curricula from top institutions focus primarily on technical considerations for building VR applications, missing out on concerns and usability problems specific to VR interaction design. To better understand current needs, we examined the status quo of existing university pedagogies by carrying out a content analysis of undergraduate and graduate courses about VR and related areas offered in the major citadels of learning and conducting interviews with 7 industry experts. Our analysis reveals that the current teaching practices underemphasize design thinking, prototyping, and evaluation skills, while focusing on technical implementation. We recommend VR curricula should emphasize design principles and guidelines, offer training in prototyping and ideation, prioritize practical design exercises while providing industry insights, and encourage students to solve VR design problems beyond the classroom.
summary: As virtual reality (VR) is emerging in the tech sector, developers and designers are under pressure to create immersive experiences for their products. However, the current curricula from top institutions focus primarily on technical considerations for building VR applications, missing out on concerns and usability problems specific to VR interaction design. To better understand current needs, we examined the status quo of existing university pedagogies by carrying out a content analysis of undergraduate and graduate courses about VR and related areas offered in the major citadels of learning and conducting interviews with 7 industry experts. Our analysis reveals that the current teaching practices underemphasize design thinking, prototyping, and evaluation skills, while focusing on technical implementation. We recommend VR curricula should emphasize design principles and guidelines, offer training in prototyping and ideation, prioritize practical design exercises while providing industry insights, and encourage students to solve VR design problems beyond the classroom.
abstract_zh: 随着虚拟现实 (VR) 在科技领域的兴起，开发人员和设计师面临着为其产品创造沉浸式体验的压力。然而，目前顶尖机构的课程主要侧重于构建 VR 应用程序的技术考虑，而忽略了 VR 交互设计特有的关注点和可用性问题。为了更好地了解当前需求，我们对各大院校开设的 VR 及相关领域的本科生和研究生课程进行了内容分析，并采访了 7 位行业专家，审视了现有大学教学法的现状。我们的分析表明，当前的教学实践不太重视设计思维、原型设计和评估技能，而注重技术实现。我们建议VR课程应强调设计原则和指南，提供原型和构思培训，优先考虑实践设计练习，同时提供行业见解，并鼓励学生在课堂之外解决VR设计问题。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了当前大学VR课程设置的不足，并提出了改进VR交互设计教学的建议。
AI.motivation: 随着VR技术的发展，现有课程过于侧重技术实现，忽视了交互设计的用户体验和实际问题。
AI.method: 通过内容分析法研究顶尖院校的VR相关课程，并对7位行业专家进行访谈。
AI.result: 发现当前教学实践低估了设计思维、原型设计和评估技能的重要性，缺乏实践性设计训练和行业洞察。
AI.conclusion: 建议VR课程应强化设计原则教学，增加原型设计训练，注重实践项目并融入行业视角。

search_text: Interaction Design for VR Applications: Understanding Needs for University Curricula VR 应用的交互设计：了解大学课程的需求 As virtual reality (VR) is emerging in the tech sector, developers and designers are under pressure to create immersive experiences for their products. However, the current curricula from top institutions focus primarily on technical considerations for building VR applications, missing out on concerns and usability problems specific to VR interaction design. To better understand current needs, we examined the status quo of existing university pedagogies by carrying out a content analysis of undergraduate and graduate courses about VR and related areas offered in the major citadels of learning and conducting interviews with 7 industry experts. Our analysis reveals that the current teaching practices underemphasize design thinking, prototyping, and evaluation skills, while focusing on technical implementation. We recommend VR curricula should emphasize design principles and guidelines, offer training in prototyping and ideation, prioritize practical design exercises while providing industry insights, and encourage students to solve VR design problems beyond the classroom. 随着虚拟现实 (VR) 在科技领域的兴起，开发人员和设计师面临着为其产品创造沉浸式体验的压力。然而，目前顶尖机构的课程主要侧重于构建 VR 应用程序的技术考虑，而忽略了 VR 交互设计特有的关注点和可用性问题。为了更好地了解当前需求，我们对各大院校开设的 VR 及相关领域的本科生和研究生课程进行了内容分析，并采访了 7 位行业专家，审视了现有大学教学法的现状。我们的分析表明，当前的教学实践不太重视设计思维、原型设计和评估技能，而注重技术实现。我们建议VR课程应强调设计原则和指南，提供原型和构思培训，优先考虑实践设计练习，同时提供行业见解，并鼓励学生在课堂之外解决VR设计问题。 本文分析了当前大学VR课程设置的不足，并提出了改进VR交互设计教学的建议。 Oloff C. Biermann,Daniel Ajisafe,Dongwook Yoon cs.HC,cs.CY,cs.ET

authors_text: Deyao Zhu,Li Erran Li,Mohamed Elhoseiny
title: Value Memory Graph: A Graph-Structured World Model for Offline Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 价值记忆图：离线强化学习的图结构世界模型
abstract: Reinforcement Learning (RL) methods are typically applied directly in environments to learn policies. In some complex environments with continuous state-action spaces, sparse rewards, and/or long temporal horizons, learning a good policy in the original environments can be difficult. Focusing on the offline RL setting, we aim to build a simple and discrete world model that abstracts the original environment. RL methods are applied to our world model instead of the environment data for simplified policy learning. Our world model, dubbed Value Memory Graph (VMG), is designed as a directed-graph-based Markov decision process (MDP) of which vertices and directed edges represent graph states and graph actions, separately. As state-action spaces of VMG are finite and relatively small compared to the original environment, we can directly apply the value iteration algorithm on VMG to estimate graph state values and figure out the best graph actions. VMG is trained from and built on the offline RL dataset. Together with an action translator that converts the abstract graph actions in VMG to real actions in the original environment, VMG controls agents to maximize episode returns. Our experiments on the D4RL benchmark show that VMG can outperform state-of-the-art offline RL methods in several goal-oriented tasks, especially when environments have sparse rewards and long temporal horizons. Code is available at https://github.com/TsuTikgiau/ValueMemoryGraph
summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) methods are typically applied directly in environments to learn policies. In some complex environments with continuous state-action spaces, sparse rewards, and/or long temporal horizons, learning a good policy in the original environments can be difficult. Focusing on the offline RL setting, we aim to build a simple and discrete world model that abstracts the original environment. RL methods are applied to our world model instead of the environment data for simplified policy learning. Our world model, dubbed Value Memory Graph (VMG), is designed as a directed-graph-based Markov decision process (MDP) of which vertices and directed edges represent graph states and graph actions, separately. As state-action spaces of VMG are finite and relatively small compared to the original environment, we can directly apply the value iteration algorithm on VMG to estimate graph state values and figure out the best graph actions. VMG is trained from and built on the offline RL dataset. Together with an action translator that converts the abstract graph actions in VMG to real actions in the original environment, VMG controls agents to maximize episode returns. Our experiments on the D4RL benchmark show that VMG can outperform state-of-the-art offline RL methods in several goal-oriented tasks, especially when environments have sparse rewards and long temporal horizons. Code is available at https://github.com/TsuTikgiau/ValueMemoryGraph
abstract_zh: 强化学习 (RL) 方法通常直接应用于环境中来学习策略。在一些具有连续状态动作空间、稀疏奖励和/或长时间范围的复杂环境中，在原始环境中学习好的策略可能很困难。专注于离线强化学习设置，我们的目标是构建一个简单且离散的世界模型，抽象出原始环境。强化学习方法应用于我们的世界模型，而不是环境数据，以简化政策学习。我们的世界模型被称为值记忆图（VMG），被设计为基于有向图的马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），其中顶点和有向边分别表示图状态和图动作。由于VMG的状态-动作空间是有限的，并且与原始环境相比相对较小，因此我们可以直接在VMG上应用值迭代算法来估计图状态值并找出最佳图动作。 VMG 是根据离线 RL 数据集进行训练和构建的。 VMG 与将 VMG 中的抽象图动作转换为原始环境中的真实动作的动作翻译器一起控制代理以最大化剧集回报。我们在 D4RL 基准上的实验表明，VMG 在多个目标导向的任务中可以超越最先进的离线 RL 方法，特别是当环境奖励稀疏且时间范围较长时。代码可在 https://github.com/TsuTikgiau/ValueMemoryGraph 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图结构的世界模型Value Memory Graph（VMG），用于解决离线强化学习中的复杂环境问题。
AI.motivation: 在具有稀疏奖励、连续状态动作空间和长时序跨度的复杂环境中，传统强化学习方法难以直接学习有效策略，而离线强化学习需依赖历史数据而非环境交互。
AI.method: 构建一个有向图马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），其中顶点表示状态，边表示动作。通过价值迭代算法在离散的图结构上估计状态值，并利用动作转换器将抽象动作映射到真实环境动作。
AI.result: 在D4RL基准测试中，VMG在多个目标导向任务中优于现有离线强化学习方法，尤其在稀疏奖励和长时序跨度环境中表现突出。
AI.conclusion: VMG通过将环境抽象为图结构，有效解决了离线强化学习中的复杂性问题，为稀疏奖励和长时序任务提供了新的解决方案。

authors_text: Kim Youwang,Kim Ji-Yeon,Tae-Hyun Oh
title: CLIP-Actor: Text-Driven Recommendation and Stylization for Animating Human Meshes
title_zh: CLIP-Actor：用于动画人体网格的文本驱动推荐和风格化
comment: Accepted at ECCV 2022. [Project page] https://clip-actor.github.io [Code] https://github.com/postech-ami/CLIP-Actor
comments: Accepted at ECCV 2022. [Project page] https://clip-actor.github.io [Code] https://github.com/postech-ami/CLIP-Actor
abstract: We propose CLIP-Actor, a text-driven motion recommendation and neural mesh stylization system for human mesh animation. CLIP-Actor animates a 3D human mesh to conform to a text prompt by recommending a motion sequence and optimizing mesh style attributes. We build a text-driven human motion recommendation system by leveraging a large-scale human motion dataset with language labels. Given a natural language prompt, CLIP-Actor suggests a text-conforming human motion in a coarse-to-fine manner. Then, our novel zero-shot neural style optimization detailizes and texturizes the recommended mesh sequence to conform to the prompt in a temporally-consistent and pose-agnostic manner. This is distinctive in that prior work fails to generate plausible results when the pose of an artist-designed mesh does not conform to the text from the beginning. We further propose the spatio-temporal view augmentation and mask-weighted embedding attention, which stabilize the optimization process by leveraging multi-frame human motion and rejecting poorly rendered views. We demonstrate that CLIP-Actor produces plausible and human-recognizable style 3D human mesh in motion with detailed geometry and texture solely from a natural language prompt.
summary: We propose CLIP-Actor, a text-driven motion recommendation and neural mesh stylization system for human mesh animation. CLIP-Actor animates a 3D human mesh to conform to a text prompt by recommending a motion sequence and optimizing mesh style attributes. We build a text-driven human motion recommendation system by leveraging a large-scale human motion dataset with language labels. Given a natural language prompt, CLIP-Actor suggests a text-conforming human motion in a coarse-to-fine manner. Then, our novel zero-shot neural style optimization detailizes and texturizes the recommended mesh sequence to conform to the prompt in a temporally-consistent and pose-agnostic manner. This is distinctive in that prior work fails to generate plausible results when the pose of an artist-designed mesh does not conform to the text from the beginning. We further propose the spatio-temporal view augmentation and mask-weighted embedding attention, which stabilize the optimization process by leveraging multi-frame human motion and rejecting poorly rendered views. We demonstrate that CLIP-Actor produces plausible and human-recognizable style 3D human mesh in motion with detailed geometry and texture solely from a natural language prompt.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 CLIP-Actor，一种用于人体网格动画的文本驱动运动推荐和神经网格风格化系统。 CLIP-Actor 通过推荐运动序列和优化网格样式属性，对 3D 人体网格进行动画处理，以符合文本提示。我们利用带有语言标签的大规模人体动作数据集构建了一个文本驱动的人体动作推荐系统。给定自然语言提示，CLIP-Actor 以从粗到细的方式建议符合文本的人体动作。然后，我们新颖的零样本神经风格优化对推荐的网格序列进行详细化和纹理化，以时间一致且与姿势无关的方式符合提示。其独特之处在于，当艺术家设计的网格的姿势从一开始就不符合文本时，先前的工作就无法生成合理的结果。我们进一步提出了时空视图增强和掩模加权嵌入注意，它们通过利用多帧人体运动并拒绝渲染不良的视图来稳定优化过程。我们证明，CLIP-Actor 仅根据自然语言提示即可生成具有详细几何形状和纹理的运动中可信且人类可识别的 3D 人体网格。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CLIP-Actor系统，通过文本驱动的方式为3D人体网格生成符合文本描述的动画，包括动作推荐和网格风格优化。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在艺术家设计的网格姿态不符合文本描述时难以生成合理结果，因此需要一种能够从自然语言提示中生成符合文本描述的3D人体网格动画的方法。
AI.method: CLIP-Actor通过利用大规模带语言标签的人体运动数据集构建文本驱动的人体运动推荐系统，并采用零样本神经风格优化技术对推荐的网格序列进行细节和纹理优化，同时引入时空视角增强和掩码加权嵌入注意力以稳定优化过程。
AI.result: CLIP-Actor能够仅从自然语言提示中生成具有详细几何和纹理的合理且可被人类识别的3D人体网格动画。
AI.conclusion: CLIP-Actor系统成功实现了从文本到3D人体网格动画的生成，解决了现有方法在姿态与文本不匹配时的不足。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出CLIP-Actor系统，通过文本驱动的方式为3D人体网格生成符合文本描述的动画，包括动作推荐和网格风格优化。
ai_content.motivation: 现有方法在艺术家设计的网格姿态不符合文本描述时难以生成合理结果，因此需要一种能够从自然语言提示中生成符合文本描述的3D人体网格动画的方法。
ai_content.method: CLIP-Actor通过利用大规模带语言标签的人体运动数据集构建文本驱动的人体运动推荐系统，并采用零样本神经风格优化技术对推荐的网格序列进行细节和纹理优化，同时引入时空视角增强和掩码加权嵌入注意力以稳定优化过程。
ai_content.result: CLIP-Actor能够仅从自然语言提示中生成具有详细几何和纹理的合理且可被人类识别的3D人体网格动画。
ai_content.conclusion: CLIP-Actor系统成功实现了从文本到3D人体网格动画的生成，解决了现有方法在姿态与文本不匹配时的不足。

search_text: CLIP-Actor: Text-Driven Recommendation and Stylization for Animating Human Meshes CLIP-Actor：用于动画人体网格的文本驱动推荐和风格化 We propose CLIP-Actor, a text-driven motion recommendation and neural mesh stylization system for human mesh animation. CLIP-Actor animates a 3D human mesh to conform to a text prompt by recommending a motion sequence and optimizing mesh style attributes. We build a text-driven human motion recommendation system by leveraging a large-scale human motion dataset with language labels. Given a natural language prompt, CLIP-Actor suggests a text-conforming human motion in a coarse-to-fine manner. Then, our novel zero-shot neural style optimization detailizes and texturizes the recommended mesh sequence to conform to the prompt in a temporally-consistent and pose-agnostic manner. This is distinctive in that prior work fails to generate plausible results when the pose of an artist-designed mesh does not conform to the text from the beginning. We further propose the spatio-temporal view augmentation and mask-weighted embedding attention, which stabilize the optimization process by leveraging multi-frame human motion and rejecting poorly rendered views. We demonstrate that CLIP-Actor produces plausible and human-recognizable style 3D human mesh in motion with detailed geometry and texture solely from a natural language prompt. 我们提出了 CLIP-Actor，一种用于人体网格动画的文本驱动运动推荐和神经网格风格化系统。 CLIP-Actor 通过推荐运动序列和优化网格样式属性，对 3D 人体网格进行动画处理，以符合文本提示。我们利用带有语言标签的大规模人体动作数据集构建了一个文本驱动的人体动作推荐系统。给定自然语言提示，CLIP-Actor 以从粗到细的方式建议符合文本的人体动作。然后，我们新颖的零样本神经风格优化对推荐的网格序列进行详细化和纹理化，以时间一致且与姿势无关的方式符合提示。其独特之处在于，当艺术家设计的网格的姿势从一开始就不符合文本时，先前的工作就无法生成合理的结果。我们进一步提出了时空视图增强和掩模加权嵌入注意，它们通过利用多帧人体运动并拒绝渲染不良的视图来稳定优化过程。我们证明，CLIP-Actor 仅根据自然语言提示即可生成具有详细几何形状和纹理的运动中可信且人类可识别的 3D 人体网格。 本文提出CLIP-Actor系统，通过文本驱动的方式为3D人体网格生成符合文本描述的动画，包括动作推荐和网格风格优化。 Kim Youwang,Kim Ji-Yeon,Tae-Hyun Oh cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.GR

authors_text: Zheng Chang,Xinfeng Zhang,Shanshe Wang,Siwei Ma,Wen Gao
title: STIP: A SpatioTemporal Information-Preserving and Perception-Augmented Model for High-Resolution Video Prediction
title_zh: STIP：用于高分辨率视频预测的时空信息保存和感知增强模型
comment: This journal paper is extended from our previous work accepted in CVPR2022 and has been submitted to IEEE Transactions on Multimedia
comments: This journal paper is extended from our previous work accepted in CVPR2022 and has been submitted to IEEE Transactions on Multimedia
abstract: Although significant achievements have been achieved by recurrent neural network (RNN) based video prediction methods, their performance in datasets with high resolutions is still far from satisfactory because of the information loss problem and the perception-insensitive mean square error (MSE) based loss functions. In this paper, we propose a Spatiotemporal Information-Preserving and Perception-Augmented Model (STIP) to solve the above two problems. To solve the information loss problem, the proposed model aims to preserve the spatiotemporal information for videos during the feature extraction and the state transitions, respectively. Firstly, a Multi-Grained Spatiotemporal Auto-Encoder (MGST-AE) is designed based on the X-Net structure. The proposed MGST-AE can help the decoders recall multi-grained information from the encoders in both the temporal and spatial domains. In this way, more spatiotemporal information can be preserved during the feature extraction for high-resolution videos. Secondly, a Spatiotemporal Gated Recurrent Unit (STGRU) is designed based on the standard Gated Recurrent Unit (GRU) structure, which can efficiently preserve spatiotemporal information during the state transitions. The proposed STGRU can achieve more satisfactory performance with a much lower computation load compared with the popular Long Short-Term (LSTM) based predictive memories. Furthermore, to improve the traditional MSE loss functions, a Learned Perceptual Loss (LP-loss) is further designed based on the Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs), which can help obtain a satisfactory trade-off between the objective quality and the perceptual quality. Experimental results show that the proposed STIP can predict videos with more satisfactory visual quality compared with a variety of state-of-the-art methods. Source code has been available at \url{https://github.com/ZhengChang467/STIPHR}.

In this paper, we propose a Spatiotemporal Information-Preserving and Perception-Augmented Model (STIP) to solve the above two problems. To solve the information loss problem, the proposed model aims to preserve the spatiotemporal information for videos during the feature extraction and the state transitions, respectively. Firstly, a Multi-Grained Spatiotemporal Auto-Encoder (MGST-AE) is designed based on the X-Net structure. The proposed MGST-AE can help the decoders recall multi-grained information from the encoders in both the temporal and spatial domains. In this way, more spatiotemporal information can be preserved during the feature extraction for high-resolution videos. Secondly, a Spatiotemporal Gated Recurrent Unit (STGRU) is designed based on the standard Gated Recurrent Unit (GRU) structure, which can efficiently preserve spatiotemporal information during the state transitions. The proposed STGRU can achieve more satisfactory performance with a much lower computation load compared with the popular Long Short-Term (LSTM) based predictive memories. Furthermore, to improve the traditional MSE loss functions, a Learned Perceptual Loss (LP-loss) is further designed based on the Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs), which can help obtain a satisfactory trade-off between the objective quality and the perceptual quality. Experimental results show that the proposed STIP can predict videos with more satisfactory visual quality compared with a variety of state-of-the-art methods. Source code has been available at \url{https://github.com/ZhengChang467/STIPHR}.
abstract_zh: 尽管基于循环神经网络（RNN）的视频预测方法已经取得了显着的成就，但由于信息丢失问题和基于感知不敏感的均方误差（MSE）的损失函数，它们在高分辨率数据集上的性能仍然远不能令人满意。在本文中，我们提出了时空信息保存和感知增强模型（STIP）来解决上述两个问题。为了解决信息丢失问题，所提出的模型旨在分别在特征提取和状态转换期间保留视频的时空信息。首先，基于X-Net结构设计了多粒度时空自动编码器（MGST-AE）。所提出的 MGST-AE 可以帮助解码器在时域和空间域中从编码器回忆多粒度信息。这样，在高分辨率视频的特征提取过程中可以保留更多的时空信息。其次，基于标准门控循环单元（GRU）结构设计了时空门控循环单元（STGRU），可以在状态转换期间有效保存时空信息。与流行的基于长短期（LSTM）的预测记忆相比，所提出的 STGRU 可以以低得多的计算负载实现更令人满意的性能。此外，为了改进传统的MSE损失函数，基于生成对抗网络（GAN）进一步设计了学习感知损失（LP-loss），这有助于在客观质量和感知质量之间获得令人满意的权衡。实验结果表明，与各种最先进的方法相比，所提出的 STIP 可以预测具有更令人满意的视觉质量的视频。源代码可在 \url{https://github.com/ZhengChang467/STIPHR} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为STIP的时空信息保留与感知增强模型，用于解决高分辨率视频预测中的信息丢失和感知不敏感问题。
AI.motivation: 基于RNN的视频预测方法在高分辨率数据集上表现不佳，主要由于信息丢失问题和依赖均方误差（MSE）的感知不敏感损失函数。
AI.method: 设计了多粒度时空自编码器（MGST-AE）和时空门控循环单元（STGRU）以保留时空信息，并引入基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的感知损失（LP-loss）优化预测质量。
AI.result: 实验表明，STIP在视觉质量上优于多种最先进的视频预测方法，且计算负载更低。
AI.conclusion: STIP通过信息保留机制和感知损失优化，有效提升了高分辨率视频预测的性能，代码已开源。

authors_text: Amir Shaikhha,Mahdi Ghorbani,Hesam Shahrokhi
title: Hinted Dictionaries: Efficient Functional Ordered Sets and Maps
title_zh: 提示词典：高效的函数有序集和映射
abstract: This article introduces hinted dictionaries for expressing efficient ordered sets and maps functionally. As opposed to the traditional ordered dictionaries with logarithmic operations, hinted dictionaries can achieve better performance by using cursor-like objects referred to as hints. Hinted dictionaries unify the interfaces of imperative ordered dictionaries (e.g., C++ maps) and functional ones (e.g., Adams' sets). We show that such dictionaries can use sorted arrays, unbalanced trees, and balanced trees as their underlying representations. Throughout the article, we use Scala to present the different components of hinted dictionaries. We also provide a C++ implementation to evaluate the effectiveness of hinted dictionaries. Hinted dictionaries provide superior performance for set-set operations in comparison with the standard library of C++. Also, they show a competitive performance in comparison with the SciPy library for sparse vector operations.
summary: This article introduces hinted dictionaries for expressing efficient ordered sets and maps functionally. As opposed to the traditional ordered dictionaries with logarithmic operations, hinted dictionaries can achieve better performance by using cursor-like objects referred to as hints. Hinted dictionaries unify the interfaces of imperative ordered dictionaries (e.g., C++ maps) and functional ones (e.g., Adams' sets). We show that such dictionaries can use sorted arrays, unbalanced trees, and balanced trees as their underlying representations. Throughout the article, we use Scala to present the different components of hinted dictionaries. We also provide a C++ implementation to evaluate the effectiveness of hinted dictionaries. Hinted dictionaries provide superior performance for set-set operations in comparison with the standard library of C++. Also, they show a competitive performance in comparison with the SciPy library for sparse vector operations.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了用于在功能上表达高效有序集和映射的暗示字典。与具有对数运算的传统有序字典相反，提示字典可以通过使用称为提示的类似游标的对象来实现更好的性能。提示字典统一了命令式有序字典（例如 C++ 映射）和函数式字典（例如 Adams 集合）的接口。我们证明这样的字典可以使用排序数组、不平衡树和平衡树作为其底层表示。在整篇文章中，我们使用 Scala 来展示暗示字典的不同组件。我们还提供了一个 C++ 实现来评估暗示字典的有效性。与 C++ 标准库相比，提示字典为集合运算提供了卓越的性能。此外，与 SciPy 库相比，它们在稀疏向量运算方面表现出有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为hinted字典的数据结构，用于高效实现功能性的有序集合和映射，结合了命令式与函数式接口的优势。
AI.motivation: 传统有序字典操作复杂度为对数级别，难以兼顾性能与函数式编程的简洁性，需寻找更高效的实现方式。
AI.method: 通过引入类似光标对象的'hints'机制，统一命令式（如C++ map）与函数式（如Adams集）接口，并基于排序数组、平衡树等结构实现，使用Scala展示设计，C++验证性能。
AI.result: 在集合操作中性能优于C++标准库，在稀疏向量运算中与SciPy库表现相当，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: hinted字典通过创新接口设计和底层结构选择，在保持函数式编程特性的同时显著提升了有序集合与映射的操作效率。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为hinted字典的数据结构，用于高效实现功能性的有序集合和映射，结合了命令式与函数式接口的优势。

search_text: Hinted Dictionaries: Efficient Functional Ordered Sets and Maps 提示词典：高效的函数有序集和映射 This article introduces hinted dictionaries for expressing efficient ordered sets and maps functionally. As opposed to the traditional ordered dictionaries with logarithmic operations, hinted dictionaries can achieve better performance by using cursor-like objects referred to as hints. Hinted dictionaries unify the interfaces of imperative ordered dictionaries (e.g., C++ maps) and functional ones (e.g., Adams' sets). We show that such dictionaries can use sorted arrays, unbalanced trees, and balanced trees as their underlying representations. Throughout the article, we use Scala to present the different components of hinted dictionaries. We also provide a C++ implementation to evaluate the effectiveness of hinted dictionaries. Hinted dictionaries provide superior performance for set-set operations in comparison with the standard library of C++. Also, they show a competitive performance in comparison with the SciPy library for sparse vector operations. 本文介绍了用于在功能上表达高效有序集和映射的暗示字典。与具有对数运算的传统有序字典相反，提示字典可以通过使用称为提示的类似游标的对象来实现更好的性能。提示字典统一了命令式有序字典（例如 C++ 映射）和函数式字典（例如 Adams 集合）的接口。我们证明这样的字典可以使用排序数组、不平衡树和平衡树作为其底层表示。在整篇文章中，我们使用 Scala 来展示暗示字典的不同组件。我们还提供了一个 C++ 实现来评估暗示字典的有效性。与 C++ 标准库相比，提示字典为集合运算提供了卓越的性能。此外，与 SciPy 库相比，它们在稀疏向量运算方面表现出有竞争力的性能。 本文提出了一种名为hinted字典的数据结构，用于高效实现功能性的有序集合和映射，结合了命令式与函数式接口的优势。 Amir Shaikhha,Mahdi Ghorbani,Hesam Shahrokhi cs.PL,cs.DS

authors_text: Mehmet Alican Noyan
title: Uncovering bias in the PlantVillage dataset
title_zh: 发现 PlantVillage 数据集中的偏差
abstract: We report our investigation on the use of the popular PlantVillage dataset for training deep learning based plant disease detection models. We trained a machine learning model using only 8 pixels from the PlantVillage image backgrounds. The model achieved 49.0% accuracy on the held-out test set, well above the random guessing accuracy of 2.6%. This result indicates that the PlantVillage dataset contains noise correlated with the labels and deep learning models can easily exploit this bias to make predictions. Possible approaches to alleviate this problem are discussed.
summary: We report our investigation on the use of the popular PlantVillage dataset for training deep learning based plant disease detection models. We trained a machine learning model using only 8 pixels from the PlantVillage image backgrounds. The model achieved 49.0% accuracy on the held-out test set, well above the random guessing accuracy of 2.6%. This result indicates that the PlantVillage dataset contains noise correlated with the labels and deep learning models can easily exploit this bias to make predictions. Possible approaches to alleviate this problem are discussed.
abstract_zh: 我们报告了关于使用流行的 PlantVillage 数据集来训练基于深度学习的植物病害检测模型的调查。我们仅使用 PlantVillage 图像背景中的 8 个像素来训练机器学习模型。该模型在保留测试集上实现了 49.0% 的准确率，远高于随机猜测的 2.6% 准确率。该结果表明 PlantVillage 数据集包含与标签相关的噪声，深度学习模型可以轻松利用这种偏差进行预测。讨论了缓解该问题的可能方法。

AI.motivation: 探讨数据集中的偏差可能导致模型依赖非相关特征，影响其可靠性和泛化能力
AI.method: 通过仅使用图像背景中的8个像素训练机器学习模型，检测数据集中的偏差
AI.result: 模型在测试集上达到49.0%的准确率，远超随机猜测的2.6%，表明数据集存在标签相关的噪声
AI.conclusion: PlantVillage数据集存在标签相关噪声，模型可能依赖这些偏差，需采取措施减少影响

authors_text: Federico Nesti,Giulio Rossolini,Gianluca D'Amico,Alessandro Biondi,Giorgio Buttazzo
title: CARLA-GeAR: a Dataset Generator for a Systematic Evaluation of Adversarial Robustness of Vision Models
title_zh: CARLA-GeAR：用于系统评估视觉模型的对抗鲁棒性的数据集生成器
abstract: Adversarial examples represent a serious threat for deep neural networks in several application domains and a huge amount of work has been produced to investigate them and mitigate their effects. Nevertheless, no much work has been devoted to the generation of datasets specifically designed to evaluate the adversarial robustness of neural models. This paper presents CARLA-GeAR, a tool for the automatic generation of photo-realistic synthetic datasets that can be used for a systematic evaluation of the adversarial robustness of neural models against physical adversarial patches, as well as for comparing the performance of different adversarial defense/detection methods. The tool is built on the CARLA simulator, using its Python API, and allows the generation of datasets for several vision tasks in the context of autonomous driving. The adversarial patches included in the generated datasets are attached to billboards or the back of a truck and are crafted by using state-of-the-art white-box attack strategies to maximize the prediction error of the model under test. Finally, the paper presents an experimental study to evaluate the performance of some defense methods against such attacks, showing how the datasets generated with CARLA-GeAR might be used in future work as a benchmark for adversarial defense in the real world. All the code and datasets used in this paper are available at http://carlagear.retis.santannapisa.it.
summary: Adversarial examples represent a serious threat for deep neural networks in several application domains and a huge amount of work has been produced to investigate them and mitigate their effects. Nevertheless, no much work has been devoted to the generation of datasets specifically designed to evaluate the adversarial robustness of neural models. This paper presents CARLA-GeAR, a tool for the automatic generation of photo-realistic synthetic datasets that can be used for a systematic evaluation of the adversarial robustness of neural models against physical adversarial patches, as well as for comparing the performance of different adversarial defense/detection methods. The tool is built on the CARLA simulator, using its Python API, and allows the generation of datasets for several vision tasks in the context of autonomous driving. The adversarial patches included in the generated datasets are attached to billboards or the back of a truck and are crafted by using state-of-the-art white-box attack strategies to maximize the prediction error of the model under test. Finally, the paper presents an experimental study to evaluate the performance of some defense methods against such attacks, showing how the datasets generated with CARLA-GeAR might be used in future work as a benchmark for adversarial defense in the real world. All the code and datasets used in this paper are available at http://carlagear.retis.santannapisa.it.
abstract_zh: 对抗性示例对多个应用领域中的深度神经网络构成了严重威胁，并且已经进行了大量工作来研究它们并减轻它们的影响。然而，没有太多的工作致力于生成专门设计用于评估神经模型的对抗鲁棒性的数据集。本文介绍了 CARLA-GeAR，这是一种自动生成逼真合成数据集的工具，可用于系统评估神经模型针对物理对抗补丁的对抗鲁棒性，以及比较不同对抗防御/检测方法的性能。该工具基于 CARLA 模拟器构建，使用其 Python API，并允许在自动驾驶背景下生成多个视觉任务的数据集。生成的数据集中包含的对抗性补丁被附加到广告牌或卡车后面，并使用最先进的白盒攻击策略精心制作，以最大限度地提高被测模型的预测误差。最后，本文提出了一项实验研究，以评估一些针对此类攻击的防御方法的性能，展示了使用 CARLA-GeAR 生成的数据集如何在未来的工作中用作现实世界中对抗性防御的基准。本文使用的所有代码和数据集均可在 http://carlagear.retis.santannapisa.it 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CARLA-GeAR工具，用于自动生成逼真的合成数据集，以系统评估视觉模型对物理对抗补丁的鲁棒性，并比较不同防御/检测方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管对抗样本的研究已有很多，但缺乏专门设计用于评估神经模型对抗鲁棒性的数据集，尤其在自动驾驶等实际场景中。
AI.method: 基于CARLA模拟器的Python API，生成包含物理对抗补丁（贴在广告牌或卡车后部）的合成数据集，利用最先进的白盒攻击策略生成对抗样本。
AI.result: 实验验证了CARLA-GeAR生成的数据集可有效评估防御方法性能，并展示其作为现实世界对抗防御基准的潜力。
AI.conclusion: CARLA-GeAR为系统化评估视觉模型对抗鲁棒性提供了工具，未来可作为自动驾驶领域对抗防御的基准数据集。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出CARLA-GeAR工具，用于自动生成逼真的合成数据集，以系统评估视觉模型对物理对抗补丁的鲁棒性，并比较不同防御/检测方法的性能。

authors_text: Wei Lu,Wei Sun,Xiongkuo Min,Wenhan Zhu,Quan Zhou,Jun He,Qiyuan Wang,Zicheng Zhang,Tao Wang,Guangtao Zhai
title: Deep Neural Network for Blind Visual Quality Assessment of 4K Content
title_zh: 用于 4K 内容盲视觉质量评估的深度神经网络
abstract: The 4K content can deliver a more immersive visual experience to consumers due to the huge improvement of spatial resolution. However, existing blind image quality assessment (BIQA) methods are not suitable for the original and upscaled 4K contents due to the expanded resolution and specific distortions. In this paper, we propose a deep learning-based BIQA model for 4K content, which on one hand can recognize true and pseudo 4K content and on the other hand can evaluate their perceptual visual quality. Considering the characteristic that high spatial resolution can represent more abundant high-frequency information, we first propose a Grey-level Co-occurrence Matrix (GLCM) based texture complexity measure to select three representative image patches from a 4K image, which can reduce the computational complexity and is proven to be very effective for the overall quality prediction through experiments. Then we extract different kinds of visual features from the intermediate layers of the convolutional neural network (CNN) and integrate them into the quality-aware feature representation. Finally, two multilayer perception (MLP) networks are utilized to map the quality-aware features into the class probability and the quality score for each patch respectively. The overall quality index is obtained through the average pooling of patch results. The proposed model is trained through the multi-task learning manner and we introduce an uncertainty principle to balance the losses of the classification and regression tasks. The experimental results show that the proposed model outperforms all compared BIQA metrics on four 4K content quality assessment databases.
summary: The 4K content can deliver a more immersive visual experience to consumers due to the huge improvement of spatial resolution. However, existing blind image quality assessment (BIQA) methods are not suitable for the original and upscaled 4K contents due to the expanded resolution and specific distortions. In this paper, we propose a deep learning-based BIQA model for 4K content, which on one hand can recognize true and pseudo 4K content and on the other hand can evaluate their perceptual visual quality. Considering the characteristic that high spatial resolution can represent more abundant high-frequency information, we first propose a Grey-level Co-occurrence Matrix (GLCM) based texture complexity measure to select three representative image patches from a 4K image, which can reduce the computational complexity and is proven to be very effective for the overall quality prediction through experiments. Then we extract different kinds of visual features from the intermediate layers of the convolutional neural network (CNN) and integrate them into the quality-aware feature representation. Finally, two multilayer perception (MLP) networks are utilized to map the quality-aware features into the class probability and the quality score for each patch respectively. The overall quality index is obtained through the average pooling of patch results. The proposed model is trained through the multi-task learning manner and we introduce an uncertainty principle to balance the losses of the classification and regression tasks. The experimental results show that the proposed model outperforms all compared BIQA metrics on four 4K content quality assessment databases.
abstract_zh: 4K内容由于空间分辨率的巨大提升，可以为消费者带来更加身临其境的视觉体验。然而，由于扩展的分辨率和特定的失真，现有的盲图像质量评估（BIQA）方法不适合原始和升级的4K内容。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于深度学习的 4K 内容 BIQA 模型，该模型一方面可以识别真实和伪 4K 内容，另一方面可以评估其感知视觉质量。考虑到高空间分辨率可以表示更丰富的高频信息的特点，我们首先提出了一种基于灰度共生矩阵（GLCM）的纹理复杂度度量，从4K图像中选择三个代表性图像块，这可以降低计算复杂度，并通过实验证明对于整体质量预测非常有效。然后，我们从卷积神经网络（CNN）的中间层提取不同类型的视觉特征，并将它们集成到质量感知特征表示中。最后，利用两个多层感知（MLP）网络将质量感知特征分别映射到每个补丁的类概率和质量得分。整体质量指数是通过补丁结果的平均池化得到的。所提出的模型通过多任务学习方式进行训练，并引入不确定性原理来平衡分类和回归任务的损失。实验结果表明，所提出的模型优于四个 4K 内容质量评估数据库上所有比较的 BIQA 指标。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的盲视觉质量评估模型，用于评估4K内容的感知视觉质量。
AI.motivation: 现有盲图像质量评估方法无法有效处理原始和超分辨率4K内容的扩展分辨率及特定失真问题。
AI.method: 提出基于灰度共生矩阵（GLCM）的纹理复杂度度量选择图像块，结合CNN中间层特征提取与多任务学习框架，利用两个MLP网络分别映射分类概率和质量评分。
AI.result: 实验表明该模型在四个4K内容质量评估数据库上优于所有对比BIQA指标。
AI.conclusion: 所提模型通过多任务学习和不确定性原理有效平衡了分类与回归任务，实现了对4K内容质量的准确评估。

search_text: Deep Neural Network for Blind Visual Quality Assessment of 4K Content 用于 4K 内容盲视觉质量评估的深度神经网络 The 4K content can deliver a more immersive visual experience to consumers due to the huge improvement of spatial resolution. However, existing blind image quality assessment (BIQA) methods are not suitable for the original and upscaled 4K contents due to the expanded resolution and specific distortions. In this paper, we propose a deep learning-based BIQA model for 4K content, which on one hand can recognize true and pseudo 4K content and on the other hand can evaluate their perceptual visual quality. Considering the characteristic that high spatial resolution can represent more abundant high-frequency information, we first propose a Grey-level Co-occurrence Matrix (GLCM) based texture complexity measure to select three representative image patches from a 4K image, which can reduce the computational complexity and is proven to be very effective for the overall quality prediction through experiments. Then we extract different kinds of visual features from the intermediate layers of the convolutional neural network (CNN) and integrate them into the quality-aware feature representation. Finally, two multilayer perception (MLP) networks are utilized to map the quality-aware features into the class probability and the quality score for each patch respectively. The overall quality index is obtained through the average pooling of patch results. The proposed model is trained through the multi-task learning manner and we introduce an uncertainty principle to balance the losses of the classification and regression tasks. The experimental results show that the proposed model outperforms all compared BIQA metrics on four 4K content quality assessment databases. 4K内容由于空间分辨率的巨大提升，可以为消费者带来更加身临其境的视觉体验。然而，由于扩展的分辨率和特定的失真，现有的盲图像质量评估（BIQA）方法不适合原始和升级的4K内容。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于深度学习的 4K 内容 BIQA 模型，该模型一方面可以识别真实和伪 4K 内容，另一方面可以评估其感知视觉质量。考虑到高空间分辨率可以表示更丰富的高频信息的特点，我们首先提出了一种基于灰度共生矩阵（GLCM）的纹理复杂度度量，从4K图像中选择三个代表性图像块，这可以降低计算复杂度，并通过实验证明对于整体质量预测非常有效。然后，我们从卷积神经网络（CNN）的中间层提取不同类型的视觉特征，并将它们集成到质量感知特征表示中。最后，利用两个多层感知（MLP）网络将质量感知特征分别映射到每个补丁的类概率和质量得分。整体质量指数是通过补丁结果的平均池化得到的。所提出的模型通过多任务学习方式进行训练，并引入不确定性原理来平衡分类和回归任务的损失。实验结果表明，所提出的模型优于四个 4K 内容质量评估数据库上所有比较的 BIQA 指标。 本文提出一种基于深度学习的盲视觉质量评估模型，用于评估4K内容的感知视觉质量。 Wei Lu,Wei Sun,Xiongkuo Min,Wenhan Zhu,Quan Zhou,Jun He,Qiyuan Wang,Zicheng Zhang,Tao Wang,Guangtao Zhai cs.MM,cs.CV

authors_text: Chengli Tan,Jiangshe Zhang,Junmin Liu
title: Learning Non-Vacuous Generalization Bounds from Optimization
title_zh: 从优化中学习非空泛化界限
abstract: One of the fundamental challenges in the deep learning community is to theoretically understand how well a deep neural network generalizes to unseen data. However, current approaches often yield generalization bounds that are either too loose to be informative of the true generalization error or only valid to the compressed nets. In this study, we present a simple yet non-vacuous generalization bound from the optimization perspective. We achieve this goal by leveraging that the hypothesis set accessed by stochastic gradient algorithms is essentially fractal-like and thus can derive a tighter bound over the algorithm-dependent Rademacher complexity. The main argument rests on modeling the discrete-time recursion process via a continuous-time stochastic differential equation driven by fractional Brownian motion. Numerical studies demonstrate that our approach is able to yield plausible generalization guarantees for modern neural networks such as ResNet and Vision Transformer, even when they are trained on a large-scale dataset (e.g. ImageNet-1K).
summary: One of the fundamental challenges in the deep learning community is to theoretically understand how well a deep neural network generalizes to unseen data. However, current approaches often yield generalization bounds that are either too loose to be informative of the true generalization error or only valid to the compressed nets. In this study, we present a simple yet non-vacuous generalization bound from the optimization perspective. We achieve this goal by leveraging that the hypothesis set accessed by stochastic gradient algorithms is essentially fractal-like and thus can derive a tighter bound over the algorithm-dependent Rademacher complexity. The main argument rests on modeling the discrete-time recursion process via a continuous-time stochastic differential equation driven by fractional Brownian motion. Numerical studies demonstrate that our approach is able to yield plausible generalization guarantees for modern neural networks such as ResNet and Vision Transformer, even when they are trained on a large-scale dataset (e.g. ImageNet-1K).
abstract_zh: 深度学习社区的基本挑战之一是从理论上理解深度神经网络对未见过的数据的泛化能力如何。然而，当前的方法通常会产生泛化边界，这些边界要么太松，无法提供真正的泛化误差，要么只对压缩网络有效。在这项研究中，我们从优化的角度提出了一个简单但非空洞的泛化界限。我们通过利用随机梯度算法访问的假设集本质上是分形的来实现这一目标，因此可以在依赖于算法的 Rademacher 复杂性上得出更严格的界限。主要论点在于通过分数布朗运动驱动的连续时间随机微分方程对离散时间递归过程进行建模。数值研究表明，我们的方法能够为 ResNet 和 Vision Transformer 等现代神经网络提供合理的泛化保证，即使它们是在大规模数据集（例如 ImageNet-1K）上进行训练的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从优化角度学习非空泛化界的方法，通过建模随机梯度算法的分形假设集特性，为现代神经网络提供更紧的泛化保证。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习泛化界理论存在两大缺陷：一是界过于松散无法反映真实误差，二是仅适用于压缩网络，难以解释现代复杂模型的泛化能力。
AI.method: 将离散优化过程建模为分数布朗运动驱动的连续时间随机微分方程，利用假设集的分形特性推导算法依赖的Rademacher复杂度上界。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在ResNet和Vision Transformer等现代网络上，即使使用ImageNet-1K等大规模数据集训练，也能产生合理的泛化误差界。
AI.conclusion: 通过连续时间动力学建模揭示了优化过程与泛化能力的深层联系，为理解现代神经网络的泛化机制提供了新的理论工具。

authors_text: Wentao Zhang,Ziqi Yin,Zeang Sheng,Yang Li,Wen Ouyang,Xiaosen Li,Yangyu Tao,Zhi Yang,Bin Cui
title: Graph Attention Multi-Layer Perceptron
title_zh: 图注意力多层感知器
comment: 11 pages, 7 figures. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2108.10097
comments: 11 pages, 7 figures. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2108.10097
abstract: Graph neural networks (GNNs) have achieved great success in many graph-based applications. However, the enormous size and high sparsity level of graphs hinder their applications under industrial scenarios. Although some scalable GNNs are proposed for large-scale graphs, they adopt a fixed $K$-hop neighborhood for each node, thus facing the over-smoothing issue when adopting large propagation depths for nodes within sparse regions. To tackle the above issue, we propose a new GNN architecture -- Graph Attention Multi-Layer Perceptron (GAMLP), which can capture the underlying correlations between different scales of graph knowledge. We have deployed GAMLP in Tencent with the Angel platform, and we further evaluate GAMLP on both real-world datasets and large-scale industrial datasets. Extensive experiments on these 14 graph datasets demonstrate that GAMLP achieves state-of-the-art performance while enjoying high scalability and efficiency. Specifically, it outperforms GAT by 1.3\% regarding predictive accuracy on our large-scale Tencent Video dataset while achieving up to $50\times$ training speedup. Besides, it ranks top-1 on both the leaderboards of the largest homogeneous and heterogeneous graph (i.e., ogbn-papers100M and ogbn-mag) of Open Graph Benchmark.
summary: Graph neural networks (GNNs) have achieved great success in many graph-based applications. However, the enormous size and high sparsity level of graphs hinder their applications under industrial scenarios. Although some scalable GNNs are proposed for large-scale graphs, they adopt a fixed $K$-hop neighborhood for each node, thus facing the over-smoothing issue when adopting large propagation depths for nodes within sparse regions. To tackle the above issue, we propose a new GNN architecture -- Graph Attention Multi-Layer Perceptron (GAMLP), which can capture the underlying correlations between different scales of graph knowledge. We have deployed GAMLP in Tencent with the Angel platform, and we further evaluate GAMLP on both real-world datasets and large-scale industrial datasets. Extensive experiments on these 14 graph datasets demonstrate that GAMLP achieves state-of-the-art performance while enjoying high scalability and efficiency. Specifically, it outperforms GAT by 1.3\% regarding predictive accuracy on our large-scale Tencent Video dataset while achieving up to $50\times$ training speedup. Besides, it ranks top-1 on both the leaderboards of the largest homogeneous and heterogeneous graph (i.e., ogbn-papers100M and ogbn-mag) of Open Graph Benchmark.
abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）在许多基于图的应用中取得了巨大的成功。然而，图的巨大尺寸和高稀疏性阻碍了它们在工业场景下的应用。尽管针对大规模图提出了一些可扩展的 GNN，但它们对每个节点采用固定的 $K$ 跳邻域，因此在稀疏区域内的节点采用大传播深度时面临过度平滑问题。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了一种新的 GNN 架构——图注意力多层感知器（GAMLP），它可以捕获不同尺度的图知识之间的潜在相关性。我们通过Angel平台在腾讯部署了GALP，并在现实数据集和大规模工业数据集上进一步评估GALP。对这 14 个图数据集的大量实验表明，GALP 实现了最先进的性能，同时享有高可扩展性和效率。具体来说，它在我们的大规模腾讯视频数据集上的预测准确性比 GAT 高 1.3%，同时实现高达 50 倍的训练加速。此外，它在 Open Graph Benchmark 最大同质图和异构图（ogbn-papers100M 和 ogbn-mag）排行榜上均排名第一。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为GAMLP的图神经网络架构，旨在解决大规模图数据中的过平滑问题并提升计算效率。
AI.motivation: 现有可扩展图神经网络（GNN）在处理稀疏区域节点时因固定K-hop邻域导致过平滑问题，且难以兼顾性能与效率。
AI.method: 设计Graph Attention Multi-Layer Perceptron（GAMLP），通过图注意力机制动态捕捉不同尺度的图结构信息，替代固定邻域传播方式。
AI.result: 在14个真实数据集及工业级数据集上达到SOTA性能，相比GAT在腾讯视频数据集上提升1.3%准确率，训练速度提升50倍，并在Open Graph Benchmark榜单中排名第一。
AI.conclusion: GAMLP通过自适应注意力机制有效缓解过平滑问题，在保持高可扩展性的同时实现更优性能，验证了其在工业场景中的应用价值。

search_text: Graph Attention Multi-Layer Perceptron 图注意力多层感知器 Graph neural networks (GNNs) have achieved great success in many graph-based applications. However, the enormous size and high sparsity level of graphs hinder their applications under industrial scenarios. Although some scalable GNNs are proposed for large-scale graphs, they adopt a fixed $K$-hop neighborhood for each node, thus facing the over-smoothing issue when adopting large propagation depths for nodes within sparse regions. To tackle the above issue, we propose a new GNN architecture -- Graph Attention Multi-Layer Perceptron (GAMLP), which can capture the underlying correlations between different scales of graph knowledge. We have deployed GAMLP in Tencent with the Angel platform, and we further evaluate GAMLP on both real-world datasets and large-scale industrial datasets. Extensive experiments on these 14 graph datasets demonstrate that GAMLP achieves state-of-the-art performance while enjoying high scalability and efficiency. Specifically, it outperforms GAT by 1.3\% regarding predictive accuracy on our large-scale Tencent Video dataset while achieving up to $50\times$ training speedup. Besides, it ranks top-1 on both the leaderboards of the largest homogeneous and heterogeneous graph (i.e., ogbn-papers100M and ogbn-mag) of Open Graph Benchmark. 图神经网络（GNN）在许多基于图的应用中取得了巨大的成功。然而，图的巨大尺寸和高稀疏性阻碍了它们在工业场景下的应用。尽管针对大规模图提出了一些可扩展的 GNN，但它们对每个节点采用固定的 $K$ 跳邻域，因此在稀疏区域内的节点采用大传播深度时面临过度平滑问题。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了一种新的 GNN 架构——图注意力多层感知器（GAMLP），它可以捕获不同尺度的图知识之间的潜在相关性。我们通过Angel平台在腾讯部署了GALP，并在现实数据集和大规模工业数据集上进一步评估GALP。对这 14 个图数据集的大量实验表明，GALP 实现了最先进的性能，同时享有高可扩展性和效率。具体来说，它在我们的大规模腾讯视频数据集上的预测准确性比 GAT 高 1.3%，同时实现高达 50 倍的训练加速。此外，它在 Open Graph Benchmark 最大同质图和异构图（ogbn-papers100M 和 ogbn-mag）排行榜上均排名第一。 本文提出了一种名为GAMLP的图神经网络架构，旨在解决大规模图数据中的过平滑问题并提升计算效率。 Wentao Zhang,Ziqi Yin,Zeang Sheng,Yang Li,Wen Ouyang,Xiaosen Li,Yangyu Tao,Zhi Yang,Bin Cui cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Minghui Liwang,Zhibin Gao,Seyyedali Hosseinalipour,Zhipeng Cheng,Xianbin Wang,Zhenzhen Jiao
title: Long-Term or Temporary? Hybrid Worker Recruitment for Mobile Crowd Sensing and Computing
title_zh: 长期还是暂时？移动人群感知和计算的混合员工招聘
abstract: This paper investigates a novel hybrid worker recruitment problem where the mobile crowd sensing and computing (MCSC) platform employs workers to serve MCSC tasks with diverse quality requirements and budget constraints, under uncertainties in workers' participation and their local workloads.We propose a hybrid worker recruitment framework consisting of offline and online trading modes. The former enables the platform to overbook long-term workers (services) to cope with dynamic service supply via signing contracts in advance, which is formulated as 0-1 integer linear programming (ILP) with probabilistic constraints of service quality and budget.Besides, motivated by the existing uncertainties which may render long-term workers fail to meet the service quality requirement of each task, we augment our methodology with an online temporary worker recruitment scheme as a backup Plan B to support seamless service provisioning for MCSC tasks, which also represents a 0-1 ILP problem. To tackle these problems which are proved to be NP-hard, we develop three algorithms, namely, i) exhaustive searching, ii) unique index-based stochastic searching with risk-aware filter constraint, iii) geometric programming-based successive convex algorithm, which achieve the optimal or sub-optimal solutions. Experimental results demonstrate our effectiveness in terms of service quality, time efficiency, etc.
summary: This paper investigates a novel hybrid worker recruitment problem where the mobile crowd sensing and computing (MCSC) platform employs workers to serve MCSC tasks with diverse quality requirements and budget constraints, under uncertainties in workers' participation and their local workloads.We propose a hybrid worker recruitment framework consisting of offline and online trading modes. The former enables the platform to overbook long-term workers (services) to cope with dynamic service supply via signing contracts in advance, which is formulated as 0-1 integer linear programming (ILP) with probabilistic constraints of service quality and budget.Besides, motivated by the existing uncertainties which may render long-term workers fail to meet the service quality requirement of each task, we augment our methodology with an online temporary worker recruitment scheme as a backup Plan B to support seamless service provisioning for MCSC tasks, which also represents a 0-1 ILP problem. To tackle these problems which are proved to be NP-hard, we develop three algorithms, namely, i) exhaustive searching, ii) unique index-based stochastic searching with risk-aware filter constraint, iii) geometric programming-based successive convex algorithm, which achieve the optimal or sub-optimal solutions. Experimental results demonstrate our effectiveness in terms of service quality, time efficiency, etc.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了一种新型混合工人招聘问题，在工人参与及其本地工作量不确定的情况下，移动人群感知和计算（MCSC）平台雇用工人来服务具有不同质量要求和预算约束的MCSC任务。我们提出了一种由离线和在线交易模式组成的混合工人招聘框架。前者使平台能够通过提前签订合同来超额预订长期工人（服务）以应对动态服务供应，其被制定为具有服务质量和预算概率约束的0-1整数线性规划（ILP）。此外，由于现有的不确定性可能导致长期工人无法满足每项任务的服务质量要求，我们通过在线临时工招聘方案作为备用计划B来增强我们的方法，以支持MCSC任务的无缝服务供应，这也代表了0-1 ILP 问题。为了解决这些被证明是NP难的问题，我们开发了三种算法，即i）穷举搜索，ii）具有风险感知过滤器约束的基于唯一索引的随机搜索，iii）基于几何规划的连续凸算法，这些算法实现了最优或次优解决方案。实验结果证明了我们在服务质量、时间效率等方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了移动众包传感与计算（MCSC）平台中混合工人招聘问题，提出结合长期和临时工人的框架以应对任务质量、预算及工人参与不确定性。
AI.motivation: 现有MCSC任务面临工人参与不确定性和本地工作负载波动，导致长期工人可能无法满足单个任务的服务质量要求，需设计灵活的招聘机制。
AI.method: 提出包含离线（长期工人合同签订，建模为带概率约束的0-1整数线性规划）和在线（临时工人应急招聘，同样为0-1 ILP）的混合框架，并开发三种算法（穷举搜索、风险感知滤波约束的随机搜索、几何规划凸优化）求解。
AI.result: 实验验证了该方法在服务质量、时间效率等方面的有效性，能够应对动态环境下的任务需求。
AI.conclusion: 混合招聘框架通过长期与临时工人协同，结合优化算法，在不确定环境下实现了MCSC任务的可靠服务保障。

authors_text: Ahmad Chaddad,Paul Daniel Mingli Zhang,Saima Rathore,Paul Sargos,Christian Desrosiers,Tamim Niazi
title: Deep radiomic signature with immune cell markers predicts the survival of glioma patients
title_zh: 具有免疫细胞标记的深层放射组学特征可预测神经胶质瘤患者的生存
abstract: Imaging biomarkers offer a non-invasive way to predict the response of immunotherapy prior to treatment. In this work, we propose a novel type of deep radiomic features (DRFs) computed from a convolutional neural network (CNN), which capture tumor characteristics related to immune cell markers and overall survival. Our study uses four MRI sequences (T1-weighted, T1-weighted post-contrast, T2-weighted and FLAIR) with corresponding immune cell markers of 151 patients with brain tumor. The proposed method extracts a total of 180 DRFs by aggregating the activation maps of a pre-trained 3D-CNN within labeled tumor regions of MRI scans. These features offer a compact, yet powerful representation of regional texture encoding tissue heterogeneity. A comprehensive set of experiments is performed to assess the relationship between the proposed DRFs and immune cell markers, and measure their association with overall survival. Results show a high correlation between DRFs and various markers, as well as significant differences between patients grouped based on these markers. Moreover, combining DRFs, clinical features and immune cell markers as input to a random forest classifier helps discriminate between short and long survival outcomes, with AUC of 72\% and p=2.36$\times$10$^{-5}$. These results demonstrate the usefulness of proposed DRFs as non-invasive biomarker for predicting treatment response in patients with brain tumors.
summary: Imaging biomarkers offer a non-invasive way to predict the response of immunotherapy prior to treatment. In this work, we propose a novel type of deep radiomic features (DRFs) computed from a convolutional neural network (CNN), which capture tumor characteristics related to immune cell markers and overall survival. Our study uses four MRI sequences (T1-weighted, T1-weighted post-contrast, T2-weighted and FLAIR) with corresponding immune cell markers of 151 patients with brain tumor. The proposed method extracts a total of 180 DRFs by aggregating the activation maps of a pre-trained 3D-CNN within labeled tumor regions of MRI scans. These features offer a compact, yet powerful representation of regional texture encoding tissue heterogeneity. A comprehensive set of experiments is performed to assess the relationship between the proposed DRFs and immune cell markers, and measure their association with overall survival. Results show a high correlation between DRFs and various markers, as well as significant differences between patients grouped based on these markers. Moreover, combining DRFs, clinical features and immune cell markers as input to a random forest classifier helps discriminate between short and long survival outcomes, with AUC of 72\% and p=2.36$\times$10$^{-5}$. These results demonstrate the usefulness of proposed DRFs as non-invasive biomarker for predicting treatment response in patients with brain tumors.
abstract_zh: 成像生物标志物提供了一种在治疗前预测免疫疗法反应的非侵入性方法。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种通过卷积神经网络（CNN）计算的新型深度放射组学特征（DRF），它捕获与免疫细胞标记物和总体生存相关的肿瘤特征。我们的研究使用了 151 名脑肿瘤患者的四个 MRI 序列（T1 加权、T1 加权后、T2 加权和 FLAIR）以及相应的免疫细胞标记。该方法通过聚合 MRI 扫描的标记肿瘤区域内预训练的 3D-CNN 的激活图，总共提取了 180 个 DRF。这些特征提供了区域纹理编码组织异质性的紧凑而有力的表示。进行了一组全面的实验来评估所提出的 DRF 和免疫细胞标记物之间的关系，并测量它们与总体生存率的关联。结果显示 DRF 与各种标志物之间存在高度相关性，并且根据这些标志物分组的患者之间存在显着差异。此外，将 DRF、临床特征和免疫细胞标记结合起来作为随机森林分类器的输入有助于区分短期和长期生存结果，AUC 为 72%，p=2.36$\times$10$^{-5}$。这些结果证明了所提出的 DRF 作为非侵入性生物标志物对于预测脑肿瘤患者治疗反应的有用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度影像组学特征（DRFs）和免疫细胞标志物的非侵入性生物标志物，用于预测胶质瘤患者的生存期。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以在治疗前准确预测免疫治疗反应，需开发非侵入性影像生物标志物以辅助临床决策。
AI.method: 利用预训练3D-CNN从四模态MRI序列中提取DRFs，结合免疫细胞标志物和临床特征，通过随机森林分类器评估生存差异。
AI.result: DRFs与免疫标志物高度相关（p=2.36×10⁻⁵），联合模型AUC达72%，显著区分短/长生存患者。
AI.conclusion: DRFs可作为有效非侵入性生物标志物，结合免疫特征可提升胶质瘤患者生存预测准确性。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度影像组学特征（DRFs）和免疫细胞标志物的非侵入性生物标志物，用于预测胶质瘤患者的生存期。
motivation: 现有方法难以在治疗前准确预测免疫治疗反应，需开发非侵入性影像生物标志物以辅助临床决策。
method: 利用预训练3D-CNN从四模态MRI序列中提取DRFs，结合免疫细胞标志物和临床特征，通过随机森林分类器评估生存差异。
result: DRFs与免疫标志物高度相关（p=2.36×10⁻⁵），联合模型AUC达72%，显著区分短/长生存患者。
conclusion: DRFs可作为有效非侵入性生物标志物，结合免疫特征可提升胶质瘤患者生存预测准确性。
search_text: Deep radiomic signature with immune cell markers predicts the survival of glioma patients 具有免疫细胞标记的深层放射组学特征可预测神经胶质瘤患者的生存 Imaging biomarkers offer a non-invasive way to predict the response of immunotherapy prior to treatment. In this work, we propose a novel type of deep radiomic features (DRFs) computed from a convolutional neural network (CNN), which capture tumor characteristics related to immune cell markers and overall survival. Our study uses four MRI sequences (T1-weighted, T1-weighted post-contrast, T2-weighted and FLAIR) with corresponding immune cell markers of 151 patients with brain tumor. The proposed method extracts a total of 180 DRFs by aggregating the activation maps of a pre-trained 3D-CNN within labeled tumor regions of MRI scans. These features offer a compact, yet powerful representation of regional texture encoding tissue heterogeneity. A comprehensive set of experiments is performed to assess the relationship between the proposed DRFs and immune cell markers, and measure their association with overall survival. Results show a high correlation between DRFs and various markers, as well as significant differences between patients grouped based on these markers. Moreover, combining DRFs, clinical features and immune cell markers as input to a random forest classifier helps discriminate between short and long survival outcomes, with AUC of 72\% and p=2.36$\times$10$^{-5}$. These results demonstrate the usefulness of proposed DRFs as non-invasive biomarker for predicting treatment response in patients with brain tumors. 成像生物标志物提供了一种在治疗前预测免疫疗法反应的非侵入性方法。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种通过卷积神经网络（CNN）计算的新型深度放射组学特征（DRF），它捕获与免疫细胞标记物和总体生存相关的肿瘤特征。我们的研究使用了 151 名脑肿瘤患者的四个 MRI 序列（T1 加权、T1 加权后、T2 加权和 FLAIR）以及相应的免疫细胞标记。该方法通过聚合 MRI 扫描的标记肿瘤区域内预训练的 3D-CNN 的激活图，总共提取了 180 个 DRF。这些特征提供了区域纹理编码组织异质性的紧凑而有力的表示。进行了一组全面的实验来评估所提出的 DRF 和免疫细胞标记物之间的关系，并测量它们与总体生存率的关联。结果显示 DRF 与各种标志物之间存在高度相关性，并且根据这些标志物分组的患者之间存在显着差异。此外，将 DRF、临床特征和免疫细胞标记结合起来作为随机森林分类器的输入有助于区分短期和长期生存结果，AUC 为 72%，p=2.36$\times$10$^{-5}$。这些结果证明了所提出的 DRF 作为非侵入性生物标志物对于预测脑肿瘤患者治疗反应的有用性。 本文提出一种基于深度影像组学特征（DRFs）和免疫细胞标志物的非侵入性生物标志物，用于预测胶质瘤患者的生存期。 Ahmad Chaddad,Paul Daniel Mingli Zhang,Saima Rathore,Paul Sargos,Christian Desrosiers,Tamim Niazi cs.CV,cs.AI,q-bio.GN,q-bio.QM,stat.ME

authors_text: Karen Adam,Adam Scholefield,Martin Vetterli
title: How Asynchronous Events Encode Video
title_zh: 异步事件如何编码视频
abstract: As event-based sensing gains in popularity, theoretical understanding is needed to harness this technology's potential. Instead of recording video by capturing frames, event-based cameras have sensors that emit events when their inputs change, thus encoding information in the timing of events. This creates new challenges in establishing reconstruction guarantees and algorithms, but also provides advantages over frame-based video. We use time encoding machines to model event-based sensors: TEMs also encode their inputs by emitting events characterized by their timing and reconstruction from time encodings is well understood. We consider the case of time encoding bandlimited video and demonstrate a dependence between spatial sensor density and overall spatial and temporal resolution. Such a dependence does not occur in frame-based video, where temporal resolution depends solely on the frame rate of the video and spatial resolution depends solely on the pixel grid. However, this dependence arises naturally in event-based video and allows oversampling in space to provide better time resolution. As such, event-based vision encourages using more sensors that emit fewer events over time.
summary: As event-based sensing gains in popularity, theoretical understanding is needed to harness this technology's potential. Instead of recording video by capturing frames, event-based cameras have sensors that emit events when their inputs change, thus encoding information in the timing of events. This creates new challenges in establishing reconstruction guarantees and algorithms, but also provides advantages over frame-based video. We use time encoding machines to model event-based sensors: TEMs also encode their inputs by emitting events characterized by their timing and reconstruction from time encodings is well understood. We consider the case of time encoding bandlimited video and demonstrate a dependence between spatial sensor density and overall spatial and temporal resolution. Such a dependence does not occur in frame-based video, where temporal resolution depends solely on the frame rate of the video and spatial resolution depends solely on the pixel grid. However, this dependence arises naturally in event-based video and allows oversampling in space to provide better time resolution. As such, event-based vision encourages using more sensors that emit fewer events over time.
abstract_zh: 随着基于事件的传感越来越受欢迎，需要理论理解来利用该技术的潜力。基于事件的摄像机不是通过捕获帧来记录视频，而是具有在输入发生变化时发出事件的传感器，从而在事件发生的时间中对信息进行编码。这给建立重建保证和算法带来了新的挑战，但也提供了优于基于帧的视频的优势。我们使用时间编码机来对基于事件的传感器进行建模：TEM 还通过发出以时间编码为特征的事件来编码其输入，并且从时间编码中进行重建是很好理解的。我们考虑时间编码带限视频的情况，并证明空间传感器密度与整体空间和时间分辨率之间的依赖性。这种依赖性不会发生在基于帧的视频中，其中时间分辨率仅取决于视频的帧速率，而空间分辨率仅取决于像素网格。然而，这种依赖性在基于事件的视频中自然出现，并允许在空间中进行过采样以提供更好的时间分辨率。因此，基于事件的视觉鼓励使用更多的传感器，随着时间的推移发出更少的事件。

AI.tldr: 本文研究事件相机如何通过异步事件编码视频，并分析其时空分辨率之间的关系。
AI.motivation: 传统视频基于帧率和像素网格限制时空分辨率，而事件相机通过异步事件编码具有潜在优势，但缺乏理论支撑。
AI.method: 采用时间编码机（TEMs）建模事件传感器，分析带限视频的时间编码特性，建立空间传感器密度与时空分辨率的依赖关系。
AI.result: 发现事件视频中空间传感器密度与时空分辨率存在依赖关系，可通过空间过采样提升时间分辨率，这是传统帧视频所不具备的特性。
AI.conclusion: 事件视觉系统应通过增加传感器数量并减少单个传感器的事件发射频率，以优化时空分辨率表现。
