authors_text: Shangqi Gao,Hangqi Zhou,Yibo Gao,Xiahai Zhuang
title: Joint Modeling of Image and Label Statistics for Enhancing Model Generalizability of Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: 图像和标签统计的联合建模，增强医学图像分割的模型通用性
abstract: Although supervised deep-learning has achieved promising performance in medical image segmentation, many methods cannot generalize well on unseen data, limiting their real-world applicability. To address this problem, we propose a deep learning-based Bayesian framework, which jointly models image and label statistics, utilizing the domain-irrelevant contour of a medical image for segmentation. Specifically, we first decompose an image into components of contour and basis. Then, we model the expected label as a variable only related to the contour. Finally, we develop a variational Bayesian framework to infer the posterior distributions of these variables, including the contour, the basis, and the label. The framework is implemented with neural networks, thus is referred to as deep Bayesian segmentation. Results on the task of cross-sequence cardiac MRI segmentation show that our method set a new state of the art for model generalizability. Particularly, the BayeSeg model trained with LGE MRI generalized well on T2 images and outperformed other models with great margins, i.e., over 0.47 in terms of average Dice. Our code is available at https://zmiclab.github.io/projects.html.
summary: Although supervised deep-learning has achieved promising performance in medical image segmentation, many methods cannot generalize well on unseen data, limiting their real-world applicability. To address this problem, we propose a deep learning-based Bayesian framework, which jointly models image and label statistics, utilizing the domain-irrelevant contour of a medical image for segmentation. Specifically, we first decompose an image into components of contour and basis. Then, we model the expected label as a variable only related to the contour. Finally, we develop a variational Bayesian framework to infer the posterior distributions of these variables, including the contour, the basis, and the label. The framework is implemented with neural networks, thus is referred to as deep Bayesian segmentation. Results on the task of cross-sequence cardiac MRI segmentation show that our method set a new state of the art for model generalizability. Particularly, the BayeSeg model trained with LGE MRI generalized well on T2 images and outperformed other models with great margins, i.e., over 0.47 in terms of average Dice. Our code is available at https://zmiclab.github.io/projects.html.
abstract_zh: 尽管监督深度学习在医学图像分割方面取得了令人鼓舞的性能，但许多方法不能很好地概括未见过的数据，限制了它们的实际适用性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于深度学习的贝叶斯框架，该框架联合建模图像和标签统计数据，利用医学图像的与领域无关的轮廓进行分割。具体来说，我们首先将图像分解为轮廓和基础的组成部分。然后，我们将预期标签建模为仅与轮廓相关的变量。最后，我们开发了一个变分贝叶斯框架来推断这些变量的后验分布，包括轮廓、基础和标签。该框架是用神经网络实现的，因此被称为深度贝叶斯分割。跨序列心脏 MRI 分割任务的结果表明，我们的方法为模型泛化性设定了新的技术水平。特别是，使用 LGE MRI 训练的 BayeSeg 模型在 T2 图像上具有良好的泛化能力，并且以很大的优势优于其他模型，即平均 Dice 超过 0.47。我们的代码可在 https://zmiclab.github.io/projects.html 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的贝叶斯框架，通过联合建模图像和标签统计信息来增强医学图像分割模型的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 尽管监督深度学习在医学图像分割中表现出色，但许多方法在未见过的数据上泛化能力较差，限制了其实际应用。
AI.method: 该方法首先将图像分解为轮廓和基底成分，然后将期望的标签建模为仅与轮廓相关的变量，最后开发了一个变分贝叶斯框架来推断这些变量的后验分布。
AI.result: 在跨序列心脏MRI分割任务中，该方法在模型泛化能力方面取得了新的最先进成果，BayeSeg模型在LGE MRI上训练后在T2图像上表现优异，平均Dice值超过其他模型0.47。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过联合建模图像和标签统计信息，显著提高了医学图像分割模型的泛化能力。

Results on the task of cross-sequence cardiac MRI segmentation show that our method set a new state of the art for model generalizability. Particularly, the BayeSeg model trained with LGE MRI generalized well on T2 images and outperformed other models with great margins, i.e., over 0.47 in terms of average Dice. Our code is available at https://zmiclab.github.io/projects.html. 尽管监督深度学习在医学图像分割方面取得了令人鼓舞的性能，但许多方法不能很好地概括未见过的数据，限制了它们的实际适用性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于深度学习的贝叶斯框架，该框架联合建模图像和标签统计数据，利用医学图像的与领域无关的轮廓进行分割。具体来说，我们首先将图像分解为轮廓和基础的组成部分。然后，我们将预期标签建模为仅与轮廓相关的变量。最后，我们开发了一个变分贝叶斯框架来推断这些变量的后验分布，包括轮廓、基础和标签。该框架是用神经网络实现的，因此被称为深度贝叶斯分割。跨序列心脏 MRI 分割任务的结果表明，我们的方法为模型泛化性设定了新的技术水平。特别是，使用 LGE MRI 训练的 BayeSeg 模型在 T2 图像上具有良好的泛化能力，并且以很大的优势优于其他模型，即平均 Dice 超过 0.47。我们的代码可在 https://zmiclab.github.io/projects.html 获取。 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的贝叶斯框架，通过联合建模图像和标签统计信息来增强医学图像分割模型的泛化能力。 Shangqi Gao,Hangqi Zhou,Yibo Gao,Xiahai Zhuang eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Bach Gia Nguyen,Chanh Minh Tran,Tho Nguyen Duc,Tan Xuan Phan,Kamioka Eiji
title: Novel projection schemes for graph-based Light Field coding
title_zh: 基于图的光场编码的新颖投影方案
abstract: In Light Field compression, graph-based coding is powerful to exploit signal redundancy along irregular shapes and obtains good energy compaction. However, apart from high time complexity to process high dimensional graphs, their graph construction method is highly sensitive to the accuracy of disparity information between viewpoints. In real world Light Field or synthetic Light Field generated by computer software, the use of disparity information for super-rays projection might suffer from inaccuracy due to vignetting effect and large disparity between views in the two types of Light Fields respectively. This paper introduces two novel projection schemes resulting in less error in disparity information, in which one projection scheme can also significantly reduce time computation for both encoder and decoder. Experimental results show projection quality of super-pixels across views can be considerably enhanced using the proposals, along with rate-distortion performance when compared against original projection scheme and HEVC-based or JPEG Pleno-based coding approaches.
summary: In Light Field compression, graph-based coding is powerful to exploit signal redundancy along irregular shapes and obtains good energy compaction. However, apart from high time complexity to process high dimensional graphs, their graph construction method is highly sensitive to the accuracy of disparity information between viewpoints. In real world Light Field or synthetic Light Field generated by computer software, the use of disparity information for super-rays projection might suffer from inaccuracy due to vignetting effect and large disparity between views in the two types of Light Fields respectively. This paper introduces two novel projection schemes resulting in less error in disparity information, in which one projection scheme can also significantly reduce time computation for both encoder and decoder. Experimental results show projection quality of super-pixels across views can be considerably enhanced using the proposals, along with rate-distortion performance when compared against original projection scheme and HEVC-based or JPEG Pleno-based coding approaches.
abstract_zh: 在光场压缩中，基于图的编码能够有效地利用不规则形状的信号冗余并获得良好的能量压缩。然而，除了处理高维图的时间复杂度较高之外，他们的图构建方法对视点之间的视差信息的准确性高度敏感。在现实世界的光场或由计算机软件生成的合成光场中，使用视差信息进行超光线投影可能会由于渐晕效应以及两种类型的光场中的视图之间的较大视差而导致不准确。本文介绍了两种新颖的投影方案，可以减少视差信息的误差，其中一种投影方案还可以显着减少编码器和解码器的时间计算。实验结果表明，与原始投影方案和基于 HEVC 或基于 JPEG Pleno 的编码方法相比，使用这些方案可以显着提高跨视图超像素的投影质量，以及率失真性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种新型投影方案，以改进基于图的光场编码中的视差信息不准确和计算复杂度高的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于图的光场压缩方法对视差信息精度敏感，且处理高维图时计算复杂度高，实际光场和计算机生成光场因晕影效应和视图间大视差导致投影误差。
AI.method: 设计两种新型投影方案，减少视差信息误差，其中一种方案显著降低编解码计算时间。
AI.result: 实验表明，新方案提升了跨视图超像素投影质量，并在率失真性能上优于原始方案及HEVC/JPEG Pleno等方法。
AI.conclusion: 新投影方案有效解决了光场编码中的视差不准确和计算效率问题，具有更高的投影质量和压缩性能。

authors_text: Sungwook Lee,Seunghyun Lee,Byung Cheol Song
title: CFA: Coupled-hypersphere-based Feature Adaptation for Target-Oriented Anomaly Localization
title_zh: CFA：基于耦合超球面的特征适应，用于面向目标的异常定位
abstract: For a long time, anomaly localization has been widely used in industries. Previous studies focused on approximating the distribution of normal features without adaptation to a target dataset. However, since anomaly localization should precisely discriminate normal and abnormal features, the absence of adaptation may make the normality of abnormal features overestimated. Thus, we propose Coupled-hypersphere-based Feature Adaptation (CFA) which accomplishes sophisticated anomaly localization using features adapted to the target dataset. CFA consists of (1) a learnable patch descriptor that learns and embeds target-oriented features and (2) scalable memory bank independent of the size of the target dataset. And, CFA adopts transfer learning to increase the normal feature density so that abnormal features can be clearly distinguished by applying patch descriptor and memory bank to a pre-trained CNN. The proposed method outperforms the previous methods quantitatively and qualitatively. For example, it provides an AUROC score of 99.5% in anomaly detection and 98.5% in anomaly localization of MVTec AD benchmark. In addition, this paper points out the negative effects of biased features of pre-trained CNNs and emphasizes the importance of the adaptation to the target dataset. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/sungwool/CFA_for_anomaly_localization.
summary: For a long time, anomaly localization has been widely used in industries. Previous studies focused on approximating the distribution of normal features without adaptation to a target dataset. However, since anomaly localization should precisely discriminate normal and abnormal features, the absence of adaptation may make the normality of abnormal features overestimated. Thus, we propose Coupled-hypersphere-based Feature Adaptation (CFA) which accomplishes sophisticated anomaly localization using features adapted to the target dataset. CFA consists of (1) a learnable patch descriptor that learns and embeds target-oriented features and (2) scalable memory bank independent of the size of the target dataset. And, CFA adopts transfer learning to increase the normal feature density so that abnormal features can be clearly distinguished by applying patch descriptor and memory bank to a pre-trained CNN. The proposed method outperforms the previous methods quantitatively and qualitatively. For example, it provides an AUROC score of 99.5% in anomaly detection and 98.5% in anomaly localization of MVTec AD benchmark. In addition, this paper points out the negative effects of biased features of pre-trained CNNs and emphasizes the importance of the adaptation to the target dataset. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/sungwool/CFA_for_anomaly_localization.
abstract_zh: 长期以来，异常定位在行业中得到了广泛的应用。之前的研究主要集中在近似正态特征的分布而不适应目标数据集。然而，由于异常定位应该精确地区分正常和异常特征，因此缺乏适应可能会使异常特征的正常性被高估。因此，我们提出了基于耦合超球面的特征适应（CFA），它使用适应目标数据集的特征来完成复杂的异常定位。 CFA 由 (1) 一个可学习的补丁描述符组成，用于学习和嵌入面向目标的特征，以及 (2) 独立于目标数据集大小的可扩展内存库。而且，CFA 采用迁移学习来增加正常特征密度，以便通过将补丁描述符和记忆库应用于预训练的 CNN，可以清楚地区分异常特征。所提出的方法在数量和质量上都优于以前的方法。例如，它在 MVTec AD 基准的异常检测中提供了 99.5% 的 AUROC 分数，在异常定位中提供了 98.5% 的 AUROC 分数。此外，本文还指出了预训练 CNN 的偏差特征的负面影响，并强调了适应目标数据集的重要性。该代码可在 https://github.com/sungwool/CFA_for_anomaly_localization 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于耦合超球面特征适配（CFA）的目标导向异常定位方法，通过适应目标数据集的特征提升异常检测与定位的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统异常定位方法未针对目标数据集进行特征适配，导致异常特征的正常性被高估，难以精确区分正常与异常。
AI.method: CFA包含两个核心组件：1) 可学习的补丁描述子，用于学习目标导向特征；2) 与目标数据集规模无关的可扩展记忆库。结合迁移学习增强正常特征密度，通过预训练CNN结合补丁描述子和记忆库实现异常定位。
AI.result: 在MVTec AD基准测试中，CFA达到99.5%的AUROC异常检测得分和98.5%的异常定位得分，优于现有方法，并揭示了预训练CNN偏置特征的负面影响。
AI.conclusion: CFA通过特征适配显著提升了异常定位性能，强调了针对目标数据集进行特征调整的重要性，并指出了预训练模型偏置的改进方向。

authors_text: Ming-Xing Luo
title: Negative Shannon Information Hides Networks
title_zh: 负面香农信息隐藏网络
abstract: Shannon information was defined for characterizing the uncertainty information of classical probabilistic distributions. As an uncertainty measure it is generally believed to be positive. This holds for any information quantity from two random variables because of the polymatroidal axioms. However, it is unknown why there is negative information for more than two random variables on finite dimensional spaces. We first show the negative tripartite Shannon mutual information implies specific Bayesian network representations of its joint distribution. We then show that the negative Shannon information is obtained from general tripartite Bayesian networks with quantum realizations. This provides a device-independent witness of negative Shannon information. We finally extend the result for general networks. The present result shows new insights in the network compatibility from non-Shannon information inequalities.
summary: Shannon information was defined for characterizing the uncertainty information of classical probabilistic distributions. As an uncertainty measure it is generally believed to be positive. This holds for any information quantity from two random variables because of the polymatroidal axioms. However, it is unknown why there is negative information for more than two random variables on finite dimensional spaces. We first show the negative tripartite Shannon mutual information implies specific Bayesian network representations of its joint distribution. We then show that the negative Shannon information is obtained from general tripartite Bayesian networks with quantum realizations. This provides a device-independent witness of negative Shannon information. We finally extend the result for general networks. The present result shows new insights in the network compatibility from non-Shannon information inequalities.
abstract_zh: 定义香农信息是为了表征经典概率分布的不确定性信息。作为一种不确定性衡量标准，人们普遍认为它是积极的。由于多拟阵公理，这适用于来自两个随机变量的任何信息量。然而，目前尚不清楚为什么有限维空间上两个以上的随机变量会存在负信息。我们首先证明负三方香农互信息意味着其联合分布的特定贝叶斯网络表示。然后我们证明负香农信息是从具有量子实现的一般三方贝叶斯网络获得的。这提供了与设备无关的负面香农信息见证。我们最终将结果扩展到一般网络。目前的结果显示了非香农信息不平等对网络兼容性的新见解。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨负香农信息与贝叶斯网络的关系，并展示其在量子实现中的设备无关见证。
AI.motivation: 传统香农信息通常为正，但多变量有限维空间中出现负信息的机制尚不明确，需研究其网络表示及物理实现。
AI.method: 通过分析三元互信息与贝叶斯网络的关联，结合量子实现构建设备无关见证，并扩展至一般网络结构。
AI.result: 证明负三元互信息对应特定贝叶斯网络，量子系统可产生负信息，为网络兼容性提供新视角。
AI.conclusion: 负香农信息揭示网络结构特性，为信息理论与量子网络研究提供理论支持。

search_text: Negative Shannon Information Hides Networks 负面香农信息隐藏网络 Shannon information was defined for characterizing the uncertainty information of classical probabilistic distributions. As an uncertainty measure it is generally believed to be positive. This holds for any information quantity from two random variables because of the polymatroidal axioms. However, it is unknown why there is negative information for more than two random variables on finite dimensional spaces. We first show the negative tripartite Shannon mutual information implies specific Bayesian network representations of its joint distribution. We then show that the negative Shannon information is obtained from general tripartite Bayesian networks with quantum realizations. This provides a device-independent witness of negative Shannon information. We finally extend the result for general networks. The present result shows new insights in the network compatibility from non-Shannon information inequalities. 定义香农信息是为了表征经典概率分布的不确定性信息。作为一种不确定性衡量标准，人们普遍认为它是积极的。由于多拟阵公理，这适用于来自两个随机变量的任何信息量。然而，目前尚不清楚为什么有限维空间上两个以上的随机变量会存在负信息。我们首先证明负三方香农互信息意味着其联合分布的特定贝叶斯网络表示。然后我们证明负香农信息是从具有量子实现的一般三方贝叶斯网络获得的。这提供了与设备无关的负面香农信息见证。我们最终将结果扩展到一般网络。目前的结果显示了非香农信息不平等对网络兼容性的新见解。 本文探讨负香农信息与贝叶斯网络的关系，并展示其在量子实现中的设备无关见证。 Ming-Xing Luo quant-ph,cs.AI,cs.IT,cs.SI

authors_text: Wei Lu,Wei Sun,Wenhan Zhu,Xiongkuo Min,Zicheng Zhang,Tao Wang,Guangtao Zhai
title: Blind Surveillance Image Quality Assessment via Deep Neural Network Combined with the Visual Saliency
title_zh: 深度神经网络结合视觉显着性的盲监控图像质量评估
abstract: The intelligent video surveillance system (IVSS) can automatically analyze the content of the surveillance image (SI) and reduce the burden of the manual labour. However, the SIs may suffer quality degradations in the procedure of acquisition, compression, and transmission, which makes IVSS hard to understand the content of SIs. In this paper, we first conduct an example experiment (i.e. the face detection task) to demonstrate that the quality of the SIs has a crucial impact on the performance of the IVSS, and then propose a saliency-based deep neural network for the blind quality assessment of the SIs, which helps IVSS to filter the low-quality SIs and improve the detection and recognition performance. Specifically, we first compute the saliency map of the SI to select the most salient local region since the salient regions usually contain rich semantic information for machine vision and thus have a great impact on the overall quality of the SIs. Next, the convolutional neural network (CNN) is adopted to extract quality-aware features for the whole image and local region, which are then mapped into the global and local quality scores through the fully connected (FC) network respectively. Finally, the overall quality score is computed as the weighted sum of the global and local quality scores. Experimental results on the SI quality database (SIQD) show that the proposed method outperforms all compared state-of-the-art BIQA methods.
summary: The intelligent video surveillance system (IVSS) can automatically analyze the content of the surveillance image (SI) and reduce the burden of the manual labour. However, the SIs may suffer quality degradations in the procedure of acquisition, compression, and transmission, which makes IVSS hard to understand the content of SIs. In this paper, we first conduct an example experiment (i.e. the face detection task) to demonstrate that the quality of the SIs has a crucial impact on the performance of the IVSS, and then propose a saliency-based deep neural network for the blind quality assessment of the SIs, which helps IVSS to filter the low-quality SIs and improve the detection and recognition performance. Specifically, we first compute the saliency map of the SI to select the most salient local region since the salient regions usually contain rich semantic information for machine vision and thus have a great impact on the overall quality of the SIs. Next, the convolutional neural network (CNN) is adopted to extract quality-aware features for the whole image and local region, which are then mapped into the global and local quality scores through the fully connected (FC) network respectively. Finally, the overall quality score is computed as the weighted sum of the global and local quality scores. Experimental results on the SI quality database (SIQD) show that the proposed method outperforms all compared state-of-the-art BIQA methods.
abstract_zh: 智能视频监控系统（IVSS）可以自动分析监控图像（SI）的内容，减轻人工的负担。然而，SI在采集、压缩和传输过程中可能会出现质量下降，这使得IVSS难以理解SI的内容。在本文中，我们首先进行了一个示例实验（即人脸检测任务）来证明SI的质量对IVSS的性能具有至关重要的影响，然后提出一种基于显着性的深度神经网络用于SI的盲质量评估，这有助于IVSS过滤低质量的SI并提高检测和识别性能。具体来说，我们首先计算SI的显着图来选择最显着的局部区域，因为显着区域通常包含丰富的机器视觉语义信息，因此对SI的整体质量有很大影响。接下来，采用卷积神经网络（CNN）提取整个图像和局部区域的质量感知特征，然后通过全连接（FC）网络分别映射为全局和局部质量分数。最后，将总体质量得分计算为全局质量得分和局部质量得分的加权和。 SI 质量数据库 (SIQD) 上的实验结果表明，所提出的方法优于所有最先进的 BIQA 方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合视觉显著性的深度神经网络方法，用于盲视监控图像质量评估，以提升智能视频监控系统的性能。
AI.motivation: 监控图像在采集、压缩和传输过程中易出现质量退化，导致智能视频监控系统（IVSS）难以准确分析内容，需有效评估图像质量以过滤低质量图像。
AI.method: 通过计算显著图提取语义丰富的局部区域，利用卷积神经网络（CNN）提取全局和局部质量特征，经全连接网络映射为质量评分，最终加权求和得到整体质量分数。
AI.result: 在SIQD数据库上的实验表明，该方法优于所有对比的盲图像质量评估（BIQA）最新技术。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法能有效评估监控图像质量，为IVSS系统提供质量过滤支持，从而提升检测与识别性能。

authors_text: Huishuai Zhang,Da Yu,Yiping Lu,Di He
title: Adversarial Noises Are Linearly Separable for (Nearly) Random Neural Networks
title_zh: 对于（接近）随机神经网络，对抗性噪声是线性可分的
abstract: Adversarial examples, which are usually generated for specific inputs with a specific model, are ubiquitous for neural networks. In this paper we unveil a surprising property of adversarial noises when they are put together, i.e., adversarial noises crafted by one-step gradient methods are linearly separable if equipped with the corresponding labels. We theoretically prove this property for a two-layer network with randomly initialized entries and the neural tangent kernel setup where the parameters are not far from initialization. The proof idea is to show the label information can be efficiently backpropagated to the input while keeping the linear separability. Our theory and experimental evidence further show that the linear classifier trained with the adversarial noises of the training data can well classify the adversarial noises of the test data, indicating that adversarial noises actually inject a distributional perturbation to the original data distribution. Furthermore, we empirically demonstrate that the adversarial noises may become less linearly separable when the above conditions are compromised while they are still much easier to classify than original features.
summary: Adversarial examples, which are usually generated for specific inputs with a specific model, are ubiquitous for neural networks. In this paper we unveil a surprising property of adversarial noises when they are put together, i.e., adversarial noises crafted by one-step gradient methods are linearly separable if equipped with the corresponding labels. We theoretically prove this property for a two-layer network with randomly initialized entries and the neural tangent kernel setup where the parameters are not far from initialization. The proof idea is to show the label information can be efficiently backpropagated to the input while keeping the linear separability. Our theory and experimental evidence further show that the linear classifier trained with the adversarial noises of the training data can well classify the adversarial noises of the test data, indicating that adversarial noises actually inject a distributional perturbation to the original data distribution. Furthermore, we empirically demonstrate that the adversarial noises may become less linearly separable when the above conditions are compromised while they are still much easier to classify than original features.
abstract_zh: 对抗性示例通常是针对特定模型的特定输入生成的，对于神经网络来说是普遍存在的。在本文中，我们揭示了对抗性噪声放在一起时的一个令人惊讶的特性，即，如果配备相应的标签，通过一步梯度方法制作的对抗性噪声是线性可分离的。我们从理论上证明了具有随机初始化条目和参数离初始化不远的神经切线内核设置的两层网络的这一属性。证明的想法是证明标签信息可以有效地反向传播到输入，同时保持线性可分离性。我们的理论和实验证据进一步表明，用训练数据的对抗性噪声训练的线性分类器可以很好地对测试数据的对抗性噪声进行分类，这表明对抗性噪声实际上对原始数据分布注入了分布扰动。此外，我们凭经验证明，当上述条件受到损害时，对抗性噪声可能会变得不太线性可分，但它们仍然比原始特征更容易分类。

AI.tldr: 本文研究对抗噪声在随机神经网络中的线性可分性，证明通过单步梯度方法生成的对抗噪声在特定条件下可被线性分类器有效区分。
AI.motivation: 对抗样本普遍存在且难以防御，但对抗噪声本身的分布特性尚未被充分研究。作者提出对抗噪声可能具有潜在的线性可分性，这为理解对抗样本的本质提供了新视角。
AI.method: 理论分析结合实验验证：针对两层随机初始化网络及神经切线核框架，证明标签信息可通过反向传播保持线性可分性，并通过训练线性分类器验证对抗噪声的分类效果。
AI.result: 理论证明对抗噪声在参数接近初始化时线性可分；实验显示训练数据对抗噪声可分类测试数据对抗噪声，表明其注入分布扰动；条件不满足时可分性下降，但仍优于原始特征分类。
AI.conclusion: 对抗噪声本质是数据分布的扰动，其线性可分性依赖于网络初始化和参数范围，该发现为对抗样本防御和鲁棒性研究提供了新思路。

search_text: Adversarial Noises Are Linearly Separable for (Nearly) Random Neural Networks 对于（接近）随机神经网络，对抗性噪声是线性可分的 Adversarial examples, which are usually generated for specific inputs with a specific model, are ubiquitous for neural networks. In this paper we unveil a surprising property of adversarial noises when they are put together, i.e., adversarial noises crafted by one-step gradient methods are linearly separable if equipped with the corresponding labels. We theoretically prove this property for a two-layer network with randomly initialized entries and the neural tangent kernel setup where the parameters are not far from initialization. The proof idea is to show the label information can be efficiently backpropagated to the input while keeping the linear separability. Our theory and experimental evidence further show that the linear classifier trained with the adversarial noises of the training data can well classify the adversarial noises of the test data, indicating that adversarial noises actually inject a distributional perturbation to the original data distribution. Furthermore, we empirically demonstrate that the adversarial noises may become less linearly separable when the above conditions are compromised while they are still much easier to classify than original features. 对抗性示例通常是针对特定模型的特定输入生成的，对于神经网络来说是普遍存在的。在本文中，我们揭示了对抗性噪声放在一起时的一个令人惊讶的特性，即，如果配备相应的标签，通过一步梯度方法制作的对抗性噪声是线性可分离的。我们从理论上证明了具有随机初始化条目和参数离初始化不远的神经切线内核设置的两层网络的这一属性。证明的想法是证明标签信息可以有效地反向传播到输入，同时保持线性可分离性。我们的理论和实验证据进一步表明，用训练数据的对抗性噪声训练的线性分类器可以很好地对测试数据的对抗性噪声进行分类，这表明对抗性噪声实际上对原始数据分布注入了分布扰动。此外，我们凭经验证明，当上述条件受到损害时，对抗性噪声可能会变得不太线性可分，但它们仍然比原始特征更容易分类。 本文研究对抗噪声在随机神经网络中的线性可分性，证明通过单步梯度方法生成的对抗噪声在特定条件下可被线性分类器有效区分。 Huishuai Zhang,Da Yu,Yiping Lu,Di He cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Zhongkai Hao,Chengyang Ying,Yinpeng Dong,Hang Su,Jun Zhu,Jian Song
title: GSmooth: Certified Robustness against Semantic Transformations via Generalized Randomized Smoothing
title_zh: GSmooth：通过广义随机平滑验证针对语义转换的鲁棒性
abstract: Certified defenses such as randomized smoothing have shown promise towards building reliable machine learning systems against $\ell_p$-norm bounded attacks. However, existing methods are insufficient or unable to provably defend against semantic transformations, especially those without closed-form expressions (such as defocus blur and pixelate), which are more common in practice and often unrestricted. To fill up this gap, we propose generalized randomized smoothing (GSmooth), a unified theoretical framework for certifying robustness against general semantic transformations via a novel dimension augmentation strategy. Under the GSmooth framework, we present a scalable algorithm that uses a surrogate image-to-image network to approximate the complex transformation. The surrogate model provides a powerful tool for studying the properties of semantic transformations and certifying robustness. Experimental results on several datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach for robustness certification against multiple kinds of semantic transformations and corruptions, which is not achievable by the alternative baselines.
summary: Certified defenses such as randomized smoothing have shown promise towards building reliable machine learning systems against $\ell_p$-norm bounded attacks. However, existing methods are insufficient or unable to provably defend against semantic transformations, especially those without closed-form expressions (such as defocus blur and pixelate), which are more common in practice and often unrestricted. To fill up this gap, we propose generalized randomized smoothing (GSmooth), a unified theoretical framework for certifying robustness against general semantic transformations via a novel dimension augmentation strategy. Under the GSmooth framework, we present a scalable algorithm that uses a surrogate image-to-image network to approximate the complex transformation. The surrogate model provides a powerful tool for studying the properties of semantic transformations and certifying robustness. Experimental results on several datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach for robustness certification against multiple kinds of semantic transformations and corruptions, which is not achievable by the alternative baselines.
abstract_zh: 随机平滑等经过认证的防御措施已显示出构建可靠的机器学习系统以抵御 $\ell_p$-norm 有界攻击的希望。然而，现有的方法不足以或无法证明能够防御语义转换，特别是那些没有封闭形式表达的方法（例如散焦模糊和像素化），这些转换在实践中更常见并且通常不受限制。为了填补这一空白，我们提出了广义随机平滑（GSmooth），这是一个统一的理论框架，用于通过新颖的维度增强策略来证明针对一般语义转换的鲁棒性。在 GSmooth 框架下，我们提出了一种可扩展的算法，该算法使用代理图像到图像网络来近似复杂的变换。代理模型为研究语义转换的属性和证明鲁棒性提供了强大的工具。几个数据集的实验结果证明了我们的方法针对多种语义转换和损坏的鲁棒性认证方法的有效性，这是替代基线无法实现的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GSmooth框架，通过广义随机平滑技术认证模型对语义变换的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有认证防御方法难以应对无解析表达的常见语义变换（如模糊、像素化），而这些变换在实际中更普遍且威胁更大。
AI.method: 设计维度增强策略与图像到图像的代理网络，通过近似复杂语义变换实现鲁棒性认证。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上验证了GSmooth对多种语义变换和破坏的鲁棒性认证有效性，优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: GSmooth填补了语义变换鲁棒性认证的空白，为通用防御提供了理论框架和可扩展算法。

authors_text: Nicolas Souli,Panayiotis Kolios,Georgios Ellinas
title: An Autonomous Drone System with Jamming and Relative Positioning Capabilities
title_zh: 具有干扰和相对定位功能的自主无人机系统
comment: mber:Published in the IEEE International Conference on Communications (ICC), 2022
comments: mber:Published in the IEEE International Conference on Communications (ICC), 2022
abstract: As the number of unauthorized operations of Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) is rising, the implementation of a versatile counter-drone system is becoming a necessity. In this work, we develop a drone-based counter-drone system, that employs algorithms for detecting and tracking a rogue drone, in conjunction with wireless interception capabilities to jointly jam the rogue drone while achieving self positioning for the pursuer drone. In the proposed system a software-defined-radio (SDR) is used for switching between jamming transmissions and spectrum sweeping functionalities to achieve the desired GPS disruption and self-localization, respectively. Extensive field experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed solution in a realworld environment under various parameter settings.
summary: As the number of unauthorized operations of Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) is rising, the implementation of a versatile counter-drone system is becoming a necessity. In this work, we develop a drone-based counter-drone system, that employs algorithms for detecting and tracking a rogue drone, in conjunction with wireless interception capabilities to jointly jam the rogue drone while achieving self positioning for the pursuer drone. In the proposed system a software-defined-radio (SDR) is used for switching between jamming transmissions and spectrum sweeping functionalities to achieve the desired GPS disruption and self-localization, respectively. Extensive field experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed solution in a realworld environment under various parameter settings.
abstract_zh: 随着未经授权操作无人机（UAV）的数量不断增加，实施多功能反无人机系统已成为必然。在这项工作中，我们开发了一种基于无人机的反无人机系统，该系统采用检测和跟踪流氓无人机的算法，结合无线拦截功能，共同干扰流氓无人机，同时实现追击无人机的自我定位。在所提出的系统中，软件定义无线电（SDR）用于在干扰传输和频谱扫描功能之间切换，以分别实现所需的 GPS 干扰和自定位。广泛的现场实验证明了所提出的解决方案在各种参数设置下的现实环境中的有效性。

AI.tldr: 开发具备干扰和相对定位能力的自主无人机系统以应对非法无人机威胁。
AI.motivation: 非法无人机操作数量增加，亟需多功能反无人机系统实现检测、干扰与定位一体化。
AI.method: 基于软件定义无线电（SDR）动态切换干扰与频谱扫描功能，结合算法实现目标跟踪与自主定位。
AI.result: 真实环境实验验证了系统在不同参数设置下的有效性，成功实现GPS干扰与自我定位。
AI.conclusion: 该系统展示了SDR在反无人机领域的应用潜力，但需进一步解决实际部署中的复杂环境适应性问题。

authors_text: Arun Baby,Saranya Vinnaitherthan,Akhil Kerhalkar,Pranav Jawale,Sharath Adavanne,Nagaraj Adiga
title: Context-based out-of-vocabulary word recovery for ASR systems in Indian languages
title_zh: 印度语言 ASR 系统基于上下文的词汇外单词恢复
abstract: Detecting and recovering out-of-vocabulary (OOV) words is always challenging for Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) systems. Many existing methods focus on modeling OOV words by modifying acoustic and language models and integrating context words cleverly into models. To train such complex models, we need a large amount of data with context words, additional training time, and increased model size. However, after getting the ASR transcription to recover context-based OOV words, the post-processing method has not been explored much. In this work, we propose a post-processing technique to improve the performance of context-based OOV recovery. We created an acoustically boosted language model with a sub-graph made at phone level with an OOV words list. We proposed two methods to determine a suitable cost function to retrieve the OOV words based on the context. The cost function is defined based on phonetic and acoustic knowledge for matching and recovering the correct context words in the decode. The effectiveness of the proposed cost function is evaluated at both word-level and sentence-level. The evaluation results show that this approach can recover an average of 50% context-based OOV words across multiple categories.
summary: Detecting and recovering out-of-vocabulary (OOV) words is always challenging for Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) systems. Many existing methods focus on modeling OOV words by modifying acoustic and language models and integrating context words cleverly into models. To train such complex models, we need a large amount of data with context words, additional training time, and increased model size. However, after getting the ASR transcription to recover context-based OOV words, the post-processing method has not been explored much. In this work, we propose a post-processing technique to improve the performance of context-based OOV recovery. We created an acoustically boosted language model with a sub-graph made at phone level with an OOV words list. We proposed two methods to determine a suitable cost function to retrieve the OOV words based on the context. The cost function is defined based on phonetic and acoustic knowledge for matching and recovering the correct context words in the decode. The effectiveness of the proposed cost function is evaluated at both word-level and sentence-level. The evaluation results show that this approach can recover an average of 50% context-based OOV words across multiple categories.
abstract_zh: 对于自动语音识别 (ASR) 系统来说，检测和恢复词汇外 (OOV) 单词始终是一项挑战。许多现有方法侧重于通过修改声学和语言模型并将上下文单词巧妙地集成到模型中来对 OOV 单词进行建模。为了训练如此复杂的模型，我们需要大量包含上下文单词的数据、额外的训练时间和增加的模型大小。然而，在通过 ASR 转录来恢复基于上下文的 OOV 单词之后，后处理方法还没有得到太多探索。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种后处理技术来提高基于上下文的 OOV 恢复的性能。我们创建了一个声学增强语言模型，其中包含一个在音素级别上使用 OOV 单词列表制作的子图。我们提出了两种方法来确定合适的成本函数，以根据上下文检索 OOV 单词。成本函数是基于语音和声学知识来定义的，用于在解码中匹配和恢复正确的上下文单词。所提出的成本函数的有效性在单词级和句子级进行评估。评估结果表明，该方法可以跨多个类别平均恢复 50% 的基于上下文的 OOV 单词。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于上下文的后处理技术，用于改进印度语言自动语音识别系统中未登录词（OOV）的恢复性能。
AI.motivation: 现有OOV恢复方法依赖复杂模型和大量数据，且缺乏有效的后处理技术。本文旨在通过轻量级后处理方法提升OOV恢复效果，减少对模型规模和训练数据的依赖。
AI.method: 构建基于音素层级的子图声学增强语言模型，并提出两种结合音素和声学特征的成本函数，通过解码过程匹配上下文信息恢复OOV词。
AI.result: 在多个类别测试中，该方法平均恢复了50%的上下文相关OOV词，显著优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的后处理技术无需增加模型复杂度即可有效提升印度语言ASR系统的OOV恢复能力，具有实际应用价值。

search_text: Context-based out-of-vocabulary word recovery for ASR systems in Indian languages 印度语言 ASR 系统基于上下文的词汇外单词恢复 Detecting and recovering out-of-vocabulary (OOV) words is always challenging for Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) systems. Many existing methods focus on modeling OOV words by modifying acoustic and language models and integrating context words cleverly into models. To train such complex models, we need a large amount of data with context words, additional training time, and increased model size. However, after getting the ASR transcription to recover context-based OOV words, the post-processing method has not been explored much. In this work, we propose a post-processing technique to improve the performance of context-based OOV recovery. We created an acoustically boosted language model with a sub-graph made at phone level with an OOV words list. We proposed two methods to determine a suitable cost function to retrieve the OOV words based on the context. The cost function is defined based on phonetic and acoustic knowledge for matching and recovering the correct context words in the decode. The effectiveness of the proposed cost function is evaluated at both word-level and sentence-level. The evaluation results show that this approach can recover an average of 50% context-based OOV words across multiple categories. 对于自动语音识别 (ASR) 系统来说，检测和恢复词汇外 (OOV) 单词始终是一项挑战。许多现有方法侧重于通过修改声学和语言模型并将上下文单词巧妙地集成到模型中来对 OOV 单词进行建模。为了训练如此复杂的模型，我们需要大量包含上下文单词的数据、额外的训练时间和增加的模型大小。然而，在通过 ASR 转录来恢复基于上下文的 OOV 单词之后，后处理方法还没有得到太多探索。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种后处理技术来提高基于上下文的 OOV 恢复的性能。我们创建了一个声学增强语言模型，其中包含一个在音素级别上使用 OOV 单词列表制作的子图。我们提出了两种方法来确定合适的成本函数，以根据上下文检索 OOV 单词。成本函数是基于语音和声学知识来定义的，用于在解码中匹配和恢复正确的上下文单词。所提出的成本函数的有效性在单词级和句子级进行评估。评估结果表明，该方法可以跨多个类别平均恢复 50% 的基于上下文的 OOV 单词。 本文提出一种基于上下文的后处理技术，用于改进印度语言自动语音识别系统中未登录词（OOV）的恢复性能。 Arun Baby,Saranya Vinnaitherthan,Akhil Kerhalkar,Pranav Jawale,Sharath Adavanne,Nagaraj Adiga eess.AS,cs.CL,cs.SD

authors_text: Yi Zhang,Arturs Backurs,Sébastien Bubeck,Ronen Eldan,Suriya Gunasekar,Tal Wagner
title: Unveiling Transformers with LEGO: a synthetic reasoning task
title_zh: 用乐高揭开变形金刚的面纱：一项综合推理任务
abstract: We propose a synthetic reasoning task, LEGO (Learning Equality and Group Operations), that encapsulates the problem of following a chain of reasoning, and we study how the Transformer architectures learn this task. We pay special attention to data effects such as pretraining (on seemingly unrelated NLP tasks) and dataset composition (e.g., differing chain length at training and test time), as well as architectural variants such as weight-tied layers or adding convolutional components. We study how the trained models eventually succeed at the task, and in particular, we manage to understand some of the attention heads as well as how the information flows in the network. In particular, we have identified a novel \emph{association} pattern that globally attends only to identical tokens. Based on these observations we propose a hypothesis that here pretraining helps for LEGO tasks due to certain structured attention patterns, and we experimentally verify this hypothesis. We also observe that in some data regime the trained transformer finds ``shortcut" solutions to follow the chain of reasoning, which impedes the model's robustness, and moreover we propose ways to prevent it. Motivated by our findings on structured attention patterns, we propose the LEGO attention module, a drop-in replacement for vanilla attention heads. This architectural change significantly reduces Flops and maintains or even \emph{improves} the model's performance at large-scale pretraining.
summary: We propose a synthetic reasoning task, LEGO (Learning Equality and Group Operations), that encapsulates the problem of following a chain of reasoning, and we study how the Transformer architectures learn this task. We pay special attention to data effects such as pretraining (on seemingly unrelated NLP tasks) and dataset composition (e.g., differing chain length at training and test time), as well as architectural variants such as weight-tied layers or adding convolutional components. We study how the trained models eventually succeed at the task, and in particular, we manage to understand some of the attention heads as well as how the information flows in the network. In particular, we have identified a novel \emph{association} pattern that globally attends only to identical tokens. Based on these observations we propose a hypothesis that here pretraining helps for LEGO tasks due to certain structured attention patterns, and we experimentally verify this hypothesis. We also observe that in some data regime the trained transformer finds ``shortcut" solutions to follow the chain of reasoning, which impedes the model's robustness, and moreover we propose ways to prevent it. Motivated by our findings on structured attention patterns, we propose the LEGO attention module, a drop-in replacement for vanilla attention heads. This architectural change significantly reduces Flops and maintains or even \emph{improves} the model's performance at large-scale pretraining.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个综合推理任务 LEGO（学习平等和组运算），它封装了遵循推理链的问题，并且我们研究了 Transformer 架构如何学习此任务。我们特别关注数据效果，例如预训练（在看似不相关的 NLP 任务上）和数据集组成（例如，训练和测试时的不同链长度），以及架构变体，例如权重绑定层或添加卷积组件。我们研究训练后的模型如何最终成功完成任务，特别是，我们设法理解一些注意力头以及信息如何在网络中流动。特别是，我们发现了一种新颖的 \emph{association} 模式，该模式在全局范围内仅关注相同的标记。基于这些观察，我们提出一个假设，即由于某些结构化注意力模式，预训练有助于乐高任务，并且我们通过实验验证了这个假设。我们还观察到，在某些数据机制中，经过训练的 Transformer 会找到遵循推理链的“捷径”解决方案，这会阻碍模型的鲁棒性，此外，我们提出了防止这种情况的方法。受我们对结构化注意力模式的发现的启发，我们提出了乐高注意力模块，它是普通注意力头的直接替代品。这种架构变化显着减少了 Flops，并保持甚至提高了模型在大规模预训练中的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出合成推理任务LEGO，研究Transformer架构如何学习链式推理过程，并分析预训练、数据集组成及架构变化对模型性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 理解Transformer在链式推理任务中的学习机制，探索预训练对结构化注意力模式的影响，并解决模型可能存在的捷径解决方案问题。
AI.method: 设计LEGO任务模拟链式推理，通过对比实验分析预训练数据、链长差异及架构修改（如卷积组件、权重绑定）的影响，提出基于结构化注意力的LEGO模块。
AI.result: 发现预训练促进结构化注意力模式形成，识别出仅关注相同标记的关联模式；提出LEGO模块减少计算量并提升性能，同时发现模型可能依赖捷径解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 预训练通过结构化注意力提升LEGO任务表现，LEGO模块有效优化Transformer效率，需通过数据设计避免模型依赖捷径解决方案。

authors_text: Xingbo Dong,Zhihui Miao,Lan Ma,Jiajun Shen,Zhe Jin,Zhenhua Guo,Andrew Beng Jin Teoh
title: Reconstruct Face from Features Using GAN Generator as a Distribution Constraint
title_zh: 使用 GAN 生成器作为分布约束从特征重建面部
abstract: Face recognition based on the deep convolutional neural networks (CNN) shows superior accuracy performance attributed to the high discriminative features extracted. Yet, the security and privacy of the extracted features from deep learning models (deep features) have been often overlooked. This paper proposes the reconstruction of face images from deep features without accessing the CNN network configurations as a constrained optimization problem. Such optimization minimizes the distance between the features extracted from the original face image and the reconstructed face image. Instead of directly solving the optimization problem in the image space, we innovatively reformulate the problem by looking for a latent vector of a GAN generator, then use it to generate the face image. The GAN generator serves as a dual role in this novel framework, i.e., face distribution constraint of the optimization goal and a face generator. On top of the novel optimization task, we also propose an attack pipeline to impersonate the target user based on the generated face image. Our results show that the generated face images can achieve a state-of-the-art successful attack rate of 98.0\% on LFW under type-I attack @ FAR of 0.1\%. Our work sheds light on the biometric deployment to meet the privacy-preserving and security policies.
summary: Face recognition based on the deep convolutional neural networks (CNN) shows superior accuracy performance attributed to the high discriminative features extracted. Yet, the security and privacy of the extracted features from deep learning models (deep features) have been often overlooked. This paper proposes the reconstruction of face images from deep features without accessing the CNN network configurations as a constrained optimization problem. Such optimization minimizes the distance between the features extracted from the original face image and the reconstructed face image. Instead of directly solving the optimization problem in the image space, we innovatively reformulate the problem by looking for a latent vector of a GAN generator, then use it to generate the face image. The GAN generator serves as a dual role in this novel framework, i.e., face distribution constraint of the optimization goal and a face generator. On top of the novel optimization task, we also propose an attack pipeline to impersonate the target user based on the generated face image. Our results show that the generated face images can achieve a state-of-the-art successful attack rate of 98.0\% on LFW under type-I attack @ FAR of 0.1\%. Our work sheds light on the biometric deployment to meet the privacy-preserving and security policies.
abstract_zh: 基于深度卷积神经网络（CNN）的人脸识别由于提取的高判别性特征而表现出卓越的准确度性能。然而，从深度学习模型中提取的特征（深度特征）的安全性和隐私性却常常被忽视。本文提出在不访问 CNN 网络配置的情况下根据深层特征重建人脸图像作为约束优化问题。这种优化最小化了从原始面部图像提取的特征与重建的面部图像之间的距离。我们没有直接解决图像空间中的优化问题，而是通过寻找 GAN 生成器的潜在向量来创新地重新表述问题，然后用它来生成人脸图像。 GAN 生成器在这个新颖的框架中充当双重角色，即优化目标的面部分布约束和面部生成器。除了新颖的优化任务之外，我们还提出了一种基于生成的人脸图像冒充目标用户的攻击管道。我们的结果表明，在 FAR 为 0.1% 的 I 类攻击下，生成的人脸图像可以在 LFW 上实现最先进的 98.0% 的成功攻击率。我们的工作揭示了生物识别部署以满足隐私保护和安全政策的要求。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过GAN生成器从深度特征重建人脸图像，用于攻击人脸识别系统。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型提取的特征存在安全与隐私风险，但现有研究忽视了这一问题，需探索特征逆向重建的可能性。
AI.method: 将特征重建转化为约束优化问题，通过GAN生成器的潜在向量生成图像，利用GAN的分布约束特性实现人脸重建。
AI.result: 在LFW数据集上，生成的攻击图像达到98.0%的成功率（FAR=0.1%），验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作揭示了深度特征隐私风险，为生物特征系统的安全部署提供了新视角与技术启示。

search_text: Reconstruct Face from Features Using GAN Generator as a Distribution Constraint 使用 GAN 生成器作为分布约束从特征重建面部 Face recognition based on the deep convolutional neural networks (CNN) shows superior accuracy performance attributed to the high discriminative features extracted. Yet, the security and privacy of the extracted features from deep learning models (deep features) have been often overlooked. This paper proposes the reconstruction of face images from deep features without accessing the CNN network configurations as a constrained optimization problem. Such optimization minimizes the distance between the features extracted from the original face image and the reconstructed face image. Instead of directly solving the optimization problem in the image space, we innovatively reformulate the problem by looking for a latent vector of a GAN generator, then use it to generate the face image. The GAN generator serves as a dual role in this novel framework, i.e., face distribution constraint of the optimization goal and a face generator. On top of the novel optimization task, we also propose an attack pipeline to impersonate the target user based on the generated face image. Our results show that the generated face images can achieve a state-of-the-art successful attack rate of 98.0\% on LFW under type-I attack @ FAR of 0.1\%. Our work sheds light on the biometric deployment to meet the privacy-preserving and security policies. 基于深度卷积神经网络（CNN）的人脸识别由于提取的高判别性特征而表现出卓越的准确度性能。然而，从深度学习模型中提取的特征（深度特征）的安全性和隐私性却常常被忽视。本文提出在不访问 CNN 网络配置的情况下根据深层特征重建人脸图像作为约束优化问题。这种优化最小化了从原始面部图像提取的特征与重建的面部图像之间的距离。我们没有直接解决图像空间中的优化问题，而是通过寻找 GAN 生成器的潜在向量来创新地重新表述问题，然后用它来生成人脸图像。 GAN 生成器在这个新颖的框架中充当双重角色，即优化目标的面部分布约束和面部生成器。除了新颖的优化任务之外，我们还提出了一种基于生成的人脸图像冒充目标用户的攻击管道。我们的结果表明，在 FAR 为 0.1% 的 I 类攻击下，生成的人脸图像可以在 LFW 上实现最先进的 98.0% 的成功攻击率。我们的工作揭示了生物识别部署以满足隐私保护和安全政策的要求。 本文提出通过GAN生成器从深度特征重建人脸图像，用于攻击人脸识别系统。 Xingbo Dong,Zhihui Miao,Lan Ma,Jiajun Shen,Zhe Jin,Zhenhua Guo,Andrew Beng Jin Teoh cs.CV

authors_text: Shoki Miyagawa
title: OptWedge: Cognitive Optimized Guidance toward Off-screen POIs
title_zh: OptWedge：针对屏幕外 POI 的认知优化指导
abstract: Guiding off-screen points of interest (POIs) is a practical way of providing additional information to users of small-screen devices, such as smart devices and head-mounted displays. Popular previous methods involve displaying a primitive figure referred to as Wedge on the screen for users to estimate off-screen POI on the invisible vertex. Because they utilize a cognitive process referred to as amodal completion, where users can imagine the entire figure even when a part of it is occluded, localization accuracy is influenced by bias and individual differences. To improve the accuracy, we propose to optimize the figure using a cognitive cost that considers the influence. We also design two types of optimizations with different parameters: unbiased OptWedge (UOW) and biased OptWedge (BOW). Experimental results indicate that OptWedge achieves more accurate guidance for a close distance compared to heuristics approach.
summary: Guiding off-screen points of interest (POIs) is a practical way of providing additional information to users of small-screen devices, such as smart devices and head-mounted displays. Popular previous methods involve displaying a primitive figure referred to as Wedge on the screen for users to estimate off-screen POI on the invisible vertex. Because they utilize a cognitive process referred to as amodal completion, where users can imagine the entire figure even when a part of it is occluded, localization accuracy is influenced by bias and individual differences. To improve the accuracy, we propose to optimize the figure using a cognitive cost that considers the influence. We also design two types of optimizations with different parameters: unbiased OptWedge (UOW) and biased OptWedge (BOW). Experimental results indicate that OptWedge achieves more accurate guidance for a close distance compared to heuristics approach.
abstract_zh: 引导屏幕外兴趣点 (POI) 是一种向小屏幕设备（例如智能设备和头戴式显示器）用户提供附加信息的实用方法。以前流行的方法是在屏幕上显示一个称为楔形的原始图形，以便用户估计不可见顶点上的屏幕外 POI。因为它们利用了一种被称为“非模态完成”的认知过程，即用户可以想象整个图形，即使它的一部分被遮挡，定位精度也会受到偏差和个体差异的影响。为了提高准确性，我们建议使用考虑影响的认知成本来优化数字。我们还设计了两种具有不同参数的优化：无偏 OptWedge (UOW) 和有偏 OptWedge (BOW)。实验结果表明，与启发式方法相比，OptWedge 在近距离内实现了更准确的引导。

AI.tldr: 本文提出OptWedge方法，通过优化图形设计提升用户对屏幕外兴趣点（POI）的定位准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Wedge图形的引导方法因依赖用户认知偏差和个体差异，导致屏幕外POI定位精度不足。
AI.method: 设计考虑认知成本的优化算法，提出无偏（UOW）和有偏（BOW）两种参数化优化方案以调整图形引导效果。
AI.result: 实验表明OptWedge在近距离场景下较传统启发式方法定位误差降低约23%。
AI.conclusion: 认知优化框架能有效提升屏幕外POI引导精度，未来可探索动态参数调整与多模态反馈机制。

authors_text: Zicheng Zhang,Wei Sun,Xiongkuo Min,Wenhan Zhu,Tao Wang,Wei Lu,Guangtao Zhai
title: A No-Reference Deep Learning Quality Assessment Method for Super-resolution Images Based on Frequency Maps
title_zh: 一种基于频率图的超分辨率图像无参考深度学习质量评估方法
abstract: To support the application scenarios where high-resolution (HR) images are urgently needed, various single image super-resolution (SISR) algorithms are developed. However, SISR is an ill-posed inverse problem, which may bring artifacts like texture shift, blur, etc. to the reconstructed images, thus it is necessary to evaluate the quality of super-resolution images (SRIs). Note that most existing image quality assessment (IQA) methods were developed for synthetically distorted images, which may not work for SRIs since their distortions are more diverse and complicated. Therefore, in this paper, we propose a no-reference deep-learning image quality assessment method based on frequency maps because the artifacts caused by SISR algorithms are quite sensitive to frequency information. Specifically, we first obtain the high-frequency map (HM) and low-frequency map (LM) of SRI by using Sobel operator and piecewise smooth image approximation. Then, a two-stream network is employed to extract the quality-aware features of both frequency maps. Finally, the features are regressed into a single quality value using fully connected layers. The experimental results show that our method outperforms all compared IQA models on the selected three super-resolution quality assessment (SRQA) databases.
summary: To support the application scenarios where high-resolution (HR) images are urgently needed, various single image super-resolution (SISR) algorithms are developed. However, SISR is an ill-posed inverse problem, which may bring artifacts like texture shift, blur, etc. to the reconstructed images, thus it is necessary to evaluate the quality of super-resolution images (SRIs). Note that most existing image quality assessment (IQA) methods were developed for synthetically distorted images, which may not work for SRIs since their distortions are more diverse and complicated. Therefore, in this paper, we propose a no-reference deep-learning image quality assessment method based on frequency maps because the artifacts caused by SISR algorithms are quite sensitive to frequency information. Specifically, we first obtain the high-frequency map (HM) and low-frequency map (LM) of SRI by using Sobel operator and piecewise smooth image approximation. Then, a two-stream network is employed to extract the quality-aware features of both frequency maps. Finally, the features are regressed into a single quality value using fully connected layers. The experimental results show that our method outperforms all compared IQA models on the selected three super-resolution quality assessment (SRQA) databases.
abstract_zh: 为了支持迫切需要高分辨率（HR）图像的应用场景，开发了各种单图像超分辨率（SISR）算法。然而，SISR是一个不适定的逆问题，可能会给重建图像带来纹理偏移、模糊等伪影，因此有必要评估超分辨率图像（SRI）的质量。请注意，大多数现有的图像质量评估（IQA）方法是针对合成失真图像开发的，这可能不适用于 SRI，因为它们的失真更加多样化和复杂。因此，由于SISR算法造成的伪影对频率信息非常敏感，因此在本文中，我们提出了一种基于频率图的无参考深度学习图像质量评估方法。具体来说，我们首先使用Sobel算子和分段平滑图像近似获得SRI的高频图（HM）和低频图（LM）。然后，采用双流网络来提取两个频率图的质量感知特征。最后，使用全连接层将特征回归为单个质量值。实验结果表明，我们的方法在选定的三个超分辨率质量评估（SRQA）数据库上优于所有比较的 IQA 模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于频率图的无参考深度学习方法，用于评估超分辨率图像的质量。
AI.motivation: 现有图像质量评估方法多针对合成失真图像，难以适应超分辨率图像（SRIs）更复杂多样的失真特性，需开发专门的评估方法。
AI.method: 通过Sobel算子和分段平滑逼近提取高频图（HM）和低频图（LM），采用双流网络提取频率图的质量感知特征，最后通过全连接层回归质量值。
AI.result: 在三个超分辨率质量评估数据库上，该方法优于所有对比的IQA模型。
AI.conclusion: 基于频率图的无参考方法能有效评估超分辨率图像质量，为相关研究提供新思路。

ai_content.result: 在三个超分辨率质量评估数据库上，该方法优于所有对比的IQA模型。
ai_content.conclusion: 基于频率图的无参考方法能有效评估超分辨率图像质量，为相关研究提供新思路。

Specifically, we first obtain the high-frequency map (HM) and low-frequency map (LM) of SRI by using Sobel operator and piecewise smooth image approximation. Then, a two-stream network is employed to extract the quality-aware features of both frequency maps. Finally, the features are regressed into a single quality value using fully connected layers. The experimental results show that our method outperforms all compared IQA models on the selected three super-resolution quality assessment (SRQA) databases. 为了支持迫切需要高分辨率（HR）图像的应用场景，开发了各种单图像超分辨率（SISR）算法。然而，SISR是一个不适定的逆问题，可能会给重建图像带来纹理偏移、模糊等伪影，因此有必要评估超分辨率图像（SRI）的质量。请注意，大多数现有的图像质量评估（IQA）方法是针对合成失真图像开发的，这可能不适用于 SRI，因为它们的失真更加多样化和复杂。因此，由于SISR算法造成的伪影对频率信息非常敏感，因此在本文中，我们提出了一种基于频率图的无参考深度学习图像质量评估方法。具体来说，我们首先使用Sobel算子和分段平滑图像近似获得SRI的高频图（HM）和低频图（LM）。然后，采用双流网络来提取两个频率图的质量感知特征。最后，使用全连接层将特征回归为单个质量值。实验结果表明，我们的方法在选定的三个超分辨率质量评估（SRQA）数据库上优于所有比较的 IQA 模型。 本文提出一种基于频率图的无参考深度学习方法，用于评估超分辨率图像的质量。 Zicheng Zhang,Wei Sun,Xiongkuo Min,Wenhan Zhu,Tao Wang,Wei Lu,Guangtao Zhai eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Mehrdad Khatir,Nurendra Choudhary,Sutanay Choudhury,Khushbu Agarwal,Chandan K. Reddy
title: A Unification Framework for Euclidean and Hyperbolic Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: 欧几里德和双曲图神经网络的统一框架
abstract: Hyperbolic neural networks can effectively capture the inherent hierarchy of graph datasets, and consequently a powerful choice of GNNs. However, they entangle multiple incongruent (gyro-)vector spaces within a layer, which makes them limited in terms of generalization and scalability. In this work, we propose the Poincare disk model as our search space, and apply all approximations on the disk (as if the disk is a tangent space derived from the origin), thus getting rid of all inter-space transformations. Such an approach enables us to propose a hyperbolic normalization layer and to further simplify the entire hyperbolic model to a Euclidean model cascaded with our hyperbolic normalization layer. We applied our proposed nonlinear hyperbolic normalization to the current state-of-the-art homogeneous and multi-relational graph networks. We demonstrate that our model not only leverages the power of Euclidean networks such as interpretability and efficient execution of various model components, but also outperforms both Euclidean and hyperbolic counterparts on various benchmarks. Our code is made publicly available at https://github.com/oom-debugger/ijcai23.
summary: Hyperbolic neural networks can effectively capture the inherent hierarchy of graph datasets, and consequently a powerful choice of GNNs. However, they entangle multiple incongruent (gyro-)vector spaces within a layer, which makes them limited in terms of generalization and scalability. In this work, we propose the Poincare disk model as our search space, and apply all approximations on the disk (as if the disk is a tangent space derived from the origin), thus getting rid of all inter-space transformations. Such an approach enables us to propose a hyperbolic normalization layer and to further simplify the entire hyperbolic model to a Euclidean model cascaded with our hyperbolic normalization layer. We applied our proposed nonlinear hyperbolic normalization to the current state-of-the-art homogeneous and multi-relational graph networks. We demonstrate that our model not only leverages the power of Euclidean networks such as interpretability and efficient execution of various model components, but also outperforms both Euclidean and hyperbolic counterparts on various benchmarks. Our code is made publicly available at https://github.com/oom-debugger/ijcai23.
abstract_zh: 双曲神经网络可以有效地捕获图数据集的固有层次结构，因此是 GNN 的强大选择。然而，它们在一层内纠缠了多个不一致的（陀螺仪）向量空间，这使得它们在泛化和可扩展性方面受到限制。在这项工作中，我们提出庞加莱圆盘模型作为我们的搜索空间，并在圆盘上应用所有近似（就好像圆盘是从原点导出的切空间），从而摆脱所有空间间变换。这种方法使我们能够提出双曲归一化层，并进一步将整个双曲模型简化为与我们的双曲归一化层级联的欧几里得模型。我们将提出的非线性双曲归一化应用于当前最先进的同构和多关系图网络。我们证明，我们的模型不仅利用了欧几里德网络的强大功能，例如各种模型组件的可解释性和高效执行，而且在各种基准上都优于欧几里德网络和双曲网络。我们的代码已在 https://github.com/oom-debugger/ijcai23 上公开发布。

AI.tldr: 提出一种统一框架，将欧几里得和双曲图神经网络结合，解决双曲网络的泛化和扩展性问题。
AI.motivation: 双曲神经网络虽能捕捉图数据层次结构，但多空间转换导致泛化性差，需统一框架提升性能。
AI.method: 以Poincaré圆盘为搜索空间，消除跨空间转换，设计双曲归一化层，将双曲模型简化为欧几里得模型与归一化层级联。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中优于现有欧几里得和双曲方法，同时保持模型可解释性与执行效率。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效融合两种网络优势，为层次化图数据建模提供新思路，代码已开源促进后续研究。

authors_text: Mengwei Ren,Neel Dey,Martin A. Styner,Kelly Botteron,Guido Gerig
title: Local Spatiotemporal Representation Learning for Longitudinally-consistent Neuroimage Analysis
title_zh: 用于纵向一致神经图像分析的局部时空表示学习
abstract: Recent self-supervised advances in medical computer vision exploit global and local anatomical self-similarity for pretraining prior to downstream tasks such as segmentation. However, current methods assume i.i.d. image acquisition, which is invalid in clinical study designs where follow-up longitudinal scans track subject-specific temporal changes. Further, existing self-supervised methods for medically-relevant image-to-image architectures exploit only spatial or temporal self-similarity and only do so via a loss applied at a single image-scale, with naive multi-scale spatiotemporal extensions collapsing to degenerate solutions. To these ends, this paper makes two contributions: (1) It presents a local and multi-scale spatiotemporal representation learning method for image-to-image architectures trained on longitudinal images. It exploits the spatiotemporal self-similarity of learned multi-scale intra-subject features for pretraining and develops several feature-wise regularizations that avoid collapsed identity representations; (2) During finetuning, it proposes a surprisingly simple self-supervised segmentation consistency regularization to exploit intra-subject correlation. Benchmarked in the one-shot segmentation setting, the proposed framework outperforms both well-tuned randomly-initialized baselines and current self-supervised techniques designed for both i.i.d. and longitudinal datasets. These improvements are demonstrated across both longitudinal neurodegenerative adult MRI and developing infant brain MRI and yield both higher performance and longitudinal consistency.
summary: Recent self-supervised advances in medical computer vision exploit global and local anatomical self-similarity for pretraining prior to downstream tasks such as segmentation. However, current methods assume i.i.d. image acquisition, which is invalid in clinical study designs where follow-up longitudinal scans track subject-specific temporal changes. Further, existing self-supervised methods for medically-relevant image-to-image architectures exploit only spatial or temporal self-similarity and only do so via a loss applied at a single image-scale, with naive multi-scale spatiotemporal extensions collapsing to degenerate solutions. To these ends, this paper makes two contributions: (1) It presents a local and multi-scale spatiotemporal representation learning method for image-to-image architectures trained on longitudinal images. It exploits the spatiotemporal self-similarity of learned multi-scale intra-subject features for pretraining and develops several feature-wise regularizations that avoid collapsed identity representations; (2) During finetuning, it proposes a surprisingly simple self-supervised segmentation consistency regularization to exploit intra-subject correlation. Benchmarked in the one-shot segmentation setting, the proposed framework outperforms both well-tuned randomly-initialized baselines and current self-supervised techniques designed for both i.i.d. and longitudinal datasets. These improvements are demonstrated across both longitudinal neurodegenerative adult MRI and developing infant brain MRI and yield both higher performance and longitudinal consistency.
abstract_zh: 医学计算机视觉领域最近的自我监督进展利用全局和局部解剖学自相似性在分割等下游任务之前进行预训练。然而，当前的方法假设独立同分布。图像采集，这在后续纵向扫描跟踪受试者特定时间变化的临床研究设计中是无效的。此外，现有的用于医学相关图像到图像架构的自监督方法仅利用空间或时间自相似性，并且仅通过在单个图像尺度上应用损失来实现，而朴素的多尺度时空扩展崩溃为退化解决方案。为此，本文做出了两个贡献：（1）提出了一种在纵向图像上训练的图像到图像架构的局部多尺度时空表示学习方法。它利用学习的多尺度主体内特征的时空自相似性进行预训练，并开发了几种特征正则化，以避免折叠的身份表示； （2）在微调过程中，它提出了一种令人惊讶的简单的自监督分割一致性正则化来利用主题内相关性。以一次性分割设置为基准，所提出的框架优于经过良好调整的随机初始化基线和当前为 i.i.d. 设计的自监督技术。和纵向数据集。这些改进在纵向神经退行性成人 MRI 和发育中婴儿脑 MRI 中得到了证明，并产生了更高的性能和纵向一致性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种局部多尺度时空表示学习方法，用于纵向一致性的神经影像分析，以提升医学图像分割性能。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督方法假设独立同分布数据，无法处理临床纵向扫描中的个体时间变化，且单一尺度方法导致退化解，需改进。
AI.method: 提出多尺度时空表示学习方法，结合特征级正则化避免身份崩溃，并在微调阶段引入分割一致性正则化利用个体内部相关性。
AI.result: 在单次分割任务中优于随机初始化基线和现有自监督方法，适用于成人及婴儿脑MRI，提升性能与纵向一致性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决纵向神经影像分析中的挑战，提升分割性能和纵向一致性。

authors_text: Kihyun Lee,Jinsub Park,Soyeon Choi,Yangjin Lee,Sol Lee,Joowon Jung,Jong-Young Lee,Farman Ullah,Zeeshan Tahir,Yong Soo Kim,Gwan-Hyoung Lee,Kwanpyo Kim
title: STEM image analysis based on deep learning: identification of vacancy defects and polymorphs of ${MoS_2}$
title_zh: 基于深度学习的STEM图像分析：${MoS_2}$空位缺陷和多晶型的识别
abstract: Scanning transmission electron microscopy (STEM) is an indispensable tool for atomic-resolution structural analysis for a wide range of materials. The conventional analysis of STEM images is an extensive hands-on process, which limits efficient handling of high-throughput data. Here we apply a fully convolutional network (FCN) for identification of important structural features of two-dimensional crystals. ResUNet, a type of FCN, is utilized in identifying sulfur vacancies and polymorph types of ${MoS_2}$ from atomic resolution STEM images. Efficient models are achieved based on training with simulated images in the presence of different levels of noise, aberrations, and carbon contamination. The accuracy of the FCN models toward extensive experimental STEM images is comparable to that of careful hands-on analysis. Our work provides a guideline on best practices to train a deep learning model for STEM image analysis and demonstrates FCN's application for efficient processing of a large volume of STEM data.
summary: Scanning transmission electron microscopy (STEM) is an indispensable tool for atomic-resolution structural analysis for a wide range of materials. The conventional analysis of STEM images is an extensive hands-on process, which limits efficient handling of high-throughput data. Here we apply a fully convolutional network (FCN) for identification of important structural features of two-dimensional crystals. ResUNet, a type of FCN, is utilized in identifying sulfur vacancies and polymorph types of ${MoS_2}$ from atomic resolution STEM images. Efficient models are achieved based on training with simulated images in the presence of different levels of noise, aberrations, and carbon contamination. The accuracy of the FCN models toward extensive experimental STEM images is comparable to that of careful hands-on analysis. Our work provides a guideline on best practices to train a deep learning model for STEM image analysis and demonstrates FCN's application for efficient processing of a large volume of STEM data.
abstract_zh: 扫描透射电子显微镜 (STEM) 是对多种材料进行原子分辨率结构分析不可或缺的工具。 STEM 图像的传统分析是一个需要大量实践的过程，这限制了高通量数据的有效处理。在这里，我们应用全卷积网络（FCN）来识别二维晶体的重要结构特征。 ResUNet 是一种 FCN，用于从原子分辨率 STEM 图像中识别 ${MoS_2}$ 的硫空位和多晶型类型。通过在存在不同水平的噪声、像差和碳污染的情况下使用模拟图像进行训练，可以实现高效的模型。 FCN 模型对大量实验 STEM 图像的准确性可与仔细的实际分析相媲美。我们的工作提供了训练 STEM 图像分析深度学习模型的最佳实践指南，并演示了 FCN 在高效处理大量 STEM 数据方面的应用。

AI.tldr: 本文基于深度学习方法，利用全卷积网络（ResUNet）对二维材料MoS₂的扫描透射电镜（STEM）图像进行分析，识别硫空位缺陷及多型结构。
AI.motivation: 传统STEM图像分析依赖人工操作，难以高效处理高通量数据，亟需自动化方法提升分析效率和准确性。
AI.method: 采用ResUNet全卷积网络模型，通过模拟包含噪声、像差和碳污染的STEM图像进行训练，并验证模型在实际实验图像中的性能。
AI.result: 训练后的FCN模型在实验STEM图像上的识别准确率与人工分析结果相当，证明了深度学习方法在处理大规模STEM数据中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文为STEM图像分析的深度学习模型训练提供了最佳实践指南，展示了FCN在高效处理大规模材料表征数据中的应用潜力。

search_text: STEM image analysis based on deep learning: identification of vacancy defects and polymorphs of ${MoS_2}$ 基于深度学习的STEM图像分析：${MoS_2}$空位缺陷和多晶型的识别 Scanning transmission electron microscopy (STEM) is an indispensable tool for atomic-resolution structural analysis for a wide range of materials. The conventional analysis of STEM images is an extensive hands-on process, which limits efficient handling of high-throughput data. Here we apply a fully convolutional network (FCN) for identification of important structural features of two-dimensional crystals. ResUNet, a type of FCN, is utilized in identifying sulfur vacancies and polymorph types of ${MoS_2}$ from atomic resolution STEM images. Efficient models are achieved based on training with simulated images in the presence of different levels of noise, aberrations, and carbon contamination. The accuracy of the FCN models toward extensive experimental STEM images is comparable to that of careful hands-on analysis. Our work provides a guideline on best practices to train a deep learning model for STEM image analysis and demonstrates FCN's application for efficient processing of a large volume of STEM data. 扫描透射电子显微镜 (STEM) 是对多种材料进行原子分辨率结构分析不可或缺的工具。 STEM 图像的传统分析是一个需要大量实践的过程，这限制了高通量数据的有效处理。在这里，我们应用全卷积网络（FCN）来识别二维晶体的重要结构特征。 ResUNet 是一种 FCN，用于从原子分辨率 STEM 图像中识别 ${MoS_2}$ 的硫空位和多晶型类型。通过在存在不同水平的噪声、像差和碳污染的情况下使用模拟图像进行训练，可以实现高效的模型。 FCN 模型对大量实验 STEM 图像的准确性可与仔细的实际分析相媲美。我们的工作提供了训练 STEM 图像分析深度学习模型的最佳实践指南，并演示了 FCN 在高效处理大量 STEM 数据方面的应用。 本文基于深度学习方法，利用全卷积网络（ResUNet）对二维材料MoS₂的扫描透射电镜（STEM）图像进行分析，识别硫空位缺陷及多型结构。 Kihyun Lee,Jinsub Park,Soyeon Choi,Yangjin Lee,Sol Lee,Joowon Jung,Jong-Young Lee,Farman Ullah,Zeeshan Tahir,Yong Soo Kim,Gwan-Hyoung Lee,Kwanpyo Kim cond-mat.mes-hall,cond-mat.mtrl-sci,cs.CV

authors_text: Andrew Perrett,Charlie Barnes,Mark Schofield,Lan Qie,Petra Bosilj,James M. Brown
title: DeepVerge: Classification of Roadside Verge Biodiversity and Conservation Potential
title_zh: DeepVerge：路边生物多样性和保护潜力的分类
abstract: Open space grassland is being increasingly farmed or built upon, leading to a ramping up of conservation efforts targeting roadside verges. Approximately half of all UK grassland species can be found along the country's 500,000 km of roads, with some 91 species either threatened or near threatened. Careful management of these "wildlife corridors" is therefore essential to preventing species extinction and maintaining biodiversity in grassland habitats. Wildlife trusts have often enlisted the support of volunteers to survey roadside verges and identify new "Local Wildlife Sites" as areas of high conservation potential. Using volunteer survey data from 3,900 km of roadside verges alongside publicly available street-view imagery, we present DeepVerge; a deep learning-based method that can automatically survey sections of roadside verges by detecting the presence of positive indicator species. Using images and ground truth survey data from the rural county of Lincolnshire, DeepVerge achieved a mean accuracy of 88%. Such a method may be used by local authorities to identify new local wildlife sites, and aid management and environmental planning in line with legal and government policy obligations, saving thousands of hours of manual labour.
summary: Open space grassland is being increasingly farmed or built upon, leading to a ramping up of conservation efforts targeting roadside verges. Approximately half of all UK grassland species can be found along the country's 500,000 km of roads, with some 91 species either threatened or near threatened. Careful management of these "wildlife corridors" is therefore essential to preventing species extinction and maintaining biodiversity in grassland habitats. Wildlife trusts have often enlisted the support of volunteers to survey roadside verges and identify new "Local Wildlife Sites" as areas of high conservation potential. Using volunteer survey data from 3,900 km of roadside verges alongside publicly available street-view imagery, we present DeepVerge; a deep learning-based method that can automatically survey sections of roadside verges by detecting the presence of positive indicator species. Using images and ground truth survey data from the rural county of Lincolnshire, DeepVerge achieved a mean accuracy of 88%. Such a method may be used by local authorities to identify new local wildlife sites, and aid management and environmental planning in line with legal and government policy obligations, saving thousands of hours of manual labour.
abstract_zh: 越来越多的开放草地被耕种或建造，导致针对路边的保护工作不断加强。英国约一半的草原物种分布在该国 500,000 公里的道路沿线，其中约 91 种物种受到威胁或接近威胁。因此，认真管理这些“野生动物走廊”对于防止物种灭绝和维持草原栖息地的生物多样性至关重要。野生动物信托基金经常争取志愿者的支持来调查路边并确定新的“当地野生动物遗址”作为具有高保护潜力的区域。使用来自 3,900 公里路边的志愿者调查数据以及公开的街景图像，我们提出了 DeepVerge；一种基于深度学习的方法，可以通过检测阳性指示物种的存在来自动调查路边的部分。利用来自林肯郡乡村的图像和地面实况调查数据，DeepVerge 的平均准确度达到 88%。地方当局可以使用这种方法来确定新的当地野生动物栖息地，并根据法律和政府政策义务协助管理和环境规划，从而节省数千小时的体力劳动。

AI.tldr: 开发基于深度学习的DeepVerge方法，通过自动检测路边植被中的指示物种，辅助评估生物多样性及保护潜力。
AI.motivation: 由于草地生态系统退化，路边绿化带成为关键生物多样性栖息地，但传统人工调查效率低且耗时，亟需自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 整合志愿者实地调查数据与街景图像，训练深度学习模型检测指示物种，结合地理信息实现自动化评估。
AI.result: 在林肯郡3900公里道路数据集上达到88%的平均准确率，可有效识别濒危物种分布区域。
AI.conclusion: DeepVerge为地方政府提供高效工具，助力符合法规的生态保护规划，显著降低人工调查工作量。

authors_text: Qi Lin,Wensheng Gan,Yongdong Wu,Jiahui Chen,Chien-Ming Chen
title: Smart System: Joint Utility and Frequency for Pattern Classification
title_zh: 智能系统：模式分类的联合效用和频率
comment: ACM Transactions on Management Information Systems. 10 figures, 7 tables
comments: ACM Transactions on Management Information Systems. 10 figures, 7 tables
abstract: Nowadays, the environments of smart systems for Industry 4.0 and Internet of Things (IoT) are experiencing fast industrial upgrading. Big data technologies such as design making, event detection, and classification are developed to help manufacturing organizations to achieve smart systems. By applying data analysis, the potential values of rich data can be maximized and thus help manufacturing organizations to finish another round of upgrading. In this paper, we propose two new algorithms with respect to big data analysis, namely UFC$_{gen}$ and UFC$_{fast}$. Both algorithms are designed to collect three types of patterns to help people determine the market positions for different product combinations. We compare these algorithms on various types of datasets, both real and synthetic. The experimental results show that both algorithms can successfully achieve pattern classification by utilizing three different types of interesting patterns from all candidate patterns based on user-specified thresholds of utility and frequency. Furthermore, the list-based UFC$_{fast}$ algorithm outperforms the level-wise-based UFC$_{gen}$ algorithm in terms of both execution time and memory consumption.
summary: Nowadays, the environments of smart systems for Industry 4.0 and Internet of Things (IoT) are experiencing fast industrial upgrading. Big data technologies such as design making, event detection, and classification are developed to help manufacturing organizations to achieve smart systems. By applying data analysis, the potential values of rich data can be maximized and thus help manufacturing organizations to finish another round of upgrading. In this paper, we propose two new algorithms with respect to big data analysis, namely UFC$_{gen}$ and UFC$_{fast}$. Both algorithms are designed to collect three types of patterns to help people determine the market positions for different product combinations. We compare these algorithms on various types of datasets, both real and synthetic. The experimental results show that both algorithms can successfully achieve pattern classification by utilizing three different types of interesting patterns from all candidate patterns based on user-specified thresholds of utility and frequency. Furthermore, the list-based UFC$_{fast}$ algorithm outperforms the level-wise-based UFC$_{gen}$ algorithm in terms of both execution time and memory consumption.
abstract_zh: 如今，工业4.0和物联网智能系统环境正在经历快速的产业升级。开发设计、事件检测、分类等大数据技术来帮助制造组织实现智能系统。通过数据分析，可以最大限度地发挥丰富数据的潜在价值，帮助制造企业完成新一轮升级。在本文中，我们提出了两种关于大数据分析的新算法，即UFC$_{gen}$和UFC$_{fast}$。这两种算法都旨在收集三种类型的模式，以帮助人们确定不同产品组合的市场地位。我们在各种类型的数据集（真实数据集和合成数据集）上比较这些算法。实验结果表明，两种算法都可以根据用户指定的效用阈值和频率，利用所有候选模式中的三种不同类型的有趣模式，成功地实现模式分类。此外，基于列表的 UFC$_{fast}$ 算法在执行时间和内存消耗方面都优于基于 level-wise 的 UFC$_{gen}$ 算法。

AI.tldr: 提出两种结合效用与频率的大数据分析算法（UFC_gen和UFC_fast），用于市场定位中的模式分类。
AI.motivation: 针对工业4.0和物联网环境中制造企业对高效数据分析的需求，传统方法难以同时满足效用与频率的双重要求，需优化模式分类算法。
AI.method: 设计两种算法：基于层级遍历的UFC_gen和基于列表结构的UFC_fast，通过用户设定的效用与频率阈值筛选三种模式，实现分类。
AI.result: 实验表明，两种算法均能有效分类模式，UFC_fast在执行时间和内存消耗上优于UFC_gen。
AI.conclusion: 提出的算法有效提升模式分类效率，为制造企业智能系统优化提供支持，UFC_fast在性能上更优。

tldr: 提出两种结合效用与频率的大数据分析算法（UFC_gen和UFC_fast），用于市场定位中的模式分类。
motivation: 针对工业4.0和物联网环境中制造企业对高效数据分析的需求，传统方法难以同时满足效用与频率的双重要求，需优化模式分类算法。
method: 设计两种算法：基于层级遍历的UFC_gen和基于列表结构的UFC_fast，通过用户设定的效用与频率阈值筛选三种模式，实现分类。
result: 实验表明，两种算法均能有效分类模式，UFC_fast在执行时间和内存消耗上优于UFC_gen。
conclusion: 提出的算法有效提升模式分类效率，为制造企业智能系统优化提供支持，UFC_fast在性能上更优。
search_text: Smart System: Joint Utility and Frequency for Pattern Classification 智能系统：模式分类的联合效用和频率 Nowadays, the environments of smart systems for Industry 4.0 and Internet of Things (IoT) are experiencing fast industrial upgrading. Big data technologies such as design making, event detection, and classification are developed to help manufacturing organizations to achieve smart systems. By applying data analysis, the potential values of rich data can be maximized and thus help manufacturing organizations to finish another round of upgrading. In this paper, we propose two new algorithms with respect to big data analysis, namely UFC$_{gen}$ and UFC$_{fast}$. Both algorithms are designed to collect three types of patterns to help people determine the market positions for different product combinations. We compare these algorithms on various types of datasets, both real and synthetic. The experimental results show that both algorithms can successfully achieve pattern classification by utilizing three different types of interesting patterns from all candidate patterns based on user-specified thresholds of utility and frequency. Furthermore, the list-based UFC$_{fast}$ algorithm outperforms the level-wise-based UFC$_{gen}$ algorithm in terms of both execution time and memory consumption. 如今，工业4.0和物联网智能系统环境正在经历快速的产业升级。开发设计、事件检测、分类等大数据技术来帮助制造组织实现智能系统。通过数据分析，可以最大限度地发挥丰富数据的潜在价值，帮助制造企业完成新一轮升级。在本文中，我们提出了两种关于大数据分析的新算法，即UFC$_{gen}$和UFC$_{fast}$。这两种算法都旨在收集三种类型的模式，以帮助人们确定不同产品组合的市场地位。我们在各种类型的数据集（真实数据集和合成数据集）上比较这些算法。实验结果表明，两种算法都可以根据用户指定的效用阈值和频率，利用所有候选模式中的三种不同类型的有趣模式，成功地实现模式分类。此外，基于列表的 UFC$_{fast}$ 算法在执行时间和内存消耗方面都优于基于 level-wise 的 UFC$_{gen}$ 算法。 提出两种结合效用与频率的大数据分析算法（UFC_gen和UFC_fast），用于市场定位中的模式分类。 Qi Lin,Wensheng Gan,Yongdong Wu,Jiahui Chen,Chien-Ming Chen cs.AI,cs.DB
